papers.title: Syn4D: A Multiview Synthetic 4D Dataset
papers.abstract: Dense 3D reconstruction and tracking of dynamic scenes from monocular video remains an important open challenge in computer vision. Progress in this area has been constrained by the scarcity of high-quality datasets with dense, complete, and accurate geometric annotations. To address this limitation, we introduce Syn4D, a multiview synthetic dataset of dynamic scenes that includes ground-truth camera motion, depth maps, dense tracking, and parametric human pose annotations. A key feature of Syn4D is the ability to unproject any pixel into 3D to any time and to any camera. We conduct extensive evaluations across multiple downstream tasks to demonstrate the utility and effectiveness of the proposed dataset, including 4D scene reconstruction, 3D point tracking, geometry-aware camera retargeting, and human pose estimation. The experimental results highlight Syn4D's potential to facilitate research in dynamic scene understanding and spatiotemporal modeling.

analysis.tldr: Syn4D 是一个多视角合成动态场景数据集，提供密集、完整的几何标注，用于推动动态场景 3D 重建与跟踪研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 从单目视频进行动态场景的密集 3D 重建与跟踪是计算机视觉中的开放挑战，但高质量数据集（具有密集、完整、准确的几何标注）稀缺，限制了该领域进展。
analysis.problem: 现有动态场景数据集缺乏密集、完整且准确的几何标注，难以支撑 4D 重建、3D 点跟踪等下游任务的研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建一个多视角合成动态场景数据集 Syn4D，包含真实相机运动、深度图、密集跟踪和参数化人体姿态标注，支持任意像素到任意时间、任意相机的 3D 反投影。
contributions: 提出了 Syn4D，一个多视角合成动态场景数据集，提供密集、完整、准确的几何标注。
在多个下游任务（4D 场景重建、3D 点跟踪、几何感知相机重定向、人体姿态估计）上验证了数据集的实用性和有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 4D 场景重建、3D 点跟踪、几何感知相机重定向和人体姿态估计等下游任务上进行了广泛评估，结果显示了 Syn4D 的潜力。
limitations: 数据集为合成数据，与真实场景可能存在域差异。
可能仅覆盖有限的动态场景类型和运动模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Syn4D 是一个多视角合成动态场景数据集，提供密集、完整的几何标注，用于推动动态场景 3D 重建与跟踪研究。

papers.title: Taming Outlier Tokens in Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: We study outlier tokens in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) for image generation. Prior work has shown that Vision Transformers (ViTs) can produce a small number of high-norm tokens that attract disproportionate attention while carrying limited local information, but their role in generative models remains underexplored. We show that this phenomenon appears in both the encoder and denoiser of modern Representation Autoencoder (RAE)-DiT pipelines: pretrained ViT encoders can produce outlier representations, and DiTs themselves can develop internal outlier tokens, especially in intermediate layers. Moreover, simply masking high-norm tokens does not improve performance, indicating that the problem is not only caused by a few extreme values, but is more closely related to corrupted local patch semantics. To address this issue, we introduce Dual-Stage Registers (DSR), a register-based intervention for both components: trained registers when available, recursive test-time registers otherwise, and diffusion registers for the denoiser. Across ImageNet and large-scale text-to-image generation, these interventions consistently reduce outlier artifacts and improve generation quality. Our results highlight outlier-token control as an important ingredient in building stronger DiTs.

analysis.tldr: 提出双阶段寄存器（DSR）方法，抑制扩散Transformer中的异常token以提升图像生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散Transformer（DiT）在图像生成中可能产生少量高范数异常token，这些token吸引过多注意力但携带有限局部信息，影响生成质量。此前研究仅关注ViT中的异常token，其在生成模型中的作用未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: DiT中异常token导致生成质量下降，且简单掩码无效，问题与局部块语义损坏相关。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 异常token出现在RAE-DiT管道的编码器和去噪器中：预训练ViT编码器产生异常表示，DiT中间层出现内部异常token。简单掩码高范数token不能改善性能，表明问题不仅是极端值，更与局部语义损坏有关。
analysis.method: 提出双阶段寄存器（DSR），包括：对编码器使用训练寄存器（可用时）或递归测试时寄存器，对去噪器使用扩散寄存器。
contributions: 首次系统研究DiT中的异常token现象，并揭示其与局部语义损坏的关联。
提出DSR方法，在ImageNet和大规模文本到图像生成中一致减少异常伪影并提升生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet和大规模文本到图像生成任务上验证，DSR减少异常伪影并提升生成质量。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: DSR可能增加计算开销（寄存器引入额外前向传播）。
方法对寄存器设计敏感，需要针对不同模型调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双阶段寄存器（DSR）方法，抑制扩散Transformer中的异常token以提升图像生成质量。

papers.title: D-OPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Continuously Tuning Step-Distilled Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: The landscape of high-performance image generation models is currently shifting from the inefficient multi-step ones to the efficient few-step counterparts (e.g, Z-Image-Turbo and FLUX.2-klein). However, these models present significant challenges for directly continuous supervised fine-tuning. For example, applying the commonly used fine-tuning technique would compromises their inherent few-step inference capability. To address this, we propose D-OPSD, a novel training paradigm for step-distilled diffusion models that enables on-policy learning during supervised fine-tuning. We first find that the modern diffusion model where the LLM/VLM serves as the encoder can inherit its encoder's in-context capabilities. This enables us to make the training as an on-policy self-distillation process. Specifically, during training, we make the model acts as both the teacher and the student with different contexts, where the student is conditioned only on the text feature, while the teacher is conditioned on the multimodal feature of both the text prompt and the target image. Training minimizes the two predicted distributions over the student's own roll-outs. By optimized on the model's own trajectory and under it's own supervision, D-OPSD enables the model to learn new concept, style, etc. without sacrificing the original few-step capacity.

analysis.tldr: 提出D-OPSD，一种用于步蒸馏扩散模型的在线自蒸馏微调范式，在不牺牲少步推理能力的前提下实现连续监督微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 高性能图像生成模型正从多步模型转向少步模型，但现有微调技术会破坏其固有的少步推理能力，亟需一种能保持少步能力的微调方法。
analysis.problem: 如何对步蒸馏扩散模型进行连续监督微调，同时保持其少步推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现现代扩散模型（以LLM/VLM为编码器）能继承编码器的上下文学习能力，这为在线自蒸馏提供了基础。
analysis.method: 将训练构建为在线自蒸馏过程：模型同时作为教师和学生，教师以文本提示和目标图像的多模态特征为条件，学生仅以文本特征为条件，在学生自身轨迹上最小化两个预测分布。
contributions: 提出D-OPSD，一种针对步蒸馏扩散模型的在线自蒸馏训练范式，支持连续监督微调。
发现现代扩散模型可继承编码器的上下文能力，并利用此特性实现教师-学生自蒸馏。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM/VLM编码器的上下文能力，对非此类编码器的模型不适用。
在线自蒸馏的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出D-OPSD，一种用于步蒸馏扩散模型的在线自蒸馏微调范式，在不牺牲少步推理能力的前提下实现连续监督微调。

papers.title: LoViF 2026 The First Challenge on Holistic Quality Assessment for 4D World Model (PhyScore)
papers.abstract: This paper reports on the LoViF 2026 PhyScore challenge, a competition on holistic quality assessment of world-model-generated videos across both 2D and 4D generation settings. The challenge is motivated by a central gap in current evaluation practice: perceptual quality alone is insufficient to judge whether generated dynamics are physically plausible, temporally coherent, and consistent with input conditions. Participants are required to build a metric that jointly predicts four dimensions, i.e., Video Quality, Physical Realism, Condition-Video Alignment, and Temporal Consistency. Depart from that, participants also need to localize physical anomaly timestamps for fine-grained diagnosis. The benchmark dataset contains 1,554 videos generated by seven representative world generative models, organized into three tracks (text-2D, image-to-4D, and video-to-4D) and spanning 26 categories. These categories explicitly cover physics-relevant scenarios, including dynamics, optics, and thermodynamics, together with diverse real-world and creative content. To ensure label reliability, scores and anomaly timestamps are produced through trained human annotation with an additional automated quality-control pass. Evaluation is based on both score prediction and anomaly localization, with a composite protocol that combines TimeStamp_IOU and SRCC/PLCC. This report summarizes the challenge design and provides method-level insights from submitted solutions.

analysis.tldr: LoViF 2026 PhyScore挑战赛：面向4D世界模型生成视频的全面质量评估，涵盖视频质量、物理真实性、条件对齐和时间一致性四个维度。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前评估实践存在核心空白：仅靠感知质量不足以判断生成动态的物理合理性、时间连贯性和条件一致性，亟需一个全面的评估基准和方法。
analysis.problem: 构建一个能够联合预测视频质量、物理真实性、条件-视频对齐和时间一致性四个维度，并定位物理异常时间戳的评估指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，构建包含1,554个视频的基准数据集，由七种代表性世界生成模型生成，涵盖三个赛道（文本到2D、图像到4D、视频到4D）和26个类别，包括物理相关场景。通过训练人工标注和自动质量控制生成分数和异常时间戳。评估结合时间戳IOU和SRCC/PLCC的复合协议。
contributions: 提出了一个面向4D世界模型生成视频的全面质量评估挑战，涵盖四个关键维度。
构建了一个包含1,554个视频、覆盖多种生成模型和物理场景的基准数据集，并提供了可靠的人工标注。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有物理场景。
人工标注可能存在主观偏差，尽管有质量控制。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LoViF 2026 PhyScore挑战赛：面向4D世界模型生成视频的全面质量评估，涵盖视频质量、物理真实性、条件对齐和时间一致性四个维度。

papers.title: OpenSearch-VL: An Open Recipe for Frontier Multimodal Search Agents
papers.abstract: Deep search has become a crucial capability for frontier multimodal agents, enabling models to solve complex questions through active search, evidence verification, and multi-step reasoning. Despite rapid progress, top-tier multimodal search agents remain difficult to reproduce, largely due to the absence of open high-quality training data, transparent trajectory synthesis pipelines, or detailed training recipes. To this end, we introduce OpenSearch-VL, a fully open-source recipe for training frontier multimodal deep search agents with agentic reinforcement learning. First, we curated a dedicated pipeline to construct high-quality training data through Wikipedia path sampling, fuzzy entity rewriting, and source-anchor visual grounding, which jointly reduce shortcuts and one-step retrieval collapse. Based on this pipeline, we curate two training datasets, SearchVL-SFT-36k for SFT and SearchVL-RL-8k for RL. Besides, we design a diverse tool environment that unifies text search, image search, OCR, cropping, sharpening, super-resolution, and perspective correction, enabling agents to combine active perception with external knowledge acquisition. Finally, we propose a multi-turn fatal-aware GRPO training algorithm that handles cascading tool failures by masking post-failure tokens while preserving useful pre-failure reasoning through one-sided advantage clamping. Built on this recipe, OpenSearch-VL delivers substantial performance gains, with over 10-point average improvements across seven benchmarks, and achieves results comparable to proprietary commercial models on several tasks. We will release all data, code, and models to support open research on multimodal deep search agents.

analysis.tldr: OpenSearch-VL 提出一套完全开源的多模态深度搜索智能体训练配方，通过数据构建、工具环境和致命感知强化学习算法，在七个基准上平均提升超10个点。
analysis.research_motivation: 顶级多模态搜索智能体难以复现，缺乏公开的高质量训练数据、透明的轨迹合成流程和详细的训练配方。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个完全开源、可复现的多模态深度搜索智能体训练方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法存在捷径和一步检索崩溃问题，且工具链中错误会级联传播。
analysis.method: 提出全开源配方，包括：1) 通过维基百科路径采样、模糊实体重写和源锚点视觉定位构建高质量训练数据；2) 设计统一工具环境（文本搜索、图像搜索、OCR等）；3) 提出多轮致命感知GRPO训练算法，通过掩码后错误token和单边优势钳位处理级联工具失败。
contributions: 提出完全开源的多模态深度搜索智能体训练配方OpenSearch-VL。
设计数据构建管道和两个训练数据集（SearchVL-SFT-36k和SearchVL-RL-8k）。
提出多轮致命感知GRPO算法，有效处理级联工具失败。
在七个基准上平均提升超10个点，达到与商业模型相当的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在七个基准上进行评估，平均提升超10个点，部分任务与商业模型相当。
limitations: 数据构建依赖维基百科，可能限制领域泛化。
工具环境可能未覆盖所有实际场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OpenSearch-VL 提出一套完全开源的多模态深度搜索智能体训练配方，通过数据构建、工具环境和致命感知强化学习算法，在七个基准上平均提升超10个点。

papers.title: Geometry-Aware State Space Model: A New Paradigm for Whole-Slide Image Representation
papers.abstract: Accurate analysis of histopathological images is critical for disease diagnosis and treatment planning. Whole-slide images (WSIs), which digitize tissue specimens at gigapixel resolution, are fundamental to this process but require aggregating thousands of patches for slide-level predictions. Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) tackles this challenge with a two-stage paradigm, decoupling tile-level embedding and slide-level prediction. However, most existing methods implicitly embed patch representations in homogeneous Euclidean spaces, overlooking the hierarchical organization and regional heterogeneity of pathological tissues. This limits current models' ability to capture global tissue architecture and fine-grained cellular morphology. To address this limitation, we introduce a hybrid hyperbolic-Euclidean representation that embeds WSI features in dual geometric spaces, enabling complementary modeling of hierarchical tissue structures and local morphological details. Building on this formulation, we develop BatMIL, a WSI classification framework that leverages both geometric spaces. To model long-range dependencies among thousands of patches, we employ a structured state space sequence model (S4) backbone that encodes patch sequences with linear computational complexity. Furthermore, to account for regional heterogeneity, we introduce a chunk-level mixture-of-experts (MoE) module that groups patches into regions and dynamically routes them to specialized subnetworks, improving representational capacity while reducing redundant computation. Extensive experiments on seven WSI datasets spanning six cancer types demonstrate that BatMIL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art MIL approaches in slide-level classification tasks. These results indicate that geometry-aware representation learning offers a promising direction for next-generation computational pathology.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合双曲-欧几里得空间表示与状态空间模型结合的WSI分类框架BatMIL，在7个数据集上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有WSI分析方法大多在欧几里得空间中隐式嵌入图像块，忽略了病理组织的层次结构和区域异质性，限制了模型对全局组织结构和细粒度细胞形态的捕捉能力。
analysis.problem: 如何有效建模全切片图像中病理组织的层次结构、区域异质性以及数千个图像块之间的长程依赖关系，以提升切片级分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BatMIL框架，采用混合双曲-欧几里得空间表示嵌入WSI特征，使用结构化状态空间序列模型（S4）编码图像块序列以线性复杂度建模长程依赖，并引入块级混合专家（MoE）模块将图像块分组为区域并动态路由到专用子网络。
contributions: 提出混合双曲-欧几里得空间表示，用于互补建模层次化组织结构和局部形态细节。
开发BatMIL框架，结合S4序列模型和块级MoE模块，实现高效且区域自适应的WSI分类。
analysis.experiments: 在涵盖6种癌症类型的7个WSI数据集上进行实验，BatMIL在切片级分类任务中一致优于现有最先进的MIL方法。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，如双曲空间曲率、MoE专家数量等。
计算资源需求可能较高，尽管S4和MoE旨在降低复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合双曲-欧几里得空间表示与状态空间模型结合的WSI分类框架BatMIL，在7个数据集上超越SOTA。

papers.title: PhysForge: Generating Physics-Grounded 3D Assets for Interactive Virtual World
papers.abstract: Synthesizing physics-grounded 3D assets is a critical bottleneck for interactive virtual worlds and embodied AI. Existing methods predominantly focus on static geometry, overlooking the functional properties essential for interaction. We propose that interactive asset generation must be rooted in functional logic and hierarchical physics. To bridge this gap, we introduce PhysForge, a decoupled two-stage framework supported by PhysDB, a large-scale dataset of 150,000 assets with four-tier physical annotations. First, a VLM acts as a "physical architect" to plan a "Hierarchical Physical Blueprint" defining material, functional, and kinematic constraints. Second, a physics-grounded diffusion model realizes this blueprint by synthesizing high-fidelity geometry alongside precise kinematic parameters via a novel KineVoxel Injection (KVI) mechanism. Experiments demonstrate that PhysForge produces functionally plausible, simulation-ready assets, providing a robust data engine for interactive 3D content and embodied agents.

analysis.tldr: PhysForge通过解耦两阶段框架和物理数据集PhysDB，生成具备物理属性的3D资产，支持交互式虚拟世界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D资产生成方法主要关注静态几何，忽略了交互所需的功能属性，成为虚拟世界和具身智能的瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有物理属性（如材料、功能、运动学约束）的3D资产，使其可直接用于交互式仿真。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 解耦两阶段框架：1) VLM作为物理架构师规划分层物理蓝图；2) 物理引导的扩散模型通过KineVoxel Injection机制生成高保真几何和精确运动学参数。
contributions: 提出PhysForge，一个解耦的两阶段框架，用于生成物理基础的3D资产。
构建PhysDB，包含15万资产的四级物理标注数据集。
设计KineVoxel Injection机制，实现几何与运动学参数的联合生成。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明PhysForge生成功能合理、可直接用于仿真的资产，为交互式3D内容和具身智能提供数据引擎。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM的规划能力，复杂场景下蓝图质量受限。
数据集PhysDB的标注覆盖范围可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhysForge通过解耦两阶段框架和物理数据集PhysDB，生成具备物理属性的3D资产，支持交互式虚拟世界。

papers.title: Wasserstein-Aligned Localisation for VLM-Based Distributional OOD Detection in Medical Imaging
papers.abstract: Zero-shot anomaly localisation via vision-language models (VLMs) offers a compelling approach for rare pathology detection, yet its performance is fundamentally limited by the absence of healthy anatomical context. We reformulate zero-shot localisation as a comparative inference problem in which anomalies are identified through structured comparison against reference distributions of normal anatomy. We introduce WALDO, a training-free framework grounded in optimal transport theory that enables comparative reasoning through: (i) entropy-weighted Sliced Wasserstein distances for anatomically-aware reference selection from DINOv2 patch distributions, (ii) Goldilocks zone sampling exploiting the non-monotonic relationship between reference similarity and localisation accuracy, and (iii) self-consistency aggregation via weighted non-maximum suppression. We theoretically analyse the Goldilocks effect through distributional divergence, and show that references with moderate similarity minimize a bias-variance trade-off in comparative visual reasoning. On the NOVA brain MRI benchmark, WALDO with Qwen2.5-VL-72B achieves $43.5_{\pm1.6}\%$ mAP@30 (95\% CI: [40.4, 46.7]), representing a 19\% relative improvement over zero-shot baselines. Cross-model evaluation shows consistent gains: GPT-4o achieves $32.0_{\pm6.5}\%$ and Qwen3-VL-32B achieves $32.0_{\pm6.6}\%$ mAP@30. Paired McNemar tests confirm statistical significance ($p<0.01$). Source code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出WALDO框架，利用最优传输理论实现VLM在医学图像中的分布外异常定位，无需训练即可提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本异常定位在医学影像中具有重要应用价值，但现有VLM方法因缺乏健康解剖背景而性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有训练数据的情况下，利用VLM进行医学图像中罕见病理的分布外异常定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现参考相似度与定位精度之间存在非单调关系，即中等相似度的参考（Goldilocks zone）能最小化比较视觉推理中的偏差-方差权衡。
analysis.method: 基于最优传输理论的训练无关框架WALDO，包括熵加权切片Wasserstein距离进行解剖感知参考选择、Goldilocks区域采样、以及通过加权非极大值抑制进行自一致性聚合。
contributions: 提出WALDO框架，将零样本异常定位重新表述为基于参考正常解剖分布的比较推理问题。
理论分析并利用Goldilocks效应，证明中等相似度参考能优化偏差-方差权衡。
在NOVA脑MRI基准上取得显著提升，跨模型验证一致有效。
analysis.experiments: 在NOVA脑MRI基准上，WALDO with Qwen2.5-VL-72B达到43.5% mAP@30，相比零样本基线提升19%；GPT-4o和Qwen3-VL-32B均达32.0% mAP@30；McNemar检验p<0.01。
limitations: 仅针对脑MRI模态验证，泛化到其他医学影像模态需进一步实验。
依赖预训练VLM和DINOv2特征，可能受限于基础模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WALDO框架，利用最优传输理论实现VLM在医学图像中的分布外异常定位，无需训练即可提升性能。

papers.title: Aes3D: Aesthetic Assessment in 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: As 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) gains attention in immersive media and digital content creation, assessing the aesthetics of 3D scenes becomes important in helping creators build more visually compelling 3D content. However, existing evaluation methods for 3D scenes primarily emphasize reconstruction fidelity and perceptual realism, largely overlooking higher-level aesthetic attributes such as composition, harmony, and visual appeal. This limitation comes from two key challenges: (1) the absence of general 3DGS datasets with aesthetic annotations, and (2) the intrinsic nature of 3DGS as a low-level primitive representation, which makes it difficult to capture high-level aesthetic features. To address these challenges, we propose Aes3D, the first systematic framework for assessing the aesthetics of 3D neural rendering scenes. Aes3D includes Aesthetic3D, the first dataset dedicated to 3D scene aesthetic assessment, built on our proposed annotation strategy for 3D scene aesthetics. In addition, we present Aes3DGSNet, a lightweight model that directly predicts scene-level aesthetic scores from 3DGS representations. Notably, our model operates solely on 3D Gaussian primitives, eliminating the need for rendering multi-view images and thus reducing computational cost and hardware requirements. Through aesthetics-supervised learning on multi-view 3DGS scene representations, Aes3DGSNet effectively captures high-level aesthetic cues and accurately regresses aesthetic scores. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves strong performance while maintaining a lightweight design, establishing a new benchmark for 3D scene aesthetic assessment. Code and datasets will be made available in a future version.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向3D高斯泼溅场景的美学评估框架，包含专用数据集和轻量级模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS在沉浸式媒体和数字内容创作中日益重要，但现有评估方法仅关注重建保真度和感知真实感，缺乏对构图、和谐度等高层美学属性的评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏带美学标注的3DGS数据集，且3DGS作为低层基元表示难以捕捉高层美学特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Aes3D框架，包括Aesthetic3D数据集（基于3D场景美学标注策略构建）和Aes3DGSNet（轻量级模型，直接基于3D高斯基元预测场景级美学分数，无需渲染多视图图像）。
contributions: 首个面向3D神经渲染场景美学评估的系统性框架Aes3D。
首个3D场景美学评估数据集Aesthetic3D。
轻量级模型Aes3DGSNet，直接基于3DGS表示预测美学分数，降低计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 实验结果表明方法在保持轻量设计的同时取得了强性能，为3D场景美学评估建立了新基准。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，泛化性待验证。
美学评估主观性强，标注一致性可能受挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向3D高斯泼溅场景的美学评估框架，包含专用数据集和轻量级模型。

papers.title: What Matters in Practical Learned Image Compression
papers.abstract: One of the major differentiators unlocked by learned codecs relative to their hard-coded traditional counterparts is their ability to be optimized directly to appeal to the human visual system. Despite this potential, a perceptual yet practical image codec is yet to be proposed. In this work, we aim to close this gap. We conduct a comprehensive study of the key modeling choices that govern the design of a practical learned image codec, jointly optimized for perceptual quality and runtime -- including within the ablations several novel techniques. We then perform performance-aware neural architecture search over millions of backbone configurations to identify models that achieve the target on-device runtime while maximizing compression performance as captured by perceptual metrics. We combine the various optimizations to construct a new codec that achieves a significantly improved tradeoff between speed and perceptual quality. Based on rigorous subjective user studies, it provides 2.3-3x bitrate savings against AV1, AV2, VVC, ECM and JPEG-AI, and 20-40% bitrate savings against the best learned codec alternatives. At the same time, on an iPhone 17 Pro Max, it encodes 12MP images as fast as 230ms, and decodes them in 150ms -- faster than most top ML-based codecs run on a V100 GPU.

analysis.tldr: 通过神经架构搜索和感知优化，实现速度与感知质量俱佳的学习图像编解码器。
analysis.research_motivation: 学习型图像编解码器可针对人类视觉系统优化，但现有方法在感知质量和实际运行速度之间难以兼顾，缺乏实用的感知编解码器。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个同时优化感知质量和运行时效率的实用学习图像编解码器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对关键建模选择进行消融研究，并引入性能感知的神经架构搜索，在数百万骨干配置中寻找在目标设备上满足运行时间约束且感知压缩性能最优的模型。
contributions: 系统研究了实用学习图像编解码器的关键建模选择，包括若干新技术。
提出性能感知的神经架构搜索方法，平衡运行时间和感知质量。
构建的新编解码器在主观测试中比特率节省显著，且移动端推理速度快于多数基于ML的编解码器在V100 GPU上的速度。
analysis.experiments: 基于严格的主观用户研究，新编解码器相比AV1、AV2、VVC、ECM和JPEG-AI节省2.3-3倍比特率，相比最佳学习编解码器节省20-40%比特率；在iPhone 17 Pro Max上，12MP图像编码230ms，解码150ms。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定移动设备（iPhone 17 Pro Max）进行优化，泛化性未知。
神经架构搜索的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过神经架构搜索和感知优化，实现速度与感知质量俱佳的学习图像编解码器。

papers.title: CPCANet: Deep Unfolding Common Principal Component Analysis for Domain Generalization
papers.abstract: Domain Generalization (DG) aims to learn representations that remain robust under out-of-distribution (OOD) shifts and generalize effectively to unseen target domains. While recent invariant learning strategies and architectural advances have achieved strong performance, explicitly discovering a structured domain-invariant subspace through second-order statistics remains underexplored. In this work, we propose CPCANet, a novel framework grounded in Common Principal Component Analysis (CPCA), which unrolls the iterative Flury-Gautschi (FG) algorithm into fully differentiable neural layers. This approach integrates the statistical properties of CPCA into an end-to-end trainable framework, enforcing the discovery of a shared subspace across diverse domains while preserving interpretability. Experiments on four standard DG benchmarks demonstrate that CPCANet achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in zero-shot transfer. Moreover, CPCANet is architecture-agnostic and requires no dataset-specific tuning, providing a simple and efficient approach to learning robust representations under distribution shift. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 将共同主成分分析展开为可微分网络层，实现领域泛化中的结构化不变子空间学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有领域泛化方法在分布偏移下鲁棒性不足，且通过二阶统计量显式发现结构化领域不变子空间的方法尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用共同主成分分析（CPCA）的统计特性，设计一个端到端可训练的框架，以显式学习跨领域的共享子空间，提升领域泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CPCANet，将迭代的Flury-Gautschi算法展开为可微分神经层，集成CPCA的统计特性到端到端训练框架中，强制发现跨领域的共享子空间。
contributions: 首次将共同主成分分析（CPCA）展开为可微分网络层，用于领域泛化。
提出架构无关、无需数据集特定调优的CPCANet，在四个标准基准上达到SOTA零样本迁移性能。
analysis.experiments: 在四个标准领域泛化基准上进行了实验，CPCANet在零样本迁移中达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能对高维数据计算开销较大。
仅验证了图像领域的泛化，其他模态未测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将共同主成分分析展开为可微分网络层，实现领域泛化中的结构化不变子空间学习。

papers.title: A unified Benchmark for Multi-Frame Image Restoration under Severe Refractive Warping
papers.abstract: Video sequence capturing through refractive dynamic media, such as a turbulent air or water surface, often suffer from severe geometric distortions and temporal instability. While recent advances address mild atmospheric turbulence, no existing benchmarks systematically evaluate restoration methods under strong and highly nonuniform refractive conditions. We present a comprehensive benchmark for geometric distortion removal in video, covering a range from turbulence-like mild warping to strong discontinuous refractive deformations. The benchmark includes both laboratory-captured real data and synthetic sequences generated for static scenes via physics-based light refraction modeling across four distortion levels and multiple surface wave types. We evaluate a spectrum of methods from simple baselines and classical registration algorithms to advanced learning-based approaches including DATUM and our proposed diffusion based V-cache for high and extreme distortions regimes. Evaluation uses both pixel-level (PSNR, SSIM), and perceptual (LPIPS, DINO, CLIP) metrics providing the first large scale analysis of geometric distortion removal. Our benchmark establishes a new foundation for developing and evaluating algorithms capable of reconstructing video from highly distorted optical environments. Our code and datasets are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 首个针对严重折射扭曲的多帧图像恢复统一基准，涵盖从弱湍流到强非均匀折射变形，并提供真实与合成数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准仅评估轻度大气湍流下的恢复方法，缺乏对强且高度非均匀折射条件下几何失真去除的系统评估，限制了相关算法的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一的基准来系统评估和比较不同方法在严重折射扭曲下的多帧图像恢复性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含实验室采集真实数据和基于物理光折射模型生成的合成序列的基准，涵盖四种失真水平和多种表面波类型；并提出一种基于扩散的V-cache方法用于高和极端失真场景。
contributions: 提出了首个针对严重折射扭曲的多帧图像恢复统一基准，包含真实和合成数据。
系统评估了从经典配准到先进学习方法（包括提出的扩散V-cache）的性能，使用像素级和感知指标。
analysis.experiments: 在基准上评估了多种方法，包括简单基线、经典配准算法和先进学习方法（如DATUM和提出的扩散V-cache），使用PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS、DINO、CLIP等指标。
limitations: 合成数据可能无法完全模拟真实世界的复杂折射条件。
基准主要针对静态场景，动态场景的评估尚未覆盖。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对严重折射扭曲的多帧图像恢复统一基准，涵盖从弱湍流到强非均匀折射变形，并提供真实与合成数据。

papers.title: FlowDIS: Language-Guided Dichotomous Image Segmentation with Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Accurate image segmentation is essential for modern computer vision applications such as image editing, autonomous driving, and medical image analysis. In recent years, Dichotomous Image Segmentation (DIS) has become a standard task for training and evaluating highly accurate segmentation models. Existing DIS approaches often fail to preserve fine-grained details or fully capture the semantic structure of the foreground. To address these challenges, we present FlowDIS, a novel dichotomous image segmentation method built on the flow matching framework, which learns a time-dependent vector field to transport the image distribution to the corresponding mask distribution, optionally conditioned on a text prompt. Moreover, with our Position-Aware Instance Pairing (PAIP) training strategy, FlowDIS offers strong controllability through text prompts, enabling precise, pixel-level object segmentation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches both with and without language guidance. Compared with the best prior DIS method, FlowDIS achieves a 5.5% higher $F_{\beta}^{\omega}$ measure and 43% lower MAE ($\mathcal{M}$) on the DIS-TE test set. The code is available at: this https URL

analysis.tldr: FlowDIS 利用流匹配框架实现语言引导的二分图像分割，显著提升细节保留和语义结构捕获能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有二分图像分割方法难以保留细粒度细节或充分捕获前景的语义结构，且缺乏语言引导的灵活性，限制了在图像编辑、自动驾驶等应用中的表现。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既能精确分割像素级细节、又能通过文本提示灵活控制的分割方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于流匹配框架，学习时间依赖的向量场将图像分布传输到掩码分布，并可选地以文本提示为条件；提出位置感知实例配对训练策略增强可控性。
contributions: 提出 FlowDIS，首个将流匹配应用于二分图像分割的方法，支持语言引导。
设计位置感知实例配对训练策略，实现精确的像素级对象分割。
analysis.experiments: 在 DIS-TE 测试集上，FlowDIS 相比最佳先前方法在 Fβω 指标上提升 5.5%，MAE 降低 43%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本提示，弱提示下性能未知。
流匹配推理速度可能较慢，实时性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowDIS 利用流匹配框架实现语言引导的二分图像分割，显著提升细节保留和语义结构捕获能力。

papers.title: Height-Guided Projection Reparameterization for Camera-LiDAR Occupancy
papers.abstract: 3D occupancy prediction aims to infer dense, voxel-wise scene semantics from sensor observations, where the 2D-to-3D view transformation serves as a crucial step in bridging image features and volumetric representations. Most previous methods rely on a fixed projection space, where 3D reference points are uniformly sampled along pillars. However, such sampling struggles to capture the sparsity and height variations of real-world scenes, leading to ambiguous correspondences and unreliable feature aggregation. To address these challenges, we propose HiPR, a camera-LiDAR occupancy framework with Height-Guided Projection Reparameterization. HiPR first encodes LiDAR into a BEV height map to capture the maximum height of the point cloud. HiPR then adjusts the sampling range of each pillar using the height prior, enabling adaptive reparameterization of the projection space. As a result, the projected points are redistributed into geometrically meaningful regions rather than fixed ranges. Meanwhile, we mask out the invalid parts of the height map to avoid misleading the feature aggregation. In addition, to alleviate the training instability caused by noisy LiDAR-derived heights, we introduce a training-time Progressive Height Conditioning strategy, which gradually transitions the conditioning signal from ground-truth heights to LiDAR heights. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HiPR consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods while maintaining real-time inference. The code and pretrained models can be found at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: HiPR通过高度引导的投影重参数化，自适应调整3D参考点采样范围，提升相机-激光雷达3D占用预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D占用预测方法在2D到3D视图变换中采用固定投影空间，沿柱体均匀采样3D参考点，难以捕捉真实场景的稀疏性和高度变化，导致对应关系模糊和特征聚合不可靠。
analysis.problem: 解决固定投影空间中参考点采样无法适应场景高度变化的问题，提升特征聚合的几何准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出固定柱体均匀采样难以处理场景稀疏性和高度变化，导致模糊对应和不可靠特征聚合；激光雷达高度噪声会引起训练不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出HiPR框架：1) 将激光雷达编码为BEV高度图以捕获点云最大高度；2) 利用高度先验自适应调整每个柱体的采样范围，实现投影空间重参数化；3) 掩码高度图无效部分；4) 采用渐进式高度条件策略，从真实高度逐步过渡到激光雷达高度以缓解训练不稳定。
contributions: 提出高度引导投影重参数化方法，自适应调整3D参考点采样范围，提升几何意义区域的特征聚合。
设计渐进式高度条件策略，缓解激光雷达高度噪声导致的训练不稳定问题。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，HiPR一致优于现有最先进方法，并保持实时推理。
limitations: 依赖激光雷达数据，可能不适用于纯视觉场景。
高度先验的准确性受激光雷达噪声影响，渐进式策略增加了训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HiPR通过高度引导的投影重参数化，自适应调整3D参考点采样范围，提升相机-激光雷达3D占用预测性能。

papers.title: ScriptHOI: Learning Scripted State Transitions for Open-Vocabulary Human-Object Interaction Detection
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary human-object interaction (HOI) detection requires recognizing interaction phrases that may not appear as annotated categories during training. Recent vision-language HOI detectors improve semantic transfer by matching human-object features with text embeddings, but their predictions are often dominated by object affordance and phrase-level co-occurrence. As a result, a model may predict \textit{cut cake} from the presence of a knife and a cake without verifying whether the hand, tool, target, contact pattern, and object state jointly support the action. We propose \textbf{ScriptHOI}, a structured framework that represents each interaction phrase as a soft scripted state transition. Rather than treating a phrase as a single class token, ScriptHOI decomposes it into body-role, contact, geometry, affordance, motion, and object-state slots. A visual state tokenizer parses each detected human-object pair into corresponding state tokens, and a slot-wise matcher estimates both script coverage and script conflict. These two quantities calibrate HOI logits, expose missing visual evidence, and provide training constraints for incomplete annotations. To avoid suppressing valid but unannotated interactions, we further introduce interval partial-label learning, which constrains unannotated candidates with script-derived lower and upper probability bounds instead of assigning closed-world negatives. A counterfactual script contrast loss swaps individual script slots to discourage object-only shortcuts. Experiments on HICO-DET, V-COCO, and open-vocabulary HOI splits show that ScriptHOI improves rare and unseen interaction recognition while substantially reducing affordance-conflict false positives.

analysis.tldr: ScriptHOI 将交互短语分解为脚本化状态转换，通过视觉状态标记和槽匹配校准 HOI 检测，提升开放词汇场景下的交互识别能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇 HOI 检测器依赖物体功能与短语共现，导致预测缺乏对交互细节的验证，易产生假阳性。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型在开放词汇 HOI 检测中验证交互的完整证据链，避免仅凭物体功能推断交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型预测常被物体功能（如刀和蛋糕导致预测切蛋糕）和短语共现主导，而忽略手、工具、目标、接触模式和物体状态是否共同支持动作。
analysis.method: 将每个交互短语分解为身体角色、接触、几何、功能、运动和物体状态六个槽位；视觉状态分词器提取状态标记；槽匹配器计算脚本覆盖度和冲突度以校准 logits；引入区间部分标签学习和反事实脚本对比损失。
contributions: 提出脚本化状态转换框架 ScriptHOI，将交互短语分解为结构化槽位，显式建模交互证据链。
引入区间部分标签学习，避免抑制未标注的有效交互。
设计反事实脚本对比损失，减少物体功能捷径。
analysis.experiments: 在 HICO-DET、V-COCO 和开放词汇 HOI 分割上实验，ScriptHOI 提升了罕见和未见交互的识别，并显著减少了功能冲突假阳性。
limitations: 脚本槽位的定义可能依赖先验知识，泛化到新交互需扩展槽位。
视觉状态分词器的性能可能受限于检测质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ScriptHOI 将交互短语分解为脚本化状态转换，通过视觉状态标记和槽匹配校准 HOI 检测，提升开放词汇场景下的交互识别能力。

papers.title: Direct Product Flow Matching: Decoupling Radial and Angular Dynamics for Few-Shot Adaptation
papers.abstract: Recent flow matching (FM) methods improve the few-shot adaptation of vision-language models, by modeling cross-modal alignment as a continuous multi-step flow. In this paper, we argue that existing FM methods are inherently constrained by incompatible geometric priors on pre-trained cross-modal features, resulting in suboptimal adaptation performance. We first analyze these methods from a polar decomposition perspective (i.e., radial and angular sub-manifolds). Under this new geometric view, we identify three overlooked limitations in them: 1) Angular dynamics distortion: The radial-angular coupling induces non-uniform speed on the angular sub-manifold, leading to regression training difficulty and extra truncation errors. 2) Radial dynamics neglect: Feature normalization discards modality confidence, failing to distinguish out-of-distribution and in-distribution data, and abandoning crucial radial dynamics. 3) Context-agnostic unconditional flow: Dataset-specific information loss during pre-trained cross-modal feature extraction remains unrecovered. To resolve these issues, we propose warped product flow matching (WP-FM), a unified Riemannian framework that reformulates alignment on a warped product manifold. Within this framework, we derive direct product flow matching (DP-FM) by introducing a constant-warping metric, which yields a decoupled cylindrical manifold (i.e., direct product manifold). DP-FM enables independent radial evolution and constant-speed angular geodesic transport, effectively eliminating angular dynamics distortion while preserving radial consistency. Meanwhile, we incorporate classifier-free guidance by conditioning the flow on the pre-trained VLMs' hidden states to inject missing dataset-specific information. Extensive results across 11 benchmarks have demonstrated that DP-FM achieves a new state-of-the-art for multi-step few-shot adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出直接积流匹配（DP-FM），通过解耦径向与角动力学实现视觉-语言模型少样本适配的新SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流匹配方法在少样本适配中因预训练跨模态特征的不兼容几何先验导致次优性能，亟需从几何视角分析并解决径向-角耦合带来的训练困难与信息丢失。
analysis.problem: 解决现有流匹配方法中径向-角动力学耦合导致的角流形非均匀速度、径向动力学忽略以及上下文无关无条件流三个局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从极分解视角分析现有方法，发现三个局限：1) 径向-角耦合导致角流形非均匀速度，增加回归训练难度和截断误差；2) 特征归一化丢弃模态置信度，无法区分分布内外数据；3) 无条件流丢失数据集特定信息。
analysis.method: 提出扭曲积流匹配（WP-FM）框架，并推导出直接积流匹配（DP-FM），通过常扭曲度量解耦为圆柱流形，实现独立径向演化和匀速角测地传输，同时引入无分类器引导注入隐藏状态信息。
contributions: 从极分解视角揭示现有流匹配方法在少样本适配中的三个几何局限。
提出WP-FM框架和DP-FM方法，解耦径向与角动力学，消除角动力学畸变并保持径向一致性。
在11个基准上取得多步少样本适配的新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在11个基准上进行了广泛实验，DP-FM达到多步少样本适配的新SOTA。
limitations: 方法依赖于预训练视觉-语言模型的隐藏状态，可能受限于模型架构。
常扭曲度量假设可能不适用于所有数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出直接积流匹配（DP-FM），通过解耦径向与角动力学实现视觉-语言模型少样本适配的新SOTA。

papers.title: When Relations Break: Analyzing Relation Hallucination in Vision-Language Model Under Rotation and Noise
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong multimodal performance but remain prone to relation hallucination, which requires accurate reasoning over inter-object interactions. We study the impact of visual perturbations, specifically rotation and noise, and show that even mild distortions significantly degrade relational reasoning across models and datasets. We further evaluate prompt-based augmentation and preprocessing strategies (orientation correction and denoising), finding that while they offer partial improvements, they do not fully resolve hallucinations. Our results reveal a gap between perceptual robustness and relational understanding, highlighting the need for more robust, geometry-aware VLMs.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现视觉扰动（旋转和噪声）会显著加剧VLM的关系幻觉，现有预处理策略只能部分缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型在多模态任务中表现强劲，但关系推理（物体间交互）容易产生幻觉，而现有研究对视觉扰动如何影响关系幻觉缺乏系统分析。
analysis.problem: 系统研究旋转和噪声等视觉扰动对VLM关系幻觉的影响，并评估现有缓解策略的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使轻微的旋转和噪声也会显著降低模型的关系推理能力；提示增强和预处理（方向校正、去噪）只能部分改善，无法完全消除幻觉。
analysis.method: 在多个VLM和数据集上，通过施加旋转和噪声扰动，评估关系推理性能；并测试基于提示的增强和预处理策略（方向校正、去噪）。
contributions: 首次系统分析旋转和噪声对VLM关系幻觉的影响，揭示感知鲁棒性与关系理解之间的差距。
评估现有缓解策略的局限性，指出需要更鲁棒、几何感知的VLM。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型和数据集上进行了实验，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅研究了旋转和噪声两种扰动，其他类型扰动（如遮挡、光照）未涉及。
缓解策略仅测试了提示增强和预处理，未探索模型架构或训练层面的改进。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究发现视觉扰动（旋转和噪声）会显著加剧VLM的关系幻觉，现有预处理策略只能部分缓解。

papers.title: Few-Shot Learning Pipeline for Monkeypox Skin Disease Classification Using CNN Feature Extractors
papers.abstract: Despite the strong performance of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in disease classification, their effectiveness often depends on access to large annotated datasets, which is an impractical requirement for emerging or rare conditions such as Monkeypox. To overcome this limitation, we propose a few-shot learning (FSL) framework that employs SimpleShot, a lightweight, non-parametric, inductive classifier, for Monkeypox and pox-like skin disease recognition from limited labeled examples. The proposed pipeline passes the skin lesion images through a frozen, pretrained CNN backbone to obtain feature embeddings, which are then classified via SimpleShot using nearest-centroid comparisons in a normalized embedding space. We systematically benchmark six widely used CNN backbones as feature extractors under consistent experimental settings, enabling fair comparison. Experiments on three publicly available datasets (MSLD v1.0, MSID, and MSLD v2.0) are conducted across 2-way, 4-way, and 6-way tasks with 1-shot, 5-shot, and 10-shot configurations. Among all models, MobileNetV2_100 consistently achieves the highest accuracy. In addition, we present a cross-dataset evaluation for Monkeypox classification, revealing that binary Mpox-vs-Others transfer remains comparatively stable while multi-class performance degrades significantly under domain shift. Together, these results demonstrate the practical utility of combining inductive FSL methods with lightweight CNN backbones and highlight the importance of domain robustness for reliable real-world clinical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出SimpleShot+CNN特征提取器的少样本学习流水线，用于猴痘皮肤病分类，MobileNetV2_100表现最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: CNN在疾病分类中依赖大规模标注数据，但新兴或罕见疾病（如猴痘）难以获取充足标注样本，亟需少样本学习方法。
analysis.problem: 在有限标注样本下实现猴痘及类痘皮肤病的准确分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 跨数据集评估显示，二分类（Mpox-vs-Others）迁移较稳定，但多分类性能在域偏移下显著下降。
analysis.method: 使用冻结的预训练CNN骨干提取特征嵌入，通过SimpleShot（基于最近质心比较的非参数归纳分类器）进行分类。
contributions: 提出结合SimpleShot与CNN特征提取器的少样本学习流水线，用于猴痘皮肤病分类。
系统比较六种CNN骨干在多个少样本配置下的性能，发现MobileNetV2_100最优。
进行跨数据集评估，揭示域偏移对多分类性能的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在MSLD v1.0、MSID、MSLD v2.0三个公开数据集上，进行2-way、4-way、6-way任务，shot数为1、5、10。
limitations: 仅使用冻结的CNN骨干，未探索微调或自适应方法。
跨数据集评估仅涉及三个数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SimpleShot+CNN特征提取器的少样本学习流水线，用于猴痘皮肤病分类，MobileNetV2_100表现最佳。

papers.title: Computer-Aided Design Generation by Cascaded Discrete Diffusion Model
papers.abstract: Recent deep learning approaches seek to automate CAD creation by representing a model as a sequence of discrete commands and parameters, and then generating them using autoregressive models or continuous diffusion operating in Euclidean embedding space. However, continuous diffusion perturbs representations in a continuous Euclidean domain that does not reflect the inherently discrete and heterogeneous nature of CAD tokens, often producing perturbed representations that map to semantically invalid symbols. To overcome this limitation, we propose a cascaded discrete diffusion framework for CAD generation, which consists of a command diffusion for generating CAD commands and a parameter diffusion conditioned on CAD commands. Unlike isotropic Gaussian perturbation, the forward process of our approach operates directly over categorical token distributions using delicate transition matrices. For commands, we adopt an absorbing-state transition matrix that progressively corrupts tokens to a designated symbol; for parameters, we introduce specific transition matrices tailored to heterogeneous attributes: a Gaussian kernel for coordinate continuity, a scale-invariant kernel for dimensional values, and a prior-preserving kernel for boolean attributes. The reverse process is achieved by two denoising networks: a Transformer-based encoder for command recovery, and a parameter network with extra local self-attention for command-level interaction and cross-attention for conditional injection. Experiments on the DeepCAD dataset show that the proposed approach surpasses existing autoregressive and continuous diffusion models on unconditional generation metrics, while qualitative results validate effective controllability in conditional generation tasks. Source codes will be released.

analysis.tldr: 提出级联离散扩散模型用于CAD生成，通过定制转移矩阵处理异构离散令牌，优于自回归和连续扩散方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CAD生成方法使用自回归模型或连续扩散，但连续扩散在欧几里得空间扰动不反映CAD令牌的离散和异构特性，常产生语义无效符号。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个离散扩散框架，使其前向过程直接操作于分类令牌分布，并针对CAD命令和参数的不同属性定制转移矩阵，以生成有效CAD序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 连续扩散在CAD生成中因扰动空间与令牌离散性不匹配，导致映射到无效符号。
analysis.method: 级联离散扩散框架：命令扩散使用吸收态转移矩阵逐步将令牌腐蚀为指定符号；参数扩散针对坐标、维度、布尔属性分别使用高斯核、尺度不变核和先验保持核。反向过程通过Transformer编码器恢复命令，参数网络含局部自注意力和交叉注意力。
contributions: 提出首个级联离散扩散模型用于CAD生成，直接操作于分类令牌分布。
针对CAD命令和异构参数设计定制转移矩阵，保持离散语义。
在DeepCAD数据集上无条件生成指标超越自回归和连续扩散模型，并展示条件生成的可控性。
analysis.experiments: 在DeepCAD数据集上评估无条件生成指标，定性结果验证条件生成可控性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定CAD数据集，泛化性待验证。
级联架构可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出级联离散扩散模型用于CAD生成，通过定制转移矩阵处理异构离散令牌，优于自回归和连续扩散方法。

papers.title: Prompt-Anchored Vision-Text Distillation for Lifelong Person Re-identification
papers.abstract: Lifelong person re-identification (LReID) aims to train a generalizable model with sequentially collected data. However, such models often suffer from semantic drift, limited adaptability, and catastrophic forgetting as new domains emerge. Existing exemplar-free approaches largely rely on visual-only distillation or parameter regularization, while overlooking the potential of auxiliary modalities, such as text, to preserve semantic stability and enable incremental plasticity. We observe that the frozen text encoder in pretrained vision-language models can serve as a stable semantic anchor across domains. To decouple the roles of vision and text, we propose Prompt-Anchored vision-text Distillation (PAD), an asymmetric vision-text framework for semantic alignment and cross-domain generalization. On the textual side, we distill prompts to preserve vision-text alignment under a fixed semantic space, acting as a global semantic reference rather than a dominant learning signal. On the visual side, an EMA-based teacher with an adaptive prompt pool enables domain-wise adaptation by allocating new slots while freezing past ones. Extensive experiments show that PAD substantially outperforms state-of-the-art methods across seen and unseen domains, achieving a strong balance between stability and plasticity. Project page is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出提示锚定的视觉-文本蒸馏框架，利用冻结文本编码器作为语义锚点，平衡终身行人重识别的稳定性与可塑性。
analysis.research_motivation: 终身行人重识别面临语义漂移、适应性有限和灾难性遗忘问题，现有无样本方法多依赖纯视觉蒸馏或参数正则化，忽视了文本等辅助模态在保持语义稳定性和增量可塑性方面的潜力。
analysis.problem: 解决终身行人重识别中模型在新领域出现时语义漂移、适应性不足和灾难性遗忘的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到预训练视觉-语言模型中的冻结文本编码器可作为跨领域的稳定语义锚点。
analysis.method: 提出非对称视觉-文本蒸馏框架PAD：文本侧通过蒸馏提示在固定语义空间下保持视觉-文本对齐，作为全局语义参考；视觉侧使用基于EMA的教师模型和自适应提示池，通过分配新槽位并冻结旧槽位实现领域自适应。
contributions: 提出PAD框架，利用冻结文本编码器作为语义锚点，实现视觉-文本语义对齐和跨领域泛化。
设计非对称蒸馏机制，文本侧提供稳定语义参考，视觉侧通过自适应提示池实现领域级适应。
在多个已见和未见领域上显著超越现有方法，实现稳定性与可塑性的强平衡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖预训练视觉-语言模型，可能受限于模型规模和领域覆盖。
提示池的扩展策略可能增加存储开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出提示锚定的视觉-文本蒸馏框架，利用冻结文本编码器作为语义锚点，平衡终身行人重识别的稳定性与可塑性。

papers.title: Local Intrinsic Dimension Unveils Hallucinations in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion models are prone to generating structural hallucinations - samples that match the statistical properties of the training data yet defy underlying structural rules, resulting in anomalies like hands with more than five fingers. Recent research studied this failure mode from several viewpoints, offering partial explanations to their occurrence, such as mode interpolation. In this work, we propose a complementary perspective that treats hallucinations as instabilities on the model-induced manifold. We begin by showing that a hallucination filter based on such instabilities matches or exceeds the performance of the recently proposed temporal one. By tracing the source of these instabilities, we identify local intrinsic dimension (LID) as their primary driver and propose Intrinsic Quenching (IQ), a direct corrective mechanism that deflates it to alleviate hallucinations. IQ consistently outperforms standard hallucination reduction baselines across a wide array of benchmarks and offers a highly promising solution for enforcing anatomical consistency in downstream medical imaging tasks.

analysis.tldr: 扩散模型的结构幻觉源于模型诱导流形的不稳定性，局部本征维度（LID）是其主要驱动因素，提出的Intrinsic Quenching（IQ）机制通过降低LID有效缓解幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型生成的结构性幻觉（如人手六指）违背底层结构规则，现有研究从模式插值等角度提供部分解释，但缺乏统一视角和有效纠正方法。
analysis.problem: 扩散模型生成结构性幻觉的根源机制不明，且缺乏高效的幻觉检测与纠正方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 幻觉表现为模型诱导流形上的不稳定性，局部本征维度（LID）是这种不稳定性的主要驱动因素。
analysis.method: 提出Intrinsic Quenching (IQ)，通过降低局部本征维度来直接纠正幻觉。
contributions: 提出基于流形不稳定性的幻觉检测方法，性能匹配或超越现有时序方法。
识别局部本征维度（LID）为幻觉的主要驱动因素，并提出Intrinsic Quenching (IQ)纠正机制。
IQ在多个基准上优于标准幻觉减少基线，并在下游医学成像任务中有效保证解剖一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估IQ，并与标准幻觉减少基线对比；在医学成像任务中验证解剖一致性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的结构幻觉，对语义或纹理幻觉效果未知。
IQ机制的计算开销和可扩展性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 扩散模型的结构幻觉源于模型诱导流形的不稳定性，局部本征维度（LID）是其主要驱动因素，提出的Intrinsic Quenching（IQ）机制通过降低LID有效缓解幻觉。

papers.title: CARD: A Multi-Modal Automotive Dataset for Dense 3D Reconstruction in Challenging Road Topography
papers.abstract: Autonomous driving must operate across diverse surfaces to enable safe mobility. However, most driving datasets are captured on well-paved flat roads. Moreover, recent driving datasets primarily provide sparse LiDAR ground truth for images, which is insufficient for assessing fine-grained geometry in depth estimation and completion. To address these gaps, we introduce CARD, a multi-modal driving dataset that delivers quasi-dense 3D ground truth across continuous sequences rich in speed bumps, potholes, irregular surfaces and off-road segments. Our sensor suite includes synchronized global-shutter stereo cameras, front and rear LiDARs, 6-DoF poses from LiDAR-inertial odometry, per-wheel motion traces, and full calibration. Notably, our multi-LiDAR fusion yields ~500K valid depth pixels per frame, about 6.5x more than KITTI Depth Completion and 10x more on average than other public driving datasets. The dataset spans ~110 km and 4.7 hours across Germany and Italy. In addition, CARD provides 2D bounding boxes targeting road-topography irregularities, enabling accurate benchmarking for both geometry and perception tasks. Furthermore, we establish a standardized evaluation protocol for road surface irregularities on CARD and benchmark state-of-the-art depth estimation models to provide strong baselines. The CARD dataset is hosted on this https URL .

analysis.tldr: CARD 是一个多模态驾驶数据集，提供准密集 3D 真值，专注于具有挑战性的道路地形（如减速带、坑洼），深度真值密度比 KITTI 高 6.5 倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有驾驶数据集大多在平坦道路上采集，且仅提供稀疏 LiDAR 真值，难以评估深度估计和补全中的细粒度几何结构，限制了自动驾驶在复杂地形上的安全运行。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个包含密集 3D 真值、覆盖不平坦道路（如减速带、坑洼、越野路段）的多模态驾驶数据集，以支持细粒度深度估计和道路地形感知的基准测试。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了一个多模态驾驶数据集 CARD，包含同步全局快门立体相机、前后 LiDAR、LiDAR-惯性里程计 6-DoF 位姿、每轮运动轨迹和完整标定，通过多 LiDAR 融合生成每帧约 50 万有效深度像素的准密集 3D 真值，并提供了针对道路地形不规则性的 2D 边界框标注。
contributions: 提出了 CARD 数据集，覆盖德国和意大利约 110 公里、4.7 小时的连续序列，包含减速带、坑洼、不规则表面和越野路段。
通过多 LiDAR 融合实现了每帧约 50 万有效深度像素的准密集 3D 真值，密度是 KITTI 深度补全的 6.5 倍，是其他公开驾驶数据集的 10 倍以上。
提供了针对道路地形不规则性的 2D 边界框标注，并建立了标准化的评估协议和基线结果。
analysis.experiments: 在 CARD 数据集上对最先进的深度估计模型进行了基准测试，提供了强基线结果。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖德国和意大利，可能无法代表全球所有道路地形。
准密集深度真值仍非完全密集，可能存在少量缺失区域。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CARD 是一个多模态驾驶数据集，提供准密集 3D 真值，专注于具有挑战性的道路地形（如减速带、坑洼），深度真值密度比 KITTI 高 6.5 倍。

papers.title: Chaotic Contrastive Learning for Robust Texture Classification
papers.abstract: Texture classification is a pivotal task in computer vision, presenting unique challenges due to high inter-class similarity and the sensitivity of structural patterns to scale and illumination changes. While Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and recent Vision Transformers have set performance benchmarks, they often require extensive labeled datasets or struggle to generalize across domains due to an over-reliance on color and shape features. This paper introduces a novel framework that synergizes Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) with deterministic chaotic dynamics. We propose a chaotic contrastive pre-training strategy, where pixel-wise chaotic maps, specifically Logistic, Tent, and Sine maps, act as non-linear data augmentation techniques. These chaotic perturbations, grounded in ergodic theory, force the network to learn topologically robust features by mimicking complex environmental noise and reflectance variations. Furthermore, we introduce an attention-based feature ensemble that fuses high-level semantic representations from a supervised large backbone with low-frequency structural features from a chaos-pretrained tiny encoder. Experimental results on six texture benchmarks (FMD, UMD, KTH-TIPS2-b, DTD, GTOS, and 1200Tex) demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches and achieving promising accuracies on all the analyzed datasets.

analysis.tldr: 结合混沌动力学的对比学习框架，通过混沌映射增强数据，提升纹理分类的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 纹理分类面临类间相似度高、结构模式对尺度和光照敏感等挑战，现有CNN和ViT方法依赖大量标注数据或过度关注颜色形状特征，跨域泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖大规模标注数据的情况下，学习对噪声和光照变化鲁棒的纹理特征，提升分类准确性和泛化性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混沌对比学习框架：1）使用Logistic、Tent、Sine等混沌映射作为非线性数据增强，基于遍历理论迫使网络学习拓扑鲁棒特征；2）设计注意力特征融合模块，结合监督大骨干网络的高层语义特征与混沌预训练小编码器的低频结构特征。
contributions: 首次将确定性混沌动力学引入自监督对比学习，用于纹理分类的数据增强。
提出注意力特征融合机制，有效结合高层语义与低频结构特征。
在六个纹理基准上达到SOTA，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在FMD、UMD、KTH-TIPS2-b、DTD、GTOS和1200Tex六个纹理数据集上实验，方法优于现有SOTA，在所有数据集上均取得有前景的准确率。
limitations: 混沌映射的参数选择可能影响性能，需要进一步研究自适应策略。
方法在非纹理任务上的泛化能力未在摘要中探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合混沌动力学的对比学习框架，通过混沌映射增强数据，提升纹理分类的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

papers.title: Low-Rank Adaptation of Geospatial Foundation Models for Wildfire Mapping Using Sentinel-2 Data
papers.abstract: Wildfire burned-area mapping is essential for damage assessment, emissions modeling, and understanding fire-climate interactions across diverse ecological regions. Recent geospatial foundation models provide strong general-purpose representations for satellite imagery, yet there is still no clear understanding of how to efficiently adapt these models for downstream Earth observation tasks, particularly under geographic and temporal domain shift. This study evaluates three state-of-the-art Geospatial Foundation Models (GFMs) - Terramind, DINOv3, and Prithvi-v2 - for burned-area mapping across the United States and Canada using Sentinel-2 data. Leveraging 3,820 wildfire events from 2017-2023, we conduct spatial and temporal generalization tests across diverse biomes. We systematically compare full fine-tuning, decoder-only fine-tuning, and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for adapting each model. Across all experiments, LoRA provides the strongest cross-domain generalization while updating less than 1% of parameters, demonstrating a favorable trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. Prithvi-v2 with LoRA achieves the highest overall accuracy and the largest improvement compared to full fine-tuning. These findings indicate that geospatial foundation models, when adapted using lightweight parameter-efficient methods such as LoRA, offer a robust and scalable solution for large-scale burned-area mapping. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: LoRA高效适配地理空间基础模型，实现跨域野火燃烧区制图。
analysis.research_motivation: 野火燃烧区制图对灾害评估和气候建模至关重要，但地理空间基础模型在跨地理和时间域迁移时缺乏高效适配方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效适配地理空间基础模型以提升野火燃烧区制图在跨域泛化中的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全微调在跨域泛化中表现不佳，而LoRA仅更新不到1%参数即可取得最强泛化能力。
analysis.method: 系统比较全微调、仅解码器微调和LoRA三种适配方法，在三个地理空间基础模型（Terramind、DINOv3、Prithvi-v2）上进行空间和时间泛化测试。
contributions: 首次系统评估多种适配方法对地理空间基础模型在野火制图任务中的跨域泛化影响。
证明LoRA在更新极少参数的情况下，能显著提升跨域泛化性能，Prithvi-v2+LoRA取得最佳效果。
analysis.experiments: 使用2017-2023年3820个野火事件的Sentinel-2数据，在美国和加拿大不同生物群落上进行空间和时间泛化测试。
limitations: 仅针对野火燃烧区制图任务，其他地球观测任务未验证。
仅使用Sentinel-2数据，其他遥感数据源未探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LoRA高效适配地理空间基础模型，实现跨域野火燃烧区制图。

papers.title: Attention-Based Chaotic Self-Supervision for Medical Image Classification
papers.abstract: Deep learning models for medical image classification usually achieve promising results but typically rely on large, annotated datasets or standard transfer learning from ImageNet. Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) has emerged as a powerful alternative, yet common methods like masked autoencoders (MAEs) may inadvertently destroy fine-grained diagnostic features by using random masking. In this paper, we propose a novel SSL pre-training strategy, the Chaotic Denoising Autoencoder (CDAE). Instead of masking, we apply a chaotic transformation to the input image, tasking an autoencoder to reconstruct the original. We hypothesize this forces the encoder to learn robust, domain-specific features by "inverting the chaos". Furthermore, we propose an attentive fusion mechanism that combines features from our CDAE-trained encoder with a standard encoder, leveraging the strengths of both general and domain-specific representations. Our method is evaluated on two public medical datasets: ISIC 2018 (skin lesions) and APTOS 2019 (diabetic retinopathy). The proposed model achieves high performance, with an accuracy of 0.9221 and an F1-macro of 0.8530 on ISIC 2018, and an accuracy of 0.8644 and F1-macro of 0.7433 on APTOS 2019, demonstrating the efficacy of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出混沌去噪自编码器（CDAE）作为医学图像分类的自监督预训练策略，通过混沌变换替代随机掩码，并引入注意力融合机制结合通用与领域特征。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分类依赖大量标注数据或ImageNet迁移学习，自监督学习（如MAE）的随机掩码可能破坏细粒度诊断特征，需要更鲁棒的预训练方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自监督预训练策略，避免破坏医学图像中的细粒度诊断特征，并有效结合通用与领域特定特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混沌去噪自编码器（CDAE），对输入图像施加混沌变换后让自编码器重建原图，迫使编码器学习鲁棒的领域特定特征；并设计注意力融合机制，结合CDAE编码器与标准编码器的特征。
contributions: 提出CDAE自监督预训练方法，用混沌变换替代随机掩码，避免破坏细粒度特征。
设计注意力融合机制，结合通用与领域特定特征提升分类性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ISIC 2018（皮肤病变）和APTOS 2019（糖尿病视网膜病变）上评估，ISIC 2018准确率0.9221，F1-macro 0.8530；APTOS 2019准确率0.8644，F1-macro 0.7433。
limitations: 仅验证了两个数据集，泛化性需更多实验。
混沌变换的参数选择可能影响性能，需进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混沌去噪自编码器（CDAE）作为医学图像分类的自监督预训练策略，通过混沌变换替代随机掩码，并引入注意力融合机制结合通用与领域特征。

papers.title: ICPR 2026 Competition on Privacy-Preserving Person Re-Identification from Top-View RGB-Depth Camera (TVRID)
papers.abstract: This companion paper reports the ICPR 2026 TVRID competition on privacy-aware top-view person re-identification. We present the competition setting, the released RGB-Depth dataset, and a summary of final results with descriptions of the top entries. TVRID contains 86 identities captured by four synchronized overhead Intel RealSense D455 cameras, with paired RGB/Depth streams and structured geometric variation across flat, ascent, descent, and oblique viewpoints. The evaluation protocol includes three tracks: RGB Re-ID, Depth Re-ID, and RGB$\leftrightarrow$Depth cross-modal retrieval. Submissions are ranked using mAP and CMC-1 under a unified server-side evaluation. The final results show a clear difficulty ordering (RGB $>$ Depth $>$ Cross-Modal), highlighting both the challenge of modality-constrained retrieval and the feasibility of strong performance with modality-invariant learning. By releasing the dataset at this https URL , the evaluation scripts at this https URL , and the accompanying documentation, TVRID establishes a reproducible benchmark for top-view, depth-based, and cross-modal person re-id.

analysis.tldr: ICPR 2026 竞赛报告：基于顶视 RGB-D 相机的隐私保护行人重识别数据集与基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 顶视 RGB-D 相机在隐私保护场景（如零售、安防）中具有优势，但缺乏标准化的基准数据集和评估协议，阻碍了该方向的研究进展。
analysis.problem: 构建一个面向顶视 RGB-D 相机的隐私保护行人重识别基准，包括数据集、评估协议和竞赛结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 发布包含 86 个身份、四台同步顶视 Intel RealSense D455 相机采集的 RGB-D 数据集，设计 RGB Re-ID、Depth Re-ID 和 RGB↔Depth 跨模态检索三个赛道，使用 mAP 和 CMC-1 统一评估。
contributions: 发布了首个面向顶视 RGB-D 相机的隐私保护行人重识别数据集 TVRID，包含 86 个身份和多种视角变化。
设计了三个评估赛道（RGB、Depth、跨模态），并提供了统一的服务器端评估脚本和基准结果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及最终结果显示难度顺序为 RGB > Depth > Cross-Modal，并指出模态约束检索的挑战和模态不变学习的可行性。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（86 个身份），可能限制模型泛化能力。
仅使用单一相机型号（Intel RealSense D455），实际部署中相机差异可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ICPR 2026 竞赛报告：基于顶视 RGB-D 相机的隐私保护行人重识别数据集与基准。

papers.title: DART: A Vision-Language Foundation Model for Comprehensive Rope Condition Monitoring
papers.abstract: The condition monitoring (CM) of synthetic fibre ropes (SFRs) used in offshore, maritime, and industrial settings demands more than a classifier: inspectors need continuous severity estimates, maintenance recommendations, anomaly flags, deterioration timelines, and automated reports, all from a single inspection image. We present DART (Damage Assessment via Rope Transformer), a vision-language foundation model that addresses the full rope inspection workflow through a unified multi-task architecture. DART extends the Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) to the cross-modal domain by coupling a Vision Transformer (ViT-H/14) with Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct via a Severity-Conditioned Cross-Modal Fusion (SC-CMF) module. Three architectural innovations drive the model's versatility: (1) HD-MASK, a saliency-guided masking strategy that focuses self-supervised reconstruction on damage-dense patches; (2) per-class learnable severity gates that adaptively weight language grounding by damage category; and (3) a Contrastive Damage Disentanglement (CDD) loss that shapes the embedding space to simultaneously encode damage type, severity ordering, and cross-modal semantics. Trained once on 4,270 images spanning 14 fine-grained rope damage classes, the frozen DART backbone supports downstream tasks without any task-specific fine-tuning: damage classification (93.22 % accuracy, 91.04 % macro-F1, +38.5 pp over a vision-only baseline), continuous severity regression (Spearman rho = 0.94, within-1-ordinal accuracy 99.6 %), few-shot recognition (89.2 % macro-F1 at 20 shots). These results demonstrate that DART functions as a general-purpose CM backbone that goes well beyond classification, providing actionable inspection intelligence from a single shared representation.

analysis.tldr: DART 是一个视觉-语言基础模型，通过统一多任务架构实现合成纤维绳索的全面状态监测，在分类、严重性回归和少样本识别上均取得优异性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 绳索状态监测需要从单张图像中获取连续严重性估计、维护建议、异常标记、退化时间线和自动报告，而现有方法仅能提供分类，无法满足全面需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的视觉-语言模型，使其能同时处理绳索损伤分类、严重性回归、少样本识别等多种下游任务，且无需任务特定微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: DART 扩展了联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）到跨模态领域，通过 ViT-H/14 和 Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct 结合严重性条件跨模态融合模块（SC-CMF），并引入三种创新：HD-MASK 显著性引导掩码策略、每类可学习严重性门控、对比损伤解耦损失（CDD）。
contributions: 提出了 DART，首个用于绳索状态监测的视觉-语言基础模型，支持多任务统一架构。
设计了 HD-MASK、可学习严重性门控和 CDD 损失三种创新模块，提升跨模态表征能力。
在 14 类细粒度损伤数据集上训练一次，无需微调即可在分类、严重性回归和少样本识别任务上达到 SOTA 性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 4,270 张图像、14 类损伤的数据集上评估，损伤分类准确率 93.22%，macro-F1 91.04%，比纯视觉基线高 38.5 个百分点；严重性回归 Spearman rho=0.94，序内准确率 99.6%；20-shot 少样本识别 macro-F1 89.2%。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（4,270 张图像），可能限制泛化能力。
仅针对合成纤维绳索，未验证在其他材料或场景中的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DART 是一个视觉-语言基础模型，通过统一多任务架构实现合成纤维绳索的全面状态监测，在分类、严重性回归和少样本识别上均取得优异性能。

papers.title: Exploring Clustering Capability of Inpainting Model Embeddings for Pattern-based Individual Identification
papers.abstract: In this paper, we explore deep learning techniques for individual identification of animals based on their skin patterns. Individual identification is crucial in biodiversity monitoring, since it enables analysis of decline or growth of populations, or intra-species interactions within populations. Models trained for the task of individual identification often do not focus on the skin pattern of animals, but on background details or body shape details. These characteristics are not individually specific, or can change drastically through time. We focus on techniques that will make machine learning models more responsive to skin pattern structure when extracting individual visual embeddings from images. For this, we explore image inpainting of task-specific masks as an auxiliary task to enhance ML-based individual identification from animal skin patterns. We propose a comparative analysis among four models as an encoder backbone for the individual identification task. We focus on the case study of zebrafish, which is a widely recognized biological model organism, and which exhibits individually identifying skin patterns. To evaluate encoder backbone performance, we present standard metrics for classification accuracy, embedding clustering metrics, and GradCAM visualizations.

analysis.tldr: 利用图像修复辅助任务增强动物个体识别中皮肤图案特征的提取能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 动物个体识别对生物多样性监测至关重要，但现有模型常关注背景或体型等非特异性特征，忽略了皮肤图案这一稳定且个体化的特征。
analysis.problem: 如何使机器学习模型在提取个体视觉嵌入时更关注皮肤图案结构，而非背景或体型细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有个体识别模型倾向于利用背景或体型特征，这些特征随时间变化大或非个体特有，导致识别鲁棒性不足。
analysis.method: 提出以图像修复（inpainting）作为辅助任务，通过修复任务特定掩码来增强编码器对皮肤图案的敏感性，并比较四种编码器骨干网络。
contributions: 探索图像修复辅助任务用于增强动物个体识别中皮肤图案特征提取的有效性。
提供基于斑马鱼案例的编码器骨干网络比较分析，包括分类准确率、嵌入聚类指标和GradCAM可视化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅以斑马鱼为案例，可能不直接推广到其他物种。
未提供与其他个体识别方法的定量对比结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用图像修复辅助任务增强动物个体识别中皮肤图案特征的提取能力。

papers.title: FairEnc: A Fair Vision-Language Model with Fair Vision and Text Encoders for Glaucoma Detection
papers.abstract: Automated glaucoma detection is critical for preventing irreversible vision loss and reducing the burden on healthcare systems. However, ensuring fairness across diverse patient populations remains a significant challenge. In this paper, we propose FairEnc, a fair pretraining method for vision-language models (VLMs) that enables simultaneous debiasing across multiple sensitive attributes. FairEnc jointly mitigates biases in both textual and visual modalities with respect to multiple sensitive attributes, including race, gender, ethnicity, and language. Specifically, for the textual encoder, we leverage a large language model to generate synthetic clinical descriptions with varied sensitive attributes while preserving disease semantics, and employ a contrastive alignment objective to encourage demographic-invariant representations. For the visual encoder, we propose a dual-level fairness strategy that combines mutual information regularization to reduce statistical dependence between learned features and demographic groups, with multi-discriminator adversarial debiasing. Comprehensive experiments on the publicly available Harvard-FairVLMed dataset demonstrate that FairEnc effectively reduces demographic disparity as measured by DPD and DEOdds while achieving strong diagnostic performance under both zero-shot and linear probing evaluations. Additional experiments on the private FairFundus dataset show that FairEnc consistently preserves fairness advantages under cross-domain and cross-modality settings and maintains diagnostic performance within a competitive range. These results highlight FairEnc's ability to generalize fairness under distribution shifts, supporting its potential for more equitable deployment in real-world clinical settings. Our codebase and synthetic clinical notes are available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出FairEnc，一种公平预训练方法，通过联合去偏视觉和文本编码器，在青光眼检测中实现多敏感属性公平性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动化青光眼检测对防止不可逆视力丧失至关重要，但现有模型在不同患者群体间存在公平性问题，亟需同时去偏多种敏感属性（如种族、性别）的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何使视觉-语言模型在青光眼检测中同时消除文本和视觉模态中关于种族、性别、民族、语言等多敏感属性的偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FairEnc包括：1）文本编码器：利用LLM生成保留疾病语义但改变敏感属性的合成临床描述，通过对比对齐目标学习人口统计不变表示；2）视觉编码器：结合互信息正则化减少特征与人口统计组的统计依赖，以及多判别器对抗去偏。
contributions: 提出FairEnc，首个同时去偏视觉和文本模态多敏感属性的VLM公平预训练方法。
在公开数据集Harvard-FairVLMed和私有数据集FairFundus上验证了公平性和诊断性能。
analysis.experiments: 在公开Harvard-FairVLMed数据集上，零样本和线性探测评估显示FairEnc有效降低DPD和DEOdds指标，同时保持强诊断性能；在私有FairFundus数据集上，跨域和跨模态设置下保持公平性优势。
limitations: 依赖LLM生成合成文本，可能引入新偏差。
仅针对青光眼检测，泛化到其他疾病需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FairEnc，一种公平预训练方法，通过联合去偏视觉和文本编码器，在青光眼检测中实现多敏感属性公平性。

papers.title: VTAgent: Agentic Keyframe Anchoring for Evidence-Aware Video TextVQA
papers.abstract: Video text-based visual question answering (Video TextVQA) aims to answer questions by reasoning over visual textual content appearing in videos. Despite the strong multimodal video understanding capabilities of recent Video-LLMs, their performance on existing Video TextVQA benchmarks remains limited. To better understand this gap, we conduct an upper-bound analysis through frame-wise question answering, counting a sample as correct if any frame yields the right answer, which significantly outperforms direct video-based inference and reveals a substantial performance gap. The results suggest that the primary bottleneck lies in the localization of key question-relevant evidence, rather than in reasoning capacity itself. Building on this insight, we propose a question-guided agent framework that explicitly anchors the relevant keyframes before answering. The approach operates effectively in a training-free setting and consistently surpasses direct video inference. With additional supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL), it achieves an average improvement of +12.12 in accuracy and +11.15 in ANLS across benchmarks, establishing new state-of-the-art results. Our study underscores the critical role of explicit keyframe anchoring for advancing Video TextVQA. The code will be publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于关键帧锚定的智能体框架VTAgent，通过显式定位问题相关关键帧提升视频文本VQA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Video-LLMs在视频文本VQA任务上性能有限，主要瓶颈在于关键证据定位而非推理能力。
analysis.problem: 解决视频文本VQA中关键帧定位不准确导致回答错误的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过逐帧问答上界分析发现，直接视频推理与逐帧最优结果存在显著差距，表明定位是主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出问题引导的智能体框架，先显式锚定相关关键帧再回答，支持无训练、SFT和RL三种模式。
contributions: 揭示视频文本VQA中关键帧定位是主要瓶颈而非推理能力
提出VTAgent框架，通过显式关键帧锚定实现训练无关且可微调的性能提升
在多个基准上取得新SOTA，平均准确率提升+12.12，ANLS提升+11.15
analysis.experiments: 在多个Video TextVQA基准上评估，无训练设置下持续超越直接视频推理，SFT和RL进一步取得SOTA结果。
limitations: 依赖问题引导的锚定策略可能对复杂多步推理场景效果有限
框架在无训练设置下性能提升可能受限于基础模型能力
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于关键帧锚定的智能体框架VTAgent，通过显式定位问题相关关键帧提升视频文本VQA性能。

papers.title: 3D Ultrasound-Derived Pseudo-CT Synthesis Using a Transformer-Augmented Residual Network for Real-Time Operator Guidance
papers.abstract: Computed tomography (CT) is indispensable for clinical diagnosis and image-guided interventions but exposes patients to ionizing radiation, motivating the development of safer imaging alternatives. Ultrasound (US) is non-ionizing and widely accessible; however, it is highly operator dependent and lacks quantitative tissue characterization, often leading to diagnostic uncertainty and unnecessary CT examinations. This work presents a 3D ultrasound-derived pseudo-CT (UD-pCT) framework that generates CT-like anatomical reference volumes inferred from US, without aiming to reproduce physically accurate Hounsfield Units. Paired 3D kidney US and CT volumes from the TRUSTED dataset are first spatially aligned using a landmark-based multimodal registration pipeline, creating high-quality paired inputs for supervised training of an adversarial framework. The proposed Bottleneck Transformer Residual U-Net3D (BT-ResUNet3D) model employs a 3D residual encoder-decoder generator augmented with a transformer bottleneck, enabling effective modeling of fine-grained local anatomical structures as well as long-range volumetric dependencies, while a 3D Conditional PatchGAN discriminator enforces local structural realism in the synthesized pseudo-CT volumes. Quantitative evaluation using PSNR and SSIM demonstrates that the proposed method outperforms established baselines in structural fidelity and perceptual image quality. The UD-pCT volumes provide real-time anatomical reference for operator guidance, potentially reducing acquisition variability and unnecessary CT use. A limitation of this study is the relatively small paired dataset, which may limit the generalizability of the proposed model.

analysis.tldr: 提出3D超声-伪CT合成框架，用Transformer增强残差网络生成实时解剖参考，减少CT辐射暴露。
analysis.research_motivation: CT在临床诊断和图像引导干预中不可或缺，但存在电离辐射风险；超声无辐射且易获取，但高度依赖操作者且缺乏定量组织表征，常导致诊断不确定性和不必要的CT检查。
analysis.problem: 如何从3D超声体积生成高质量的伪CT图像，以提供实时解剖参考，减少CT使用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Bottleneck Transformer Residual U-Net3D (BT-ResUNet3D)模型，采用3D残差编码器-解码器结构，在瓶颈处加入Transformer模块以建模长程依赖，配合3D条件PatchGAN判别器进行对抗训练。
contributions: 提出一种3D超声-伪CT合成框架，用于实时操作者引导。
设计BT-ResUNet3D模型，结合残差U-Net和Transformer瓶颈，有效建模局部细节和全局依赖。
analysis.experiments: 在TRUSTED数据集上使用PSNR和SSIM评估，方法优于已有基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 配对数据集较小，可能限制模型泛化性。
伪CT不追求物理精确的亨氏单位，可能影响某些定量应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出3D超声-伪CT合成框架，用Transformer增强残差网络生成实时解剖参考，减少CT辐射暴露。

papers.title: QuadBox: Accelerating 3D Gaussian Splatting with Geometry-Aware Boxes
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as an advanced technique for real-time novel view synthesis by representing scene geometry and appearance using differentiable Gaussian primitives. However, efficiently computing precise Gaussian-tile intersections remains a critical task in the rasterization pipeline. To this end, we propose QuadBox, a method that leverages four axis-aligned bounding boxes to tightly encapsulate projected Gaussians in a discrete manner. First, we derive a geometry-aware stretching factor that enables the construction of a tile-aligned QuadBox, which covers the elliptical projection and largely excludes irrelevant tiles. Second, we introduce QPass, a single-pass tile traversal algorithm that exhaustively exploits the discrete nature of QuadBox, ensuring that the tile intersection check is performed with simple interval tests. Experiments on public datasets show that our method accelerates the rendering speed of 3DGS by 1.85$\times$. Code is available at \href{ this https URL }{ this https URL }.

analysis.tldr: 通过几何感知的四边形包围盒加速3D高斯溅射的渲染速度。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D高斯溅射在实时新视角合成中表现出色，但高效计算精确的高斯-瓦片交集仍是光栅化流程中的关键瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 加速3D高斯溅射中高斯-瓦片交集的计算，提升渲染速度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出QuadBox方法，利用四个轴对齐包围盒紧密包裹投影高斯，并设计单遍瓦片遍历算法QPass，通过简单区间测试进行瓦片交集检查。
contributions: 提出几何感知的拉伸因子，构建瓦片对齐的QuadBox，紧密覆盖椭圆投影并排除无关瓦片。
引入QPass单遍瓦片遍历算法，利用QuadBox的离散特性，实现高效交集检查。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上，该方法将3DGS的渲染速度加速1.85倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于瓦片的渲染管线。
加速效果可能受场景复杂度影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过几何感知的四边形包围盒加速3D高斯溅射的渲染速度。

papers.title: MIRAGE: Retrieval and Generation of Multimodal Images and Texts for Medical Education
papers.abstract: Access to diverse, well-annotated medical images with interactive learning tools is fundamental for training practitioners in medicine and related fields to improve their diagnostic skills and understanding of anatomical structures. While medical atlases are valuable, they are often impractical due to their size and lack of interactivity, whereas online image search may provide mislabeled or incomplete material. To address this, we propose MIRAGE, a multimodal medical text and image retrieval and generation system that allows users to find and generate clinically relevant images from trustworthy sources by mapping both text and images to a shared latent space, enabling semantically meaningful queries. The system is based on a fine-tuned medical version of CLIP (MedICaT-ROCO), trained with the ROCO dataset, obtained from PubMed Central. MIRAGE allows users to give prompts to retrieve images, generate synthetic ones through a medical diffusion model (Prompt2MedImage) and receive enriched descriptions from a large language model (Dolly-v2-3b). It also supports a dual search option, enabling the visual comparison of different medical conditions. A key advantage of the system is that it relies entirely on publicly available pretrained models, ensuring reproducibility and accessibility. Our goal is to provide a free, transparent and easy-to-use didactic tool for medical students, especially those without programming skills. The system features an interface that enables interactive and personalized visual learning through medical image retrieval and generation. The system is accessible to medical students worldwide without requiring local computational resources or technical expertise, and is currently deployed on Kaggle: this http URL

analysis.tldr: MIRAGE 是一个基于公开预训练模型的多模态医学图像与文本检索生成系统，旨在为医学生提供交互式学习工具。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学教育需要多样、标注良好的医学图像和交互式学习工具，但传统医学图谱体积大且缺乏交互性，在线图像搜索则可能提供错误或不完整的材料。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个免费、透明、易用的多模态医学图像检索与生成系统，帮助医学生（尤其无编程背景者）获取可信的临床图像并进行交互式学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于微调的医学 CLIP 模型（MedICaT-ROCO）将文本和图像映射到共享潜在空间，支持语义查询；结合医学扩散模型（Prompt2MedImage）生成合成图像，并使用大语言模型（Dolly-v2-3b）生成丰富描述；提供双搜索选项以比较不同医学状况。
contributions: 提出了一个完全基于公开预训练模型的多模态医学图像检索与生成系统，确保可复现性和可访问性。
提供了一个免费、透明、易用的交互式学习工具，无需本地计算资源或编程技能，已在 Kaggle 部署。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 系统依赖公开预训练模型，可能在某些罕见疾病或特定解剖结构上表现有限。
生成图像的质量和准确性可能受限于训练数据（ROCO 数据集）的覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MIRAGE 是一个基于公开预训练模型的多模态医学图像与文本检索生成系统，旨在为医学生提供交互式学习工具。

papers.title: Gaze4HRI: Zero-shot Benchmarking Gaze Estimation Neural-Networks for Human-Robot Interaction
papers.abstract: While zero-shot appearance-based 3D gaze estimation offers significant cost-efficiency by directly mapping RGB images to gaze vectors, its reliability in Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) settings remains uncertain. Existing benchmarks frequently overlook fundamental HRI conditions, such as dynamic camera viewpoints and moving targets in video. Furthermore, current cross-dataset evaluations often suffer from a complexity gap, where methods trained on diverse datasets are tested on significantly smaller and less varied sets, failing to assess true robustness. To bridge these gaps, we introduce Gaze4HRI, a large-scale dataset (50+ subjects, 3,000+ videos, 600,000+ frames) designed to evaluate state-of-the-art performance against critical HRI variables: illumination, head-gaze conflict, as well as the motion of camera and gaze target in video. Our benchmark reveals that all evaluated methods fail in at least one condition, identifying steeply-downward gaze as a universal failure point. Notably, PureGaze trained on the ETH-X-Gaze dataset uniquely maintains resilience across all other conditions. These results challenge the recent focus in the literature on complex spatial-temporal modeling and Transformer-based architectures. Instead, our findings suggest that extensive data diversity, as exemplified by the ETH-X-Gaze dataset, serves as the primary driver of zero-shot robustness in unconstrained environments, while resilience-enhancing frameworks, such as PureGaze's self-adversarial loss for gaze feature purification, provide a substantial further improvement. Ultimately, this study establishes a rigorous benchmark that provides practical guidelines for practitioners as well as reshaping future research. The dataset and codes are available at this https URL .
