analysis.tldr: 提出Gaze4HRI基准，发现所有零样本3D视线估计方法在HRI条件下均存在失败点，且数据多样性比复杂架构更重要。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本3D视线估计在HRI中成本低，但现有基准忽略动态视角和移动目标等关键条件，跨数据集评估存在复杂度差距，无法评估真实鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对HRI关键变量（光照、头-视线冲突、相机和目标运动）的零样本视线估计基准，且现有方法在复杂HRI条件下的鲁棒性未知。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有评估方法在至少一种条件下失败，其中陡峭向下视线是通用失败点；PureGaze在ETH-X-Gaze上训练后在其他条件下保持鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 构建包含50+受试者、3000+视频、600000+帧的大规模数据集Gaze4HRI，系统评估多种SOTA方法在光照、头-视线冲突、相机和目标运动等条件下的表现。
contributions: 提出Gaze4HRI基准，覆盖HRI关键变量，揭示零样本视线估计的失败模式。
发现数据多样性（如ETH-X-Gaze）比复杂架构（时空模型、Transformer）对零样本鲁棒性更重要。
验证PureGaze的自对抗损失可进一步提升鲁棒性，为实践提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 在Gaze4HRI数据集上评估多种SOTA方法，包括PureGaze、ETH-X-Gaze等，分析不同条件下的性能。
limitations: 仅评估零样本设置，未考虑微调或领域适应。
数据集可能未覆盖所有HRI场景（如不同机器人平台）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Gaze4HRI基准，发现所有零样本3D视线估计方法在HRI条件下均存在失败点，且数据多样性比复杂架构更重要。

papers.title: Lightweight Cross-Spectral Face Recognition via Contrastive Alignment and Distillation
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous Face Recognition (HFR) aims at matching face images captured across different sensing modalities, such as thermal-to-visible or near-infrared-to-visible, enhancing the usability of face recognition systems in challenging real-world conditions. Although recent HFR methods have achieved significant improvements in performance, many rely on computationally expensive models, making them impractical for deployment on resource-limited edge devices. In this work, we introduce a lightweight yet effective HFR framework by adapting a hybrid CNN-Transformer model originally developed for RGB homogeneous face recognition. Our approach enables efficient end-to-end training with only a small amount of paired heterogeneous data, while still maintaining strong performance on standard RGB face recognition benchmarks. This makes it suitable for both homogeneous and heterogeneous settings. Comprehensive experiments on several challenging HFR and face recognition benchmarks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance while keeping computational requirements low.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级跨光谱人脸识别框架，通过对比对齐和蒸馏实现高效异质人脸识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有异质人脸识别方法依赖高计算量模型，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高性能的同时，实现轻量化的跨光谱人脸识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用混合CNN-Transformer模型，通过对比对齐和蒸馏技术，仅需少量配对异质数据即可端到端训练。
contributions: 提出轻量级HFR框架，适用于同质和异质场景。
在多个基准上达到SOTA或竞争性能，同时保持低计算需求。
analysis.experiments: 在多个异质人脸识别和人脸识别基准上进行综合实验，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模态对（如热成像到可见光），泛化性需验证。
轻量化设计可能在高精度要求场景下性能受限。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级跨光谱人脸识别框架，通过对比对齐和蒸馏实现高效异质人脸识别。

papers.title: Hybrid Congestion Classification Framework Using Flow-Guided Attention and Empirical Mode Decomposition
papers.abstract: Accurate traffic congestion classification requires models that jointly capture roadway scene context and non-stationary traffic motion, yet most prior work treats these requirements in isolation. Vision-based methods often depend on appearance cues with standard temporal pooling, which can bias predictions toward static infrastructure, whereas signal-based approaches characterize temporal dynamics but lack the spatial context needed for scene-level localization. These complementary limitations motivate a unified framework that links motion evidence to spatial feature selection while preserving data-adaptive temporal characterization. This study therefore proposes FLO-EMD, a hybrid approach that couples motion-guided attention with empirical, data-driven temporal decomposition. Dense optical flow guides channel and spatial attention so that RGB features are refined toward motion-relevant regions. In parallel, aggregated flow statistics form compact motion traces that are decomposed using Empirical Mode Decomposition (EMD) to extract intrinsic temporal components. The resulting EMD embedding is fused with learned spatiotemporal representations to classify light, medium, and heavy congestion. Experiments on 1,050 five-second clips from four surveillance networks show that FLO-EMD achieves 97.5% overall test accuracy (weighted F1 = 0.9742), outperforming established baselines and remaining robust across diverse environmental conditions; ablation and sensitivity analyses further quantify the contributions of EMD, the number of intrinsic mode functions, and the selected motion descriptors.

analysis.tldr: 提出FLO-EMD混合框架，融合光流引导注意力与经验模态分解，实现高精度交通拥堵分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有交通拥堵分类方法要么依赖视觉外观（忽略动态运动），要么仅分析信号（缺乏空间上下文），两者互补的局限性阻碍了准确分类。
analysis.problem: 如何联合建模道路场景上下文与非平稳交通运动，实现准确的拥堵程度分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FLO-EMD：密集光流引导通道和空间注意力以增强运动相关区域特征；同时聚合光流统计量，经EMD分解提取固有时间成分，并与学习到的时空表示融合，分类轻、中、重度拥堵。
contributions: 提出光流引导注意力机制，使RGB特征聚焦于运动相关区域。
引入经验模态分解处理非平稳交通运动，提取紧凑运动轨迹的固有时间成分。
在四个监控网络的1050个5秒片段上达到97.5%准确率，优于基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在四个监控网络的1050个5秒片段上测试，整体准确率97.5%，加权F1=0.9742；消融和敏感性分析量化了EMD、本征模态函数数量和运动描述子的贡献。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量光流计算，在低光照或遮挡场景下性能可能下降。
EMD分解的计算开销可能限制实时应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FLO-EMD混合框架，融合光流引导注意力与经验模态分解，实现高精度交通拥堵分类。

papers.title: VC-FeS: Viewpoint-Conditioned Feature Selection for Vehicle Re-identification in Thermal Vision
papers.abstract: Identification of less-articulated objects using single-channel images, such as thermal images, is important in many applications, such as surveillance. However, in this domain, existing methods show poor performance due to high similarity among objects of the same category in the absence of color information (overlooking shape information) and de-emphasized texture information. Furthermore, variability in viewpoint adds more complexity as the features vary from side to side. We address these issues by constructing viewpoint-conditioned feature vectors and area-specific feature comparisons in separate feature spaces. These interventions enable leveraging the advancements of existing RGB-pre-trained ViT feature extractors while effectively adapting them to address the challenges specific to the thermal domain. We test our system with RGBNT100 (IR) vehicle dataset and a thermal maritime dataset acquired by us. Our results surpass the state-of-the-art methods by 19.7% and 12.8% for the above datasets in mAP scores, respectively. We also plan to make our thermal dataset available, the first of its kind for maritime vessel identification.

analysis.tldr: 提出视角条件特征选择方法，在热红外车辆重识别中超越SOTA 19.7% mAP。
analysis.research_motivation: 热红外图像中同类物体因缺乏颜色和纹理信息而高度相似，且视角变化导致特征差异大，现有方法性能差。
analysis.problem: 热红外图像中车辆重识别因颜色缺失、纹理弱化和视角变化导致的特征混淆问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 热红外图像中同类物体外观高度相似，且不同视角下特征差异显著，现有RGB预训练模型直接应用效果不佳。
analysis.method: 构建视角条件特征向量，并在不同特征空间中进行区域特定特征比较，以适配热红外领域。
contributions: 提出视角条件特征选择方法，有效利用RGB预训练ViT特征提取器并适应热红外领域。
在RGBNT100和自采热红外海事数据集上分别超越SOTA 19.7%和12.8% mAP。
将公开首个用于海上船只识别的热红外数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在RGBNT100 (IR)车辆数据集和自采热红外海事数据集上评估，mAP分别提升19.7%和12.8%。
limitations: 方法依赖视角条件，可能对视角估计误差敏感。
仅针对热红外图像，泛化到其他单通道图像需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视角条件特征选择方法，在热红外车辆重识别中超越SOTA 19.7% mAP。

papers.title: Morphology-Guided Cross-Task Coupling for Joint Building Height and Footprint Estimation
papers.abstract: Building height (BH) and building footprint (BF) jointly describe the vertical and horizontal extent of the built environment and are required inputs for urban climate, disaster-risk, and population-mapping models. The two parameters are coupled through floor-area-ratio (FAR) constraints, yet remote-sensing approaches typically treat them as independent regression targets. We argue that explicitly encoding this cross-task coupling is more impactful than further refining individual encoders, and propose MorphoFormer, a joint BH/BF estimation framework built around two complementary mechanisms: (i) a BF-Guided Task Decoder (BGTD) that gates the height branch via cross-attention on a footprint-derived morphology context, and (ii) a Morphology Consistency Loss (MCL) that supervises a height-from-footprint surrogate against the ground-truth BH, indirectly forcing the BF feature to encode height-correlated structure. The encoder is a single-stage Swin backbone fed by Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 multispectral, and DEM inputs, trained and evaluated on a geo-blocked split of 54 cities. Against a Swin-MTL baseline at identical receptive field, MorphoFormer reduces BH test RMSE from 3.39 to 3.15 m (R^2 improves 0.62 -> 0.67) with BF R^2 stable at 0.80. Controlled ablations at identical capacity attribute most of this 0.24 m improvement to the two proposed mechanisms: removing BGTD raises BH RMSE by 0.11 m and removing MCL raises it by 0.11 m, with the residual approximately 0.02 m falling within the noise floor of encoder-side variations. Because both mechanisms act on cross-task representations rather than pixels, the design carries no intrinsic dependence on input resolution.

analysis.tldr: 提出MorphoFormer，通过显式编码建筑高度与足迹的跨任务耦合，在54城市数据集上实现高度估计RMSE从3.39降至3.15米。
analysis.research_motivation: 建筑高度和足迹是城市气候、灾害风险等模型的关键输入，但现有遥感方法通常将它们作为独立回归任务，忽略了通过容积率约束的耦合关系。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模建筑高度与足迹之间的跨任务耦合，以提升联合估计精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MorphoFormer框架，包含两个互补机制：BF引导任务解码器（BGTD）通过足迹导出的形态上下文交叉注意力门控高度分支；形态一致性损失（MCL）通过高度-足迹代理监督，间接迫使足迹特征编码高度相关结构。编码器为单阶段Swin骨干，输入Sentinel-1 SAR、Sentinel-2多光谱和DEM数据。
contributions: 提出显式编码建筑高度与足迹跨任务耦合的联合估计框架MorphoFormer。
设计BF引导任务解码器和形态一致性损失两个互补机制，有效提升高度估计精度。
在54城市地理分块数据集上验证，相比Swin-MTL基线，高度RMSE降低0.24米，R²从0.62提升至0.67。
analysis.experiments: 在54城市地理分块数据集上，与Swin-MTL基线对比，高度RMSE从3.39降至3.15米，R²从0.62提升至0.67，足迹R²稳定在0.80。消融实验显示BGTD和MCL分别贡献0.11米RMSE降低。
limitations: 可能仅适用于遥感图像中的建筑高度和足迹联合估计任务。
未讨论对极高密度或复杂城市区域的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MorphoFormer，通过显式编码建筑高度与足迹的跨任务耦合，在54城市数据集上实现高度估计RMSE从3.39降至3.15米。

papers.title: ULF-Loc: Unbiased Landmark Feature for Robust Visual Localization with 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Visual localization is a core technology for augmented reality and autonomous navigation. Recent methods combine the efficient rendering of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with feature-based localization. These methods rely on direct matching between 2D query features and the 3D Gaussian feature field, but this often results in mismatches due to an inherent bias in the learned Gaussian feature. We theoretically analyze the feature learning process in 3DGS, revealing that the widely adopted $\alpha$-blending optimization inherently introduces bias into 3D point features. This bias stems from the entanglement between individual Gaussians and their neighboring Gaussians, making the learned features unsuitable for precise matching tasks. Motivated by these findings, we propose ULF-Loc, an unbiased landmark feature framework that replaces biased feature optimization with geometry-weighted feature fusion. We further introduce keypoint-consensus landmark sampling to select reliable Gaussians and local geometric consistency verification to reject mismatches caused by rendering artifacts. On the Cambridge Landmarks dataset, ULF-Loc reduces the mean median translation error by 17\% compared to the state-of-the-art, while achieving superior efficiency with only 1/10 the training time and 1/6 the GPU memory of STDLoc.

analysis.tldr: 提出无偏地标特征框架ULF-Loc，通过几何加权特征融合解决3DGS特征偏差，提升视觉定位精度与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉定位是AR和自动驾驶的核心技术，现有基于3DGS的方法因特征学习中的α混合优化引入偏差，导致匹配不准确，限制了定位鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 3DGS特征学习中的α混合优化导致3D点特征存在固有偏差，影响2D-3D匹配的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 理论分析表明，α混合优化中单个高斯体素与相邻高斯体素的纠缠导致特征偏差，使得学习到的特征不适合精确匹配。
analysis.method: 提出ULF-Loc框架，用几何加权特征融合替代有偏特征优化，并引入关键点一致性地标采样和局部几何一致性验证。
contributions: 理论揭示3DGS特征学习中的α混合优化偏差，并分析其来源。
提出无偏地标特征框架ULF-Loc，包括几何加权融合、关键点一致性地标采样和局部几何一致性验证。
在Cambridge Landmarks数据集上，相比SOTA降低17%中位平移误差，训练时间仅1/10，GPU内存仅1/6。
analysis.experiments: 在Cambridge Landmarks数据集上评估，与STDLoc等SOTA方法对比，报告了平移误差、训练时间和GPU内存。
limitations: 可能依赖关键点检测质量，在纹理稀疏场景下性能可能下降。
几何加权融合的权重设计可能需针对不同场景调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无偏地标特征框架ULF-Loc，通过几何加权特征融合解决3DGS特征偏差，提升视觉定位精度与效率。

papers.title: Anny-Fit: All-Age Human Mesh Recovery
papers.abstract: Recovering 3D human pose and shape from a single image remains a cornerstone of human-centric vision, yet most methods assume adult subjects and optimize each person independently. These assumptions fail in real-world, all-age scenes, where body proportions and depth must be resolved jointly. We introduce Anny-Fit, a multi-person, camera-space optimization framework for all-age 3D human mesh recovery (HMR). Unlike existing per-person fitting methods, Anny-Fit jointly optimizes all individuals directly in the camera coordinate system, enforcing global spatial consistency. At the core of our approach is the use of multiple forms of expert knowledge -- including metric depth maps, instance segmentation, 2D keypoints, and, VLM-derived semantic attributes such as age and gender -- each obtained from dedicated off-the-shelf networks. These complementary signals jointly guide the optimization, constraining the depth-scale ambiguity characteristic of all-age scenes. Across diverse datasets, Anny-Fit consistently improves 2D reprojection accuracy (+13 to 16), relative depth ordering (+6 to 7), 3D estimation error (-9 to -29) and shape estimation (+25 to +82), producing more coherent scenes. Finally, we show that VLM-based semantic knowledge can be distilled into an HMR model via the pseudo-ground-truth annotations produced by Anny-Fit on training data, enabling it to learn semantically meaningful shape parameters while improving HMR performance. Our approach bridges adult-only and all-age modeling by enabling zero-shot adaptation of adult-trained HMR pipelines to the full age spectrum without retraining. Code is publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: Anny-Fit 通过联合优化多人体、利用多模态专家知识（包括 VLM 语义属性），实现了全年龄段 3D 人体网格恢复，显著提升深度排序和形状估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 3D 人体网格恢复方法大多假设成人主体且独立优化每个人，无法处理真实世界中全年龄段场景下身体比例和深度的联合歧义。
analysis.problem: 从单张图像中恢复全年龄段、多人的 3D 人体姿态和形状，并解决深度-尺度歧义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Anny-Fit，一个多人在相机空间联合优化框架，利用度量深度图、实例分割、2D 关键点和 VLM 导出的年龄/性别等语义属性作为专家知识，共同约束优化过程。
contributions: 提出首个全年龄段多人体网格恢复的联合优化框架 Anny-Fit，直接相机坐标系优化保证全局空间一致性。
利用多种专家知识（包括 VLM 语义属性）解决深度-尺度歧义，显著提升 2D 重投影精度、相对深度排序、3D 估计和形状估计。
展示 VLM 语义知识可通过 Anny-Fit 生成的伪真值蒸馏到 HMR 模型中，实现零样本适应全年龄段。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上，Anny-Fit 在 2D 重投影精度（+13 到 16）、相对深度排序（+6 到 7）、3D 估计误差（-9 到 -29）和形状估计（+25 到 +82）上均有一致提升。
limitations: 依赖多个 off-the-shelf 网络，可能引入累积误差。
VLM 语义属性可能受限于训练数据分布，对罕见年龄或性别组合效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Anny-Fit 通过联合优化多人体、利用多模态专家知识（包括 VLM 语义属性），实现了全年龄段 3D 人体网格恢复，显著提升深度排序和形状估计。

papers.title: Not Every Subject Should Stay: Machine Unlearning for Noisy Engagement Recognition
papers.abstract: Engagement recognition datasets are typically subject-indexed and often contain noisy, subjective supervision, making post-hoc dataset revision a practical problem. Existing noisy-label and data-cleaning methods largely operate at the sample level before or during training, but do not directly address a different question: once a model has already been trained, can the influence of an entire problematic subject be removed without full retraining? We study this setting through subject-level machine unlearning as a post-hoc sanitization mechanism for engagement recognition. Starting from a baseline trained on all subjects, we rank candidate harmful subjects using a model-dependent proxy, apply a lightweight approximate unlearning update, and compare the result against an oracle model retrained from scratch on the retained subjects only. We instantiate this protocol on DAiSEE and EngageNet using Tensor-Convolution and Convolution-Transformer Network (TCCT-Net) as a fixed platform and evaluate three matched model states under the same removal scenario: baseline, unlearned, and oracle. In representative K=3 forget-set settings, the unlearned model recovers 89.3% and 92.5% of the oracle gain on EngageNet and DAiSEE, respectively, at roughly one quarter of retraining cost. Across the tested small-audit regimes, effectiveness is strongest at an intermediate forget-set size, indicating that approximate subject-level unlearning is a useful low-cost correction mechanism, but one whose benefit depends on subject selection quality and removal regime.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于主题级机器遗忘的噪声参与识别后处理方法，无需完全重训即可移除问题主题影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 参与识别数据集常含噪声和主观标注，且按主题索引，训练后难以低成本移除问题主题的影响。现有方法多在训练前或训练中处理样本级噪声，不适用于训练后移除整个主题。
analysis.problem: 如何在已训练的参与识别模型中，无需完全重训即可移除问题主题的影响？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于主题级机器遗忘：从全数据训练基线模型开始，用模型依赖代理排序候选有害主题，应用轻量近似遗忘更新，与仅保留好主题的从头训练模型对比。
contributions: 提出主题级机器遗忘作为参与识别后处理机制，解决训练后移除问题主题的问题。
在DAiSEE和EngageNet上验证，遗忘模型恢复89.3%和92.5%的oracle增益，成本约为重训的四分之一。
analysis.experiments: 在DAiSEE和EngageNet数据集上，使用TCCT-Net平台，评估基线、遗忘和oracle三种模型状态。K=3遗忘集设置下，遗忘模型恢复89.3%和92.5%的oracle增益，成本约为重训的四分之一。
limitations: 有效性依赖于主题选择质量。
仅在中等遗忘集大小下效果最强，极端大小下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于主题级机器遗忘的噪声参与识别后处理方法，无需完全重训即可移除问题主题影响。

papers.title: FaithfulFaces: Pose-Faithful Facial Identity Preservation for Text-to-Video Generation
papers.abstract: Identity-preserving text-to-video generation (IPT2V) empowers users to produce diverse and imaginative videos with consistent human facial identity. Despite recent progress, existing methods often suffer from significant identity distortion under large facial pose variations or facial occlusions. In this paper, we propose \textit{FaithfulFaces}, a pose-faithful facial identity preservation learning framework to improve IPT2V in complex dynamic scenes. The key of FaithfulFaces is a pose-shared identity aligner that refines and aligns facial poses across distinct views via a pose-shared dictionary and a pose variation-identity invariance constraint. By mapping single-view inputs into a global facial pose representation with explicit Euler angle embeddings, FaithfulFaces provides a pose-faithful facial prior that guides generative foundations toward robust identity-preserving generation. In particular, we develop a specialized pipeline to curate a high-quality video dataset featuring substantial facial pose diversity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FaithfulFaces achieves state-of-the-art performance, maintaining superior identity consistency and structural clarity even as pose changes and occlusions occur.

analysis.tldr: 提出姿态共享身份对齐器，在文本到视频生成中保持人脸身份一致性，尤其应对大姿态变化和遮挡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有身份保持文本到视频生成方法在大姿态变化或面部遮挡下身份失真严重，亟需鲁棒的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 解决文本到视频生成中因大姿态变化和面部遮挡导致的人脸身份失真问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FaithfulFaces框架，核心是姿态共享身份对齐器，通过姿态共享字典和姿态变化-身份不变性约束，将单视角输入映射为全局面部姿态表示（含欧拉角嵌入），提供姿态忠实的面部先验。
contributions: 提出姿态共享身份对齐器，实现跨视角面部姿态对齐与身份保持。
构建高质量、大姿态多样性的视频数据集。
在复杂动态场景下实现SOTA身份一致性和结构清晰度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量姿态标注数据。
对极端遮挡或非正面视角的泛化能力待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出姿态共享身份对齐器，在文本到视频生成中保持人脸身份一致性，尤其应对大姿态变化和遮挡。

papers.title: Multi-Level Bidirectional Biomimetic Learning for EEG-Based Visual Decoding
papers.abstract: EEG-based visual neural decoding aims to align neural responses with visual stimuli for tasks such as image retrieval. However, limited paired data and a fundamental mismatch between high-fidelity digital images and biological visual perception - distorted by retinotopic mapping and subject-specific neuroanatomy - severely impede cross-modal alignment. To address this, we propose MB2L, a Multi-Level Bidirectional Biomimetic Learning framework that incorporates structured physiological inductive biases into representation learning. Specifically, we propose Adaptive Blur with Visual Priors to mitigate perceptual-structural mismatch by reweighting visual inputs according to retinotopic priors. We further propose Biomimetic Visual Feature Extraction to learn multi-level visual representations consistent with hierarchical cortical processing, enhancing subject-invariant encoding. These modules are jointly optimized via Multi-level Bidirectional Contrastive Learning, which aligns EEG and visual features in a shared semantic space through bidirectional contrastive objectives. Experiments show MB2L achieves 80.5% Top-1 and 97.6% Top-5 accuracy on zero-shot EEG-to-image retrieval, significantly outperforming prior methods and demonstrating strong generalization across subjects and experimental settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出多级双向仿生学习框架MB2L，通过引入生理先验提升EEG视觉解码性能。
analysis.research_motivation: EEG视觉解码中，有限的配对数据以及数字图像与生物视觉感知之间的根本性不匹配（受视网膜拓扑映射和个体神经解剖影响）严重阻碍了跨模态对齐。
analysis.problem: 解决EEG与视觉刺激之间的跨模态对齐问题，实现零样本EEG到图像检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MB2L框架，包含自适应模糊视觉先验（缓解感知-结构不匹配）、仿生视觉特征提取（学习多级视觉表示）和多级双向对比学习（对齐EEG和视觉特征）。
contributions: 提出自适应模糊视觉先验，根据视网膜拓扑先验重新加权视觉输入，缓解感知-结构不匹配。
提出仿生视觉特征提取，学习与层级皮层处理一致的多级视觉表示，增强跨主体不变性。
通过多级双向对比学习联合优化，实现零样本EEG到图像检索，性能显著优于先前方法。
analysis.experiments: 在零样本EEG到图像检索任务上，MB2L达到80.5% Top-1和97.6% Top-5准确率，显著优于先前方法，并展示了跨主体和实验设置的强泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视觉先验，泛化到其他视觉任务需调整。
未讨论计算开销或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多级双向仿生学习框架MB2L，通过引入生理先验提升EEG视觉解码性能。

papers.title: Physical Adversarial Clothing Evades Visible-Thermal Detectors via Non-Overlapping RGB-T Pattern
papers.abstract: Visible-thermal (RGB-T) object detection is a crucial technology for applications such as autonomous driving, where multimodal fusion enhances performance in challenging conditions like low light. However, the security of RGB-T detectors, particularly in the physical world, has been largely overlooked. This paper proposes a novel approach to RGB-T physical attacks using adversarial clothing with a non-overlapping RGB-T pattern (NORP). To simulate full-view (0$^{\circ}$--360$^{\circ}$) RGB-T attacks, we construct 3D RGB-T models for human and adversarial clothing. NORP is a new adversarial pattern design using distinct visible and thermal materials without overlap, avoiding the light reduction in overlapping RGB-T patterns (ORP). To optimize the NORP on adversarial clothing, we propose a spatial discrete-continuous optimization (SDCO) method. We systematically evaluated our method on RGB-T detectors with different fusion architectures, demonstrating high attack success rates both in the digital and physical worlds. Additionally, we introduce a fusion-stage ensemble method that enhances the transferability of adversarial attacks across unseen RGB-T detectors with different fusion architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出非重叠RGB-T图案的对抗服装，通过空间离散-连续优化方法实现对可见-热红外双模检测器的物理对抗攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 可见-热红外双模检测器在自动驾驶等应用中至关重要，但其物理世界安全性被忽视，现有对抗攻击方法未考虑双模融合特性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计物理对抗服装，在可见光和热红外两个模态上同时欺骗RGB-T检测器，并实现全视角攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出非重叠RGB-T图案（NORP）的对抗服装，使用不重叠的可见光和热红外材料；采用空间离散-连续优化方法（SDCO）优化图案；引入融合阶段集成方法增强跨架构迁移性。
contributions: 首次提出针对RGB-T双模检测器的物理对抗攻击方法，使用非重叠RGB-T图案。
提出空间离散-连续优化方法（SDCO）优化对抗图案，并引入融合阶段集成方法提升迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在数字和物理世界中对不同融合架构的RGB-T检测器进行系统评估，显示高攻击成功率。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定人体模型和服装材质有效。
未讨论对遮挡或动态场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非重叠RGB-T图案的对抗服装，通过空间离散-连续优化方法实现对可见-热红外双模检测器的物理对抗攻击。

papers.title: Contact Matrix: Enhancing Dance Motion Synthesis with Precise Interaction Modeling
papers.abstract: Generating realistic reactive motions, in which one person reacts to the fixed motions of others, is challenging due to strict interaction constraints and a limited feasible solution space. This paper focuses on a typical scenario: duet dance, where high-quality data is scarce, motion patterns are complex, and the details of human interactions are both intricate and abundant. To tackle these challenges, we propose a novel two-stage framework. In the first stage, we introduce a motion VQ-VAE with separate body-part encoders and a joint decoder, enabling specialized codebooks to enhance representation capacity while dynamically modeling dependencies across body parts during decoding, thereby preventing inconsistencies in the generated motions. In the second stage, we propose a contact-aware diffusion model for reactive motion generation that jointly generates motion and a contact matrix between individuals, enabling explicit interaction modeling and providing guidance toward more precise and constrained interaction dynamics during sampling. Experiments show that our method outperforms Duolando with lower $\text{FID}_k$ (8.89 vs. 25.30) and $\text{FID}_{cd}$ (8.01 vs. 9.97), as well as a higher BED (0.4606 vs. 0.2858), indicating improved interaction fidelity and rhythmic synchronization.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段框架，通过身体部分VQ-VAE和接触感知扩散模型提升双人舞蹈运动合成中的交互精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成真实反应运动（如双人舞）面临交互约束严格、可行解空间有限、高质量数据稀缺、运动模式复杂等挑战，现有方法难以精确建模交互细节。
analysis.problem: 如何从固定动作中生成高质量、交互精确的双人舞蹈反应运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 双人舞蹈中交互细节复杂且丰富，现有方法在交互保真度和节奏同步性上不足。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用带独立身体部分编码器和联合解码器的运动VQ-VAE，通过专用码本增强表示能力并动态建模身体部分依赖；第二阶段提出接触感知扩散模型，联合生成运动和个体间接触矩阵，实现显式交互建模并在采样中提供精确约束。
contributions: 提出身体部分分离的VQ-VAE，提升运动表示能力并防止生成不一致。
提出接触感知扩散模型，通过联合生成接触矩阵显式建模交互，提高交互精度和约束。
analysis.experiments: 在双人舞蹈数据集上评估，与Duolando相比，FID_k从25.30降至8.89，FID_cd从9.97降至8.01，BED从0.2858提升至0.4606。
limitations: 仅针对双人舞蹈场景，未验证其他交互场景。
依赖固定动作输入，未考虑双向交互。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段框架，通过身体部分VQ-VAE和接触感知扩散模型提升双人舞蹈运动合成中的交互精度。

papers.title: CAST: Mitigating Object Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models via Caption-Guided Visual Attention Steering
papers.abstract: Although Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance on downstream tasks, they frequently produce contents that deviate from visual information, leading to object hallucination. To tackle this, recent works mostly depend on expensive manual annotations and training cost, or decoding strategies which significantly increase inference time. In this work, we observe that LVLMs' attention to visual information is significantly enhanced when answering caption queries compared to non-caption queries. Inspired by this phenomenon, we propose Caption-guided Visual Attention Steering (CAST), a training-free, plug-and-play hallucination mitigation method that leverages the attention activation pattern corresponding to caption queries to enhance LVLMs' visual perception capability. Specifically, we use probing techniques to identify attention heads that are highly sensitive to caption queries and estimate optimized steering directions for their outputs. This steering strengthens LVLM's fine-grained visual perception capabilities, thereby effectively mitigating object hallucination. CAST reduced object hallucination by an average of 6.03% across five widely used LVLMs and five benchmarks including both discriminative and generative tasks, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance while adding little inference cost and preserving other foundational capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的视觉注意力引导方法CAST，利用标题查询的注意力模式减少LVLM物体幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM常产生偏离视觉信息的物体幻觉，现有方法依赖昂贵人工标注或增加推理时间。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练成本和推理时间的前提下，有效缓解LVLM的物体幻觉问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LVLM在处理标题查询时对视觉信息的注意力显著增强，而非标题查询则较弱。
analysis.method: 通过探针识别对标题查询敏感的注意力头，估计优化方向并引导视觉注意力，增强细粒度视觉感知。
contributions: 发现标题查询能增强LVLM视觉注意力的现象
提出训练无关的插拔式幻觉缓解方法CAST，仅需少量推理开销
analysis.experiments: 在5个LVLM和5个基准（含判别与生成任务）上平均减少6.03%物体幻觉，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖标题查询的质量
未在更多模态或复杂场景下验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的视觉注意力引导方法CAST，利用标题查询的注意力模式减少LVLM物体幻觉。

papers.title: UniPCB: A Generation-Assisted Detection Framework for PCB Defect Inspection
papers.abstract: In the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT), enabling intelligent, real-time Printed Circuit Board (PCB) defect inspection is critical for ensuring product reliability. However, existing IIoT-based visual inspection systems face two compounding challenges: scarce and imbalanced defect samples that limit model training, and insufficient feature representation under complex circuit backgrounds. Existing generation methods rely on single-modality conditions with coarse structural control, while detection methods improve architectures without addressing the data bottleneck. To resolve both challenges jointly, we propose a generation-assisted PCB defect inspection framework that integrates controlled defect synthesis with task-specific defect detection within an IIoT-enabled pipeline. On the generation side, a Multi-modal Condition Generator extracts complementary edge, depth, and text conditions in parallel. A ScaleEncoder then embeds these conditions into the diffusion U-Net at four resolutions, and a Condition Modulation applies FiLM-style spatially-adaptive modulation at each scale, enabling structurally aligned and defect-aware sample synthesis to augment the scarce IIoT dataset. On the detection side, an Inverted Residual Shift Attention couples self-attention with shift-wise convolution to jointly capture global context and local texture, and a Cross-level Complementary Fusion Block generates pixel-level gates for selective cross-level feature fusion. The synthesized samples directly enrich the detection training set, so that improvements in generation compound with improvements in detection. Extensive experiments on DsPCBSD+ demonstrate that UniPCB achieves mAP@0.5 of 98.0% and mAP@0.5:0.95 of 61.8% on defect detection, surpassing all compared methods, while the generation branch attains an FID of 129.61 and SSIM of 0.619, outperforming existing conditional generation approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成辅助的PCB缺陷检测框架UniPCB，通过多模态条件扩散生成缺陷样本增强数据，并设计新型检测模块，在DsPCBSD+上达到98.0% mAP@0.5。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业物联网中PCB缺陷检测面临缺陷样本稀缺、类别不平衡以及复杂电路背景下特征表示不足的问题，现有生成方法缺乏精细结构控制，检测方法未解决数据瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何联合解决PCB缺陷检测中的样本稀缺和特征表示不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出生成辅助检测框架UniPCB：生成侧使用多模态条件生成器提取边缘、深度和文本条件，通过ScaleEncoder嵌入扩散U-Net，并采用FiLM风格的空间自适应调制实现结构对齐的缺陷样本合成；检测侧设计倒置残差移位注意力（IRSA）捕获全局上下文和局部纹理，以及跨层互补融合块（CCFB）进行像素级门控特征融合。
contributions: 提出生成辅助检测框架，将可控缺陷合成与任务特定检测集成于IIoT流水线中。
设计多模态条件生成器与尺度编码器，实现结构对齐的缺陷样本合成。
提出倒置残差移位注意力和跨层互补融合块，提升检测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在DsPCBSD+数据集上，检测任务达到mAP@0.5为98.0%，mAP@0.5:0.95为61.8%，生成任务FID为129.61，SSIM为0.619，均优于对比方法。
limitations: 生成样本的FID和SSIM指标仍有提升空间。
方法在更复杂或不同PCB类型上的泛化能力未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成辅助的PCB缺陷检测框架UniPCB，通过多模态条件扩散生成缺陷样本增强数据，并设计新型检测模块，在DsPCBSD+上达到98.0% mAP@0.5。

papers.title: Temporal Structure Matters for Efficient Test-Time Adaptation in Wearable Human Activity Recognition
papers.abstract: Wearable human activity recognition (WHAR) models often suffer from performance degradation under real-world cross-user distribution shifts. Test-time adaptation (TTA) mitigates this degradation by adapting models online using unlabeled test streams, yet existing methods largely inherit assumptions from vision tasks and underexploit the inherent inter-window temporal structure in WHAR streams. In this paper, we revisit such temporal structure as a feature-conditioned inference signal rather than merely an output-space smoothing prior. We derive the insight that temporal continuity and observation-induced feature deviations provide complementary cues for determining when to preserve or release temporal inertia and where to route prediction refinement during likely transitions. Building upon this insight, we propose SIGHT, a lightweight and backpropagation-free TTA framework for WHAR, enabling real-time edge deployment. SIGHT estimates predictive surprise by comparing the current feature with a prototype-based expected state, and then uses the resulting feature deviation to guide geometry-aware transition routing based on prototype alignment and stream-level marginal habit tracking. Evaluations on real-world datasets confirm that SIGHT outperforms existing TTA baselines while reducing computational and memory costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出利用时间结构进行高效测试时适应的轻量级框架SIGHT，用于可穿戴人体活动识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 可穿戴人体活动识别模型在跨用户分布偏移下性能下降，现有测试时适应方法多继承视觉任务假设，未充分利用WHAR流中固有的窗口间时间结构。
analysis.problem: 如何利用WHAR流中的时间结构（而非仅作为输出平滑先验）实现高效、轻量、无需反向传播的测试时适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 时间连续性和观测引起的特征偏差提供了互补线索：决定何时保持或释放时间惯性，以及在可能的状态转换期间引导预测精炼。
analysis.method: 提出SIGHT框架：通过比较当前特征与原型期望状态估计预测惊喜，利用特征偏差指导基于原型对齐和流级边际习惯追踪的几何感知转换路由。
contributions: 重新审视WHAR中的时间结构作为特征条件推理信号，而非仅输出平滑先验。
提出轻量级、无需反向传播的TTA框架SIGHT，实现实时边缘部署。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界数据集上评估，SIGHT优于现有TTA基线，同时降低计算和内存成本。
limitations: 可能依赖原型质量，对初始原型选择敏感。
未明确讨论多传感器融合场景下的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出利用时间结构进行高效测试时适应的轻量级框架SIGHT，用于可穿戴人体活动识别。

papers.title: Advancing Aesthetic Image Generation via Composition Transfer
papers.abstract: Composition is a cornerstone of visual aesthetics, influencing the appeal of an image. While its principles operate independently of specific content, in practice, composition is often coupled with semantics. As a result, existing methods often enhance composition either through implicit learning or by semantics-based layout control, rather than explicitly modeling composition itself. To address this gap, we introduce Composer, a framework rooted in aesthetic theory, designed to model composition in a semantic-agnostic manner. First, it supports composition transfer by extracting key composition-aware representations from a reference image and leveraging a tailored conditional guidance module to control composition based on pre-trained diffusion models. Second, when users specify only text themes without a composition reference, Composer supports theme-driven composition retrieval by leveraging the in-context learning capabilities of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), achieving explicit composition planning. To enhance composition in a reference-free mode, we conduct text-to-composition fine-tuning on the trained control module to enable implicit composition planning. Furthermore, we curated a high-quality dataset comprising 2 million image-text pairs using state-of-the-art generative models to support model training. Experimental results demonstrate that Composer significantly enhances aesthetic quality in text-to-image tasks and facilitates personalized composition control and transfer, offering users precision and flexibility in the creative process.

analysis.tldr: 提出Composer框架，通过语义无关的构图建模实现美学图像生成中的构图迁移与规划。
analysis.research_motivation: 构图是视觉美学的基础，但现有方法常将构图与语义耦合，缺乏显式的构图建模，限制了构图控制的精确性和灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何在文本到图像生成中实现语义无关的构图建模，支持构图迁移、主题驱动的构图检索以及无参考构图增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Composer框架，包含三个模块：1）从参考图像提取构图感知表示，结合条件引导模块控制扩散模型生成；2）利用LVLM的上下文学习能力实现主题驱动的构图检索；3）通过文本到构图微调实现无参考构图规划。同时构建了200万图像-文本对的高质量数据集。
contributions: 提出语义无关的构图建模方法，支持构图迁移与显式构图规划。
利用LVLM实现主题驱动的构图检索，无需构图参考。
构建大规模高质量数据集，支持模型训练。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明Composer在文本到图像任务中显著提升美学质量，并支持个性化构图控制与迁移。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型和LVLM的性能。
构图检索的准确性可能受LVLM上下文理解能力限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Composer框架，通过语义无关的构图建模实现美学图像生成中的构图迁移与规划。

papers.title: Reference-based Category Discovery: Unsupervised Object Detection with Category Awareness
papers.abstract: Traditional one-shot detection methods have addressed the closed-set problem in object detection, but the high cost of data annotation remains a critical challenge. General unsupervised methods generate pseudo boxes without category labels, thus failing to achieve category-aware classification. To overcome these limitations, we propose Reference-based Category Discovery (RefCD), an unsupervised detector that enables category-aware\footnotemark[1] detection without any manually annotated labels. It leverages feature similarity between predicted objects and unlabeled reference images. Unlike previous unsupervised methods that lack category guidance and one-shot methods which require labeled data, RefCD introduces a carefully designed feature similarity loss to explicitly guide the learning of potential category-specific features. Additionally, RefCD supports category-agnostic detection without reference images, serving as a unified framework. Comprehensive quantitative and qualitative analysis of category-aware and category-agnostic detection results demonstrates its effectiveness, and RefCD can learn category information in an unsupervised paradigm even without category labels.

analysis.tldr: 提出无监督目标检测方法RefCD，利用参考图像特征相似性实现类别感知检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统目标检测依赖大量标注数据，成本高昂；无监督方法虽能生成伪框但缺乏类别信息，无法实现类别感知分类。
analysis.problem: 如何在无任何人工标注的情况下实现类别感知的目标检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出参考图像类别发现（RefCD）框架，通过计算预测对象与未标注参考图像之间的特征相似性，并设计特征相似性损失来引导潜在类别特定特征的学习，同时支持无参考图像的类别无关检测。
contributions: 提出RefCD，首个无需任何标注即可实现类别感知检测的无监督检测器。
设计特征相似性损失，有效利用参考图像引导类别特征学习。
提供统一的框架，同时支持类别感知和类别无关检测。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖参考图像的质量和多样性，可能影响类别发现效果。
未在复杂场景或小目标上验证性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无监督目标检测方法RefCD，利用参考图像特征相似性实现类别感知检测。

papers.title: DiCLIP: Diffusion Model Enhances CLIP's Dense Knowledge for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation (WSSS) with image-level labels typically leverages Class Activation Maps (CAMs) to achieve pixel-level predictions. Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has been introduced to generate CAMs in WSSS. However, previous WSSS methods solely adopt CLIP's vision-language paired property for dense localization, neglecting its inherently limited dense knowledge across both visual and text modalities, which renders CAM generation suboptimal. In this work, we propose DiCLIP, a novel WSSS framework that leverages the generative diffusion model to enhance CLIP's dense knowledge across two modalities. Specifically, Visual Correlation Enhancement (VCE) and Text Semantic Augmentation (TSA) modules are proposed for dense prediction enhancement. To improve the spatial awareness of visual features, our VCE module utilizes diffusion's reliable spatial consistency to mitigate the over-smoothing issue in CLIP's attention. It designs the Attention Clustering Refinement (ACR) module to reliably extract diverse correlation maps from the diffusion model. The correlation maps act as a diversity bias for CLIP's self-attention, recursively pushing its visual features towards a more discriminative dense distribution. To augment the semantics of text embeddings, our TSA module argues that a single text modality is insufficient to encompass the variability of visual categories. Thus, we leverage diffusion's generative power to maintain a dynamic key-value cache model, shifting CAM generation from a patch-text matching mechanism to a novel visual knowledge retrieval paradigm. With these enhancements, DiCLIP not only outperforms state-of-the-art methods on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO but also significantly reduces training costs. Code is publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 利用扩散模型增强CLIP的密集知识，提升弱监督语义分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 弱监督语义分割依赖图像级标签，现有方法使用CLIP生成CAM，但CLIP在视觉和文本模态上的密集知识有限，导致CAM生成次优。
analysis.problem: 如何增强CLIP在视觉和文本模态上的密集知识，以生成更准确的CAM。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CLIP的注意力存在过平滑问题，且单一文本模态不足以覆盖视觉类别的多样性。
analysis.method: 提出DiCLIP框架，包含视觉相关性增强（VCE）和文本语义增强（TSA）模块：VCE利用扩散模型的空间一致性缓解CLIP注意力的过平滑，TSA通过扩散模型维护动态键值缓存，将CAM生成从补丁-文本匹配转变为视觉知识检索。
contributions: 提出DiCLIP框架，利用扩散模型增强CLIP的密集知识，提升WSSS性能。
设计VCE和TSA模块，分别改善视觉特征的空间分辨率和文本语义的多样性。
在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO上达到SOTA，并显著降低训练成本。
analysis.experiments: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上评估，优于现有方法，且训练成本更低。
limitations: 依赖扩散模型的预训练质量。
可能对复杂场景的泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用扩散模型增强CLIP的密集知识，提升弱监督语义分割性能。

papers.title: From Diffusion to Rectified Flow: Rethinking Text-Based Segmentation
papers.abstract: Text-based image segmentation aims to delineate object boundaries within an image from text prompts, offering higher flexibility and broader application scope compared to traditional fixed-category segmentation tasks. Recent studies have shown that diffusion models (e.g., Stable Diffusion) can provide rich multimodal semantic features, leading to studies of using diffusion models as feature extractors for segmentation tasks. Such methods, however, inherit the generative natures of diffusion models that are harmful to discriminative segmentation tasks. In response, we propose RLFSeg, a novel framework that leverages Rectified Flow to learn direct mapping from the image to the segmentation mask within the latent space. The model is thus freed from the noise-denoise process and the need to optimize the time step of diffusion models, resulting in substantially better performance than previous diffusion-based methods, especially on zero-shot scenarios. By introducing label refinement and an Adaptive One-Step Sampling strategy, the model achieves higher accuracy even on a single inference step. The framework redirects a pretrained generative model to the discriminative segmentation task with zero modification to model structure, thus reveals promising application potential and significant research value.

analysis.tldr: 提出RLFSeg框架，利用Rectified Flow替代扩散模型，实现更优的文本引导图像分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型作为特征提取器用于分割任务时，继承了生成模型的噪声-去噪过程，不利于判别式分割，且需要优化时间步长，性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何克服扩散模型在文本引导分割任务中的生成特性带来的性能瓶颈，实现更高效、更准确的零样本分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型的噪声-去噪过程和时间步优化对判别式分割任务有害，导致性能不如预期。
analysis.method: 提出RLFSeg框架，使用Rectified Flow在潜在空间中学习从图像到分割掩码的直接映射，避免噪声-去噪过程；引入标签细化和自适应单步采样策略，提升单步推理精度。
contributions: 首次将Rectified Flow应用于文本引导分割，消除扩散模型的噪声-去噪过程和时间步优化需求。
提出标签细化和自适应单步采样策略，实现单步推理高精度。
零修改模型结构，将预训练生成模型重定向为判别式分割任务，展现应用潜力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练Rectified Flow模型的质量。
自适应单步采样策略的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RLFSeg框架，利用Rectified Flow替代扩散模型，实现更优的文本引导图像分割。

papers.title: GTF: Omnidirectional EPI Transformer for Light Field Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Light field (LF) image super-resolution benefits from Epipolar Plane Images (EPIs), whose line slopes explicitly encode disparity. However, existing Transformer-based LF SR methods mainly attend to horizontal and vertical EPIs, leaving diagonal epipolar geometry underexplored. We present GTF, an omnidirectional EPI Transformer that explicitly models horizontal, vertical, 45-degree, and 135-degree EPIs within a unified reconstruction framework. GTF combines directional EPI processing, MacPI-based prior injection, adaptive directional fusion, and a topology-preserving feed-forward network to better exploit LF geometry. For the NTIRE 2026 fidelity tracks, we use GTF as the main model, while a lightweight GTF-Tiny variant targets the efficiency track. On five standard LF SR benchmarks covering both real-captured and synthetic scenes, GTF reaches 32.78 dB without inference-time enhancement, and stronger inference settings with EPSW and test-time augmentation further improve performance. Under the NTIRE 2026 efficiency constraint, GTF-Tiny attains 32.57 dB with only 0.915M parameters and 19.81 GFLOPs. In the NTIRE 2026 Light Field Image Super-Resolution Challenge, our submissions rank 3rd on Track 1 and Track 3 and 4th on Track 2. Architecture-evolution, channel-width, and inference analyses further support the effectiveness of diagonal EPI modeling, directional fusion, and the lightweight design.

analysis.tldr: 提出全向EPI Transformer GTF，显式建模多方向极平面图像以提升光场超分辨率性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于Transformer的光场超分辨率方法主要关注水平和垂直极平面图像，忽略了45°和135°对角线极平面几何信息，限制了性能提升。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模多方向（水平、垂直、45°、135°）极平面图像，以更充分利用光场几何结构实现高质量超分辨率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对角线极平面图像包含额外的视差信息，现有方法未充分利用；轻量级模型在效率约束下仍能保持高精度。
analysis.method: 提出全向EPI Transformer（GTF），包含方向性EPI处理、MacPI先验注入、自适应方向融合和拓扑保持前馈网络，统一重建框架。
contributions: 首次在Transformer中显式建模水平、垂直、45°和135°四个方向的极平面图像。
提出MacPI先验注入和自适应方向融合模块，有效利用多方向几何信息。
轻量级GTF-Tiny在0.915M参数下达到32.57 dB，适用于效率赛道。
analysis.experiments: 在五个标准光场超分辨率基准（包含真实和合成场景）上，GTF达到32.78 dB（无推理增强），使用EPSW和测试时增强进一步提升。NTIRE 2026挑战赛中，Track 1和Track 3排名第3，Track 2排名第4。
limitations: 可能对极端视差或噪声场景鲁棒性不足。
轻量级模型在极低计算预算下性能可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出全向EPI Transformer GTF，显式建模多方向极平面图像以提升光场超分辨率性能。

papers.title: VL-UniTrack: A Unified Framework with Visual-Language Prompts for UAV-Ground Visual Tracking
papers.abstract: UAV-ground visual tracking (UGVT) aims to simultaneously track the same object from both the UAV and the ground view. However, existing two-stream methods suffer from isolated feature extraction and rely heavily on implicit appearance matching, which struggles to establish reliable correspondence under drastic view differences, leading to tracking unreliability. To address these limitations, we propose VL-UniTrack, a fully unified framework enhanced by visual-language prompts. By encoding features from both views within a single shared encoder, our method breaks the barrier of feature isolation to facilitate sufficient cross-view interaction. To overcome the ambiguity caused by relying solely on appearance matching, we design visual-language geometric prompting module, which fuses language descriptions with visual features to generate learnable prompts. These prompts are then fed into our prompt-guided cross-view adapter module to enable sufficient cross-view feature interaction and to guide the learning of view-specific feature representations. Furthermore, a confidence-modulated mutual distillation loss is proposed to regularize the training by mitigating noise propagation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the latest benchmark. The code can be downloaded in this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出VL-UniTrack，通过视觉-语言提示统一框架解决无人机-地面视角跟踪中的特征隔离和外观匹配歧义问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机-地面视觉跟踪（UGVT）中，现有双流方法存在特征提取隔离和过度依赖隐式外观匹配的问题，在视角差异大时难以建立可靠对应关系，导致跟踪不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何解决双流方法中特征隔离和仅依赖外观匹配导致的跨视角对应不准确问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有双流方法在视角差异大时，隐式外观匹配难以建立可靠对应，导致跟踪不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出VL-UniTrack统一框架，使用共享编码器编码双视角特征，设计视觉-语言几何提示模块融合语言描述与视觉特征生成可学习提示，并通过提示引导的跨视角适配器实现充分交互，同时提出置信度调制互蒸馏损失抑制噪声传播。
contributions: 提出首个完全统一的无人机-地面视觉跟踪框架，打破特征隔离。
设计视觉-语言几何提示模块和提示引导跨视角适配器，增强跨视角特征交互。
提出置信度调制互蒸馏损失，有效抑制噪声传播。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在最新基准上达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量语言描述，在无描述场景下性能未知。
统一编码器可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VL-UniTrack，通过视觉-语言提示统一框架解决无人机-地面视角跟踪中的特征隔离和外观匹配歧义问题。

papers.title: Lightning Unified Video Editing via In-Context Sparse Attention
papers.abstract: Video editing has evolved toward In-Context Learning (ICL) paradigms, yet the resulting quadratic attention costs create a critical computational bottleneck. In this work, we propose In-context Sparse Attention (ISA), the first near-lossless empirical sparse framework tailored for ICL video editing. Our design is grounded in two key insights: first, context tokens exhibit significantly lower saliency than source tokens; second, we theoretically prove and empirically validate that Query sharpness correlates with approximation error. Motivated by these findings, ISA implements an efficient pre-selection strategy to prune redundant context, followed by a dynamic query grouping mechanism that routes high-error queries to full attention and low-error ones to a computationally efficient 0-th order Taylor sparse attention. Furthermore, we build \textbf{\texttt{LIVEditor}} , a novel lightning video editing model via ISA and a proposed video-editing data pipeline that curated a 1.7M high-quality dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LIVEditor achieves a $\sim$60% reduction in attention-module latency while surpassing state-of-the-art methods across EditVerseBench, IVE-Bench, and VIE-Bench, delivering near-lossless acceleration without compromising visual fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出上下文稀疏注意力（ISA）实现近无损加速视频编辑，构建LIVEditor模型在多个基准上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频编辑中的上下文学习范式面临二次注意力成本的计算瓶颈，现有方法效率低下，亟需高效的稀疏注意力框架。
analysis.problem: 解决ICL视频编辑中注意力计算成本过高的问题，实现近无损加速。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 上下文令牌的显著性低于源令牌；查询锐度与近似误差相关。
analysis.method: 提出上下文稀疏注意力（ISA），包括高效预选择策略修剪冗余上下文，以及动态查询分组机制将高误差查询路由到全注意力、低误差查询路由到0阶泰勒稀疏注意力。
contributions: 提出首个近无损的稀疏注意力框架ISA，专为ICL视频编辑设计。
构建LIVEditor模型和1.7M高质量视频编辑数据集，实现约60%注意力模块延迟降低并超越SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在EditVerseBench、IVE-Bench和VIE-Bench上评估，LIVEditor实现约60%注意力延迟降低，同时超越现有方法。
limitations: 稀疏注意力可能在某些极端场景下引入误差。
依赖高质量数据集，数据构建成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出上下文稀疏注意力（ISA）实现近无损加速视频编辑，构建LIVEditor模型在多个基准上超越SOTA。

papers.title: Open-Source Image Editing Models Are Zero-Shot Vision Learners
papers.abstract: Recent studies have shown that large generative models can solve vision tasks they were not explicitly trained for. However, existing evidence relies on closed-source models~(Veo~3, Nano Banana Pro) or requires task-specific instruction tuning, leaving open whether publicly available image-editing models possess zero-shot vision abilities out of the box. We conduct a systematic evaluation of three open-source image-editing models -- Qwen-Image-Edit, FireRed-Image-Edit, and LongCat-Image-Edit -- on dense visual prediction tasks \emph{without any fine-tuning}. We benchmark monocular depth estimation on NYUv2 and DIODE, surface normal estimation on NYUv2, and semantic segmentation on Cityscapes, covering both geometric and semantic scene understanding. Results show that open-source image-editing models exhibit non-trivial zero-shot visual understanding. On NYUv2 surface normals, FireRed-Image-Edit achieves a mean angular error of $17.69^\circ$, surpassing the fine-tuned Marigold ($20.86^\circ$) and matching the instruction-tuned Vision Banana ($17.78^\circ$) without any task-specific training. On NYUv2 depth estimation, LongCat-Image-Edit obtains $\delta_1{=}0.822$ with affine alignment, and Qwen-Image-Edit leads on DIODE Indoor ($\delta_1{=}0.868$). On Cityscapes semantic segmentation, Qwen-Image-Edit reaches 25.7 mIoU at the 19-class level and 49.5 mIoU at a coarser 7-category level. By comparing three independently trained editors, we test whether zero-shot vision ability is an emergent property of image-editing pretraining rather than a model-specific artifact. Code, evaluation scripts, and all results are publicly released to serve as a reproducible baseline for future work.

analysis.tldr: 开源图像编辑模型无需微调即可零样本解决密集视觉预测任务，性能可匹敌甚至超越专用模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究表明大型生成模型可解决未显式训练的视觉任务，但证据依赖闭源模型或需任务特定微调，缺乏对开源图像编辑模型零样本能力的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 验证开源图像编辑模型是否天然具备零样本视觉理解能力，并探究该能力是否为图像编辑预训练涌现特性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对三个开源图像编辑模型（Qwen-Image-Edit、FireRed-Image-Edit、LongCat-Image-Edit）在密集视觉预测任务上进行零样本评估，包括单目深度估计、表面法线估计和语义分割，无需任何微调。
contributions: 首次系统评估开源图像编辑模型的零样本视觉能力，覆盖几何与语义场景理解。
发现FireRed-Image-Edit在表面法线估计上超越微调模型Marigold，匹配指令调优模型Vision Banana。
通过对比三个独立训练的编辑器，验证零样本视觉能力是图像编辑预训练的涌现特性。
公开代码、评估脚本和所有结果，作为可复现基线。
analysis.experiments: 在NYUv2和DIODE上进行深度估计，NYUv2上进行表面法线估计，Cityscapes上进行语义分割。FireRed-Image-Edit在NYUv2表面法线达到平均角度误差17.69°，优于微调Marigold（20.86°）并匹配Vision Banana（17.78°）。LongCat-Image-Edit在NYUv2深度估计上δ1=0.822，Qwen-Image-Edit在DIODE室内δ1=0.868。Cityscapes语义分割上Qwen-Image-Edit达到25.7 mIoU（19类）和49.5 mIoU（7类）。
limitations: 仅评估了三个开源模型，可能不具广泛代表性。
零样本性能仍低于最先进的专用模型，实际应用可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 开源图像编辑模型无需微调即可零样本解决密集视觉预测任务，性能可匹敌甚至超越专用模型。

papers.title: SAMIC: A Lightweight Semantic-Aware Mamba for Efficient Perceptual Image Compression
papers.abstract: Perceptual image compression focuses on preserving high visual quality under low-bitrate constraints. Most existing approaches to perceptual compression leverage the strong generative capabilities of generative adversarial networks or diffusion models, at the cost of substantial model complexity. To this end, we present an efficient perceptual image compression method that exploits the long-range modeling capability and linear computational complexity of state space models, with a particular focus on Mamba. Unlike existing methods that rely on an inherently fixed scanning order and consequently impair semantic continuity and spatial correlation, we develop a semantic-aware Mamba block (SAMB) to enable scanning guided by dynamically clustered semantic features, thereby alleviating the strict causality constraints and long-range information decay inherent to Mamba. Inspired by singular value decomposition, we design an SVD-inspired redundancy reduction module (SVD-RRM) that performs a low-rank approximation on the latent features by introducing a learnable soft threshold, leading to channel-wise redundancy information reduction. The proposed SAMB is integrated into both the encoder and decoder of the compression framework, whereas the SVD-RRM is incorporated only in the encoder. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-art approaches in terms of rate-distortion-perception tradeoff and model complexity. The source code and pretrained models will be available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级语义感知Mamba模型SAMIC，用于高效感知图像压缩，在率失真感知权衡和模型复杂度上优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有感知图像压缩方法依赖GAN或扩散模型，模型复杂度高；而Mamba虽具有线性复杂度，但固定扫描顺序损害语义连续性和空间相关性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用Mamba的长程建模能力和线性复杂度，同时解决其固定扫描顺序导致的语义连续性损失和长程信息衰减问题，实现高效感知图像压缩。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Mamba的固定扫描顺序会破坏语义连续性和空间相关性，且存在严格因果约束和长程信息衰减。
analysis.method: 提出语义感知Mamba块（SAMB），通过动态聚类语义特征引导扫描；设计SVD启发冗余减少模块（SVD-RRM），利用可学习软阈值对潜在特征进行低秩近似以减少通道冗余。
contributions: 提出语义感知Mamba块（SAMB），缓解Mamba的因果约束和长程信息衰减，增强语义连续性。
设计SVD启发冗余减少模块（SVD-RRM），通过低秩近似减少通道冗余，提升压缩效率。
在率失真感知权衡和模型复杂度上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上与现有方法比较率失真感知权衡和模型复杂度，结果优于SOTA。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对高分辨率图像或视频的扩展性未验证。
语义聚类可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级语义感知Mamba模型SAMIC，用于高效感知图像压缩，在率失真感知权衡和模型复杂度上优于现有方法。

papers.title: Efficient Geometry-Controlled High-Resolution Satellite Image Synthesis
papers.abstract: High-resolution satellite images are often scarce and costly, especially for remote areas or infrequent events. This shortage hampers the development and testing of machine learning models for land-cover classification, change detection, and disaster monitoring. In this paper, we tackle the problem of geometry-controlled high-resolution satellite image synthesis by adding control over existing pre-trained diffusion models. We propose a simple yet efficient method for controlling the synthesis process by leveraging only skip connection features using windowed cross-attention modules. Several previously established control techniques are compared, indicating that our method achieves comparable performance while leading to a better alignment with the geometry control map. We also discuss the limitations in current evaluation approaches, amplifying the necessity of a consistent alignment assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种高效方法，通过窗口交叉注意力控制预训练扩散模型的跳跃连接特征，实现几何引导的高分辨率卫星图像合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率卫星图像稀缺且昂贵，限制了土地覆盖分类、变化检测和灾害监测等机器学习模型的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地利用几何控制图引导预训练扩散模型生成高分辨率卫星图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有控制技术性能相当，但所提方法在几何控制图对齐方面表现更好；当前评估方法存在局限性，需要一致的对齐评估。
analysis.method: 在预训练扩散模型的跳跃连接特征上添加窗口交叉注意力模块，实现几何控制。
contributions: 提出一种简单高效的方法，仅利用跳跃连接特征和窗口交叉注意力实现几何控制。
与多种现有控制技术比较，表明所提方法在保持性能的同时实现更好的几何对齐。
讨论当前评估方法的局限性，强调一致对齐评估的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的卫星图像或几何控制图。
窗口交叉注意力的窗口大小选择可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种高效方法，通过窗口交叉注意力控制预训练扩散模型的跳跃连接特征，实现几何引导的高分辨率卫星图像合成。

papers.title: InterMesh: Explicit Interaction-Aware End-to-End Multi-Person Human Mesh Recovery
papers.abstract: Humans constantly interact with their surroundings. Existing end-to-end multi-person human mesh recovery methods, typically based on the DETR framework, capture inter-human relationships through self-attention across all human queries. However, these approaches model interactions only implicitly and lack explicit reasoning about how humans interact with objects and with each other. In this paper, we propose InterMesh, a simple yet effective framework that explicitly incorporates human-environment interaction information into human mesh recovery pipeline. By leveraging a human-object interaction detector, InterMesh enriches query representations with structured interaction semantics, enabling more accurate pose and shape estimation. We design lightweight modules, Contextual Interaction Encoder and Interaction-Guided Refiner, to integrate these features into existing HMR architectures with minimal overhead. We validate our approach through extensive experiments on 3DPW, MuPoTS, CMU Panoptic, Hi4D, and CHI3D datasets, demonstrating remarkable improvements over state-of-the-art methods. Notably, InterMesh reduces MPJPE by 9.9% on CMU Panoptic and 8.2% on Hi4D, highlighting its effectiveness in scenarios with complex human-object and inter-human interactions.

analysis.tldr: InterMesh 通过显式建模人-物交互信息，在多人人体网格恢复中显著提升精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端多人人体网格恢复方法隐式建模交互，缺乏对人-物、人-人交互的显式推理，导致复杂交互场景下姿态和形状估计不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何显式地将人-环境交互信息融入多人人体网格恢复流程，以提升姿态和形状估计的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于 DETR 框架的方法通过自注意力隐式捕获交互，但缺乏显式交互推理，在复杂交互场景下性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出 InterMesh 框架，利用人-物交互检测器提取结构化交互语义，并设计轻量级模块（上下文交互编码器和交互引导精炼器）将其集成到现有 HMR 架构中。
contributions: 提出显式建模人-物交互的端到端多人人体网格恢复框架 InterMesh。
设计轻量级模块 Contextual Interaction Encoder 和 Interaction-Guided Refiner，有效融合交互信息。
在多个数据集上达到 SOTA，尤其在复杂交互场景下显著降低 MPJPE。
analysis.experiments: 在 3DPW、MuPoTS、CMU Panoptic、Hi4D 和 CHI3D 数据集上实验，相比 SOTA 方法，在 CMU Panoptic 上 MPJPE 降低 9.9%，在 Hi4D 上降低 8.2%。
limitations: 依赖人-物交互检测器的质量，可能受限于检测器性能。
未在更多样化的交互场景（如多人-多物）中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: InterMesh 通过显式建模人-物交互信息，在多人人体网格恢复中显著提升精度。

papers.title: Angle-I2P: Angle-Consistent-Aware Hierarchical Attention for Cross-Modality Outlier Rejection
papers.abstract: Image-to-point-cloud registration (I2P) is a fundamental task in robotic applications such as manipulation,grasping, and localization. Existing deep learning-based I2P methods seek to align image and point cloud features in a learned representation space to establish correspondences, and have achieved promising results. However, when the inlier ratio of the initial matching pairs is low, conventional Perspective-n-Points (PnP) methods may struggle to achieve accurate results. To address this limitation, we propose Angle-I2P, an outlier rejection network that leverages angle-consistent geometric constraints and hierarchical attention. First, we design a scale-invariant, crossmodality geometric constraint based on angular consistency. This explicit geometric constraint guides the model in distinguishing inliers from outliers. Furthermore, we propose a global-tolocal hierarchical attention mechanism that effectively filters out geometrically inconsistent matches under rigid transformation, thereby improving the Inlier Ratio (IR) and Registration Recall (RR). Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the 7Scenes, RGBD Scenes V2, and a self-collected dataset, with consistent improvements across all benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于角度一致性和层级注意力的跨模态异常点剔除网络，提升图像-点云配准性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像到点云配准是机器人操作、抓取和定位中的基础任务，现有深度学习方法在初始匹配内点率低时，传统PnP方法难以获得准确结果。
analysis.problem: 解决跨模态图像-点云配准中低内点率下异常匹配剔除问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当初始匹配对的内点率较低时，传统PnP方法性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出Angle-I2P网络，包含尺度不变的角度一致性几何约束和全局到局部的层级注意力机制，用于过滤几何不一致的匹配。
contributions: 设计了基于角度一致性的尺度不变跨模态几何约束，引导模型区分内点和外点。
提出全局到局部的层级注意力机制，有效过滤刚性变换下几何不一致的匹配。
analysis.experiments: 在7Scenes、RGBD Scenes V2和自采集数据集上达到最先进性能，内点率和配准召回率均有提升。
limitations: 可能对极端视角变化或稀疏点云敏感。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于角度一致性和层级注意力的跨模态异常点剔除网络，提升图像-点云配准性能。

papers.title: Reward-Guided Semantic Evolution for Test-time Adaptive Object Detection
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection with vision-language models (VLMs) such as Grounding DINO suffers from performance degradation under test-time distribution shifts, primarily due to semantic misalignment between text embeddings and shifted visual embeddings of region proposals. While recent test-time adaptive object detection methods for VLM-based either rely on costly backpropagation or bypass semantic misalignment via external memory, none directly and efficiently align text and vision in a training-free manner. To address this, we propose Reward-Guided Semantic Evolution (RGSE), a training-free framework that directly refines the text embeddings at test time. Inspired by evolutionary search, RGSE treats text embedding adaptation as a semantic search process: it perturbs text embeddings as candidate variants, evaluates them via cosine similarity with current and historical high-confidence visual proposals as a reward signal, and fuses them into a refined embedding through reward-weighted averaging. Without any backpropagation, RGSE achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple detection benchmarks while adding minimal computational overhead. Our code will be open source upon publication.

analysis.tldr: 提出无训练测试时文本嵌入进化方法，高效对齐VLM检测器中的语义偏移。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇目标检测器在测试时分布偏移下性能下降，现有自适应方法依赖反向传播或外部记忆，缺乏高效无训练的对齐方案。
analysis.problem: 测试时分布偏移导致VLM检测器中文本嵌入与区域提议的视觉嵌入语义错位，需在不训练的情况下直接高效对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出分布偏移下文本与视觉嵌入的语义错位是性能下降的主因，现有方法未直接解决此问题。
analysis.method: 提出奖励引导语义进化（RGSE），将文本嵌入适应视为语义搜索过程：扰动文本嵌入生成候选变体，用与当前及历史高置信度视觉提议的余弦相似度作为奖励信号，通过奖励加权平均融合得到精炼嵌入。
contributions: 提出无训练测试时文本嵌入进化框架RGSE，直接对齐语义错位。
在多个检测基准上达到SOTA性能，且计算开销极小。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高置信度视觉提议的质量，低质量提议下奖励信号可能不准确。
进化搜索的扰动策略和融合方式可能需针对不同分布偏移调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无训练测试时文本嵌入进化方法，高效对齐VLM检测器中的语义偏移。

papers.title: Velox: Learning Representations of 4D Geometry and Appearance
papers.abstract: We introduce a framework for learning latent representations of 4D objects which are descriptive, faithfully capturing object geometry and appearance; compressive, aiding in downstream efficiency; and accessible, requiring minimal input, i.e., an unstructured dynamic point cloud, to construct. Specifically, Velox trains an encoder to compress spatiotemporal color point clouds into a set of dynamic shape tokens. These tokens are supervised using two complementary decoders: a 4D surface decoder, which models the time-varying surface distribution capturing the geometry; and a Gaussian decoder, which maps the tokens to 3D Gaussians, helping learn appearance. To demonstrate the utility of our representation, we evaluate it across three downstream tasks -- video-to-4D generation, 3D tracking, and cloth simulation via image-to-4D generation -- and observe strong performances in all settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出Velox框架，学习4D几何与外观的潜在表征，支持视频到4D生成、3D跟踪和布料模拟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有4D表征方法难以同时满足描述性、压缩性和易用性，需要从非结构化动态点云中高效学习。
analysis.problem: 如何从非结构化动态点云中学习兼具几何与外观描述能力、支持下游任务的紧凑4D表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 编码器将时空彩色点云压缩为动态形状令牌，通过4D表面解码器（几何）和高斯解码器（外观）联合监督。
contributions: 提出Velox框架，学习描述性、压缩性、易用性的4D几何与外观表征。
在视频到4D生成、3D跟踪、布料模拟三个下游任务中验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在视频到4D生成、3D跟踪和布料模拟任务上评估，表现强劲。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量动态点云输入。
未提及对复杂拓扑或大规模场景的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Velox框架，学习4D几何与外观的潜在表征，支持视频到4D生成、3D跟踪和布料模拟。

papers.title: High-Fidelity Single-Image Head Modeling with Industry-Grade Topology
papers.abstract: We present a single-image head mesh reconstruction framework that addresses the longstanding challenge of simultaneously preserving facial identity and producing industry-grade topology. Our framework adopts a coarse-to-fine optimization pipeline that refines a rigged template across three stages -- rig, joint, and vertex -- achieving stable convergence and consistent topology. To mitigate the ill-posed nature of single-image 3D face reconstruction and ensure identity preservation, we employ a normal consistency objective jointly with landmark alignment. To further preserve local surface structure and enforce topological regularity, we introduce geometry-aware constraints based on Gaussian curvature and conformal consistency, along with auxiliary regularizations that correct fine artifacts such as lip seams and eyelid discontinuities. Our hierarchical optimization with geometry-aware regularization yields meshes with semantically meaningful edge flow and industry-grade topology. After geometry reconstruction, we extract UV-space texture and normal maps to preserve appearance details for visualization and downstream use. In a user study with 22 professional technical artists, our results were assessed as approaching industry-grade usability, and 95% of participants ranked our method as the top-performing approach, underscoring its effectiveness for real-world digital human production.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种单图头部网格重建框架，通过粗到细优化与几何感知约束，同时保持身份一致性和工业级拓扑。
analysis.research_motivation: 单图3D头部重建长期面临身份保持与工业级拓扑难以兼得的挑战，现有方法要么牺牲拓扑质量，要么无法准确保留面部身份，限制了在数字人生产中的实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张图像重建出既精确保持面部身份又具有工业级拓扑（如语义边缘流、无伪影）的头部网格。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单图3D人脸重建是病态问题，直接优化易导致身份丢失或拓扑不规则；唇缝、眼睑等精细区域容易出现伪影。
analysis.method: 采用粗到细优化流程，在三个层级（rig、joint、vertex）逐步细化可驱动模板；联合使用法线一致性损失与地标对齐保持身份，引入高斯曲率和共形一致性约束保持局部结构与拓扑规则性，并添加辅助正则化修正唇缝、眼睑等伪影。
contributions: 提出一种单图头部网格重建框架，同时实现身份保持与工业级拓扑。
设计分层优化与几何感知正则化，生成语义边缘流和无伪影网格。
通过22位专业艺术家的用户研究验证，95%参与者认为该方法最优，接近工业级可用性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了用户研究：22位专业技术艺术家评估，95%参与者将本方法评为最佳。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量模板，对极端姿态或遮挡鲁棒性未知。
用户研究样本量较小，且未与最新SOTA方法进行定量指标对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种单图头部网格重建框架，通过粗到细优化与几何感知约束，同时保持身份一致性和工业级拓扑。

papers.title: DALight-3D: A Lightweight 3D U-Net for Brain Tumor Segmentation from Multi-Modal MRI
papers.abstract: Automatic brain tumor segmentation from multi-modal MRI remains challenging because volumetric models often incur substantial computational cost. This paper presents DALight-3D, a compact 3D U-Net variant that combines depthwise separable 3D convolutions, identifier-conditioned normalization, cross-slice attention, and adaptive skip fusion. The method is evaluated on the Medical Segmentation Decathlon Task01 BrainTumour benchmark under matched optimization settings against standard 3D U-Net, Attention U-Net, Residual 3D U-Net, and V-Net baselines. In the reported 50-epoch comparison, DALight-3D achieves a mean Dice of 0.727 with 2.22M parameters, compared with 0.710 Dice and 3.20M parameters for Residual 3D U-Net. Component-wise ablations show consistent performance degradation when SepConv, identifier-conditioned normalization, CSA, or SSFB is removed. These results indicate that DALight-3D offers a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off within the present benchmark setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级3D U-Net变体DALight-3D，在脑肿瘤分割中实现精度与效率的平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态MRI脑肿瘤自动分割中，现有3D模型计算成本高，难以在资源受限场景部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持分割精度的同时显著降低3D U-Net的参数和计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合深度可分离3D卷积、标识条件归一化、跨切片注意力与自适应跳跃融合的紧凑3D U-Net。
contributions: 提出DALight-3D轻量级架构，参数仅2.22M。
在Medical Segmentation Decathlon脑肿瘤基准上，以更少参数取得优于标准3D U-Net等基线的Dice分数。
analysis.experiments: 在Medical Segmentation Decathlon Task01 BrainTumour基准上，与标准3D U-Net、Attention U-Net、Residual 3D U-Net和V-Net对比，50轮训练后DALight-3D平均Dice为0.727（2.22M参数），Residual 3D U-Net为0.710（3.20M参数）。消融实验验证各组件有效性。
limitations: 仅在单一基准上评估，泛化性未知。
未报告推理速度或内存占用等效率指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级3D U-Net变体DALight-3D，在脑肿瘤分割中实现精度与效率的平衡。

papers.title: From Priors to Perception: Grounding Video-LLMs in Physical Reality
papers.abstract: While Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) excel in general understanding, they exhibit systematic deficits in fine-grained physical reasoning. Existing interventions not only suffer from limited generalization but fundamentally conflate generative artifacts with genuine physical fallacies. Furthermore, we find that models fail systematically not only in anti-physics anomalies but also in counter-intuitive scenarios where visual facts contradict statistical expectations. Accordingly, we propose the Unified Attribution Theory: this dual failure stems not from perception deficiency, but from Semantic Prior Dominance -- the reasoning mechanism is deeply hijacked by internal narrative scripts. To address this, we construct the Programmatic Adversarial Curriculum (PACC), the first high-fidelity adversarial video dataset synthesized based on physical laws, thoroughly decoupling visual artifacts from logical errors. Concurrently, we design the Visual-Anchored Reasoning Chain (VARC) to force models to explicitly ground their judgments in low-level visual facts prior to logical adjudication. Experiments demonstrate that without invasive architectural modifications, standard LoRA fine-tuning with the PACC curriculum effectively neutralizes prior interference in state-of-the-art (SOTA) models, yielding a substantial leap in physical reasoning capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一归因理论解释Video-LLM物理推理缺陷源于语义先验主导，并构建对抗视频数据集PACC与视觉锚定推理链VARC来缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: Video-LLM在细粒度物理推理中存在系统性缺陷，现有干预方法泛化性有限且混淆了生成伪影与真实物理错误，亟需从根本上诊断并解决这一问题。
analysis.problem: Video-LLM在物理推理中因语义先验主导而忽视视觉事实，导致在反物理异常和反直觉场景中均表现失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型不仅在反物理异常中失败，在视觉事实违背统计期望的反直觉场景中也系统性失败，表明问题源于推理机制被内部叙事脚本劫持，而非感知缺陷。
analysis.method: 构建基于物理定律的高保真对抗视频数据集PACC，并设计视觉锚定推理链VARC，强制模型在逻辑判断前先基于低级视觉事实进行推理。
contributions: 提出统一归因理论，揭示Video-LLM物理推理缺陷源于语义先验主导而非感知不足。
构建首个基于物理定律的高保真对抗视频数据集PACC，解耦视觉伪影与逻辑错误。
设计视觉锚定推理链VARC，有效缓解先验干扰，提升物理推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个SOTA模型上使用标准LoRA微调与PACC课程，实验表明该方法在不修改架构的情况下显著提升物理推理能力。
limitations: 方法依赖对抗性视频数据集，可能对非对抗性场景的泛化性有限。
仅使用LoRA微调，未探索其他参数高效微调方法的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一归因理论解释Video-LLM物理推理缺陷源于语义先验主导，并构建对抗视频数据集PACC与视觉锚定推理链VARC来缓解。

papers.title: Ilov3Splat: Instance-Level Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Understanding in Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: We introduce Ilov3Splat, a novel framework for instance-level open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding built on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS). Most prior work depends on 2D rendering-based matching or point-level semantic association, which undermines cross-view consistency, lacks coherent instance-level reasoning, and limits precision in downstream 3D tasks. To address these limitations, our method jointly optimizes scene geometry and semantic representations by augmenting Gaussian splats with view-consistent feature fields. Specifically, we leverage multi-resolution hash embedding to efficiently encode language-aligned CLIP features, enabling dense and coherent language grounding in 3D space. We further train an instance feature field using contrastive loss over SAM masks, supporting fine-grained object distinction across views. At inference time, CLIP-encoded queries are matched against the learned features, followed by two-stage 3D clustering to retrieve relevant Gaussian groups. This enables our framework to identify arbitrary objects in 3D scenes based on natural language descriptions, without requiring category supervision or manual annotations. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that Ilov3Splat outperforms prior open-vocabulary 3D-GS methods in both object selection and instance segmentation, offering a flexible and accurate solution for language-driven 3D scene understanding. Project page: https://csiro-robotics.github.io/Ilov3Splat.

analysis.tldr: 基于3D高斯泼溅的实例级开放词汇3D场景理解框架，通过联合优化几何与语义实现语言驱动的任意物体识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖2D渲染匹配或点级语义关联，导致跨视角一致性差、缺乏实例级推理能力，限制了3D下游任务的精度。
analysis.problem: 如何实现实例级、开放词汇的3D场景理解，使模型能根据自然语言描述识别任意物体，无需类别监督或人工标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在3D高斯泼溅中引入多分辨率哈希嵌入编码CLIP特征，并通过SAM掩码的对比学习训练实例特征场，推理时采用两阶段3D聚类匹配查询。
contributions: 提出联合优化场景几何与语义的框架，增强高斯泼溅的视角一致特征场。
利用多分辨率哈希嵌入高效编码语言对齐的CLIP特征，实现密集3D语言接地。
通过对比学习训练实例特征场，支持跨视角细粒度物体区分。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上，Ilov3Splat在物体选择和实例分割任务中优于先前的开放词汇3D-GS方法。
limitations: 可能依赖SAM掩码质量，对遮挡或小物体效果有限。
两阶段聚类可能增加推理时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于3D高斯泼溅的实例级开放词汇3D场景理解框架，通过联合优化几何与语义实现语言驱动的任意物体识别。

papers.title: SpecPL: Disentangling Spectral Granularity for Prompt Learning
papers.abstract: Existing prompt learning for VLMs exhibits a modality asymmetry, predominantly optimizing text tokens while still relying on frozen visual encoder as holistic extractor and neglecting the spectral granularity essential for fine-grained discrimination. To bridge this, we introduce Disentangling Spectral Granularity for Prompt Learning (SpecPL), which approaches prompt learning from a novel spectral perspective via Counterfactual Granule Supervision. Specifically, we leverage a frozen VAE to decompose visual signals into semantic low-frequency bands and granular high-frequency details. A frozen Visual Semantic Bank anchors text representations to universal low-frequency invariants, mitigating overfitting. Crucially, fine-grained discrimination is driven by counterfactual granule training: by permuting high-frequency signals, we compel the model to explicitly distinguish visual granularity from semantic invariance. Uniquely, SpecPL serves as a universal plug-and-play booster, revitalizing text-oriented baselines like CoOp and MaPLe via visual-side guidance. Experiments on 11 benchmarks demonstrate competitive state-of-the-art performance, achieving a new performance ceiling of 81.51\% harmonic-mean accuracy. These results validate that spectral disentanglement with counterfactual supervision effectively bridges the gap in the stability-generalization trade-off. Code is released at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 从频谱粒度视角解耦视觉信号，通过反事实颗粒监督提升提示学习性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有提示学习存在模态不对称，仅优化文本token而忽略视觉编码器的频谱粒度，限制了细粒度判别能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用频谱分解和反事实监督来增强视觉提示学习，弥合稳定性与泛化性的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用冻结VAE将视觉信号分解为低频语义和高频细节，通过冻结视觉语义库锚定文本表示，并采用反事实颗粒训练（置换高频信号）迫使模型区分视觉粒度与语义不变性。
contributions: 提出频谱解耦的提示学习方法SpecPL，从频谱视角增强视觉粒度。
设计反事实颗粒监督机制，通过置换高频信号提升细粒度判别能力。
作为即插即用模块，可提升CoOp、MaPLe等基线性能，在11个基准上达到81.51%调和平均准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在11个基准上评估，达到81.51%调和平均准确率，验证了频谱解耦与反事实监督的有效性。
limitations: 依赖冻结VAE的分解质量，可能受限于预训练模型。
反事实训练的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从频谱粒度视角解耦视觉信号，通过反事实颗粒监督提升提示学习性能。

papers.title: DiffCap-Bench: A Comprehensive, Challenging, Robust Benchmark for Image Difference Captioning
papers.abstract: Image Difference Captioning (IDC) generates natural language descriptions that precisely identify differences between two images, serving as a key benchmark for fine-grained change perception, cross-modal reasoning, and image editing data construction. However, existing benchmarks lack diversity and compositional complexity, and standard lexical-overlap metrics (e.g., BLEU, METEOR) fail to capture semantic consistency or penalize hallucinations, which together prevent a comprehensive and robust evaluation of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on IDC. To address these gaps, we introduce DiffCap-Bench, a comprehensive IDC benchmark covering ten distinct difference categories to ensure diversity and compositional complexity. Furthermore, we propose an LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation protocol grounded in human-validated Difference Lists, enabling a robust assessment of models' ability to both capture and describe visual changes. Through extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art MLLMs, we reveal significant performance gaps between proprietary and open-source models, highlight the critical importance of reasoning capability, and identify clear limitations in model scaling. Our framework also demonstrates strong alignment with human expert judgments and strong correlation with downstream image editing data construction quality. These findings establish DiffCap-Bench as both a reliable IDC evaluation framework and a practical predictor of downstream utility. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available to support further research.

analysis.tldr: 提出DiffCap-Bench基准，覆盖10种差异类别，结合LLM-as-a-Judge评估协议，揭示MLLM在图像差异描述中的性能差距与局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像差异描述基准缺乏多样性和组合复杂性，且标准词重叠指标无法捕捉语义一致性或惩罚幻觉，导致对多模态大模型的评估不全面、不鲁棒。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个全面、多样且鲁棒的基准来评估多模态大模型在图像差异描述任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建DiffCap-Bench基准，包含10种差异类别；提出基于人类验证的差异列表的LLM-as-a-Judge评估协议。
contributions: 提出DiffCap-Bench，一个覆盖10种差异类别的全面图像差异描述基准。
提出LLM-as-a-Judge评估协议，基于人类验证的差异列表，实现鲁棒评估。
通过广泛评估揭示闭源与开源模型间的性能差距、推理能力的重要性及模型扩展的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 评估了多个最先进的多模态大模型，发现闭源与开源模型间存在显著性能差距，推理能力至关重要，模型扩展存在明显局限；框架与人类专家判断及下游图像编辑数据构建质量高度一致。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有可能的差异类型。
LLM-as-a-Judge协议可能受限于LLM自身的偏见。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DiffCap-Bench基准，覆盖10种差异类别，结合LLM-as-a-Judge评估协议，揭示MLLM在图像差异描述中的性能差距与局限。

papers.title: Example-Based Object Detection
papers.abstract: In recent years, object detection has achieved significant progress, especially in the field of open-vocabulary object detection. Unlike traditional methods that rely on predefined categories, open-vocabulary approaches can detect arbitrary objects based on human-provided prompts. With the advancement of prompt-based detection techniques, models such as SAM3 can even outperform some category-specific detectors trained on particular datasets without requiring additional training on those datasets. However, despite these advancements, false positives and false negatives still occur. In practical engineering applications, persistent misdetections or missed detections of the same object are unacceptable. Yet retraining the model every time such errors occur incurs substantial costs in terms of human effort, computational resources, and time. Therefore, how to leverage existing false positive and false negative samples to prevent such errors from recurring remains a highly challenging and urgent problem.
