To address this issue, we propose EBOD (Example-Based Object Detection), which integrates a prompt-based detector (SAM3) with robust feature matching modules (DINOv3 and LightGlue). The proposed framework effectively suppresses the repeated occurrence of false positives and false negatives by leveraging previous error examples, without requiring additional model retraining. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出EBOD框架，利用错误样本抑制重复误检/漏检，无需重训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇目标检测模型仍存在重复误检/漏检，而每次重训练成本高昂，亟需一种无需重训练即可利用错误样本防止错误复发的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用已有的假正例和假负例样本，在不重训练模型的前提下，防止相同错误重复出现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，尽管开放词汇检测模型（如SAM3）性能优异，但在实际工程中，对同一目标的持续误检或漏检不可接受，而重训练代价巨大。
analysis.method: 将基于提示的检测器（SAM3）与鲁棒特征匹配模块（DINOv3和LightGlue）集成，通过利用历史错误样本抑制重复错误。
contributions: 提出EBOD框架，无需重训练即可利用错误样本抑制重复误检和漏检。
将SAM3与DINOv3、LightGlue结合，实现鲁棒的特征匹配与错误纠正。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖错误样本的质量和多样性。
特征匹配模块可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EBOD框架，利用错误样本抑制重复误检/漏检，无需重训练。

papers.title: Information Coordination as a Bridge: A Neuro-Symbolic Architecture for Reliable Autonomous Driving Scene Understanding
papers.abstract: Reliable autonomous driving requires scene understanding that is semantically consistent across heterogeneous sensors and verifiable at the reasoning stage. However, many recent LLM-driven driving systems attach the language model as a post-processor and force it to reason over redundant or conflicting perception outputs, which can amplify hallucinated entities and unsafe conclusions. This paper proposes InfoCoordiBridge, a BEV-centric neuro-symbolic architecture that inserts an explicit coordination bridge between perception and language reasoning. InfoCoordiBridge comprises (i) a unified multi-agent perception layer that outputs typed structured facts together with modality-focused synopses, (ii) an ICA module that aligns and fuses multi-source outputs into a single SceneSummary, and (iii) an SSRE module that performs SceneSummary-grounded reasoning with verification. Experiments on nuScenes and Waymo show that ICA preserves competitive 3D detection accuracy while substantially improving fusion consistency, reducing redundancy to below 1% and achieving about 98% attribute agreement. On NuScenes-QA and a template-aligned Waymo-QA benchmark, SSRE improves factual grounding and reduces hallucinated entity mentions compared with representative VLM and agentic baselines. Overall, by coordinating multi-sensor outputs into a single conflict-aware SceneSummary before prompting, InfoCoordiBridge prevents redundant and cross-modally inconsistent perception evidence from propagating into high-level reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种以BEV为中心的神经符号架构InfoCoordiBridge，通过显式协调多传感器感知输出，提升自动驾驶场景理解的可靠性和事实性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的自动驾驶系统将语言模型作为后处理器，强制其对冗余或冲突的感知输出进行推理，这会放大幻觉实体和不安全结论，亟需一种能协调多源感知信息并确保推理可验证的架构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种架构，使多传感器感知输出在进入语言推理前得到协调和融合，从而避免冗余、冲突和幻觉传播，实现可靠且可验证的场景理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，将语言模型作为后处理器直接对冗余或冲突的感知输出推理会放大幻觉和不安全结论；通过协调多传感器输出为单一冲突感知的场景摘要，可防止冗余和跨模态不一致的感知证据传播到高层推理。
analysis.method: 提出InfoCoordiBridge，包含三部分：(i) 统一多智能体感知层，输出类型化结构化事实和模态聚焦摘要；(ii) ICA模块，对齐并融合多源输出为单一SceneSummary；(iii) SSRE模块，基于SceneSummary进行带验证的推理。
contributions: 提出一种BEV中心的神经符号架构，在感知和语言推理之间插入显式协调桥接，提升场景理解的可靠性和可验证性。
设计ICA模块实现多传感器输出的对齐与融合，降低冗余至1%以下，属性一致性达约98%。
在NuScenes-QA和Waymo-QA基准上，SSRE模块相比代表性VLM和Agent基线减少了幻觉实体提及，改善了事实基础。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes和Waymo数据集上评估，ICA在保持竞争性3D检测精度的同时显著提升融合一致性，冗余降至1%以下，属性一致性约98%；在NuScenes-QA和模板对齐的Waymo-QA基准上，SSRE相比代表性VLM和Agent基线改善了事实基础并减少幻觉实体提及。
limitations: 可能依赖BEV表示的准确性，在极端传感器故障或遮挡场景下性能未知。
模板对齐的Waymo-QA基准可能限制泛化到更开放的自然语言问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种以BEV为中心的神经符号架构InfoCoordiBridge，通过显式协调多传感器感知输出，提升自动驾驶场景理解的可靠性和事实性。

papers.title: Stream-T1: Test-Time Scaling for Streaming Video Generation
papers.abstract: While Test-Time Scaling (TTS) offers a promising direction to enhance video generation without the surging costs of training, current test-time video generation methods based on diffusion models suffer from exorbitant candidate exploration costs and lack temporal guidance. To address these structural bottlenecks, we propose shifting the focus to streaming video generation. We identify that its chunk-level synthesis and few denoising steps are intrinsically suited for TTS, significantly lowering computational overhead while enabling fine-grained temporal control. Driven by this insight, we introduced Stream-T1, a pioneering comprehensive TTS framework exclusively tailored for streaming video generation. Specifically, Stream-T1 is composed of three units: (1) Stream -Scaled Noise Propagation, which actively refines the initial latent noise of the generating chunk using historically proven, high-quality previous chunk noise, effectively establishes temporal dependency and utilizing the historical Gaussian prior to guide the current generation; (2) Stream -Scaled Reward Pruning, which comprehensively evaluates generated candidates to strike an optimal balance between local spatial aesthetics and global temporal coherence by integrating immediate short-term assessments with sliding-window-based long-term evaluations; (3) Stream-Scaled Memory Sinking, which dynamically routes the context evicted from KV-cache into distinct updating pathways guided by the reward feedback, ensuring that previously generated visual information effectively anchors and guides the subsequent video stream. Evaluated on both 5s and 30s comprehensive video benchmarks, Stream-T1 demonstrates profound superiority, significantly improving temporal consistency, motion smoothness, and frame-level visual quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个专为流式视频生成设计的测试时扩展框架Stream-T1，通过噪声传播、奖励剪枝和记忆下沉提升时间一致性与视觉质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的测试时视频生成方法候选探索成本高且缺乏时间引导，而流式视频生成的块级合成和少步去噪特性天然适合测试时扩展，但缺乏专门框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效的测试时扩展框架，以在流式视频生成中实现低成本候选探索和细粒度时间控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出流式视频生成的块级合成和少步去噪特性可显著降低计算开销并实现细粒度时间控制，但现有方法未充分利用。
analysis.method: Stream-T1包含三个单元：流式缩放噪声传播（利用历史高质量噪声引导当前块）、流式缩放奖励剪枝（结合短期和长期评估平衡空间美学与时间连贯性）、流式缩放记忆下沉（根据奖励反馈动态路由KV-cache上下文）。
contributions: 首次提出专为流式视频生成设计的测试时扩展框架Stream-T1
设计三个创新单元：噪声传播、奖励剪枝、记忆下沉，分别解决时间依赖、候选评估和上下文管理问题
analysis.experiments: 在5秒和30秒视频基准上评估，Stream-T1在时间一致性、运动平滑度和帧级视觉质量上显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定流式视频生成架构，泛化性需验证
奖励剪枝策略可能引入额外超参数调优成本
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个专为流式视频生成设计的测试时扩展框架Stream-T1，通过噪声传播、奖励剪枝和记忆下沉提升时间一致性与视觉质量。

papers.title: StableI2I: Spotting Unintended Changes in Image-to-Image Transition
papers.abstract: In most real-world image-to-image (I2I) scenarios, existing evaluations primarily focus on instruction following and the perceptual quality or aesthetics of the generated images. However, they largely fail to assess whether the output image preserves the semantic correspondence and spatial structure of the input image. To address this limitation, we propose StableI2I, a unified and dynamic evaluation framework that explicitly measures content fidelity and pre--post consistency across a wide range of I2I tasks without requiring reference images, including image editing and image restoration. In addition, we construct StableI2I-Bench, a benchmark designed to systematically evaluate the accuracy of MLLMs on such fidelity and consistency assessment tasks. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that StableI2I provides accurate, fine-grained, and interpretable evaluations of content fidelity and consistency, with strong correlations to human subjective judgments. Our framework serves as a practical and reliable evaluation tool for diagnosing content consistency and benchmarking model performance in real-world I2I systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出StableI2I框架，用于评估图像到图像转换中的内容保真度和一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有I2I评估主要关注指令遵循和感知质量，忽略了输出图像是否保留输入图像的语义对应和空间结构。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一、动态的评估框架来显式衡量I2I任务中的内容保真度和前后一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出StableI2I框架，无需参考图像即可评估内容保真度和一致性，并构建StableI2I-Bench基准测试MLLM的评估准确性。
contributions: 提出StableI2I，一个统一且动态的评估框架，用于衡量I2I任务中的内容保真度和一致性。
构建StableI2I-Bench基准，系统评估MLLM在保真度和一致性评估任务上的准确性。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明StableI2I提供准确、细粒度、可解释的评估，与人类主观判断高度相关。
limitations: 可能依赖MLLM的准确性，MLLM的局限性可能影响评估结果。
基准覆盖的任务范围可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出StableI2I框架，用于评估图像到图像转换中的内容保真度和一致性。

papers.title: RemoteZero: Geospatial Reasoning with Zero Human Annotations
papers.abstract: Geospatial reasoning requires models to resolve complex spatial semantics and user intent into precise target locations for Earth observation. Recent progress has liberated the reasoning path from manual curation, allowing models to generate their own inference chains. Yet a final dependency remains: they are still supervised by human-annotated ground-truth coordinates. This leaves the reasoning process autonomous, but not its spatial endpoint, and prevents true self-evolution on abundant unlabeled remote sensing data. To break this bottleneck, we introduce RemoteZero, a box-supervision-free framework for geospatial reasoning. RemoteZero is motivated by a simple asymmetry: an MLLM is typically better at verifying whether a region satisfies a query than at directly generating precise coordinates. Leveraging this stronger discriminative ability, RemoteZero replaces geometric supervision with intrinsic semantic verification and enables GRPO training without box annotations. The resulting framework further supports iterative self-evolution, allowing the model to improve from unlabeled remote sensing imagery through its own verification signal. Experiments show that RemoteZero achieves competitive performance against strong supervised methods, demonstrating the potential of self-verifying training for geospatial reasoning localization.

analysis.tldr: RemoteZero 提出无需人工标注坐标的遥感地理空间推理框架，利用 MLLM 的判别能力实现自验证训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有地理空间推理方法虽能自动生成推理链，但仍依赖人工标注的坐标作为监督信号，无法利用海量无标注遥感数据实现自我进化。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用人工标注坐标（框监督）的情况下，实现精确的地理空间推理定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM 在验证区域是否满足查询方面比直接生成精确坐标更擅长，存在判别能力与生成能力的不对称性。
analysis.method: 利用 MLLM 更强的判别能力，用内在语义验证替代几何监督，结合 GRPO 训练实现无框监督的推理，并支持迭代自进化。
contributions: 提出首个无需框监督的地理空间推理框架 RemoteZero，打破对人工标注坐标的依赖。
利用 MLLM 判别-生成不对称性，设计基于语义验证的训练方法，支持模型从无标注数据中自我进化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 MLLM 的判别能力，在复杂场景下验证准确性有限。
自进化过程可能引入噪声，需要进一步稳定训练。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RemoteZero 提出无需人工标注坐标的遥感地理空间推理框架，利用 MLLM 的判别能力实现自验证训练。

papers.title: Deep Reprogramming Distillation for Medical Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Medical foundation models pre-trained on large-scale datasets have shown powerful versatile performance. However, when adapting medical foundation models for specific medical scenarios, it remains the inevitable challenge due to the gap induced by the discrepancy between pre-training and downstream tasks, the real-world computation, and speed constraints. Relevant techniques that probably handle this challenge more or less suffer from some intrinsic limitations. For example, knowledge distillation (KD) assumes that teacher and student models share the same task, training strategy, and model structure family, while prevalent parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) fails to achieve personalized and lightweight deployment. Even the combination of PEFT and KD still struggles to resolve model structures and training strategies inconsistencies between teacher and student models, leading to inefficient knowledge transfer. In this study, we propose a novel framework called Deep Reprogramming Distillation (DRD) to combat the general adaptation challenge. Specifically, DRD introduces the novel reprogramming module that on the one side overcomes the domain and task discrepancy between pretraining and downstream scenarios, and on the other side builds the student-friendly efficient distillation from foundation models to lightweight downstream models. Furthermore, to mitigate variability under different training conditions, we design a centered kernel alignment (CKA) distillation method to promote robust knowledge transfer. Empirical results show that DRD surpasses previous PEFT and KD methods across 18 medical downstream tasks under different foundation models, covering various scenarios including 2D/3D classification and 2D/3D segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出深度重编程蒸馏（DRD）框架，通过重编程模块和CKA蒸馏实现医学基础模型到轻量级下游模型的高效知识迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学基础模型在特定场景适配时面临预训练与下游任务差异、计算和速度约束等挑战，现有知识蒸馏（KD）和参数高效微调（PEFT）方法存在任务/结构不一致、部署不灵活等问题。
analysis.problem: 解决医学基础模型适配下游任务时，因任务差异、模型结构不一致导致的低效知识迁移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出深度重编程蒸馏（DRD）框架，包含重编程模块（克服域和任务差异，构建学生友好的高效蒸馏）和中心核对齐（CKA）蒸馏方法（促进鲁棒知识迁移）。
contributions: 提出DRD框架，通过重编程模块同时解决域/任务差异和模型结构不一致问题。
设计CKA蒸馏方法，减少不同训练条件下的变异性，提升知识迁移鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在18个医学下游任务上，覆盖2D/3D分类和分割场景，DRD优于先前PEFT和KD方法。
limitations: 可能依赖重编程模块的设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
CKA蒸馏的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出深度重编程蒸馏（DRD）框架，通过重编程模块和CKA蒸馏实现医学基础模型到轻量级下游模型的高效知识迁移。

papers.title: LEGO: LoRA-Enabled Generator-Oriented Framework for Synthetic Image Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of generative technologies has made synthetic images nearly indistinguishable from real ones, thereby creating an urgent need for robust detectors to counter misinformation. However, existing methods mainly rely on universal artifact features that are shared across multiple generators. We observe that as the diversity of generators increases, the overlap of these common features gradually decreases. This severely undermines model generalization. In contrast, focusing only on unique artifacts tends to cause overfitting to specific forgery patterns. To address this challenge, we propose LEGO (LoRA-Enabled Generator-Oriented Framework). The core mechanism of LEGO employs an MLP to modulate multiple LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) blocks, each pretrained to capture the unique artifacts of a specific generator, followed by attention-based feature fusion. Unlike conventional methods that seek a single universal solution, LEGO delegates unique artifact extraction to specialized LoRA modules by dividing its training procedure into two stages. Each LoRA module is individually trained on a single-generator dataset to learn generator-specific representations, then MLP and attention layers are trained on mixed datasets to dynamically regulate the contribution of each module. Benefiting from its modular yet robust design, LEGO can be naturally extended by incorporating new LoRA modules for adaptation to newly emerging next-generation datasets, while still achieving substantially better performance than prior SOTA methods with fewer than 30,000 training images, less than 10% of their training data, and only 5 epochs in each training stage.

analysis.tldr: 提出LEGO框架，用多个LoRA模块分别捕获不同生成器的独特伪影，通过MLP和注意力融合实现高效合成图像检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合成图像检测方法依赖跨生成器的通用伪影特征，但随着生成器多样性增加，通用特征重叠减少，导致泛化能力下降；而仅关注独特伪影又容易过拟合。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能捕获各生成器独特伪影又能避免过拟合的合成图像检测框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到随着生成器多样性增加，不同生成器之间的通用伪影特征重叠逐渐减少，这严重损害了模型泛化能力。
analysis.method: 提出LEGO框架，核心是使用MLP调制多个LoRA模块，每个LoRA模块预训练于单一生成器数据集以学习其独特伪影，然后通过注意力机制融合特征；训练分两阶段：先单独训练各LoRA模块，再训练MLP和注意力层。
contributions: 提出LEGO框架，通过模块化LoRA设计有效捕获生成器特定伪影并避免过拟合。
在少于30,000张训练图像、少于10%训练数据和仅5个epoch的条件下，性能显著优于现有SOTA方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在少量训练数据下性能优于SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的生成器集合，对新生成器需要添加新LoRA模块。
两阶段训练流程可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LEGO框架，用多个LoRA模块分别捕获不同生成器的独特伪影，通过MLP和注意力融合实现高效合成图像检测。

papers.title: A cross-modal network for facial expression recognition
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks enriched with structural information have been widely employed for facial expression recognition tasks. However, these methods often depend on hierarchical information rather than face property to finish expression recognition. In this paper, we propose a cross-modal network with strong biological and structural information for facial expression recognition (CMNet). CMNet can respectively learn expression information via face symmetry on a whole face, left and right half faces to extract complementary facial features. To prevent negative effect of biological and structural information fusion, a salient facial information refinement module can obtain salient facial expression information to improve stability of an obtained facial expression classifier. To reduce reliance on unilateral facial features, a half-face alignment optimization mechanism is designed to align obtained expression information of learned left and right half faces. Our experimental results demonstrate that CMNet outperforms several novel methods, i.e., SCN and LAENet-SA for facial expression recognition. Codes can be obtained at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种利用面部对称性和半脸对齐的跨模态网络（CMNet）用于面部表情识别，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于结构信息的深度神经网络在面部表情识别中常依赖层次信息而非面部属性，导致特征提取不充分且易受干扰。
analysis.problem: 如何利用面部对称性和半脸结构信息提取互补特征，并减少生物与结构信息融合的负面影响，以提高表情识别的稳定性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出跨模态网络CMNet，包含：1）基于面部对称性从全脸、左半脸和右半脸学习互补特征；2）显著面部信息精炼模块提取显著表情信息，提高分类器稳定性；3）半脸对齐优化机制减少对单侧特征的依赖。
contributions: 提出CMNet，利用面部对称性和半脸结构信息进行表情识别。
设计显著面部信息精炼模块和半脸对齐优化机制，提升特征融合稳定性和分类性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，CMNet优于SCN和LAENet-SA等方法。摘要未提供具体数据集名称和数值结果。
limitations: 可能对遮挡或非正面人脸鲁棒性不足。
计算复杂度可能较高，因涉及多分支网络。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种利用面部对称性和半脸对齐的跨模态网络（CMNet）用于面部表情识别，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。

papers.title: Ground4D: Spatially-Grounded Feedforward 4D Reconstruction for Unstructured Off-Road Scenes
papers.abstract: Feedforward Gaussian Splatting has recently emerged as an efficient paradigm for 4D reconstruction in autonomous driving. However, in unstructured off-road scenes, its performance degrades due to high-frequency geometry, ego-motion jitter, and increased non-rigid dynamics. These factors introduce conflicting Gaussian observations across timestamps, leading to either over-smoothed renderings or structural artifacts. To address this issue, we propose Ground4D, a spatially-grounded 4D feedforward framework for pose-free off-road reconstruction. The key idea is to resolve temporal conflicts through spatially localized conditioning. Specifically, we introduce voxel-grounded temporal Gaussian aggregation, which partitions the canonical Gaussian space into spatial voxels and performs query-conditioned temporal attention within each voxel. Intra-voxel softmax normalization ensures that temporal selectivity and spatial occupancy become mutually reinforcing rather than conflicting. We furthermore introduce surface normal cues as auxiliary geometric guidance to regularize the geometry of Gaussian primitives. Extensive experiments on ORAD-3D and RELLIS-3D demonstrate that Ground4D consistently outperforms existing feedforward methods in reconstruction quality and generalizes zero-shot to unseen off-road domains. Project page and code: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出Ground4D，通过空间体素约束的时序高斯聚合与表面法线引导，实现无结构越野场景的高质量4D重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前馈高斯泼溅方法在无结构越野场景中因高频几何、自运动抖动和非刚性动态导致性能下降，产生过平滑或结构伪影。
analysis.problem: 解决越野场景中跨时间戳的高斯观测冲突，实现无位姿的4D重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高频几何、自运动抖动和非刚性动态引入冲突的高斯观测，导致过平滑渲染或结构伪影。
analysis.method: 提出空间体素约束的时序高斯聚合，将规范高斯空间划分为空间体素，在每个体素内进行查询条件时序注意力，并通过体素内softmax归一化使时序选择性与空间占用相互增强；同时引入表面法线作为辅助几何引导。
contributions: 提出Ground4D，一种空间约束的4D前馈框架，用于无位姿越野场景重建。
引入体素约束的时序高斯聚合，解决时序冲突。
利用表面法线辅助几何正则化，提升重建质量。
analysis.experiments: 在ORAD-3D和RELLIS-3D数据集上，Ground4D在重建质量上持续优于现有前馈方法，并零样本泛化到未见越野域。
limitations: 可能依赖体素分辨率的选择，影响性能。
未提及对极端动态场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Ground4D，通过空间体素约束的时序高斯聚合与表面法线引导，实现无结构越野场景的高质量4D重建。

papers.title: Joint Semantic Token Selection and Prompt Optimization for Interpretable Prompt Learning
papers.abstract: Vision-language models such as CLIP achieve strong visual-textual alignment, but often suffer from overfitting and limited interpretability when adapted through continuous prompt learning. While discrete prompt optimization improves interpretability, it usually depends on large external models, leading to high computational costs and limited scalability. In this paper, we propose Interpretable Prompt Learning (IPL), a hybrid framework that alternates between discrete semantic token selection and continuous prompt optimization. Specifically, IPL formulates semantic token selection as an approximate submodular optimization problem, encouraging tokens that are both human-understandable and semantically diverse. It further adopts an alternating optimization strategy to integrate discrete token selection with continuous prompt tuning, improving interpretability while preserving adaptability to downstream tasks. Our framework is plug-and-play, allowing seamless integration with existing prompt learning methods. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that IPL consistently improves both interpretability and accuracy across five representative prompt learning methods, providing an effective and scalable extension to existing frameworks.

analysis.tldr: 提出IPL框架，通过交替优化离散语义标记选择和连续提示学习，提升CLIP提示学习的可解释性和准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续提示学习在CLIP等视觉-语言模型微调中易过拟合且可解释性差，而离散提示优化依赖大模型、计算成本高且扩展性有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持下游任务适应性的同时，提升提示学习的可解释性并降低计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 连续提示学习导致过拟合和可解释性不足；离散提示优化依赖外部大模型，成本高且扩展性差。
analysis.method: 提出IPL框架，将语义标记选择建模为近似子模优化问题，选择人类可理解且语义多样的标记，并通过交替优化策略整合离散标记选择与连续提示调优。
contributions: 提出IPL混合框架，交替进行离散语义标记选择和连续提示优化，提升可解释性。
将语义标记选择形式化为近似子模优化问题，确保标记的语义多样性和可理解性。
IPL即插即用，可无缝集成到现有提示学习方法中，实验表明在多个基准上一致提升可解释性和准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上对五种代表性提示学习方法进行实验，IPL一致提升可解释性和准确性。
limitations: 可能依赖初始提示质量。
子模优化近似可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IPL框架，通过交替优化离散语义标记选择和连续提示学习，提升CLIP提示学习的可解释性和准确性。

papers.title: Structured 3D Latents Are Surprisingly Powerful: Unleashing Generalizable Style with 2D Diffusion
papers.abstract: 3D asset generation plays a pivotal role in fields such as gaming and virtual reality, enabling the rapid synthesis of high-fidelity 3D objects from a single or multiple images. Building on this capability, enabling style-controllable generation naturally emerges as an important and desirable direction. However, existing approaches typically rely on style images that lie within or are similar to the training distribution of 3D generation models. When presented with out-of-distribution (OOD) styles, their performance degrades significantly or even fails. To address this limitation, we introduce \textbf{DiLAST}: 2D Diffusion-based Latent Awakening for 3D Style Transfer. Specifically, we leverage a pretrained 2D diffusion model as a teacher to provide rich and generalizable style priors. By aligning rendered views with the target style under diffusion-based guidance, our method optimizes the structured 3D latent representations for stylization. We observe that this limitation stems not from insufficient model capacity, but from the underutilization of structured 3D latents, which are inherently expressive. Despite being trained on comparatively limited data, 3D generation models can leverage 2D diffusion guidance to steer denoising toward specific directions in latent space, thereby producing diverse, OOD styles. Extensive experiments across diverse data and multiple 3D generation backbones demonstrate the effectiveness and plug-and-play nature of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 利用2D扩散模型引导结构化3D潜变量实现通用风格迁移，无需重新训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D风格迁移方法依赖训练分布内的风格图像，对分布外（OOD）风格泛化能力差，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现3D资产生成中的通用风格可控性，特别是处理训练分布外的风格。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 结构化3D潜变量本身表达能力足够，但未被充分利用；通过2D扩散模型引导，可将其去噪过程导向特定风格方向，生成多样化的OOD风格。
analysis.method: 提出DiLAST方法，利用预训练2D扩散模型作为教师提供风格先验，通过扩散引导对齐渲染视图与目标风格，优化结构化3D潜变量实现风格迁移。
contributions: 发现结构化3D潜变量在OOD风格迁移中未被充分利用，具有强大潜力。
提出DiLAST，一种即插即用的3D风格迁移方法，利用2D扩散模型引导3D潜变量。
在多种数据和3D生成骨干上验证了方法的有效性和泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种数据和多个3D生成骨干上进行实验，展示了方法的有效性和即插即用特性。
limitations: 依赖预训练2D扩散模型的质量和多样性。
可能对极端OOD风格或复杂几何结构处理有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用2D扩散模型引导结构化3D潜变量实现通用风格迁移，无需重新训练。

papers.title: Evaluation Cards for XAI Metrics
papers.abstract: The evaluation of explainable AI (XAI) methods is affected by a lack of standardization. Metrics are inconsistently defined, incompletely reported, and rarely validated against common baselines. In this paper, we identify transparency of evaluation reporting as a central, under-addressed problem. We propose the XAI Evaluation Card, a documentation template analogous to model cards, designed to accompany any study that introduces an XAI evaluation metric. The card covers explicit declaration of target properties, grounding levels, metric assumptions, validation evidence, gaming risks, and known failure cases. We argue that adopting this template as a community norm would reduce evaluation fragmentation, support meta-analysis, and improve accountability in XAI research.

analysis.tldr: 提出XAI评估卡模板，规范可解释AI评估指标的文档化报告。
analysis.research_motivation: 可解释AI评估缺乏标准化，指标定义不一致、报告不完整、缺乏基线验证，导致评估碎片化。
analysis.problem: XAI评估指标的报告透明性不足，缺乏统一的文档规范。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象。
analysis.method: 提出XAI评估卡，一种文档模板，要求明确声明目标属性、基础水平、指标假设、验证证据、博弈风险和已知失败案例。
contributions: 识别出评估报告透明性是XAI评估中未被充分解决的核心问题。
提出XAI评估卡模板，作为社区规范以减少评估碎片化、支持元分析并提高问责性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模板的有效性需要社区采纳和实证验证。
可能增加报告负担，需要平衡详尽性与实用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出XAI评估卡模板，规范可解释AI评估指标的文档化报告。

papers.title: UAV as Urban Construction Change Monitor: A New Benchmark and Change Captioning Model
papers.abstract: Remote Sensing Image Change Captioning (RSICC) aims to generate spatially grounded natural language descriptions of scene evolution from bi-temporal imagery, moving beyond binary change masks toward semantic-level understanding. However, existing methods rely on implicit feature differencing without explicitly modeling structured change semantics, and struggle to reconcile the conflicting representation demands of change detection and caption generation. In addition, current benchmarks provide limited coverage of high-resolution urban construction scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose PTNet, a prototype-guided task-adaptive framework for joint change captioning and detection. PTNet explicitly models structured change semantics through a learnable prototype bank that guides cross-temporal interaction, disentangles task-specific representations via multi-head gating, and injects detection-derived spatial priors into caption generation, enabling coherent semantic correspondence while preserving fine-grained spatial sensitivity. Furthermore, we construct UCCD, a large-scale UAV-based benchmark comprising 9,000 high-resolution image pairs and 45,000 annotated sentences for urban construction monitoring. Extensive experiments on UCCD and WHU-CDC demonstrate that PTNet consistently outperforms existing methods. The dataset and source code are publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出原型引导的任务自适应框架PTNet和UAV城市变化监测数据集UCCD，在遥感图像变化描述任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感图像变化描述方法依赖隐式特征差分，缺乏结构化变化语义建模，且难以协调变化检测与描述生成之间的表征冲突；同时现有基准对高分辨率城市施工场景覆盖不足。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模结构化变化语义并解耦任务特定表征，实现变化描述与检测的联合优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PTNet，包含可学习原型库引导跨时交互、多头门控解耦任务表征、检测空间先验注入描述生成。
contributions: 提出PTNet原型引导任务自适应框架，显式建模结构化变化语义并解耦变化检测与描述生成。
构建UCCD大规模UAV城市变化监测基准，含9000对高分辨率图像和45000句标注。
analysis.experiments: 在UCCD和WHU-CDC数据集上实验，PTNet一致优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量原型库初始化。
UCCD数据集仅覆盖城市施工场景，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出原型引导的任务自适应框架PTNet和UAV城市变化监测数据集UCCD，在遥感图像变化描述任务上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Detecting Deepfakes via Hamiltonian Dynamics
papers.abstract: Driven by the rapid development of generative AI models, deepfake detectors are compelled to undergo periodic recalibration to capture newly developed synthetic artifacts. To break this cycle, we propose a new perspective on deepfake detection: moving from static pattern recognition to dynamical stability analysis. Specifically, our approach is motivated by physics-inspired priors: we hypothesize that natural images, as products of dissipative physical processes, tend to settle near stable, low-energy equilibria. In contrast, generative models optimize for statistical similarity to real images but do not explicitly enforce structural constraints such as geometric smoothness, leaving deepfakes more likely to occupy unstable, high-energy states. To operationalize this, we introduce Hamiltonian Action Anomaly Detection (HAAD), comprising three contributions: \textbf{i)} We model the image latent manifold as a potential energy surface. Under this hypothesis, real images are expected to produce basin-like low-energy responses, whereas fake images are more likely to induce high-potential, high-gradient responses. \textbf{ii)} We employ Hamiltonian-inspired dynamics as a stability probe. By releasing latent states from rest, samples near stable regions remain bounded, while high-gradient samples produce larger trajectory responses. \textbf{iii)} We quantify these dynamic behaviors through two trajectory statistics, \ie, Hamiltonian action and energy dissipation. Extensive experiments show that HAAD outperforms evaluated state-of-the-art baselines on challenging cross-dataset transfer benchmarks, supporting a physics-inspired stability prior for digital forensics.

analysis.tldr: 利用哈密顿动力学将深度伪造检测从静态模式识别转向动态稳定性分析，提出HAAD方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器需不断重新校准以应对新合成伪影，缺乏通用性；本文从物理启发先验出发，探索自然图像与生成图像在动力学稳定性上的本质差异。
analysis.problem: 如何不依赖特定伪造模式，通过动态稳定性分析实现跨数据集的深度伪造检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自然图像趋于稳定低能平衡态，而生成图像因缺乏结构约束（如几何平滑性）更可能处于不稳定高能态。
analysis.method: 将图像潜在流形建模为势能面，利用哈密顿动力学作为稳定性探针：从静止释放潜在状态，通过轨迹统计量（哈密顿作用量和能量耗散）区分真实与伪造图像。
contributions: 提出基于哈密顿动力学的深度伪造检测新范式，从静态模式识别转向动态稳定性分析。
设计哈密顿作用异常检测（HAAD）方法，包括势能面建模、动力学探测和轨迹统计量。
在跨数据集迁移基准上超越现有基线，验证了物理启发先验的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在挑战性的跨数据集迁移基准上，HAAD优于评估的现有基线。
limitations: 可能对图像预处理或潜在空间选择敏感。
计算开销可能高于传统静态检测方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用哈密顿动力学将深度伪造检测从静态模式识别转向动态稳定性分析，提出HAAD方法。

papers.title: Optimize-at-Capture: Highly-adaptive Exposure Controlling for In-Vehicle Non-contact Heart-rate Monitoring
papers.abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) holds great promise for continuous heart-rate monitoring of drivers in intelligent vehicles. However, its performance is severely degraded by the highly dynamic illumination changes. A critical yet overlooked factor is the lack of exposure controlling during video acquisition -- most existing systems rely on either fixed exposure settings or camera build-in auto-exposure, both of which fail to maintain stable facial brightness under rapidly changing lighting conditions during driving. To address this gap, we propose a highly-adaptive exposure controlling framework that proactively adjusts exposure parameters based on predictive modeling of historical skin reflections. Unlike standard auto-exposure, our method is specifically optimized for rPPG measurement, ensuring the skin region of interest (ROI) remains within the optimal dynamic range for rPPG signal extraction. As an important contribution of this study, we introduce ExpDrive, a public in-vehicle physiological monitoring dataset comprising synchronized facial video and reference ECG from 48 subjects captured under real driving conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms fixed exposure and standard auto-exposure strategies. Specifically, it reduces the Mean Absolute Error (MAE) by 6.31 bpm (from 14.1 to 7.79 bpm) and significantly increases the success rate by 32.3 percentage points (p < 0.001) (from 24.9% to 57.2%) across challenging driving scenarios. Notably, it clearly improved the performance of non-contact heart-rate monitoring in both low-light (rainy) and high-glare (sunny) conditions, validating the efficacy of exposure-aware acquisition design.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种针对车载非接触心率监测的曝光控制框架，通过预测皮肤反射调整曝光参数，显著提升rPPG在动态光照下的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 车载非接触心率监测（rPPG）在智能驾驶中潜力巨大，但动态光照变化严重降低其性能。现有系统依赖固定曝光或相机内置自动曝光，无法在快速变化的驾驶光照下保持面部亮度稳定，导致rPPG信号质量差。
analysis.problem: 解决车载rPPG在高度动态光照下因缺乏自适应曝光控制而导致的心率监测精度低和成功率低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种高度自适应的曝光控制框架，基于历史皮肤反射的预测模型主动调整曝光参数，使皮肤感兴趣区域（ROI）始终处于rPPG信号提取的最佳动态范围内。
contributions: 提出一种针对rPPG优化的自适应曝光控制框架，优于固定曝光和标准自动曝光。
发布ExpDrive数据集，包含48名受试者在真实驾驶条件下同步的面部视频和参考ECG数据。
analysis.experiments: 在真实驾驶场景下进行实验，与固定曝光和标准自动曝光对比。结果显示，所提方法将平均绝对误差（MAE）从14.1 bpm降至7.79 bpm（降低6.31 bpm），成功率从24.9%提升至57.2%（提升32.3个百分点，p<0.001），在低光（雨天）和高眩光（晴天）条件下均有效。
limitations: 可能依赖历史皮肤反射的预测模型，对初始曝光参数敏感。
数据集规模有限（48名受试者），泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种针对车载非接触心率监测的曝光控制框架，通过预测皮肤反射调整曝光参数，显著提升rPPG在动态光照下的性能。

papers.title: Intermediate Representations are Strong AI-Generated Image Detectors
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement in generative AI models has enabled the creation of photorealistic images. At the same time, there are growing concerns about the potential misuse and dangers of generated content, as well as a pressing need for effective AI-generated image detectors. However, current training-based detection techniques are typically computationally costly and can hardly be generalized to unseen data domains, while training-free methods fall short in detection performance. To bridge this gap, we propose a search-based method employing data embedding sensitivity in intermediate layers to detect AI-generated images. Given a set of real and AI-generated images, our method examines the similarity between original image embeddings and perturbed image embeddings, and detects AI-generated images based on the similarity. We examine the proposed method on two comprehensive benchmarks: GenImage and Forensics Small. Our method exhibits improved performance across different datasets compared to both training-free and training-based state-of-the-art methods. On average, our method achieves the largest performance gain on the Forensics Small benchmark by 39.61% compared to the best training-free method and 5.14% compared to the best training-based method in AUROC score.

analysis.tldr: 利用中间层嵌入对扰动的敏感性差异，提出一种无需训练的搜索式AI生成图像检测方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测方法中，基于训练的方法计算成本高且泛化性差，而无需训练的方法检测性能不足，亟需一种高效且泛化强的检测方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖训练的情况下，高效且准确地检测AI生成的图像，并提升跨数据域的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实图像与AI生成图像在中间层嵌入对扰动的敏感性上存在差异，可利用此差异进行检测。
analysis.method: 提出一种基于搜索的方法，通过计算原始图像嵌入与扰动后嵌入的相似性来区分真实与AI生成图像，利用中间层的数据嵌入敏感性。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的AI生成图像检测方法，利用中间层嵌入对扰动的敏感性。
在GenImage和Forensics Small基准上，相比现有无训练和有训练方法均取得性能提升，尤其在Forensics Small上AUROC提升39.61%（vs最佳无训练方法）和5.14%（vs最佳有训练方法）。
analysis.experiments: 在GenImage和Forensics Small两个基准上评估，与无训练和有训练的SOTA方法对比，AUROC指标提升显著。
limitations: 方法依赖扰动策略的选择，可能影响泛化性。
未在更多样化的生成模型和图像类型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用中间层嵌入对扰动的敏感性差异，提出一种无需训练的搜索式AI生成图像检测方法。

papers.title: InterFuserDVS: Event-Enhanced Sensor Fusion for Safe RL-Based Decision Making
papers.abstract: Autonomous driving systems rely heavily on robust sensor fusion to perceive complex envi- ronments. Traditional setups using RGB cameras and LiDAR often struggle in high-dynamic- range scenes or high-speed scenarios due to motion blur and latency. Dynamic Vision Sensors (DVS), or event cameras, offer a paradigm shift by capturing asynchronous brightness changes with microsecond temporal resolution and high dynamic range. In this paper, we propose an extended architecture of the state-of-the-art InterFuser model, integrating DVS as an additional modality to enhance perception reliability. We introduce a novel token-based fusion strategy that incorporates accumulated event frames into the transformer-based backbone of InterFuser. Our method leverages the complementary nature of RGB, LiDAR, and DVS data. We evaluate our approach on the Car Learning to Act (CARLA) Leaderboard benchmarks, demonstrating that the inclusion of DVS improves the robustness of the driving agent, achieving a competitive Driving Score of 77.2 and a superior Route Completion of 100%. The results indicate that event-based vision is a promising direction for improving safety and performance in adverse lighting and dynamic conditions.

analysis.tldr: 将事件相机(DVS)集成到InterFuser框架中，通过token融合策略提升自动驾驶在动态光照和高速场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统RGB相机和LiDAR在高动态范围或高速场景下因运动模糊和延迟而性能下降，事件相机具有微秒级时间分辨率和宽动态范围，可弥补这一缺陷。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合事件相机(DVS)数据与RGB、LiDAR，提升自动驾驶决策系统在恶劣光照和动态条件下的安全性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在InterFuser的Transformer骨干网络中引入基于token的融合策略，将累积的事件帧作为额外模态与RGB和LiDAR特征融合。
contributions: 提出InterFuserDVS架构，首次将事件相机集成到InterFuser框架中用于自动驾驶决策。
设计token级融合策略，有效结合RGB、LiDAR和DVS三种模态的互补信息。
analysis.experiments: 在CARLA Leaderboard基准上评估，获得77.2的驾驶分数和100%的路线完成率，表明DVS提升了鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖事件相机的硬件可用性，实际部署成本较高。
仅在仿真环境CARLA中验证，真实场景效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将事件相机(DVS)集成到InterFuser框架中，通过token融合策略提升自动驾驶在动态光照和高速场景下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Hierarchical Visual Agent: Managing Contexts in Joint Image-Text Space for Advanced Chart Reasoning
papers.abstract: Advanced chart question answering requires both precise perception of small visual elements and multi-step reasoning across several subplots. While existing MLLMs are strong at understanding single plots, they often struggle with multi-step reasoning across multiple subplots. We propose HierVA, a hierarchical visual agent framework for chart reasoning that iteratively constructs and updates a working context in a joint image--text space. A high-level manager generates plans and maintains a compact context containing only key information, while specialized workers perform reasoning, gather evidence, and return results. In particular, the agent maintains separate visual and textual contexts, using a zoom-in tool to restrict the visual context. Experiments on the CharXiv reasoning subset demonstrate consistent improvements over strong multimodal baselines, and ablation studies verify that hierarchical architecture, scoped visual context, and distilled context contribute complementary gains.

analysis.tldr: HierVA 通过分层视觉代理在联合图像-文本空间中管理上下文，提升了图表多步推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态大模型在理解单一图表时表现良好，但在跨多个子图的多步推理上存在困难，需要更有效的上下文管理方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型在图表问答中同时处理小视觉元素的精确感知和跨子图的多步推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 HierVA 分层视觉代理框架，高层管理器生成计划并维护紧凑上下文，专业工作者执行推理和证据收集；维护分离的视觉和文本上下文，并使用缩放工具限制视觉上下文。
contributions: 提出分层视觉代理框架 HierVA，用于图表推理中的上下文管理。
在 CharXiv 推理子集上取得一致改进，验证了分层架构、限定视觉上下文和精简上下文的互补增益。
analysis.experiments: 在 CharXiv 推理子集上进行实验，与强多模态基线相比取得一致改进，并通过消融研究验证各组件贡献。
limitations: 可能依赖特定图表数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
分层架构可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HierVA 通过分层视觉代理在联合图像-文本空间中管理上下文，提升了图表多步推理能力。

papers.title: Beyond Fixed Thresholds and Domain-Specific Benchmarks for Explainable Multi-Task Classification in Autonomous Vehicles
papers.abstract: Scene understanding is a vital part of autonomous driving systems, which requires the use of deep learning models. Deep learning methods are intrinsically black box models, which lack transparency and safety in autonomous driving. To make these systems transparent, multi-task visual understanding has become crucial for explainable autonomous driving perception systems, where simultaneous prediction of multiple driving behaviors and their underlying explanations is essential for safe navigation and human trust in autonomous vehicles. In order to design an accurate and cross-cultural explainable autonomous driving system, we introduce a comprehensive confidence threshold sensitivity analysis that evaluates various threshold values to identify optimal decision boundaries for different tasks. Our analysis demonstrates that traditional fixed threshold approaches are suboptimal for multi-task scenarios. Through extensive evaluation, we demonstrate that our adaptive threshold selection methodology improves F1-scores across different tasks. In addition, we introduce IUST-XAI-AD, a novel dataset consisting of 958 images with human annotations for driving decisions and corresponding reasoning. This dataset addresses the critical gap in domain-specific evaluation benchmarks for distinct driving contexts and provides a more challenging test environment compared to existing datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that confidence threshold sensitivity analysis can significantly improve model performance, while the introduction of the IUST-XAI-AD dataset reveals important insights about cross-cultural driving behavior patterns. The combined contributions of this work provide both methodological advances and practical evaluation tools that can accelerate the development of more reliable, explainable, and culturally-adaptive autonomous driving systems for global deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应阈值选择方法和跨文化自动驾驶可解释数据集，提升多任务分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶场景理解依赖深度学习黑箱模型，缺乏透明性和安全性；现有固定阈值方法在多任务场景下表现次优，且缺乏领域特定和跨文化评估基准。
analysis.problem: 如何设计准确且跨文化的可解释自动驾驶系统，解决多任务分类中固定阈值次优和评估基准缺失的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统固定阈值方法在多任务场景下是次优的；跨文化驾驶行为模式存在差异。
analysis.method: 提出置信度阈值敏感性分析，评估不同阈值以确定各任务最优决策边界；引入自适应阈值选择方法；构建包含958张图像及人工标注的IUST-XAI-AD数据集。
contributions: 提出自适应阈值选择方法，通过置信度阈值敏感性分析提升多任务分类F1分数。
引入IUST-XAI-AD数据集，填补领域特定和跨文化评估基准的空白。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（958张图像），可能限制泛化性。
仅针对自动驾驶场景，方法在其他领域的适用性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应阈值选择方法和跨文化自动驾驶可解释数据集，提升多任务分类性能。

papers.title: Imagery Dataset for Remaining Useful Life Estimation of Synthetic Fibre Ropes
papers.abstract: Remaining useful life (RUL) estimation of synthetic fibre ropes (SFRs) is critical for safe operation in offshore-crane, wind turbine installation, and heavy-load handling applications, where rope failure can result in catastrophic safety incidents and costly downtime. Despite growing research interest in data-driven condition monitoring, there is no publicly available image dataset that captures the complete degradation lifecycle of SFRs under controlled cyclic fatigue loading. To address this gap, we present a novel image dataset comprising approximately 34,700 high-resolution images of eleven Dyneema SK75/78 high-modulus polyethylene (HMPE) rope samples subjected to cyclic fatigue on a sheave-bend test stand at seven distinct axial load levels ranging from 60 kN to 280 kN. Ropes were loaded until mechanical failure, with fatigue lifetimes ranging from 695 cycles to 8,340 cycles. After every fixed number of sheave cycles (an inspection burst), ten images were captured at different cross-sectional positions along the rope, providing spatially representative sampling of surface degradation throughout the rope's entire service life. The images obtained from each load are annotated with the corresponding elapsed cycle count, enabling a direct computation of RUL for any rope in the sequence. This dataset aims to support a broad range of machine learning (ML) tasks including RUL regression, damage progression modelling, anomaly detection, and load-conditioned prognostics. The dataset is intended to serve as a benchmark resource for the development and comparison of vision-based condition monitoring (CM) and prognostics algorithms for SFRs.

analysis.tldr: 首个公开的合成纤维绳循环疲劳高分辨率图像数据集，用于剩余使用寿命估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成纤维绳在关键工业应用中失效会导致灾难性事故，但缺乏公开的完整退化图像数据集，阻碍了数据驱动剩余寿命预测方法的发展。
analysis.problem: 解决合成纤维绳剩余使用寿命估计中缺乏公开、完整退化过程图像数据集的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含约34,700张高分辨率图像的数据集，涵盖11个Dyneema SK75/78 HMPE绳样本在7种轴向载荷下从循环疲劳到机械失效的完整退化过程，每固定循环次数后在不同横截面位置拍摄10张图像，并标注对应循环次数以计算剩余寿命。
contributions: 首次公开了合成纤维绳在受控循环疲劳载荷下完整退化过程的图像数据集。
数据集支持多种机器学习任务，如剩余寿命回归、损伤演化建模、异常检测和负载条件预测。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅包含一种材料（Dyneema SK75/78 HMPE）和特定测试条件，泛化性可能有限。
图像采集间隔固定，可能无法捕捉快速退化阶段的细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个公开的合成纤维绳循环疲劳高分辨率图像数据集，用于剩余使用寿命估计。

papers.title: Physics-Guided Regime Unmixing
papers.abstract: The Linear Mixing Model (LMM) dominates spectral unmixing for its simplicity, but fails under multiple scattering; existing nonlinear models compensate by applying a fixed regime uniformly across entire scenes. We propose Physics-Guided Regime Unmixing (PGRU), which estimates a pixel-wise scalar $\xi_i \in [0,1]$ from observable physical features to activate nonlinear mixing only where justified. Residuals from the Generalized Bilinear Model (GBM), the Post-Nonlinear Mixing Model (PPNM), and Hapke are combined via learned attention, yielding interpretable regime maps. Experiments on Samson, Jasper Ridge, and Urban show consistent improvements over baselines, with physical coherence $\rho > 0.90$.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理引导的混合解混方法，逐像素选择非线性模型，提升解混精度与物理可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 线性混合模型（LMM）因简单性主导光谱解混，但在多次散射场景下失效；现有非线性模型对整个场景统一施加固定非线性，无法适应空间异质性。
analysis.problem: 如何根据像素的物理特征自适应地选择非线性混合模型，实现逐像素的非线性激活。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出物理引导的混合解混（PGRU），从可观测物理特征估计像素级标量ξ_i∈[0,1]以决定是否激活非线性混合；通过学习注意力机制融合广义双线性模型（GBM）、后非线性混合模型（PPNM）和Hapke模型的残差，生成可解释的混合模式图。
contributions: 提出物理引导的逐像素非线性激活机制，避免全局统一非线性假设。
通过注意力融合多种非线性模型残差，提升解混精度并保持物理一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在Samson、Jasper Ridge和Urban数据集上实验，相比基线方法取得一致改进，物理一致性ρ>0.90。
limitations: 可能依赖可观测物理特征的准确提取。
注意力融合机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理引导的混合解混方法，逐像素选择非线性模型，提升解混精度与物理可解释性。

papers.title: Densification and forecasting of Sentinel-2 time series from multimodal SAR and Optical satellite data using deep generative models
papers.abstract: Optical satellite image time series are extensively used in many Earth observation applications, including agriculture, climate monitoring, and land surface analysis. However, clouds and swath edges result in irregular sampling along the temporal dimension, limiting continuous monitoring. To address this issue, a growing body of work has focused on temporal densification and reconstruction of satellite image time series, with the objective of filling missing or cloud-contaminated observations within the temporal extent of the available data. While these approaches improve temporal continuity, they are inherently restricted to the reconstruction of the gaps within the observed time periods, and do not address the prediction of future observations. This work proposes a probabilistic deep learning framework for the densification and forecasting of Sentinel-2 time series by generating optical images at arbitrary past or future dates. The approach leverages multimodal satellite data by jointly exploiting Sentinel-2 optical and Sentinel-1 SAR observations. Unlike most existing works, we propose to focus on the uncertainty of the generated images. Experimental results demonstrate effective densification and forecasting, on sparse and temporally misaligned time series.

analysis.tldr: 提出概率深度学习框架，利用多模态SAR和光学卫星数据对Sentinel-2时间序列进行稠密化与预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学卫星图像时间序列在农业、气候监测等应用中至关重要，但云层和条带边缘导致时间采样不规则，限制了连续监测。现有方法仅能重建观测时段内的缺失数据，无法预测未来观测。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态卫星数据（光学和SAR）实现Sentinel-2时间序列的稠密化（填充缺失观测）和预测（生成未来日期图像），并量化生成图像的不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出概率深度学习框架，联合利用Sentinel-2光学和Sentinel-1 SAR观测，生成任意过去或未来日期的光学图像，并关注生成图像的不确定性。
contributions: 提出一个概率深度学习框架，能够同时进行时间序列稠密化和预测，而不仅仅是重建缺失观测。
利用多模态SAR和光学数据，并量化生成图像的不确定性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖多模态数据的可用性和配准精度。
不确定性量化方法的有效性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概率深度学习框架，利用多模态SAR和光学卫星数据对Sentinel-2时间序列进行稠密化与预测。

papers.title: Disentangled Learning Improves Implicit Neural Representations for Medical Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Implicit neural representations (INRs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for medical imaging via physics-informed unsupervised learning. Classical INRs optimize an entire network from scratch for each subject, leading to inefficient training and suboptimal imaging quality. Recent initialization-based approaches attempt to inject population priors into pre-trained networks, yet they rely on high-quality images and often suffer from catastrophic forgetting during fine-tuning. We present DisINR, a novel INR framework that explicitly disentangles shared and subject-specific representations. DisINR introduces a shared encoder-decoder pair and subject-specific encoders, whose features are jointly decoded for image reconstruction. By integrating differentiable forward models, it pre-trains the shared modules directly from limited raw measurements, removing the need for pre-acquired high-quality images. During test-time adaptation, only the subject-specific encoder is optimized, while the shared pair remains frozen, effectively preserving learned priors. Extensive evaluations on three representative medical imaging tasks show that DisINR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art INRs in both reconstruction accuracy and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: DisINR通过解耦共享与个体表征，提升医学图像重建的隐式神经表示性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐式神经表示在医学成像中潜力巨大，但传统方法需为每个对象从头训练网络，效率低且质量次优；现有初始化方法依赖高质量图像且易遗忘。
analysis.problem: 如何高效利用群体先验同时避免灾难性遗忘，实现快速且高质量的医学图像重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DisINR框架，包含共享编码器-解码器对和个体编码器，通过可微前向模型从原始测量数据预训练共享模块，测试时仅优化个体编码器。
contributions: 提出解耦共享与个体表征的隐式神经表示框架DisINR
实现无需高质量图像的预训练，避免灾难性遗忘
analysis.experiments: 在三个代表性医学成像任务上评估，重建精度和效率均显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定前向模型的可微性
个体编码器在极端数据下可能过拟合
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DisINR通过解耦共享与个体表征，提升医学图像重建的隐式神经表示性能。

papers.title: Anatomy of a failure: When, how, and why deep vision fails in scientific domains
papers.abstract: Mirroring its ubiquity in popular media and all human activities, the use of deep learning (DL) is rapidly growing in scientific imaging modalities. However, unlike everyday RGB pictures, pixels encode precise physicochemical properties in scientific imaging across potentially thousands of channels. While DL is well validated on human-centric RGB perceptual tasks, its effectiveness for scientific imaging remains uncertain. Here, we show that the naive application of DL frameworks to scientific images can lead to critical failures. We evaluate the use of DL for pathology, comparing RGB images of stained tissue with the quantitative and information-rich biochemical signatures of infrared (IR) imaging. Despite this informational advantage, DL models trained on IR data paradoxically underperform. We investigate this discrepancy to find that IR data priors interact poorly with the simplicity bias of DL, causing models to collapse to one-dimensional predictions. This constitutes a catastrophic DL failure because the model's representational capacity remains largely unused, while furthermore raising AI safety concerns and undermining the advantages of such scientific modalities. Notably, this problem persists even with state-of-the-art DL robustification strategies, which are primarily designed and validated for RGB imagery and thus inherit the same prior-bias mismatch. This work establishes a framework for understanding the limitations of generic DL in science and advocates for the study of modality-specific failure modes to guide the development of specialized, safe AI algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 深度学习在科学成像中因数据先验与模型简化偏置不匹配而失败，模型退化为单维预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习在科学成像中应用日益广泛，但科学图像与日常RGB图像在物理化学编码上差异巨大，现有DL框架直接迁移可能导致严重失败，亟需理解其失效机制。
analysis.problem: 探究深度学习在科学成像领域（如红外成像）中表现不佳的原因，特别是数据先验与模型简化偏置之间的冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 红外成像数据虽信息丰富，但DL模型训练后反而性能更差，模型退化为单维预测，表示能力未被充分利用，且现有鲁棒化策略（针对RGB设计）无法解决该问题。
analysis.method: 通过对比病理学中染色组织RGB图像与红外成像的DL应用，分析失败模式，建立理解通用DL在科学中局限性的框架。
contributions: 揭示了深度学习在科学成像中因先验-偏置不匹配导致灾难性失败的现象
建立了分析科学模态特定失败模式的框架，倡导开发专用安全AI算法
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅以病理学中红外成像为例，其他科学模态的泛化性需验证
未提出具体解决方案，仅分析失败原因
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 深度学习在科学成像中因数据先验与模型简化偏置不匹配而失败，模型退化为单维预测。

papers.title: Topology-Constrained Quantized nnUNet for Efficient and Anatomically Accurate 3D Tooth Segmentation
papers.abstract: We propose a topology-constrained quantized nnUNet framework for efficient and anatomically accurate 3D tooth segmentation, addressing the challenges of spatial distortion introduced by quantization in deep learning models. The proposed method integrates a novel tooth-specific topological loss into quantization-aware training, preserving critical anatomical structures such as tooth count, adjacency relationships, and cavity integrity while maintaining computational efficiency. The system employs an 8-bit quantized nnUNet backbone, where weights and activations are dynamically calibrated to minimize precision loss during inference. Furthermore, the topological loss combines connected-component analysis, adjacency consistency, and hole detection penalties, ensuring anatomical fidelity without modifying the underlying network architecture. The joint optimization objective harmonizes cross-entropy loss, quantization regularization, and topological constraints, enabling end-to-end training with gradient approximations for persistent homology terms. Experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly reduces topological errors compared to conventional quantized models, achieving clinically plausible segmentations on dental CBCT scans. The method retains the hardware efficiency of integer-only inference, making it suitable for deployment in resource-constrained clinical environments. This work bridges the gap between computational efficiency and anatomical precision in medical image segmentation, offering a practical solution for real-world dental applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出拓扑约束量化nnUNet，在8位量化下保持牙齿解剖结构完整性，实现高效且解剖准确的3D牙齿分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型量化会引入空间失真，破坏牙齿分割中的关键解剖结构（如牙齿数量、邻接关系、空腔完整性），而现有方法难以在保持计算效率的同时保证解剖精度。
analysis.problem: 在量化感知训练中，如何通过拓扑约束减少量化带来的解剖结构失真，实现高效且解剖准确的3D牙齿分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 量化模型在牙齿分割中会产生拓扑错误，如牙齿计数错误、邻接关系破坏、空腔完整性丢失。
analysis.method: 在8位量化nnUNet中引入牙齿特异性拓扑损失，结合连通分量分析、邻接一致性和空洞检测惩罚，通过联合优化交叉熵损失、量化正则化和拓扑约束进行端到端训练。
contributions: 提出拓扑约束量化nnUNet框架，在8位量化下显著减少拓扑错误。
设计牙齿特异性拓扑损失，无需修改网络架构即可保持解剖结构。
实现整数推理的硬件效率，适用于资源受限的临床环境。
analysis.experiments: 在牙科CBCT扫描上验证，相比传统量化模型显著减少拓扑错误，实现临床可行的分割。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于牙齿分割，泛化到其他器官需调整拓扑损失。
未提供与其他SOTA方法的定量比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出拓扑约束量化nnUNet，在8位量化下保持牙齿解剖结构完整性，实现高效且解剖准确的3D牙齿分割。

papers.title: MuCALD-SplitFed: Causal-Latent Diffusion for Privacy-Preserving Multi-Task Split-Federated Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Federated Learning enables decentralized training by aggregating model updates across clients without sharing raw data, while Split Federated Learning further partitions the model between clients and a server to reduce computation and communication at the client side. However, decentralized medical institutions rarely operate on a single shared task, making standard Federated and SplitFed collaborations poorly aligned with real clinical workflows. Multi-task FL extends these frameworks by allowing clients to handle different tasks, but often introduces instability and privacy vulnerabilities. This study proposes \textbf{MuCALD-SplitFed}, a multi-task SplitFed framework that integrates causal representation learning and latent diffusion. Experiments show MuCALD-SplitFed consistently improves segmentation, while baseline SplitFed fails to converge. The proposed approach further reduces information leakage at split points, mitigating reconstruction-based and membership inference attacks. Additionally, MuCALD SplitFed outperforms state-of-the-art personalized FL and multi-task FL approaches. The code repository is: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出因果-潜扩散多任务分割联邦学习框架，提升分割性能并降低隐私泄露。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗场景中多机构任务不同，标准联邦学习难以对齐真实工作流，多任务联邦学习存在不稳定性和隐私漏洞。
analysis.problem: 多任务分割联邦学习中任务异构导致训练不稳定、隐私易泄露的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基线SplitFed在多任务场景下无法收敛，而MuCALD-SplitFed稳定提升分割性能。
analysis.method: 结合因果表示学习和潜扩散模型的多任务SplitFed框架。
contributions: 提出MuCALD-SplitFed，首个将因果表示学习与潜扩散集成到多任务SplitFed的框架
实验证明该方法提升分割性能、缓解隐私攻击，并优于现有个性化FL和多任务FL方法

papers.title: Are Multimodal LLMs Ready for Clinical Dermatology? A Real-World Evaluation in Dermatology
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated promise on publicly available dermatology benchmarks. However, benchmark performance may not generalize to real-world dermatologic decision-making. To quantify this benchmark-to-bedside gap, we evaluated four open-weight MLLMs (InternVL-Chat v1.5, LLaVA-Med v1.5, SkinGPT4 and MedGemma-4B-Instruct) and one commercial MLLM (GPT-4.1) across three publicly available dermatology datasets and a retrospective multi-site hospital-based dermatology consultation cohort comprising 5,811 cases and 46,405 clinical images. Models were evaluated on two clinically relevant tasks: differential diagnosis generation and severity-based triage. Diagnostic performance was modest on public datasets and declined substantially in the real-world cohort. On public benchmarks, top-3 diagnostic accuracy reached 26.55% for the best open-weight model and 42.25% for GPT-4.1. On real-world consultation cases using images alone, top-3 diagnostic accuracy fell to 1.50%-13.35% among open-weight models and 24.65% for GPT-4.1. Incorporating clinical context improved performance across all models, increasing top-3 diagnostic accuracy up to 28.75% among open-weight models and 38.93% for GPT-4.1. However, model outputs were highly sensitive to incomplete or erroneous consultation context. For severity-based triage, models achieved moderate sensitivity (above 60%), suggesting potential utility for screening but insufficient reliability for clinical deployment. These findings demonstrate that benchmark performance substantially overestimates the real-world clinical capability of current dermatology MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 多模态大模型在真实皮肤科临床场景中诊断准确率远低于公开基准，存在显著的benchmark-to-bedside差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有皮肤科MLLM评估多基于公开基准，但基准性能可能无法反映真实临床决策能力，需要量化这一差距以指导模型改进和临床部署。
analysis.problem: 评估当前MLLM在真实世界皮肤科临床场景中的诊断和分诊能力，并量化公开基准与真实表现之间的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 公开基准上最佳开源模型top-3诊断准确率26.55%，GPT-4.1为42.25%；真实世界仅用图像时分别降至1.50%-13.35%和24.65%；加入临床上下文后提升至28.75%和38.93%，但模型对不完整或错误上下文高度敏感；分诊任务灵敏度中等（>60%），但不足以临床部署。
analysis.method: 在三个公开数据集和一个包含5811例病例、46405张临床图像的多站点医院皮肤科会诊队列上，评估四个开源MLLM和一个商业MLLM在鉴别诊断生成和严重程度分诊两个临床任务上的表现。
contributions: 首次在大型真实世界多站点皮肤科会诊队列上系统评估MLLM的临床能力
量化了公开基准与真实临床场景之间的性能差距，并分析了临床上下文的影响
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开数据集和一个包含5811例病例、46405张临床图像的真实世界多站点医院皮肤科会诊队列上，评估了五个MLLM在鉴别诊断生成和严重程度分诊任务上的表现。
limitations: 仅评估了有限数量的MLLM，可能不涵盖所有最新模型

papers.title: A Bayesian Approach for Task-Specific Next-Best-View Selection with Uncertain Geometry
papers.abstract: We develop a framework for task-specific active next-best-view selection in 3D reconstruction from point clouds, by casting the problem in the language of Bayesian decision theory. Our framework works by (a) placing a prior distribution over the space of implicit surfaces, (b) using recently-developed stochastic surface reconstruction methods to calculate the resulting posterior distribution, then (c) using the posterior distribution to carefully reason about which view to scan next. This enables us to perform camera selection in a manner that is directly optimized for the intended use of the reconstructed data - meaning, we reduce uncertainty only in those regions that make a difference in the task at hand, as opposed to prior approaches that reduce it uniformly across space. We evaluate our method across three distinct downstream tasks: semantic classification, segmentation, and PDE-guided physics simulation. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves superior task performance with fewer views compared to commonly used baselines and prior general uncertainty-reduction techniques.

analysis.tldr: 提出贝叶斯决策框架，针对特定下游任务选择最优下一视角，减少任务相关区域的不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有主动视角选择方法通常均匀减少全局不确定性，但实际任务只关心特定区域，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何根据下游任务（如分类、分割、物理仿真）的需求，选择最优的下一扫描视角，以最小化任务相关的不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于贝叶斯决策理论，对隐式曲面空间施加先验，利用随机曲面重建方法计算后验，然后根据后验选择能最大化任务性能的下一视角。
contributions: 提出任务特定的主动视角选择框架，直接优化下游任务性能。
将贝叶斯决策理论与随机曲面重建结合，实现不确定性在任务相关区域的有针对性减少。
analysis.experiments: 在语义分类、分割和PDE引导的物理仿真三个下游任务上评估，与常用基线和全局不确定性减少方法相比，用更少视角获得更优任务性能。
limitations: 依赖隐式曲面先验和随机重建方法的计算效率。

papers.title: Driver-WM: A Driver-Centric Traffic-Conditioned Latent World Model for In-Cabin Dynamics Rollout
papers.abstract: Safe L2/L3 driving automation requires anticipating human-in-the-loop reactions during shared-control transitions. While most driving world models forecast the external environment, in-cabin intelligence remains strictly recognition-oriented and lacks multi-step rollout capabilities for driver dynamics. We introduce Driver-WM, a driver-centric latent world model that rolls out in-cabin dynamics causally conditioned on out-cabin traffic context. This formulation unifies physical kinematics forecasting with auxiliary behavioral and emotional semantic recognition. Operating in a compact latent space constructed from frozen vision-language features, Driver-WM adopts a dual-stream architecture to separately encode external traffic and internal driver states. These streams are directionally coupled via a gated causal injection mechanism, which uses a learned vector gate to modulate external contextual perturbations while strictly enforcing temporal causality. Evaluations on a multi-task assistive driving benchmark demonstrate that Driver-WM yields robust long-horizon geometric forecasting for reactive high-motion maneuvers and improves semantic alignment for both driver and traffic states. Finally, the explicit external-to-internal conditioning allows for controlled test-time interventions to systematically analyze mechanism responses.

analysis.tldr: 提出以驾驶员为中心的潜世界模型 Driver-WM，实现因果条件化的车内动态展开。
analysis.research_motivation: L2/L3 自动驾驶中共享控制切换需要预测人类在环反应，但现有世界模型仅关注外部环境，车内智能缺乏多步展开能力。
analysis.problem: 如何对车内驾驶员动态进行因果条件化的多步预测，同时融合外部交通上下文。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出首个以驾驶员为中心的潜世界模型 Driver-WM，实现因果条件化的车内动态展开。
设计双流架构与门控因果注入机制，融合外部交通上下文与内部驾驶员状态。

papers.title: External Validation of Deep Learning Models for BI-RADS Breast Density Prediction from Ultrasound Images
papers.abstract: We externally validated three deep learning models (DenseNet121, ViT-B/32, and ResNet50) for predicting mammographic breast density from breast ultrasound exams on an independent cohort. The external validation set comprised 2,000 ultrasound exams, including 500 cancer cases defined by an initial negative exam (BI-RADS 1 or 2) followed by a cancer diagnosis within 6 months to 10 years, and 1,500 negative controls matched by manufacturer and study year. Performance was measured using patient-level AUROC across four density categories: A (fatty), B (scattered), C (heterogeneous), and D (extremely dense). As a downstream assessment, we also evaluated 10-year risk prediction by incorporating age and AI-derived density into the Tyrer-Cuzick model and comparing performance against a reference model using age and mammography-reported density. All three models performed best in extremely dense breasts (AUROC 0.868-0.899), with strong performance in fatty (0.814-0.838) and scattered density (0.764-0.799), and lower performance in heterogeneously dense breasts (0.699-0.729). DenseNet121 achieved the highest overall performance (micro-averaged AUROC 0.885), and performance across categories was comparable between internal and external testing. For risk modeling, age combined with AI-derived density yielded a lower AUROC than age combined with mammography-reported density (0.541 vs. 0.570; p = 0.23), with no statistically significant difference. These findings indicate that deep learning models generalize well to external data with different racial composition for breast density assessment. While performance is strongest in extremely dense breasts, heterogeneously dense remains more challenging, highlighting the need for targeted optimization.

analysis.tldr: 深度学习模型在超声图像中预测BI-RADS乳腺密度时，对外部数据泛化良好，但对异质性致密型乳腺的预测仍需优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 乳腺密度是乳腺癌风险的重要指标，但超声图像预测乳腺密度的深度学习模型缺乏外部验证，其泛化能力和临床适用性未知。
analysis.problem: 评估深度学习模型在独立外部队列中从超声图像预测乳腺密度的性能，并检验其用于10年风险预测的可行性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在极致致密型乳腺中表现最佳（AUROC 0.868-0.899），在异质性致密型中表现最差（0.699-0.729），提示该类密度是主要挑战。
analysis.method: 外部验证DenseNet121、ViT-B/32和ResNet50三个模型，使用2000例超声检查（含500例癌症病例），计算患者级AUROC，并评估AI密度结合年龄在Tyrer-Cuzick模型中的10年风险预测性能。
contributions: 首次在独立外部队列中验证了深度学习模型从超声图像预测乳腺密度的泛化能力。
揭示了模型在不同密度类别上的性能差异，特别是异质性致密型的挑战。
analysis.experiments: 外部验证集包含2000例超声检查，其中500例癌症病例和1500例阴性对照，按制造商和研究年份匹配。性能指标为患者级AUROC，并比较了AI密度与钼靶报告密度在风险模型中的表现。
limitations: 外部验证集种族构成不同，但未详细分析种族对性能的影响。
风险模型比较中AUROC差异无统计学意义，可能受限于样本量或模型设计。

papers.title: Look Once, Beam Twice: Camera-Primed Real-Time Double-Directional mmWave Beam Management for Vehicular Connectivity
papers.abstract: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) frequencies promise multi-gigabit connectivity for vehicle-to-everything (V2X) networks, but face challenges in terms of severe path loss and mobility-related beam misalignment. Reliable V2X connectivity requires fast, double-directional beam alignment. However, existing methods suffer from high training overhead and limited generalization to unseen scenarios. This paper presents VIsion-based BEamforming(VIBE), a hybrid model-based, closed-loop, learning architecture for real-time double-directional mmWave beam management primed by camera sensing. VIBE fuses machine learning, model-based reasoning, and closed-loop RF feedback to balance beam-pair establishment latency with link quality. VIBE bypasses exhaustive training overhead and accelerates link establishment by leveraging camera observations to reduce the beam-search space. Lightweight beam refinement and offset tracking mechanisms adaptively refine beams in response to dynamic application requirements. VIBE is implemented and evaluated across online indoor/outdoor testbeds, public datasets, and real-time vehicular experiments, demonstrating strong generalization capabilities, making it suitable for real-time V2X communication. Comparisons with 5G NR hierarchical beamforming show that VIBE consistently maintains lower outage rates. Furthermore, VIBE outperforms state-of-the-art end-to-end ML models for beam selection when evaluated on public datasets and achieves outage rates as low as 1.1-1.4 %. The results show that a hybrid model-based, closed-loop learning architecture is better suited for real-world mmWave vehicular connectivity than end-to-end trained ML models. For reproducibility, we publish our code to this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出VIBE，一种融合视觉感知与闭环学习的混合架构，实现实时双指向毫米波波束管理，显著降低中断率。
analysis.research_motivation: 毫米波V2X通信面临严重路径损耗和移动引起的波束失准，现有方法训练开销大且泛化能力有限，亟需快速、双指向的波束对齐方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用相机感知加速毫米波双指向波束对齐，同时平衡建立延迟与链路质量，并实现强泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: VIBE融合机器学习、基于模型的推理和闭环RF反馈，通过相机观测缩小波束搜索空间，结合轻量级波束细化和偏移跟踪机制，实现实时波束管理。
contributions: 提出VIBE混合架构，结合视觉感知与闭环学习，实现实时双指向毫米波波束管理。
在室内外测试平台、公开数据集和实车实验中验证了强泛化能力，中断率低至1.1-1.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在室内外测试平台、公开数据集和实车实验中评估，与5G NR分层波束成形和端到端ML模型对比，VIBE保持更低中断率。
limitations: 依赖相机感知，在恶劣天气或低光照条件下性能可能下降。

papers.title: Reduced-order Neural Modeling with Differentiable Simulation for High-Detail Tactile Perception
papers.abstract: Tactile perception is key to dexterous manipulation, yet simulating high-resolution elastomer deformation remains computationally prohibitive. Finite element methods (FEM) deliver high fidelity but demand costly remeshing, while Material Point Methods (MPM) suffer from heavy particle-memory tradeoffs. We propose a {reduced-order neural simulation framework} that couples coarse-grained MPM dynamics with an implicit neural decoder to reconstruct sub-particle tactile details from compact latent states. The framework learns a continuous deformation manifold from paired high- and low-resolution simulations, enabling physically consistent, differentiable inference. Compared to the TacIPC, our method achieves over 65\% faster simulation and {40\% lower memory usage}, while maintaining better geometric fidelity. In tactile rendering and 3D surface reconstruction, our methods further improve accuracy by 25\% and produce realistic depth images and surface mesh within a faster inference speed. These results demonstrate that the proposed reduced-order neural model enables high-detail, physically grounded tactile simulation with substantial efficiency gains for robotic interaction and optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种降阶神经仿真框架，结合粗粒度MPM与隐式神经解码器，实现高效高细节触觉感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率弹性体变形仿真计算成本极高，现有方法如FEM和MPM在精度与效率间难以平衡，限制了触觉感知在灵巧操作中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高细节、物理一致且高效的触觉仿真，以支持机器人交互与优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 降阶神经仿真框架：耦合粗粒度MPM动力学与隐式神经解码器，从高/低分辨率仿真配对数据中学习连续变形流形，实现物理一致的可微推理。
contributions: 提出降阶神经仿真框架，实现高细节触觉仿真的效率与精度平衡。
相比TacIPC，仿真速度提升65%以上，内存降低40%，几何保真度更优。
analysis.experiments: 在触觉渲染和3D表面重建任务上，方法精度提升25%，推理速度更快，生成逼真深度图像和表面网格。
limitations: 可能依赖配对高/低分辨率仿真数据，获取成本较高。
框架在极端变形或复杂接触场景下的泛化能力未明确。

papers.title: Delta-Based Neural Architecture Search: LLM Fine-Tuning via Code Diffs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show strong potential for neural architecture generation, yet existing approaches produce complete model implementations from scratch -- computationally expensive and yielding verbose code. We propose Delta-Code Generation, where fine-tuned LLMs generate compact unified diffs (deltas) to refine baseline architectures rather than synthesizing entire models. Our pipeline iteratively fine-tunes the LLM via LoRA on curated architectures from the LEMUR dataset, with MinHash-Jaccard novelty filtering for structural diversity. We evaluate three 7B-class LLMs -- DeepSeek-Coder-7B, Qwen2.5-Coder-7B, and Mistral-7B -- across six datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, MNIST, SVHN, ImageNette, CelebA) using a 22-cycle protocol (1,100 candidates per LLM). All three substantially surpass the full-generation baseline (50.6% valid rate, 42.3% mean first-epoch accuracy): DeepSeek-Coder reaches 75.3% valid rate and 65.8% mean accuracy; Qwen2.5-Coder 72.1%/64.6%; Mistral 66.6%/66.1%. On CIFAR-10, best first-epoch accuracies reach 85.5% (Mistral), 85.2% (DeepSeek), 80.6% (Qwen) -- well above 63.98% full generation and 71.5% for the concurrent approach of Gu et al. Output lengths are 30-50 lines versus 200+ for full generation (75-85% reduction). A 50-epoch study confirms the 1-epoch proxy preserves rankings (Mistral: Spearman $\rho$ = 0.926). Delta-based generation is a token-efficient, multi-domain, LLM-agnostic alternative to full-model synthesis for LLM-driven NAS.

analysis.tldr: 提出Delta-Code生成方法，让LLM通过生成代码差异（diff）而非完整代码来优化神经网络架构，显著提升效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的神经架构搜索方法需要生成完整模型代码，计算成本高且代码冗长，限制了搜索效率。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM以更高效的方式生成神经网络架构，避免从头编写完整代码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Delta-Code生成，LLM通过LoRA微调生成统一差异（diff）来改进基线架构，并使用MinHash-Jaccard新颖性过滤确保结构多样性。
contributions: 首次提出基于代码差异的神经架构搜索方法，显著减少输出长度（75-85%）。
在多个数据集和LLM上验证了方法的高效性和有效性，超越完整生成基线。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、MNIST、SVHN、ImageNette、CelebA六个数据集上，使用三个7B级LLM（DeepSeek-Coder-7B、Qwen2.5-Coder-7B、Mistral-7B）进行22轮循环（每LLM 1100个候选），并与完整生成基线及Gu等人的方法对比。
limitations: 仅评估了7B级LLM，更大模型的效果未知。
方法依赖基线架构的质量，可能影响搜索上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Delta-Code生成方法，让LLM通过生成代码差异（diff）而非完整代码来优化神经网络架构，显著提升效率与性能。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Aware Exploratory Direct Preference Optimization for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has proven to be an effective solution for mitigating hallucination in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) by learning from preference pairs. One of its key challenges lies in how to transfer the sequence-level preference into fine-grained supervision on visual fidelity. To safeguard vision-related tokens that are prone to hallucination, existing methods typically allocate training emphasis according to the model's self-assessed visual sensitivity signals. However, such sensitivity, estimated by a model still under training, introduces self-referential bias: reinforcing already well-learned visual cues while neglecting hard-to-perceive but critical details, thereby limiting deeper alignment. In this work, we propose an Uncertainty-aware Exploratory Direct Preference Optimization (UE-DPO) method for MLLMs, which enables the model to uncover its cognitive deficiencies and actively explore for self-correction, guided by token-level epistemic uncertainty. Specifically, we first quantify the uncertainty from the model's failure to ground token predictions in the given image. Then, based on an uncertainty-aware exploration intensity, we encourage more learning pressure on visually deficient tokens in preferred samples, and alleviate the over-penalization of beneficial knowledge in dispreferred samples. Further, we provide a theoretical justification for our method, and extensive experiments demonstrate its effectiveness and robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出不确定性感知的探索性直接偏好优化（UE-DPO），通过认知不确定性引导MLLM主动探索并纠正视觉缺陷，缓解幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: DPO在缓解MLLM幻觉中有效，但现有方法依赖模型自评估的视觉敏感性，存在自我引用偏差，强化已学好的视觉线索而忽略难以感知的关键细节，限制了深度对齐。
analysis.problem: 如何将序列级偏好转化为细粒度的视觉保真度监督，并避免自我引用偏差，使模型主动发现并纠正视觉认知缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型自评估的视觉敏感性存在自我引用偏差：强化已学好的视觉线索，忽略难以感知但关键的细节。
analysis.method: 提出UE-DPO，首先量化模型无法将token预测与图像对齐的不确定性，然后基于不确定性感知的探索强度，在偏好样本中增加对视觉缺陷token的学习压力，在非偏好样本中减轻对有益知识的过度惩罚。
contributions: 提出不确定性感知的探索性直接偏好优化方法，通过认知不确定性引导模型主动探索并纠正视觉缺陷。
提供了理论证明，并通过大量实验验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 不确定性量化可能增加计算开销。
探索强度超参数需要调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出不确定性感知的探索性直接偏好优化（UE-DPO），通过认知不确定性引导MLLM主动探索并纠正视觉缺陷，缓解幻觉。

papers.title: Assessing Cognitive Effort in L2 Idiomatic Processing: An Eye-Tracking Dataset
papers.abstract: This paper presents the development and validation of an eye-tracking dataset designed to investigate how second-language (L2) learners process idiomatic expressions. While native speakers often rely on direct retrieval of figurative meanings, L2 speakers frequently adopt a literal-first approach, which incurs measurable cognitive costs. This resource captures these costs through ocular metrics recorded from Portuguese L1 speakers of English across all CEFR proficiency levels (A1-C2). Although the study uses entry-level 60 Hz hardware (Tobii Pro Spark), we demonstrate that this sampling rate provides sufficient data density to detect macro-cognitive events such as fixations and regressions in reading. Preliminary analysis validates the dataset by revealing a strong inverse correlation between language proficiency and regressive eye movements. Integrated into the MIA (Modeling Idiomaticity in Human and Artificial Language Processing) initiative, this dataset serves as a cognitively grounded benchmark for evaluating both human processing models and the alignment of large language models with human-like figurative understanding.

analysis.tldr: 构建了一个眼动追踪数据集，用于评估二语习语处理中的认知努力，并验证了低采样率硬件也能捕捉关键阅读行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 二语学习者在处理习语时通常采用字面优先策略，导致可测量的认知成本，但缺乏系统性的眼动数据集来量化这种努力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个覆盖不同熟练度水平的、基于眼动追踪的二语习语处理数据集，以支持认知模型和语言模型对齐研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 初步分析显示语言熟练度与回归性眼动之间存在强负相关，验证了数据集的有效性。
analysis.method: 使用60 Hz眼动仪（Tobii Pro Spark）记录葡萄牙语母语者在不同CEFR水平（A1-C2）下阅读英语习语时的眼动数据，并整合到MIA项目中。
contributions: 提供了一个覆盖所有CEFR水平的二语习语处理眼动数据集
验证了低采样率硬件（60 Hz）足以检测宏观认知事件（如注视和回视）
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及初步分析验证了熟练度与回视的负相关。
limitations: 硬件采样率较低（60 Hz），可能无法捕捉微眼动等精细事件
仅涉及葡萄牙语母语者，跨语言泛化性有待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建了一个眼动追踪数据集，用于评估二语习语处理中的认知努力，并验证了低采样率硬件也能捕捉关键阅读行为。

papers.title: HEXST: Hexagonal Shifted-Window Transformer for Spatial Transcriptomics Gene Expression Prediction
papers.abstract: Spatial transcriptomics offers spatially resolved gene expression profiling within tissue sections, but its cost and limited throughput hinder large-scale deployment. To extend this capability to routine practice, recent computational methods aim to infer spatial gene expression directly from ubiquitous hematoxylin and eosin-stained histology slides. However, most existing models assume Cartesian or geometry-agnostic locality, despite the hexagonal sampling of widely used spot-array platforms, and point-wise regression objectives often yield over-smoothed gene expression profiles, obscuring gene-specific spatial heterogeneity. To address these, we propose HEXST, a geometry-aligned Transformer for spatial gene expression prediction from histology. HEXST operates directly on hexagonal spot coordinates to enable efficient local-to-global contextual modeling via tailored shifted-window attention mechanism and hexagonal rotary positional encoding. To enhance gene-wise spatial contrast, HEXST complements point-wise regression with a contrast-sensitive differential objective and transcriptomic priors from a pretrained single-cell foundation model during training. Across seven spatial transcriptomics datasets, HEXST consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models, providing accurate and robust spatial gene expression predictions while preserving gene-wise contrast and spatial heterogeneity.

analysis.tldr: 提出 HEXST，一种基于六边形移位窗口 Transformer 的方法，从组织学图像预测空间基因表达，优于现有模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 空间转录组学成本高、通量有限，难以大规模部署；现有方法多忽略六边形采样几何结构，且点回归目标导致基因表达过度平滑，掩盖空间异质性。
analysis.problem: 如何从 H&E 染色组织学图像准确预测空间基因表达，同时保持基因特异性的空间对比和异质性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：现有模型假设笛卡尔或几何无关的局部性，而常用点阵平台采用六边形采样；点回归目标导致过度平滑的基因表达谱，模糊了基因特异性的空间异质性。
analysis.method: HEXST 直接在六边形点坐标上操作，通过定制的移位窗口注意力和六边形旋转位置编码实现高效局部到全局上下文建模；并引入对比敏感差分目标和来自预训练单细胞基础模型的转录组先验，增强基因空间对比。
contributions: 提出几何对齐的 Transformer HEXST，利用六边形移位窗口注意力机制匹配点阵平台几何结构。
设计对比敏感差分目标和转录组先验，提升基因表达预测的空间对比和异质性。
analysis.experiments: 在七个空间转录组数据集上，HEXST 一致优于现有最先进模型，提供准确且鲁棒的预测，同时保持基因对比和空间异质性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的组织学图像和转录组先验，对低质量数据泛化能力未知。
