六边形注意力机制可能增加计算复杂度，大规模应用需优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 HEXST，一种基于六边形移位窗口 Transformer 的方法，从组织学图像预测空间基因表达，优于现有模型。

papers.title: From Pixels to Tokens: A Systematic Study of Latent Action Supervision for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Latent actions serve as an intermediate representation that enables consistent modeling of vision-language-action (VLA) models across heterogeneous datasets. However, approaches to supervising VLAs with latent actions are fragmented and lack a systematic comparison. This work structures the study of latent action supervision from two perspectives: (i) regularizing the trajectory via image-based latent actions, and (ii) unifying the target space with action-based latent actions. Under a unified VLA baseline, we instantiate and compare four representative integration strategies. Our results reveal a formulation-task correspondence: image-based latent actions benefit long-horizon reasoning and scene-level generalization, whereas action-based latent actions excel at complex motor coordination. Furthermore, we find that directly supervising the VLM with discrete latent action tokens yields the most effective performance. Finally, our experiments offer initial insights into the benefits of latent action supervision in mixed-data, suggesting a promising direction for VLA training. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 系统比较了VLA模型中图像基和动作基潜动作监督策略，发现离散潜动作令牌直接监督效果最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 潜动作作为异构数据集上VLA模型的一致中间表示，但现有监督方法碎片化，缺乏系统比较。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地比较和优化VLA模型中潜动作的监督策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现公式-任务对应关系：图像基潜动作有利于长程推理和场景级泛化，动作基潜动作擅长复杂运动协调；直接使用离散潜动作令牌监督VLM效果最佳。
analysis.method: 在统一VLA基线框架下，从图像基和动作基两个视角，实例化并比较四种潜动作集成策略。
contributions: 系统梳理了潜动作监督的两个视角：图像基轨迹正则化与动作基目标空间统一。
揭示了公式-任务对应关系，并发现离散潜动作令牌直接监督最有效。
analysis.experiments: 在统一VLA基线上比较四种策略，并初步探索混合数据中潜动作监督的优势。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实验仅在单一VLA基线上进行，可能缺乏跨架构泛化性。
混合数据实验仅为初步探索，结论需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统比较了VLA模型中图像基和动作基潜动作监督策略，发现离散潜动作令牌直接监督效果最佳。

papers.title: Towards General Preference Alignment: Diffusion Models at Nash Equilibrium
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) has been popular for aligning text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models with human preferences. As a mainstream branch of RLHF, Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) offers a computationally efficient alternative that avoids explicit reward modeling and has been widely adopted in diffusion alignment. However, existing preference-based methods for diffusion alignment still rely on reward-induced preference signals and typically assume that human preferences can be adequately modeled by the Bradley--Terry (BT) model, which may fail to capture the full complexity of human preferences. In this paper, we formulate diffusion alignment from a game-theoretic perspective. We propose Diffusion Nash Preference Optimization (Diff.-NPO), an intuitive general preference framework for diffusion alignment. Diff.-NPO encourages the current policy to play against itself to achieve self improvement and lead to a better alignment. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of Diff.-NPO on the text-to-image generation task via various metrics. Diff.-NPO consistently outperforms existing preference-based diffusion alignment methods.

analysis.tldr: 将扩散模型对齐问题建模为博弈，提出Diff.-NPO方法，通过自我博弈实现更优的人类偏好对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于偏好的扩散模型对齐方法依赖Bradley-Terry模型假设，无法捕捉人类偏好的复杂性，且依赖奖励信号，存在局限性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖奖励模型和BT假设的情况下，更有效地对齐扩散模型与复杂的人类偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Diffusion Nash Preference Optimization (Diff.-NPO)，将扩散对齐建模为博弈，当前策略与自身对抗以实现自我改进，达到纳什均衡。
contributions: 从博弈论视角重新定义扩散模型对齐问题。
提出Diff.-NPO框架，无需奖励模型和BT假设，通过自我博弈实现对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像生成任务上，通过多种指标验证了Diff.-NPO优于现有基于偏好的扩散对齐方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于文本到图像生成任务，泛化性待验证。
自我博弈的训练稳定性可能需要进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将扩散模型对齐问题建模为博弈，提出Diff.-NPO方法，通过自我博弈实现更优的人类偏好对齐。

papers.title: Covariance-Aware Goodness for Scalable Forward-Forward Learning
papers.abstract: The Forward-Forward algorithm eliminates global gradient flow and full network activations storage. However, in convolutional settings, existing BP-free FF methods significantly under-perform backpropagation on complex benchmarks such as ImageNet-100 and Tiny-ImageNet. We identify this gap as a structural bottleneck in goodness extraction: standard sum-of-squares formulation collapses feature volumes into channel-wise activation energies which omits critical second-order dependencies. To address this, we propose a framework centered on three key components. First, Bi-axis Covariance Goodness(BiCovG) explicitly augments the standard goodness function with structured second-order information along two axes: cross-channel projections that model inter-feature covariance, and nested multi-scale aggregation that encodes spatial correlation statistics. This provides a tractable approximation to covariance-aware goodness without the prohibitive O(C^2) complexity of explicit matrix estimation. Second, a lightweight Logistic Fusion module aggregates layer-wise predictions, amplifying the contribution of deeper representations. Third, the Feature Alignment Layer(FAL) introduces a zero-initialized correction at block boundaries to mitigate representation misalignment in deep locally trained networks. By introducing these three components, we effectively double the depth of viable Forward-Forward learning, extending robust layer utilization from shallow baselines to 16 layer architectures like VGG-16. The resulting BP-free model achieves 73.01% on ImageNet-100 and 50.30% on Tiny-ImageNet. As a practical extension, Hybrid Goodness Blocks control the scope of gradient propagation via configurable block sizes, further narrowing the ImageNet-100 gap to 3.6% and matching BP on Tiny-ImageNet, while still reducing peak memory by approximately 50% relative to BP.

analysis.tldr: 提出协方差感知的 goodness 函数，使 Forward-Forward 算法在卷积网络上达到与反向传播接近的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: Forward-Forward 算法避免了全局梯度传播和全网络激活存储，但在卷积设置下性能远低于反向传播，限制了其在大规模视觉任务中的应用。
analysis.problem: 标准 Forward-Forward 算法的 goodness 函数仅使用通道级激活能量的平方和，忽略了特征间的二阶依赖关系，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准 sum-of-squares 形式的 goodness 函数将特征体积压缩为通道级激活能量，丢失了关键的协方差信息，这是性能差距的结构性原因。
analysis.method: 提出 Bi-axis Covariance Goodness (BiCovG) 显式增强 goodness 函数，包含跨通道投影和嵌套多尺度聚合；轻量级 Logistic Fusion 模块聚合层间预测；特征对齐层 (FAL) 纠正块边界表征错位。
contributions: 提出 BiCovG 以可计算的方式引入协方差信息，避免显式矩阵估计的高复杂度。
通过 Logistic Fusion 和 FAL 有效加深 Forward-Forward 网络深度至 16 层，在 ImageNet-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上取得显著提升。
提出 Hybrid Goodness Blocks 进一步缩小与 BP 的差距，同时减少约 50% 的峰值内存。
analysis.experiments: 在 ImageNet-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上评估，BP-free 模型分别达到 73.01% 和 50.30% 的准确率；Hybrid Goodness Blocks 在 ImageNet-100 上将差距缩小至 3.6%，在 Tiny-ImageNet 上匹配 BP。
limitations: Hybrid Goodness Blocks 仍需要部分梯度传播，并非完全 BP-free。
方法在更大规模数据集或更深网络上的表现尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出协方差感知的 goodness 函数，使 Forward-Forward 算法在卷积网络上达到与反向传播接近的性能。

papers.title: Learning-based Statistical Refinement for Denoising
papers.abstract: This work proposes a learning-based statistical refinement method for improving the denoising results of a given denoiser without knowing the precise noise distribution or accessing clean images or calibration data. While there are many existing successful denoising approaches for handling different kinds of noise, they typically require accurate modelling of the images and the noise (implicitly or explicitly), and hence the denoising results can be suboptimal due to different practical factors such as imperfect models, unreliable noise assumptions, or low quality data. In particular, when clean image samples are not available and there is a lack of knowledge of the underlying noise distribution, which is the case in various practical situations, the results may not well align with the noise statistics. The unawareness of the useful statistical information leads to suboptimal results. This work aims to make the best use of the statistical information to improve the consistency between the given denoising results and the noise statistics, under the assumption that the noise is conditionally pixel-wise independent given the clean signal. A method, based on a Bayesian formulation of an auxiliary signal in the noisy data, is proposed for evaluating the consistency of the denoising results, without precise information on noise distribution. By leveraging the statistical information from noisy data, the method enhances the statistical noise consistency and improves denoising quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于学习的统计精炼方法，在无干净图像或校准数据的情况下提升去噪结果与噪声统计的一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有去噪方法依赖精确的噪声模型或干净数据，但在实际中噪声分布未知且无干净样本时，去噪结果与噪声统计不一致，导致次优性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在未知噪声分布且无干净图像或校准数据的情况下，利用噪声统计信息改进给定去噪器的输出结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于贝叶斯公式构建辅助信号，利用噪声数据中的统计信息评估去噪结果的一致性，并通过学习方式精炼去噪结果。
contributions: 提出一种无需干净图像或校准数据的统计精炼方法，提升去噪结果与噪声统计的一致性。
基于贝叶斯框架设计一致性评估指标，有效利用噪声统计信息。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 假设噪声在给定干净信号条件下像素独立，可能不适用于复杂相关噪声。
依赖特定噪声假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于学习的统计精炼方法，在无干净图像或校准数据的情况下提升去噪结果与噪声统计的一致性。

papers.title: Awaking Spatial Intelligence in Unified Multimodal Understanding and Generation
papers.abstract: We present JoyAI-Image, a unified multimodal foundation model for visual understanding, text-to-image generation, and instruction-guided image editing. JoyAI-Image couples a spatially enhanced Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) with a Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (MMDiT), allowing perception and generation to interact through a shared multimodal interface. Around this architecture, we build a scalable training recipe that combines unified instruction tuning, long-text rendering supervision, spatially grounded data, and both general and spatial editing signals. This design gives the model broad multimodal capability while strengthening geometry-aware reasoning and controllable visual synthesis. Experiments across understanding, generation, long-text rendering, and editing benchmarks show that JoyAI-Image achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance. More importantly, the bidirectional loop between enhanced understanding, controllable spatial editing, and novel-view-assisted reasoning enables the model to move beyond general visual competence toward stronger spatial intelligence. These results suggest a promising path for unified visual models in downstream applications such as vision-language-action systems and world models.

analysis.tldr: JoyAI-Image 通过耦合空间增强 MLLM 与 MMDiT，实现统一的多模态理解与生成，并展现出更强的空间智能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态模型在视觉理解和生成任务上通常分离处理，缺乏空间感知能力，限制了其在需要几何推理和可控视觉合成的下游应用中的表现。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一的多模态基础模型，使其同时具备视觉理解、文本到图像生成和指令引导图像编辑能力，并增强空间智能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 JoyAI-Image 模型，将空间增强的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）与多模态扩散 Transformer（MMDiT）耦合，通过共享多模态接口实现感知与生成的交互；并构建可扩展的训练方案，结合统一指令微调、长文本渲染监督、空间接地数据以及通用和空间编辑信号。
contributions: 提出一种统一多模态基础模型架构，耦合空间增强 MLLM 与 MMDiT，实现理解与生成的交互。
构建可扩展的训练方案，融合多种监督信号，增强几何感知和可控视觉合成能力。
在多个基准上达到 SOTA 或极具竞争力的性能，并展示出更强的空间智能。
analysis.experiments: 在理解、生成、长文本渲染和编辑基准上进行了实验，取得了 SOTA 或极具竞争力的性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在极端复杂场景下的泛化能力。
可能对计算资源要求较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: JoyAI-Image 通过耦合空间增强 MLLM 与 MMDiT，实现统一的多模态理解与生成，并展现出更强的空间智能。

papers.title: HERCULES: Hardware-Efficient, Robust, Continual Learning Neural Architecture Search
papers.abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has emerged as a powerful framework for automatically discovering neural architectures that balance accuracy and efficiency. However, as AI transitions from static benchmarks to real-world deployment, the traditional focus on hardware-aware efficiency is no longer sufficient. We observe that modern NAS methods, especially those that target edge AI, are evolving to address a triple objective: Efficiency, Robustness, and Continual Learning. While efficiency ensures feasibility in resource-constrained environments, robustness guarantees reliability under environmental variabilities, and continual learning enables adaptation to sequential tasks without catastrophic forgetting. We propose a taxonomy of NAS approaches through this triple lens, distinguishing between methods targeting resource optimization, environmental resilience, and architectural plasticity. This unified perspective reveals that these axes, though often studied in isolation, are mutually reinforcing. Building on this taxonomy, we map the current landscape of these NAS methods into a new framework called Hardware-Efficient, Robust, and ContinUal LEarning Search (HERCULES). We define the desiderata, the twelve labours of HERCULES, addressing the non-trivial challenge of balancing an adequate search-space exploration with the immense computational costs of a multi-objective NAS, accounting for these crucial objectives of current AI systems. By identifying critical gaps in existing research, this survey outlines a roadmap toward integrated algorithmic, architectural, and hardware-software co-design for truly deployable, lifelong-learning AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出HERCULES框架，系统综述面向硬件效率、鲁棒性和持续学习的神经架构搜索方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统NAS仅关注硬件效率，但实际部署需要同时满足效率、鲁棒性和持续学习三重目标，现有方法孤立研究这些维度，缺乏统一视角。
analysis.problem: 如何系统分类和整合面向效率、鲁棒性和持续学习的NAS方法，并识别关键研究空白。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出效率、鲁棒性和持续学习三个目标相互促进，且多目标NAS面临搜索空间探索与计算成本之间的权衡。
analysis.method: 提出HERCULES框架，通过三重透镜（效率、鲁棒性、持续学习）对现有NAS方法进行分类，并定义十二项关键挑战（十二项任务）。
contributions: 提出基于效率、鲁棒性和持续学习三维度的NAS方法分类体系
构建HERCULES框架，明确多目标NAS的十二项关键挑战和研究路线图
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新的NAS算法或实验验证
框架的实用性需进一步通过实际部署验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HERCULES框架，系统综述面向硬件效率、鲁棒性和持续学习的神经架构搜索方法。

papers.title: Connecting online criminal behavior with machine learning: Using authorship attribution to analyze and link potential online traffickers
papers.abstract: This research investigated how online criminal activities can be better understood and connected using data-driven machine learning methods. Many illegal activities, such as human trafficking and illicit trade, have moved to online platforms where offenders hide behind anonymous accounts and frequently change identities. This makes it difficult for authorities to understand how large these networks are and how different online profiles may be linked. The research shows that people tend to maintain consistent patterns in how they write advertisements and present images online, even when they try to stay anonymous. By analysing these patterns across large collections of online advertisements, the research demonstrates how to link related accounts and identify repeated behaviour across illegal online markets. In addition, the research also addresses how such methods should be used responsibly. It proposes clear guidelines to ensure that privacy, fairness, and transparency are respected when these tools are applied. Overall, the research provides practical ways to support law enforcement investigations while emphasising careful and ethical use.

analysis.tldr: 利用作者归属分析技术，通过写作和图像模式关联在线非法广告，辅助打击人口贩卖等犯罪。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线犯罪活动（如人口贩卖）中，罪犯使用匿名账户和频繁更换身份，使得执法部门难以追踪网络规模和关联不同账户，亟需数据驱动的方法来揭示隐藏的犯罪网络。
analysis.problem: 如何通过机器学习方法，从在线广告中分析并关联潜在的犯罪者身份，同时确保方法的伦理合规性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使试图匿名，人们在撰写广告和呈现图像时仍会保持一致的风格模式，这为关联不同账户提供了可分析的线索。
analysis.method: 采用作者归属分析（authorship attribution）技术，结合文本和图像模式分析，对大规模在线广告进行关联和重复行为识别。
contributions: 提出利用写作和图像模式关联匿名在线广告账户的方法，以揭示非法网络。
制定了负责任使用这些技术的指南，确保隐私、公平和透明度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能受限于广告文本长度和图像质量，影响模式提取的准确性。
伦理指南的实际执行效果和执法应用中的潜在偏见未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用作者归属分析技术，通过写作和图像模式关联在线非法广告，辅助打击人口贩卖等犯罪。

papers.title: Improving Medical VQA through Trajectory-Aware Process Supervision
papers.abstract: Reasoning capabilities are crucial for reliable medical visual question answering (VQA); however, existing datasets rarely include reasoning explanations. We address this by generating reasoning trajectories for six medical VQA benchmarks using the COMCTS algorithm with open-source vision-language models, with an LLM serving as the verification judge. Building on these generated datasets, we propose a two-stage training framework: supervised fine-tuning followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a novel process-based reward. While standard approaches rely solely on exact-match rewards for final answers, we introduce a trajectory-aware reward that measures the similarity between generated and ground-truth reasoning processes. Specifically, we embed reasoning steps using sentence transformers and compute the Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) distance between the resulting vector sequences. Experiments across six benchmarks demonstrate that combining the DTW-based process reward with exact-match reward consistently outperforms SFT-only training, raising mean accuracy from 0.598 to 0.689, mean BERTScore from 0.845 to 0.881, and mean ROUGE-L from 0.665 to 0.748. Our results highlight the importance of process supervision in training reasoning-capable medical VLMs. We make our code and generated reasoning datasets publicly available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 通过轨迹感知过程监督提升医学VQA的推理能力，结合DTW奖励与精确匹配奖励显著优于纯SFT。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学视觉问答需要可靠的推理能力，但现有数据集缺乏推理解释，限制了模型的可解释性和性能。
analysis.problem: 如何生成推理轨迹并利用过程监督训练医学VLM，以提升VQA的准确性和推理质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用COMCTS算法和开源VLM生成推理轨迹，LLM作为验证裁判；两阶段训练：SFT + GRPO，其中过程奖励基于DTW距离衡量生成与真实推理步骤的相似性。
contributions: 提出轨迹感知过程奖励，结合DTW距离与精确匹配奖励进行GRPO训练。
在六个医学VQA基准上验证方法有效性，平均准确率从0.598提升至0.689。
analysis.experiments: 在六个医学VQA基准上评估，平均准确率0.689，平均BERTScore 0.881，平均ROUGE-L 0.748，均优于SFT基线。
limitations: 依赖LLM作为验证裁判，可能引入偏差。
DTW距离计算开销较大，可能影响训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过轨迹感知过程监督提升医学VQA的推理能力，结合DTW奖励与精确匹配奖励显著优于纯SFT。

papers.title: Lookahead Drifting Model
papers.abstract: Recently, a new paradigm named \emph{drifting model} has been proposed for mapping distributions, which achieves the SOTA image generation performance over ImageNet via one-step neural functional evaluation (NFE). The basic idea is to compute a drifting term at each training iteration and then push the output of the model towards the direction of the drifting term. In this paper, we propose a \emph{lookahead drifting model}. At each training iteration, we compute a set of drifting terms sequentially. Each drifting term is calculated by making use of previously computed ones as well as the positive samples and the output of the model. %One key step is to properly scale the drifting terms so that their magnitudes are in a comparable range. In principle, the drifting terms obtained at a later stage capture higher order gradient information towards the positive samples. At each training iteration, the model is optimized by pushing its output towards the direction of the (weighted) summation of the drifting terms. Experimental results on toy examples and CIFAR10 demonstrate the better performance of the new method than the baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Lookahead Drifting Model，通过顺序计算多个漂移项来改进分布映射，在 CIFAR10 上优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有漂移模型（Drifting Model）在一步神经函数评估中实现了 SOTA 图像生成性能，但仅使用单一漂移项，可能无法充分捕获高阶梯度信息，限制了生成质量。
analysis.problem: 如何通过引入多个顺序计算的漂移项来提升漂移模型的分布映射能力，从而获得更好的生成性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在每个训练迭代中顺序计算一组漂移项，每个漂移项利用先前计算的漂移项、正样本和模型输出；最终模型输出朝向漂移项的加权和方向优化。
contributions: 提出 Lookahead Drifting Model，通过顺序计算多个漂移项捕获高阶梯度信息。
在玩具示例和 CIFAR10 上验证了该方法优于基线漂移模型。
analysis.experiments: 在玩具示例和 CIFAR10 数据集上进行了实验，结果表明新方法优于基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在较小规模数据集（CIFAR10）上验证，未在 ImageNet 等更大规模数据集上测试。
计算开销可能增加，因为每个迭代需要计算多个漂移项。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Lookahead Drifting Model，通过顺序计算多个漂移项来改进分布映射，在 CIFAR10 上优于基线。

papers.title: Continual Distillation of Teachers from Different Domains
papers.abstract: Deep learning models continue to scale, with some requiring more storage than many large-scale datasets. Thus, we introduce a new paradigm: Continual Distillation (CD), where a student learns sequentially from a stream of teacher models without retaining access to earlier teachers. CD faces two challenges: teacher training data is unavailable, and teachers have varying expertise. We show that external unlabeled data enables Unseen Knowledge Transfer (UKT), allowing the student to acquire information from domains not present in the training data, while known to the teacher. We also show that sequential distillation causes Unseen Knowledge Forgetting (UKF) when transferred knowledge is lost after training on later teachers. To better trade off between UKT and UKF, we propose Self External Data Distillation (SE2D), a method that preserves logits on external data to stabilize learning across heterogeneous teachers. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that SE2D reduces UKF and improves cross-domain generalization. The code and implementation for this work are publicly available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出持续蒸馏（CD）范式，让学生模型从不同领域的教师序列中学习，并设计SE2D方法缓解未见知识遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型规模持续增长，存储多个教师模型成本高昂，且教师训练数据通常不可用，需要一种高效的知识迁移方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让学生模型从不同领域的教师序列中持续学习，同时解决教师数据不可用和知识遗忘的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到两个现象：外部无标签数据可实现未见知识迁移（UKT），但顺序蒸馏会导致未见知识遗忘（UKF）。
analysis.method: 提出Self External Data Distillation (SE2D)，在外部数据上保留logits以稳定跨异构教师的学习。
contributions: 提出持续蒸馏（CD）新范式，学生从教师序列中学习且无法访问早期教师。
发现并定义未见知识迁移（UKT）和未见知识遗忘（UKF）现象。
提出SE2D方法，有效平衡UKT和UKF，提升跨域泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，SE2D减少了UKF并提高了跨域泛化。
limitations: 依赖外部无标签数据的质量和分布。
未讨论教师模型数量对性能的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出持续蒸馏（CD）范式，让学生模型从不同领域的教师序列中学习，并设计SE2D方法缓解未见知识遗忘。

papers.title: Constraint-Aware Execution Planning for Hybrid Space-Ground Compute Workloads
papers.abstract: Low Earth orbit (LEO) satellites increasingly carry compute hardware capable of on-board processing, yet each satellite generates roughly two orders of magnitude more data than it can downlink per orbit. This mismatch forces operators to decide, for every workload, which computation runs on-board and which runs on the ground, how intermediate data crosses the space-ground boundary through narrow contact windows, and how to maintain delivery guarantees over noisy channels. We present Constraint-Aware Execution (CAE), a planning system that takes a satellite identifier, a workload expressed as a directed acyclic graph of processing steps, and a set of orbital and resource constraints, and produces a deterministic, physically grounded execution plan. CAE operates in four phases: (1) orbital environment construction via SGP4 propagation with eclipse detection and ground station pass prediction, (2) compute placement using a cost model that compares on-board resource consumption against transfer overhead, (3) transfer insertion with adaptive forward error correction and security overhead modeling, and (4) greedy first-fit scheduling into orbital windows under power, thermal, compute, and communication constraints. We evaluate CAE against five representative workload patterns across satellites in distinct orbital regimes and demonstrate that the system produces feasible plans in under two seconds, correctly exploits onboard data reduction to minimize transfer volume, and adapts FEC and multi-pass allocation to varying channel conditions. CAE is deployed as a production API computing plans for any cataloged satellite using live two-line element data.

analysis.tldr: 提出约束感知执行规划系统CAE，为混合星地计算工作负载生成确定性物理执行计划。
analysis.research_motivation: 低轨卫星数据生成量远超下行链路能力，需要智能决策计算任务在星上还是地面执行、数据如何通过窄接触窗口传输，并保证噪声信道下的交付可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何为混合星地计算工作负载，在轨道、资源、通信等多约束下自动生成可行的执行计划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CAE系统，包含四阶段：轨道环境构建（SGP4传播、日食检测、地面站过境预测）、计算放置（成本模型比较星上资源消耗与传输开销）、传输插入（自适应前向纠错与安全开销建模）、贪心首次适应调度（在功率、热、计算、通信约束下将任务分配到轨道窗口）。
contributions: 提出CAE规划系统，为混合星地计算工作负载生成确定性执行计划。
在多种卫星轨道和代表性工作负载模式下验证，系统可在2秒内生成可行计划，并自适应调整FEC和多遍分配。
analysis.experiments: 在五种代表性工作负载模式和不同轨道卫星上评估，系统在2秒内生成可行计划，正确利用星上数据缩减最小化传输量，并适应不同信道条件。
limitations: 可能未考虑动态任务到达或紧急任务抢占。
贪心调度可能不是全局最优。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出约束感知执行规划系统CAE，为混合星地计算工作负载生成确定性物理执行计划。

papers.title: Segmenting proto-halos with vision transformers
papers.abstract: The formation of dark-matter halos from small cosmological perturbations generated in the early universe is a highly non-linear process typically modeled through N-body simulations. In this work, we explore the use of deep learning to segment and classify proto-halo regions in the initial density field according to their final halo mass at redshift z=0. We compare two architectures: a fully convolutional neural network (CNN) based on the V-Net design and a U-Net transformer. We find that the transformer-based network significantly outperforms the CNN across all metrics, achieving sub-percent error in the total segmented mass per halo class. Both networks deliver much higher accuracy than the perturbation-theory-based model \textsc{pinocchio}, especially at low halo masses and in the detailed reconstruction of proto-halo boundaries. We also investigate the impact of different input features by training models on the density field, the tidal shear, and their combination. Finally, we use Grad-CAM to generate class-activation heatmaps for the CNN, providing preliminary yet suggestive insights into how the network exploits the input fields.

analysis.tldr: 用视觉Transformer分割原初密度场中的原初晕，比CNN和微扰理论方法更准。
analysis.research_motivation: 暗物质晕形成是非线性过程，传统N体模拟计算昂贵，微扰理论方法精度有限，需要更高效准确的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 从初始密度场中分割并分类原初晕区域，预测其最终暗物质晕质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Transformer网络在所有指标上显著优于CNN，尤其在低质量晕和边界重建上；微扰理论方法精度远低于深度学习。
analysis.method: 比较V-Net（全卷积CNN）和U-Net Transformer两种架构，输入密度场、潮汐剪切及其组合，使用Grad-CAM进行可解释性分析。
contributions: 首次将视觉Transformer应用于原初晕分割任务，并证明其优于CNN和传统方法。
系统研究了不同输入特征（密度场、潮汐剪切）对分割精度的影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对z=0的暗物质晕，未验证红移演化。
可解释性分析仅针对CNN，Transformer的决策机制未探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用视觉Transformer分割原初密度场中的原初晕，比CNN和微扰理论方法更准。

papers.title: LongSeeker: Elastic Context Orchestration for Long-Horizon Search Agents
papers.abstract: Long-horizon search agents must manage a rapidly growing working context as they reason, call tools, and observe information. Naively accumulating all intermediate content can overwhelm the agent, increasing costs and the risk of errors. We propose that effective context management should be adaptive: parts of the agent's trajectory are maintained at different levels of detail depending on their current relevance to the task. To operationalize this principle, we introduce Context-ReAct, a general agentic paradigm for elastic context orchestration that integrates reasoning, context management, and tool use in a unified loop. Context-ReAct provides five atomic operations: Skip, Compress, Rollback, Snippet and Delete, which allow the agent to dynamically reshape its working context, preserving important evidence, summarizing resolved information, discarding unhelpful branches, and controlling context size. We prove that the Compress operator is expressively complete, while the other specialized operators provide efficiency and fidelity guarantees that reduce generation cost and hallucination risk. Building on this paradigm, we develop LongSeeker, a long-horizon search agent fine-tuned from Qwen3-30B-A3B on 10k synthesized trajectories. Across four representative search benchmarks, LongSeeker achieves 61.5% on BrowseComp and 62.5% on BrowseComp-ZH, substantially outperforming Tongyi DeepResearch (43.2% and 46.7%) and AgentFold (36.2% and 47.3%). These results highlight the potential of adaptive context management, showing that agents can achieve more reliable and efficient long-horizon reasoning by actively shaping their working memory.

analysis.tldr: 提出弹性上下文编排范式Context-ReAct，通过五种原子操作动态管理长程搜索Agent的工作上下文，显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 长程搜索Agent在推理、调用工具和观察信息时，工作上下文会快速增长，简单累积所有中间内容会导致成本增加和错误风险上升，亟需自适应的上下文管理方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让长程搜索Agent根据任务相关性动态调整工作上下文的详细程度，以平衡效率、可靠性和成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Context-ReAct范式，集成推理、上下文管理和工具使用，包含Skip、Compress、Rollback、Snippet、Delete五种原子操作；并基于此微调得到LongSeeker模型。
contributions: 提出Context-ReAct，一种弹性上下文编排的通用Agent范式，提供五种原子操作。
证明Compress操作具有表达完备性，其他操作提供效率和保真度保证。
开发LongSeeker模型，在四个搜索基准上显著超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在BrowseComp和BrowseComp-ZH等四个搜索基准上评估，LongSeeker分别达到61.5%和62.5%，优于Tongyi DeepResearch（43.2%和46.7%）和AgentFold（36.2%和47.3%）。
limitations: 可能依赖合成轨迹的质量。
未讨论在更复杂任务或更大模型上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弹性上下文编排范式Context-ReAct，通过五种原子操作动态管理长程搜索Agent的工作上下文，显著提升性能。

papers.title: Executable World Models for ARC-AGI-3 in the Era of Coding Agents
papers.abstract: We evaluate an initial coding-agent system for ARC-AGI-3 in which the agent maintains an executable Python world model, verifies it against previous observations, refactors it toward simpler abstractions as a practical proxy for an MDL-like simplicity bias, and plans through the model before acting. The system is intentionally direct: it uses a scripted controller, predefined world-model interfaces, verifier programs, and a plan executor, but no hand-coded game-specific logic. We report results on the 25 public ARC-AGI-3 games. Each recorded playthrough uses a fresh agent instance with no access to previous playthrough-specific files or conversation state. Most games have a single recorded playthrough; for a few games, we report multiple independent fresh-agent playthroughs to expose run-to-run variability. The agent fully solved 7 games, achieved a Relative Human Action Efficiency greater than 75%, on 6 games, and obtained a mean per-game RHAE of 32.58%. Because the system uses no game-specific code, it can serve as a game-general baseline for ARC-AGI-3. Performance on the private validation set remains to be tested. Overall, the results provide preliminary evidence that verifier-driven executable world models are a promising approach for ARC-AGI-3 agents.

analysis.tldr: 基于可执行世界模型的编码Agent在ARC-AGI-3上取得初步成功，完全解决7个游戏。
analysis.research_motivation: ARC-AGI-3任务要求通用智能体，现有方法依赖游戏特定代码或缺乏可解释性，需要一种可泛化的基线方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个无需游戏特定代码、基于可执行世界模型和验证驱动的编码Agent来解决ARC-AGI-3任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用脚本控制器、预定义世界模型接口、验证程序和计划执行器，通过维护可执行Python世界模型、验证历史观察、重构简化抽象（近似MDL简单性偏差）并在行动前进行规划。
contributions: 提出了一个无需游戏特定代码的通用ARC-AGI-3编码Agent系统。
在25个公开游戏上进行了评估，完全解决7个游戏，平均RHAE为32.58%。
analysis.experiments: 在25个公开ARC-AGI-3游戏上评估，每个游戏使用全新Agent实例，部分游戏多次运行以展示变异性。完全解决7个游戏，6个游戏RHAE>75%，平均RHAE 32.58%。私有验证集待测试。
limitations: 私有验证集性能未知。
运行间变异性可能影响稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于可执行世界模型的编码Agent在ARC-AGI-3上取得初步成功，完全解决7个游戏。

papers.title: Position: Embodied AI Requires a Privacy-Utility Trade-off
papers.abstract: Embodied AI (EAI) systems are rapidly transitioning from simulations into real-world domestic and other sensitive environments. However, recent EAI solutions have largely demonstrated advancements within isolated stages such as instruction, perception, planning and interaction, without considering their coupled privacy implications in high-frequency deployments where privacy leakage is often irreversible. This position paper argues that optimizing these components independently creates a systemic privacy crisis when deployed in sensitive settings, thereby advancing the position that privacy in EAI is a life cycle-level architectural constraint rather than a stage-local feature. To address these challenges, we propose Secure Privacy Integration in Next-generation Embodied AI (SPINE), a unified privacy-aware framework that treats privacy as a dynamic control signal governing cross-stage coupling throughout the entire EAI life cycle. SPINE decomposes the EAI pipeline into various stages and establishes a multi-criterion privacy classification matrix to orchestrate contextual sensitivity across stage boundaries. We conduct preliminary simulation and real-world case studies to conceptually validate how privacy constraints propagate downstream to reshape system behavior, illustrating the insufficiency of fragmented privacy patches and motivating future research directions into secure yet functional embodied AI systems. We detail the SPINE framework and case studies at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 本文主张隐私应作为具身AI全生命周期的架构约束，并提出SPINE框架实现跨阶段隐私控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身AI系统正快速进入家庭等敏感环境，但现有方案将指令、感知、规划、交互等阶段独立优化，忽略了高频部署中隐私泄露的不可逆风险，导致系统性隐私危机。
analysis.problem: 解决具身AI系统中隐私保护被碎片化处理、缺乏跨阶段统一约束的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有EAI方案在各阶段独立优化，未考虑耦合的隐私影响，导致在敏感环境中部署时隐私泄露不可逆。
analysis.method: 提出SPINE框架，将隐私视为动态控制信号，通过多准则隐私分类矩阵协调跨阶段上下文敏感性，实现全生命周期隐私集成。
contributions: 论证隐私应是具身AI全生命周期的架构约束而非局部特征
提出SPINE统一隐私感知框架，包含多准则隐私分类矩阵和跨阶段耦合控制机制
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及进行了初步仿真和真实世界案例研究来概念验证。
limitations: 框架尚处于概念验证阶段，缺乏大规模定量实验
隐私-效用权衡的具体量化方法未详细说明
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文主张隐私应作为具身AI全生命周期的架构约束，并提出SPINE框架实现跨阶段隐私控制。

papers.title: Uno-Orchestra: Parsimonious Agent Routing via Selective Delegation
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) multi-agent systems typically rely on rigid orchestration, committing either to flat per-query routing or to hand-engineered task decomposition, so decomposition depth, worker choice, and inference budget are not jointly optimized under one objective. We introduce Uno-Orchestra, a unified orchestration policy that selectively decomposes a task and dispatches each subtask to an admissible (model, primitive) pair, with both decisions learned together from curated RL trajectories grounded in real worker interactions. Against 22 baselines on a 13-benchmark suite spanning math, code, knowledge, long-context, and agentic tool-use, Uno-Orchestra reaches 77.0% macro pass@1, roughly 16% above the strongest workflow baseline, at roughly an order of magnitude lower per-query cost, advancing the accuracy-efficiency frontier of selective delegation.

analysis.tldr: Uno-Orchestra 通过强化学习联合优化任务分解与模型选择，在13个基准上以更低成本实现更高准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统依赖刚性编排，要么使用扁平化的每查询路由，要么使用手工设计的任务分解，导致分解深度、工人选择和推理预算无法在单一目标下联合优化。
analysis.problem: 如何联合学习任务分解策略和子任务到（模型，原语）对的分配，以在准确性和效率之间取得最佳平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Uno-Orchestra，一种统一编排策略，通过从基于真实工人交互的强化学习轨迹中学习，选择性分解任务并将每个子任务分配给可接受的（模型，原语）对。
contributions: 首次将任务分解深度、工人选择和推理预算在单一目标下联合优化。
在13个基准的22个基线上，以约一个数量级更低的每查询成本，实现了77.0%的宏pass@1，比最强工作流基线高出约16%。
analysis.experiments: 在涵盖数学、代码、知识、长上下文和智能体工具使用的13个基准套件上，与22个基线进行比较。
limitations: 可能依赖于高质量的RL轨迹数据，获取成本高。
在极端多样化的任务上泛化能力有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Uno-Orchestra 通过强化学习联合优化任务分解与模型选择，在13个基准上以更低成本实现更高准确率。

papers.title: On-line Learning in Tree MDPs by Treating Policies as Bandit Arms
papers.abstract: A Tree Markov Decision Problem (T-MDP) is a finite-horizon MDP with a starting state $s_{1}$, in which every state is reachable from $s_{1}$ through exactly one state-action trajectory. T-MDPs arise naturally as abstractions of decision making in sequential games with perfect recall, against stationary opponents. We consider the problem of on-line learning in T-MDPs, both in the PAC and the regret-minimisation regimes. We show that well-known bandit algorithms -- \textsc{Lucb} and \textsc{Ucb} -- can be applied on T-MDPs by treating each policy as an arm. The apparent technical challenge in this approach is that the number of policies is exponential in the number of states. Our main innovation is in the design of confidence bounds based on data shared by the policies, so that the bandit algorithms can yet be implemented with polynomial memory and per-step computation. We obtain instance-dependent upper bounds on sample complexity and regret that sum a ``gap term'' from every terminal state, rather than every policy. Empirically, our algorithms consistently outperform available alternatives on a suite of hidden-information games.

analysis.tldr: 将树MDP中的每条策略视为老虎机臂，利用策略间共享数据设计置信界，实现多项式复杂度的在线学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 树MDP作为完美回忆序贯博弈中对抗固定对手决策的抽象，其在线学习在PAC和遗憾最小化框架下具有重要应用价值，但策略数量随状态数指数增长，直接应用传统算法面临计算和内存瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 在树MDP中实现高效在线学习，要求算法在策略空间指数级的情况下仍保持多项式时间和内存复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将每条确定性策略视为老虎机臂，利用策略间共享的轨迹数据设计置信上界，使得LUCB和UCB算法能以多项式内存和每步计算量实现，样本复杂度和遗憾上界仅依赖于终端状态的间隙项而非策略数。
contributions: 提出将树MDP在线学习转化为策略级老虎机问题，并利用共享数据设计高效置信界，实现多项式复杂度。
导出实例相关的样本复杂度和遗憾上界，其间隙项仅与终端状态相关，优于传统策略级分析。
analysis.experiments: 在隐藏信息游戏套件上，所提算法持续优于现有替代方案。
limitations: 方法仅适用于树MDP结构，对一般MDP的扩展性未知。
理论界依赖间隙项，在间隙极小时可能退化为平凡界。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将树MDP中的每条策略视为老虎机臂，利用策略间共享数据设计置信界，实现多项式复杂度的在线学习。

papers.title: A Foundation Model for Zero-Shot Logical Rule Induction
papers.abstract: Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) learns interpretable logical rules from data. Existing methods are transductive: their learned parameters are bound to specific predicates and require retraining for each new task. We introduce Neural Rule Inducer (NRI), a pretrained model for zero-shot rule induction. Rather than encoding literal identities, NRI represents literals using domain-agnostic statistical properties such as class-conditional rates, entropy, and co-occurrence, which generalize across variable identities and counts without retraining. The model consists of a statistical encoder and a parallel slot-based decoder. Parallel decoding preserves the permutation invariance of logical disjunction; an autoregressive decoder would instead impose an arbitrary clause order. Product T-norm relaxation makes rule execution differentiable, allowing end-to-end training on prediction accuracy alone. We evaluate NRI on rule recovery, robustness to label noise and spurious correlations, and zero-shot transfer to real-world benchmarks, and we believe this work opens up the possibility of foundation models for symbolic reasoning. Code and the reference checkpoint are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出NRI，一种用于零样本逻辑规则归纳的基础模型，通过统计表示和并行解码实现跨任务泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有归纳逻辑编程方法具有传导性，参数绑定到特定谓词，每个新任务都需要重新训练，缺乏泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何实现零样本的逻辑规则归纳，使模型无需针对每个新任务重新训练即可学习可解释的逻辑规则。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: NRI包含统计编码器和并行槽解码器，使用类条件率、熵、共现等统计属性表示文字，通过乘积T-范数松弛使规则执行可微，实现端到端训练。
contributions: 提出NRI，首个用于零样本规则归纳的预训练模型，通过统计表示实现跨任务泛化。
设计并行槽解码器保持逻辑析取的置换不变性，避免自回归解码的任意子句顺序。
analysis.experiments: 在规则恢复、对标签噪声和虚假相关性的鲁棒性、以及零样本迁移到真实世界基准上评估。
limitations: 可能对复杂规则或大规模谓词空间扩展性有限。
统计表示可能丢失部分语义信息，影响规则精确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NRI，一种用于零样本逻辑规则归纳的基础模型，通过统计表示和并行解码实现跨任务泛化。

papers.title: Curated AI beats frontier LLMs at pharma asset discovery
papers.abstract: General-purpose LLMs with web search are increasingly used to scout the competitive landscape of pharmaceutical pipelines. We benchmark Gosset -- an AI platform with a chat interface backed by curated target-, modality-, and indication-level drug-asset annotations -- against four frontier systems with web access (Claude Opus 4.7, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Perplexity sonar-pro) on ten niche oncology/immunology targets where most of the pipeline lives in the long tail of preclinical and Asian-developed assets. All five systems receive the same natural-language query and the same JSON output schema. Across 10 targets Gosset returns 3.2x more verified drugs per query than the best frontier system, at perfect precision and 100% recall against the cross-system union of verified drugs. The same curated index is exposed as a Gosset MCP server that any frontier model can call as a tool, suggesting that each of these systems can close most of the recall gap by swapping generic web search for a curated index behind the same chat interface.

analysis.tldr: 基于精选数据库的AI平台在药物资产发现上远超通用前沿LLM。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用LLM结合网络搜索被用于药物管线竞争情报，但网络搜索可能遗漏长尾资产，导致召回率低。
analysis.problem: 如何提高在制药资产发现中针对长尾靶点的药物检索召回率和精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用LLM在长尾靶点（临床前和亚洲开发的资产）上召回率低，而基于精选数据库的AI平台能实现完美精度和100%召回。
analysis.method: 构建Gosset平台，包含精选的靶点、模态和适应症级别的药物资产注释，通过聊天界面提供查询，并可作为MCP服务器供其他模型调用。
contributions: 提出Gosset平台，在10个肿瘤/免疫靶点上比最佳前沿系统多返回3.2倍已验证药物，精度完美，召回率100%。
展示将精选索引作为工具（MCP服务器）可显著缩小通用LLM的召回差距。
analysis.experiments: 在10个肿瘤/免疫靶点上，对比Gosset与四个前沿系统（Claude Opus 4.7, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Perplexity sonar-pro），使用相同自然语言查询和JSON输出格式。
limitations: 仅评估了10个靶点，可能不具广泛代表性。
依赖精选数据库的维护和更新，可能无法覆盖所有最新资产。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于精选数据库的AI平台在药物资产发现上远超通用前沿LLM。

papers.title: Strat-Reasoner: Reinforcing Strategic Reasoning of LLMs in Multi-Agent Games
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in certain reasoning tasks, they struggle in multi-agent games where the final outcome depends on the joint strategies of all agents. In multi-agent games, the non-stationarity of other agents brings significant challenges on the evaluation of the reasoning process and the credit assignment over multiple reasoning steps. Existing single-agent reinforcement learning (RL) approaches and their multi-agent extensions fail to address these challenges as they do not incorporate other agents in the reasoning process. In this work, we propose Strat-Reasoner, a novel RL-based framework that improves LLMs' strategic reasoning ability in multi-agent games. We introduce a novel recursive reasoning paradigm where an agent's reasoning also integrates other agents' reasoning processes. To provide effective reward signals for the intermediate reasoning sequences, we employ a centralized Chain-of-Thought (CoT) comparison module to evaluate the reasoning quality. Finally, we compute an accurate hybrid advantage and develop a group-relative RL approach to optimize the LLM policy. Experimental results show that Strat-Reasoner substantially improves strategic abilities of underlying LLMs, achieving 22.1\% average performance improvements across various multi-agent games.

analysis.tldr: 提出Strat-Reasoner框架，通过递归推理和集中式CoT比较模块增强LLM在多智能体博弈中的策略推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在单智能体推理任务中表现优异，但在多智能体博弈中因其他智能体的非平稳性导致推理评估和信用分配困难，现有单智能体RL及其多智能体扩展未将其他智能体纳入推理过程。
analysis.problem: 如何提升LLM在多智能体博弈中的策略推理能力，解决非平稳性带来的推理评估与信用分配挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出递归推理范式，将其他智能体的推理过程融入当前智能体推理；使用集中式CoT比较模块评估中间推理质量；计算混合优势并采用组相对RL优化策略。
contributions: 提出Strat-Reasoner框架，首次将递归推理与集中式CoT比较结合用于多智能体博弈。
设计组相对RL方法，有效优化LLM策略，平均性能提升22.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在多种多智能体博弈任务上评估，平均性能提升22.1%。
limitations: 可能依赖集中式CoT比较模块的计算开销。
递归推理的复杂度可能随智能体数量增加而上升。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Strat-Reasoner框架，通过递归推理和集中式CoT比较模块增强LLM在多智能体博弈中的策略推理能力。

papers.title: DecodingTrust-Agent Platform (DTap): A Controllable and Interactive Red-Teaming Platform for AI Agents
papers.abstract: AI agents are increasingly deployed across diverse domains to automate complex workflows through long-horizon and high-stakes action executions. Due to their high capability and flexibility, such agents raise significant security and safety concerns. A growing number of real-world incidents have shown that adversaries can easily manipulate agents into performing harmful actions, such as leaking API keys, deleting user data, or initiating unauthorized transactions. Evaluating agent security is inherently challenging, as agents operate in dynamic, untrusted environments involving external tools, heterogeneous data sources, and frequent user interactions. However, realistic, controllable, and reproducible environments for large-scale risk assessment remain largely underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce the DecodingTrust-Agent Platform (DTap), the first controllable and interactive red-teaming platform for AI agents, spanning 14 real-world domains and over 50 simulation environments that replicate widely used systems such as Google Workspace, Paypal, and Slack. To scale the risk assessment of agents in DTap, we further propose DTap-Red, the first autonomous red-teaming agent that systematically explores diverse injection vectors (e.g., prompt, tool, skill, environment, combinations) and autonomously discovers effective attack strategies tailored to varying malicious goals. Using DTap-Red, we curate DTap-Bench, a large-scale red-teaming dataset comprising high-quality instances across domains, each paired with a verifiable judge to automatically validate attack outcomes. Through DTap, we conduct large-scale evaluations of popular AI agents built on various backbone models, spanning security policies, risk categories, and attack strategies, revealing systematic vulnerability patterns and providing valuable insights for developing secure next-generation agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个可控交互式AI Agent红队平台DTap，含14个领域50+仿真环境，并配套自动化红队Agent DTap-Red和基准数据集DTap-Bench，系统评估主流Agent的安全漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: AI Agent在动态、不可信环境中执行高风险操作，面临严重安全威胁，但缺乏可控、可复现的大规模风险评估平台。
analysis.problem: 现有环境难以支持对AI Agent进行真实、可控且可复现的大规模红队测试。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建DTap平台，包含14个真实世界领域和50+仿真环境；提出DTap-Red自动化红队Agent，可系统探索多种注入向量并自主发现攻击策略；基于DTap-Red构建DTap-Bench数据集，每个实例配有可验证的评判器。
contributions: 提出首个可控交互式红队平台DTap，覆盖14个领域和50+仿真环境。
提出首个自动化红队Agent DTap-Red，能自主探索多种注入向量并发现攻击策略。
构建大规模红队数据集DTap-Bench，含高质量实例和可验证评判器。
通过大规模评估揭示主流Agent的系统性漏洞模式，为开发安全Agent提供见解。
analysis.experiments: 在DTap平台上对基于多种骨干模型的流行AI Agent进行大规模评估，覆盖安全策略、风险类别和攻击策略，揭示了系统性漏洞模式。
limitations: 平台覆盖的领域和仿真环境可能仍有遗漏。
自动化红队Agent的攻击策略可能无法覆盖所有攻击向量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个可控交互式AI Agent红队平台DTap，含14个领域50+仿真环境，并配套自动化红队Agent DTap-Red和基准数据集DTap-Bench，系统评估主流Agent的安全漏洞。

papers.title: AgentTrust: Runtime Safety Evaluation and Interception for AI Agent Tool Use
papers.abstract: Modern AI agents execute real-world side effects through tool calls such as file operations, shell commands, HTTP requests, and database queries. A single unsafe action, including accidental deletion, credential exposure, or data exfiltration, can cause irreversible harm. Existing defenses are incomplete: post-hoc benchmarks measure behavior after execution, static guardrails miss obfuscation and multi-step context, and infrastructure sandboxes constrain where code runs without understanding what an action means. We present AgentTrust, a runtime safety layer that intercepts agent tool calls before execution and returns a structured verdict: allow, warn, block, or review. AgentTrust combines a shell deobfuscation normalizer, SafeFix suggestions for safer alternatives, RiskChain detection for multi-step attack chains, and a cache-aware LLM-as-Judge for ambiguous inputs. We release a 300-scenario benchmark across six risk categories and an additional 630 independently constructed real-world adversarial scenarios. On the internal benchmark, the production-only ruleset achieves 95.0% verdict accuracy and 73.7% risk-level accuracy at low-millisecond end-to-end latency. On the 630-scenario benchmark, evaluated under a patched ruleset and not claimed as zero-shot, AgentTrust achieves 96.7% verdict accuracy, including about 93% on shell-obfuscated payloads. AgentTrust is released under the AGPL-3.0 license and provides a Model Context Protocol server for MCP-compatible agents.

analysis.tldr: AgentTrust 是一个运行时安全层，在 AI Agent 工具调用前进行拦截并给出结构化裁决，结合反混淆、安全修复建议、多步攻击链检测和 LLM 评判，实现高准确率低延迟的安全防护。
analysis.research_motivation: AI Agent 通过工具调用（如文件操作、shell 命令、HTTP 请求、数据库查询）执行真实世界操作，一次不安全动作（如意外删除、凭证泄露、数据窃取）可能造成不可逆损害。现有防御不完整：事后基准只能在执行后测量行为，静态护栏无法应对混淆和多步上下文，基础设施沙箱只限制代码运行位置而不理解动作含义。
analysis.problem: 在 AI Agent 工具调用执行前进行实时安全评估与拦截，防止不安全动作造成实际损害。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: AgentTrust 结合 shell 反混淆归一化器、SafeFix 安全替代建议、RiskChain 多步攻击链检测以及缓存感知的 LLM-as-Judge 对模糊输入进行裁决，输出 allow、warn、block、review 四种结构化裁决。
contributions: 提出 AgentTrust 运行时安全层，在工具调用执行前进行拦截和结构化裁决。
发布包含 300 个场景的六类风险基准和 630 个独立构建的真实世界对抗场景。
在内部基准上，生产规则集达到 95.0% 裁决准确率和 73.7% 风险级别准确率，端到端延迟为低毫秒级。
在 630 场景基准上，补丁规则集达到 96.7% 裁决准确率，对 shell 混淆载荷约 93%。
analysis.experiments: 在内部 300 场景基准上，生产规则集达到 95.0% 裁决准确率和 73.7% 风险级别准确率，端到端延迟为低毫秒级。在 630 场景基准上，补丁规则集达到 96.7% 裁决准确率，包括对 shell 混淆载荷约 93%。
limitations: 补丁规则集在 630 场景基准上的评估并非零样本，可能依赖特定规则调整。
LLM-as-Judge 组件可能引入额外延迟和成本，且对模糊输入的处理能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AgentTrust 是一个运行时安全层，在 AI Agent 工具调用前进行拦截并给出结构化裁决，结合反混淆、安全修复建议、多步攻击链检测和 LLM 评判，实现高准确率低延迟的安全防护。

papers.title: Reward-Decomposed Reinforcement Learning for Immersive Video Role-Playing
papers.abstract: Text-based role-playing models can imitate character styles, yet they often fail to reflect a scene's atmosphere and evolving tension, both essential for immersive applications such as Virtual Reality (VR) games and interactive narratives. We study video-grounded role-playing dialogue and introduce EBM-RL (Eye-Brain-Mouth Reinforcement Learning), a decoupled GRPO-based framework that explicitly separates observation ([perception]), reasoning ([think]), and utterance ([answer]). This structure promotes human-like sensory grounding by compelling the model to first attend to visual cues, then form internal interpretations, and finally generate context-appropriate dialogue. EBM-RL integrates four complementary rewards: (i) CLIP-based scene-text alignment to improve ambiance and emotion; (ii) a Perceptual-Cognitive reward that encourages [perception] and [think] processes that increase the likelihood of the reference response; (iii) answer accuracy to ensure faithfulness; and (iv) a dense format reward to enforce the desired structured output. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EBM-RL substantially outperforms text-only role-playing baselines and larger-scale vision-language models on our immersive role-playing benchmark, delivering simultaneous gains in visual-atmosphere consistency and character authenticity. Beyond the role-playing domain, EBM-RL also exhibits strong zero-shot generalization: without any additional fine-tuning, it consistently improves performance on out-of-domain VideoQA benchmarks. We additionally release an open-source dataset for video-grounded role-playing dialogue.

analysis.tldr: 提出EBM-RL框架，通过解耦感知-推理-回答结构和四种奖励，提升视频角色扮演对话的沉浸感与场景一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本角色扮演模型虽能模仿角色风格，但常忽略场景氛围和紧张感，难以满足VR游戏等沉浸式应用需求。
analysis.problem: 视频角色扮演对话中缺乏对视觉线索的感知和场景氛围的建模，导致对话缺乏沉浸感和真实性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有文本模型无法有效利用视觉信息，导致场景氛围和角色真实性不足。
analysis.method: 提出EBM-RL框架，基于GRPO，将对话过程解耦为观察（[perception]）、推理（[think]）和回答（[answer]）三个结构化步骤，并集成四种互补奖励：CLIP场景-文本对齐奖励、感知-认知奖励、答案准确性奖励和格式奖励。
contributions: 提出EBM-RL框架，通过解耦结构和多奖励机制提升视频角色扮演的沉浸感。
在角色扮演基准上显著优于文本基线和更大规模视觉语言模型，并在VideoQA上展现零样本泛化能力。
开源视频角色扮演对话数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在自建沉浸式角色扮演基准上，EBM-RL大幅优于文本角色扮演基线和更大规模视觉语言模型；在域外VideoQA基准上零样本泛化表现一致提升。
limitations: 依赖CLIP模型和预定义奖励设计，可能无法覆盖所有场景。
解耦结构可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EBM-RL框架，通过解耦感知-推理-回答结构和四种奖励，提升视频角色扮演对话的沉浸感与场景一致性。

papers.title: Budget-aware Auto Optimizer Configurator
papers.abstract: Optimizer states occupy massive GPU memory in large-scale model training. However, gradients in different network blocks exhibit distinct behaviors, such as varying directional stability and scale anisotropy, implying that expensive optimizer states are not universally necessary and using a global optimizer is often memory-inefficient. We propose the Budget-Aware Optimizer Configurator (BAOC) to reduce memory cost by assigning suitable optimizer configurations to individual blocks under given budgets. Specifically, BAOC samples gradient streams to derive statistical metrics that quantify the potential performance risk of applying cheaper configurations (e.g., low precision or removing momentum). It then solves a constrained allocation problem to minimize total risk under memory and time budgets, selecting a budget-feasible configuration for each block. Experiments across vision, language, and diffusion workloads demonstrate that BAOC maintains training quality while significantly reducing the memory usage of optimizer states. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: BAOC通过为每个网络块分配预算感知的优化器配置，在保持训练质量的同时显著降低优化器状态的内存占用。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模模型训练中优化器状态占用大量GPU内存，但不同网络块的梯度行为差异大，全局优化器内存效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何在给定内存和时间预算下，为每个网络块选择最优的优化器配置以最小化性能风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同网络块的梯度在方向稳定性和尺度各向异性上表现不同，表明昂贵的优化器状态并非普遍必要。
analysis.method: BAOC采样梯度流统计指标量化使用廉价配置的性能风险，然后求解约束分配问题，为每个块选择预算可行的配置。
contributions: 提出预算感知的优化器配置器BAOC，根据梯度行为为每个块分配优化器配置。
通过约束优化在内存和时间预算下最小化性能风险，显著降低优化器状态内存占用。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉、语言和扩散任务上验证，BAOC在保持训练质量的同时显著减少优化器状态内存。
limitations: 可能依赖梯度采样的代表性，极端情况下风险估计可能不准确。
未讨论对训练时间的具体影响，仅提及时间预算约束。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BAOC通过为每个网络块分配预算感知的优化器配置，在保持训练质量的同时显著降低优化器状态的内存占用。

papers.title: AuditRepairBench: A Paired-Execution Trace Corpus for Evaluator-Channel Ranking Instability in Agent Repair
papers.abstract: Agent-repair leaderboards reorder under evaluator reconfiguration, and a measurable share of the reordering is produced by methods that consult evaluator-derived signal during internal selection of candidate repairs. We document this failure mode on a public leaderboard and release AuditRepairBench, a paired-execution trace corpus of 576,000 registered cells (96,000 executed) that operationalizes evaluator-channel-blocking ranking instability within a declared observability boundary. A modular screening architecture decides pathway-blocking through four interchangeable implementations, a learned influence proxy, a rule-based channel-exposure ratio that uses no trained model, a counterfactual sensitivity proxy, and a sparse human-audit proxy, combined into a screening posterior that feeds a cell-level flip functional, a set-valued label, a stratified system score, and a set-valued leaderboard. The resource is supported by mechanism-anchored validation on an 80-case source-level channel-surgery subset, an independent-discovery protocol under which two annotator groups separated from the pipeline developers discover coupling patterns blinded to the screening design and the frozen ensemble attains pooled AUROC 0.83 on their 79 cases, implementation robustness, uncertainty propagation that raises 95% coverage from 0.81 to 0.95, and forward transfer with pooled community-evaluator Spearman \r{ho} = 0.65. Screening-guided blinding patches reduce rank displacement by 55--74% (mean 62%) at fewer than 50 lines of code, whereas random channel blinding produces at most 7% reduction and generic retraining at most 13%. AuditRepairBench-Lite, a rule-only configuration on a 12,000-cell subset, preserves the leaderboard at Kendall {\tau} = 0.88 under twenty-four GPU-hours and is the primary release artifact at 42 GB.

analysis.tldr: 提出AuditRepairBench语料库，用于检测和缓解Agent修复中评估器通道导致的排名不稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: Agent修复排行榜在评估器重新配置时排名会变化，且部分变化源于方法在内部选择候选修复时使用了评估器信号，这破坏了排行榜的公平性和可重复性。
analysis.problem: 评估器通道导致的排名不稳定性（evaluator-channel ranking instability）的检测与缓解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：当评估器配置改变时，Agent修复排行榜的排名会重新排序，且相当一部分排序变化是由那些在内部选择候选修复时咨询评估器信号的方法造成的。
analysis.method: 构建AuditRepairBench语料库（576,000个注册单元，96,000个执行单元），设计模块化筛选架构，包含四种可互换的实现（学习影响代理、基于规则的通道暴露比、反事实敏感性代理、稀疏人工审计代理），结合筛选后验、单元级翻转函数、集合值标签、分层系统分数和集合值排行榜。
contributions: 公开了AuditRepairBench语料库，用于评估器通道排名不稳定性的可操作化。
提出了模块化筛选架构和多种实现，并通过机制锚定验证、独立发现协议等证明了有效性。
展示了筛选引导的盲化补丁在少量代码下显著降低排名位移（55-74%），优于随机盲化和通用重训练。
analysis.experiments: 在80个案例的源级通道手术子集上进行机制锚定验证；独立发现协议中，两组标注者发现耦合模式，冻结集成在79个案例上达到AUROC 0.83；不确定性传播将95%覆盖率从0.81提升至0.95；前向迁移中社区评估器Spearman ρ=0.65；筛选引导盲化补丁减少排名位移55-74%（平均62%），随机盲化最多7%，通用重训练最多13%。
limitations: 语料库规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有类型的评估器通道不稳定性。
筛选架构的四种实现可能仍有遗漏的通道模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AuditRepairBench语料库，用于检测和缓解Agent修复中评估器通道导致的排名不稳定性。

papers.title: SensingAgents: A Multi-Agent Collaborative Framework for Robust IMU Activity Recognition
papers.abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) using Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) sensors is a cornerstone of mobile health, smart environments, and human-computer interaction. However, current deep learning-based HAR models often struggle with heavy reliance on labeled data, position-specific ambiguity, and a lack of transparent reasoning. Inspired by the advanced agents framework, which emulates a collaborative agent using Large Language Models (LLMs), we propose SensingAgents, a novel multi-agent system for robust IMU activity recognition. SensingAgents organizes LLM-powered agents into specialized roles: a group of Analyst Agents for position-specific sensor analysis (arm, wrist, belt, pocket), a pair of Advocate Agents that resolves sensor conflicts through dynamic and static dialectical debates, and a Decision Agent that ensures reliability under sensor drift or failure. Evaluation on the Shoaib dataset demonstrates that SensingAgents significantly outperforms state-of-the-art single-agent and multi-agent LLM models, achieving an accuracy of 79.5% in a zero setting--29% higher than existing agent models and 9.4% higher than deep learning baselines--particularly in complex scenarios where multi-sensor data is conflicting or noisy. Our work highlights the potential of multi-agent collaborative reasoning for advancing the robustness and interpretability of ubiquitous sensing systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体协作框架SensingAgents，利用LLM代理提升IMU活动识别的鲁棒性和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习HAR模型依赖大量标注数据、存在位置特异性模糊且缺乏透明推理，亟需更鲁棒和可解释的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多智能体协作和LLM推理能力，解决IMU活动识别中多传感器数据冲突、噪声和位置歧义问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SensingAgents：组织LLM驱动的代理为专门角色，包括分析师代理（位置特定传感器分析）、倡导代理（通过动态和静态辩证辩论解决传感器冲突）和决策代理（确保传感器漂移或故障下的可靠性）。
contributions: 提出首个基于多智能体协作的IMU活动识别框架SensingAgents。
在Shoaib数据集上零样本设置下达到79.5%准确率，比现有代理模型高29%，比深度学习基线高9.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在Shoaib数据集上评估，零样本设置下准确率79.5%，显著优于现有单智能体和多智能体LLM模型以及深度学习基线。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
依赖LLM推理，计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体协作框架SensingAgents，利用LLM代理提升IMU活动识别的鲁棒性和可解释性。

papers.title: From Parameter Dynamics to Risk Scoring : Quantifying Sample-Level Safety Degradation in LLM Fine-tuning
papers.abstract: Safety alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) is extremely fragile, as fine-tuning on a small number of benign samples can erase safety behaviors learned from millions of preference examples. Existing studies attempt to explain this phenomenon by comparing parameters and hidden states before and after fine-tuning, but overlook their dynamic evolution during fine-tuning. In this paper, we uncover a critical mechanism underlying safety degradation by analyzing parameter dynamics, where benign fine-tuning causes parameters to cumulatively drift toward danger-aligned directions, progressively undermining the model's safety. This finding suggests that samples contributing more to this drift has greater fine-tuning risks. Based on this insight, we propose a method of Sample-Level Quantification of Safety Degradation (SQSD), which quantifies the influence of each training sample on safety degradation. Specifically, SQSD computes continuous risk scores to samples by measuring their induced parameter updates' projection difference between danger and safety directions. Extensive experiments across multiple models and datasets demonstrate that SQSD effectively quantifies sample-level fine-tuning risks and exhibits strong transferability across model architectures, parameter scales, and parameter-efficient methods.

analysis.tldr: 通过分析参数动态，揭示微调中安全退化的机制，并提出样本级风险量化方法SQSD。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的安全对齐极其脆弱，少量良性样本的微调即可破坏从大量偏好示例中学到的安全行为，现有研究仅比较微调前后的参数和隐藏状态，忽略了微调过程中的动态演化。
analysis.problem: 如何量化每个训练样本对LLM微调过程中安全退化的贡献程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 良性微调导致参数累积性地向危险对齐方向漂移，逐步削弱模型安全性，且对漂移贡献更大的样本具有更高的微调风险。
analysis.method: 提出SQSD方法，通过计算样本引起的参数更新在安全方向和危险方向上的投影差异，为每个样本分配连续的风险分数。
contributions: 揭示了微调过程中参数动态演化的安全退化机制，即参数向危险方向累积漂移。
提出了SQSD方法，能够有效量化样本级微调风险，并展现出跨模型架构、参数规模和参数高效方法的强迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型和数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了SQSD的有效性和迁移性。
limitations: 摘要未提及SQSD的计算效率或在大规模数据集上的可扩展性。
可能仅适用于监督微调场景，对其他微调范式（如RLHF）的适用性未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分析参数动态，揭示微调中安全退化的机制，并提出样本级风险量化方法SQSD。

papers.title: How Does Thinking Mode Change LLM Moral Judgments? A Controlled Instant-vs-Thinking Comparison Across Five Frontier Models
papers.abstract: We evaluate whether enabling provider-exposed reasoning mode changes moral judgments within the same model checkpoint. Across 100 moral-judgment scenarios and five frontier reasoning-trained LLMs (Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3 Flash, DeepSeek V3.1, and Qwen3.5 397B), aggregate binary-verdict agreement remains high and statistically indistinguishable between instant and thinking modes (Krippendorff's alpha = 0.78 vs. 0.79). However, disagreement is concentrated in 21 model-disputed scenarios, where instant-mode agreement is near chance (alpha = 0.08). On these scenarios, reasoning directionally narrows cross-model disagreement, increasing mean pairwise agreement from 5.4 to 6.7 out of 10. Reasoning also reduces demographic-judgment inconsistency in three of five models and does not increase it for any model. Across all five model families, reasoning changes self-labeled ethical frameworks more often than binary verdicts.

analysis.tldr: 推理模式不会显著改变LLM的道德判断整体一致性，但能缩小争议场景下的模型间分歧并降低人口统计不一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在道德判断任务中可能表现出不一致性，而推理模式（thinking mode）是否以及如何影响其道德判断尚不清楚，这对AI安全和对齐至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究同一模型检查点下，启用推理模式与即时模式相比，如何改变LLM的道德判断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在100个道德判断场景和五个前沿推理型LLM上，比较即时模式与推理模式的二元判决一致性、跨模型分歧、人口统计不一致性以及自我标签伦理框架的变化。
contributions: 发现推理模式不显著改变整体道德判断一致性，但能缩小争议场景下的跨模型分歧。
揭示推理模式在部分模型中减少人口统计不一致性，且更频繁地改变自我标签的伦理框架而非二元判决。
analysis.experiments: 在100个道德判断场景和五个模型（Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3 Flash, DeepSeek V3.1, Qwen3.5 397B）上进行实验，使用Krippendorff's alpha和平均成对一致性等指标。
limitations: 仅评估了五个模型，可能不适用于其他模型或架构。
道德判断场景有限，可能无法覆盖所有道德维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 推理模式不会显著改变LLM的道德判断整体一致性，但能缩小争议场景下的模型间分歧并降低人口统计不一致性。

papers.title: Deployment-Relevant Alignment Cannot Be Inferred from Model-Level Evaluation Alone
papers.abstract: Alignment evaluation in machine learning has largely become evaluation of models. Influential benchmarks score model outputs under fixed inputs, such as truthfulness, instruction following, or pairwise preference, and these scores are often used to support claims about deployed alignment. This paper argues that deployment-relevant alignment cannot be inferred from model-level evaluation alone. Alignment claims should instead be indexed to the level at which evidence is collected: model-level, response-level, interaction-level, or deployment-level. Two studies support this position. First, a structured audit of eleven alignment benchmarks, extended to a sixteen-benchmark corpus, dual-coded against an eight-dimension rubric with Cohen's kappa = 0.87, finds that user-facing verification support is absent across every benchmark examined, while process steerability is nearly absent. The few interactional benchmarks identified, including tau-bench, CURATe, Rifts, and Common Ground, remain fragmented in coverage, and benchmark construction rather than data source determines what is measured. Second, a blinded cross-model stress test using 180 transcripts across three frontier models and four scaffolds finds that the same verification scaffold raises one model's verification support to ceiling while leaving another categorically unchanged. This shows that scaffold efficacy is model-dependent and that the gap identified by the audit cannot be closed at the model level alone. We propose a system-level evaluation agenda: alignment profiles instead of single scores, fixed-scaffolding protocols for comparable interactional evaluation, and reporting templates that make the inferential distance between evaluation evidence and deployment claims explicit.

analysis.tldr: 模型级对齐评估无法推断部署相关对齐，需转向系统级评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前对齐评估主要基于模型级基准（如真实性、指令遵循等），但这些分数常被用于支持部署对齐声明，缺乏验证。
analysis.problem: 证明部署相关对齐不能仅从模型级评估推断，并提出系统级评估方案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 审计11个对齐基准（扩展至16个）发现用户面对验证支持缺失，过程可操控性几乎不存在；跨模型压力测试显示相同验证框架对不同模型效果差异巨大。
analysis.method: 结构化审计对齐基准（双编码，Cohen's kappa=0.87）和盲法跨模型压力测试（180个转录本，3个前沿模型，4个框架）。
contributions: 论证部署相关对齐不能仅从模型级评估推断，需索引到证据收集层级（模型、响应、交互、部署）。
提出系统级评估议程：对齐画像、固定框架协议、报告模板。
analysis.experiments: 审计16个基准，压力测试180个转录本，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 审计基准数量有限，可能未覆盖所有相关基准。
压力测试仅涉及三个模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 模型级对齐评估无法推断部署相关对齐，需转向系统级评估。

papers.title: When Context Hurts: The Crossover Effect of Knowledge Transfer on Multi-Agent Design Exploration
papers.abstract: The prevailing assumption in agent orchestration is that more context is better. We test this on multi-agent software design across 10 tasks, 7 context-injection conditions, and over 2,700 runs, and find a crossover effect: the same artifact type improves design exploration on some tasks (up to 20$\times$ tradeoff coverage) and actively degrades it on others (up to 46% reduction). On several tasks, an irrelevant document performs as well as or better than every relevant artifact. The direction is predicted by a single measurable variable--baseline exploration without context--with Pearson $r = -0.82$ ($p < 0.001$). Probing the mechanism by manipulating convergence pressure through prompt design reveals two distinct regimes: convergence driven by training data priors (natural) responds to artifact disruption, while convergence driven by explicit instructions (induced) does not. The implication is that context injection should be conditional, not universal: one no-context trial is a cheap diagnostic that predicts whether knowledge artifacts will help or hurt a given task.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体软件设计中，上下文注入并非越多越好，存在交叉效应：同一工件类型在某些任务上提升探索，在另一些任务上反而降低性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前智能体编排普遍假设更多上下文更好，但缺乏系统验证，可能导致设计探索效率低下甚至恶化。
analysis.problem: 多智能体软件设计中上下文注入对设计探索的影响方向不一致，需要理解其条件与机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现交叉效应：同一工件类型在不同任务上效果相反（提升20倍或降低46%），且基线探索度（无上下文时）可预测方向（Pearson r=-0.82）。
analysis.method: 通过10个任务、7种上下文注入条件、2700+次实验系统测试，并利用提示设计操纵收敛压力来探测机制。
contributions: 发现并量化了多智能体设计探索中上下文注入的交叉效应
提出基线探索度作为低成本诊断指标，可预测上下文是否有效
analysis.experiments: 在10个软件设计任务上进行了2700+次运行，覆盖7种上下文注入条件，并进行了机制探针实验。
limitations: 任务类型和工件种类有限，可能不覆盖所有场景
诊断指标仅基于单次无上下文试验，鲁棒性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体软件设计中，上下文注入并非越多越好，存在交叉效应：同一工件类型在某些任务上提升探索，在另一些任务上反而降低性能。

papers.title: The Scaling Properties of Implicit Deductive Reasoning in Transformers
papers.abstract: We investigate the scaling properties of implicit deductive reasoning over Horn clauses in depth-bounded Transformers. By systematically decorrelating provability from spurious features and enforcing algorithmic alignment, we find that in sufficiently deep models with a bidirectional prefix mask, implicit reasoning approaches explicit CoT performance across graph topologies and problem widths, though CoT remains necessary for depth extrapolation.

analysis.tldr: 深度双向Transformer在隐式演绎推理上随深度扩展性能提升，但深度外推仍需思维链。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解Transformer在隐式推理任务中的扩展特性，以及思维链（CoT）是否始终必要。
analysis.problem: 研究深度有界Transformer在Horn子句隐式演绎推理中的扩展性质，并探究隐式推理与显式CoT推理的性能差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过系统解耦可证明性与虚假特征，并强制执行算法对齐，研究不同深度、图拓扑和问题宽度下隐式推理的表现。
contributions: 发现足够深的双向前缀掩码Transformer中，隐式推理性能接近显式CoT。
指出深度外推仍需CoT。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对Horn子句推理，可能不适用于其他推理类型。
深度外推的局限性未完全解决。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 深度双向Transformer在隐式演绎推理上随深度扩展性能提升，但深度外推仍需思维链。

papers.title: Agent Island: A Saturation- and Contamination-Resistant Benchmark from Multiagent Games
papers.abstract: Static capabilities benchmarks suffer from saturation and contamination, making it difficult to track capabilities progress over time. We introduce Agent Island, a multiplayer simulation environment in which language-model agents compete in a game of interagent cooperation, conflict, and persuasion. The environment yields a dynamic benchmark designed to mitigate both saturation and contamination; new models can always outperform the current leading player in this winner-take-all game, and agents compete against other adaptive agents rather than face a fixed task set. We rank players with a Bayesian Plackett-Luce model, allowing us to quantify uncertainty in player skill. In 999 games involving 49 unique models, openai/gpt-5.5 dominates its peers with a posterior mean skill of 5.64, compared with 3.10 for the second-ranked model, openai/gpt-5.2, and 2.86 for the third-ranked model, openai/gpt-5.3-codex. We release the game logs as a dataset for analyses of model behavior. As an example, we investigate same-provider preference in final-round votes and find that models are 8.3 p.p. more likely to support a same-provider finalist than finalists from other providers. This preference is not uniform across providers: among separately estimated providers, the effect is strongest for OpenAI models and weakest for Anthropic models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于多智能体游戏的动态基准Agent Island，通过对抗性环境缓解能力基准的饱和与污染问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 静态能力基准存在饱和与污染问题，难以持续追踪模型能力进步，需要一种动态、抗污染的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够抵抗饱和与污染、动态评估语言模型能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在999场游戏中，不同模型表现出显著能力差异，且存在同供应商偏好现象（模型在最终轮投票中更倾向于支持同供应商的决赛选手）。
analysis.method: 构建多智能体模拟环境，语言模型代理在合作、冲突和说服游戏中竞争；使用贝叶斯Plackett-Luce模型对玩家进行排名，量化技能不确定性。
contributions: 提出Agent Island，一个动态、抗饱和与污染的多智能体游戏基准。
通过贝叶斯排名模型量化模型技能，并发布游戏日志数据集用于行为分析。
analysis.experiments: 在999场游戏中评估了49个独特模型，openai/gpt-5.5以5.64的后验平均技能领先，第二名openai/gpt-5.2为3.10，第三名openai/gpt-5.3-codex为2.86。
limitations: 游戏环境可能无法覆盖所有真实世界交互场景。
同供应商偏好分析可能受限于模型样本量。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于多智能体游戏的动态基准Agent Island，通过对抗性环境缓解能力基准的饱和与污染问题。

papers.title: Parallel Prefix Verification for Speculative Generation
papers.abstract: We introduce PARSE (PArallel pRefix Speculative Engine), a speculative generation framework that accelerates large language model (LLM) inference by parallelizing prefix verification on a semantic level. Existing speculative decoding methods are fundamentally limited by token-level equivalence: the target model must verify each token, leading to short acceptance lengths and modest speedups. Moving to semantic or segment-level verification can substantially increase acceptance granularity, but prior approaches rely on sequential verification, introducing significant overhead and limiting practical gains. PARSE introduces parallel prefix verification, enabling semantic-level verification without sequential checks. Given a full draft from a draft model, the target model evaluates correctness across multiple prefixes in a single forward pass using a custom attention mask, directly identifying the maximal valid prefix. This eliminates sequential segment verification, and makes verification compute-efficient. PARSE is orthogonal to token-level speculative decoding and can be composed with it for additional gains. Across models and benchmarks, PARSE delivers $1.25\times$ to $4.3\times$ throughput gain over the target model, and $1.6\times$ to $4.5\times$ when composed with EAGLE-3, all with negligible accuracy degradation. This demonstrates parallel prefix verification as an effective, general approach to accelerating LLM inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出并行前缀验证框架PARSE，通过语义级并行验证加速LLM推理，无需逐token或顺序验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推测解码方法受限于token级等价验证，导致接受长度短、加速有限；语义级验证虽能增加粒度，但依赖顺序验证带来额外开销。
analysis.problem: 如何实现语义级前缀的并行验证，以消除顺序验证开销并提升LLM推理加速比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PARSE框架：草稿模型生成完整草稿后，目标模型通过自定义注意力掩码在一次前向传播中并行验证多个前缀，直接识别最大有效前缀。
contributions: 提出并行前缀验证机制，实现语义级验证无需顺序检查
与token级推测解码正交，可组合获得额外加速
在多个模型和基准上实现1.25×-4.3×吞吐量提升，与EAGLE-3组合达1.6×-4.5×
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型和基准上评估，PARSE相比目标模型获得1.25×-4.3×吞吐量提升，与EAGLE-3组合达1.6×-4.5×，精度下降可忽略。
limitations: 可能依赖草稿模型质量
自定义注意力掩码可能增加实现复杂度
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出并行前缀验证框架PARSE，通过语义级并行验证加速LLM推理，无需逐token或顺序验证。

papers.title: Temporal Reasoning Is Not the Bottleneck: A Probabilistic Inconsistency Framework for Neuro-Symbolic QA
papers.abstract: Despite significant advances, large language models (LLMs) continue to exhibit brittle performance on complex temporal reasoning tasks. This failure mode is widely attributed to inherent deficits in autoregressive logical deduction. In this paper, we challenge this prevailing narrative, demonstrating that temporal reasoning is not the fundamental bottleneck; rather, the locus of failure lies in unstructured text-to-event representation. We introduce a novel neuro-symbolic question-answering framework governed by a Probabilistic Inconsistency Signal (PIS) that explicitly isolates perceptual errors from reasoning failures. By lifting unstructured text into explicit event graphs and interval constraints, our architecture strictly decouples semantic extraction from a symbolic reasoning engine. To robustly detect structural breaks, the PIS elegantly unifies symbolic credal intervals with epistemic neural uncertainty extracted via Evidential Deep Learning on LLM hidden states. Empirical evaluations reveal a striking paradigm shift: when provided with correct structural representations, our system's explicit proof traces achieve perfect 1.0 accuracy (4000/4000) and strictly zero false positives/negatives on temporal arithmetic benchmarks. On broader, noise-injected QA settings, the framework maintains a competitive 75.1\% accuracy while enabling deterministic, step-level failure localization. Ultimately, by isolating the representation bottleneck from the reasoning substrate, this work reframes temporal QA from an algorithmic reasoning challenge to a structural alignment problem, charting a verifiable path forward for reliable neuro-symbolic AI.

analysis.tldr: 神经符号QA框架通过概率不一致信号分离感知错误与推理失败，揭示时间推理瓶颈实为文本到事件的结构表征问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在复杂时间推理任务中表现脆弱，现有观点归因于自回归逻辑推理缺陷，但实际瓶颈可能在于非结构化文本到事件表征的转换。
analysis.problem: 解决神经符号问答中时间推理失败的根本原因定位问题，即区分感知错误与推理失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出时间推理并非根本瓶颈，失败源于文本到事件表征的不一致。
analysis.method: 提出概率不一致信号（PIS）框架，将非结构化文本显式转换为事件图和区间约束，通过符号推理引擎解耦语义提取，并利用证据深度学习从LLM隐藏状态提取认知不确定性，统一符号信度区间与神经不确定性以检测结构断裂。
contributions: 挑战时间推理是LLM瓶颈的主流观点，证明表征不一致才是关键失败模式
提出概率不一致信号（PIS）框架，实现感知错误与推理失败的显式分离
在时间算术基准上实现完美准确率（4000/4000），零假阳/假阴，并在噪声注入QA中保持75.1%准确率且支持确定性步骤级故障定位
analysis.experiments: 在时间算术基准上达到完美1.0准确率（4000/4000）且零假阳/假阴；在更广泛的噪声注入QA设置中达到75.1%准确率。
limitations: 框架依赖显式事件图构建，可能对高度隐晦或模糊文本的提取存在挑战
噪声注入QA设置下的准确率仍有提升空间
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 神经符号QA框架通过概率不一致信号分离感知错误与推理失败，揭示时间推理瓶颈实为文本到事件的结构表征问题。

papers.title: Pro$^2$Assist: Continuous Step-Aware Proactive Assistance with Multimodal Egocentric Perception for Long-Horizon Procedural Tasks
papers.abstract: Procedural tasks with multiple ordered steps are ubiquitous in daily life. Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have enabled personal assistants that support daily activities. However, existing systems primarily provide reactive guidance triggered by user queries, or limited proactive assistance for isolated short-term events rather than long-horizon procedural tasks. In this work, we introduce Pro$^2$Assist, a step-aware proactive assistant that continuously tracks fine-grained task progress and reasons over the user's evolving state to provide timely assistance throughout tasks. Pro$^2$Assist leverages multimodal data from augmented reality (AR) glasses to achieve motion-based perception. It then extracts step-oriented procedural context from multi-scale temporal dynamics and task-specific expert knowledge. Based on both sensory input and procedural context, Pro$^2$Assist performs continuous reasoning to infer user needs and display timely assistance on AR glasses. We evaluate Pro$^2$Assist using a dataset curated from public sources and a real-world dataset collected on our testbed with AR glasses. Extensive evaluations show that Pro$^2$Assist outperforms the best-performing baselines by over 21% in procedural action understanding accuracy, and it achieves up to 2.29x the proactive timing accuracy of baselines. A user study with 20 participants further shows that 90% find Pro$^2$Assist useful, indicating its effectiveness for real-world procedural assistance.

analysis.tldr: Pro²Assist 利用多模态 AR 感知持续跟踪任务进度，在长程程序性任务中提供及时主动的辅助，性能显著优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有个人助手主要提供由用户查询触发的反应式指导，或仅针对孤立短期事件提供有限主动辅助，无法应对多步骤长程程序性任务。
analysis.problem: 如何实现持续、步骤感知的主动辅助，以在长程程序性任务中根据用户动态状态及时提供帮助。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Pro²Assist 利用 AR 眼镜的多模态数据进行基于运动的感知，从多尺度时间动态和任务特定专家知识中提取面向步骤的程序性上下文，基于感官输入和程序性上下文进行连续推理以推断用户需求，并在 AR 眼镜上显示及时辅助。
contributions: 提出 Pro²Assist，一个步骤感知的主动辅助系统，能够持续跟踪细粒度任务进度并推理用户状态。
在公开数据集和真实 AR 眼镜测试床数据集上，Pro²Assist 在程序性动作理解准确率上超过最佳基线 21% 以上，主动时机准确率达到基线的 2.29 倍。
用户研究显示 90% 的参与者认为 Pro²Assist 有用，验证了其在真实世界程序性辅助中的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集和真实 AR 眼镜测试床数据集上评估，包括程序性动作理解准确率和主动时机准确率，以及 20 人用户研究。
limitations: 可能依赖 AR 眼镜硬件，泛化到其他设备需验证。
用户研究样本量较小（20 人），可能不足以代表广泛人群。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Pro²Assist 利用多模态 AR 感知持续跟踪任务进度，在长程程序性任务中提供及时主动的辅助，性能显著优于基线。

papers.title: ANDRE: An Attention-based Neuro-symbolic Differentiable Rule Extractor
papers.abstract: Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) aims to learn interpretable first-order rules from data, but existing symbolic and neuro-symbolic approaches struggle to scale to noisy and probabilistic settings.
