Classical ILP relies on discrete combinatorial rule search and is brittle under uncertainty, while differentiable ILP methods typically depend on predefined rule templates or inaccurate fuzzy operators that suffer from vanishing gradients or poor approximation of logical structure when reasoning over probabilistic predicate valuations. This paper proposes an Attention-based Neuro-symbolic Differentiable Rule Extractor (ANDRE), a novel ILP framework that learns first-order logic programs by optimizing over a continuous rule space with attention-based logical operators. ANDRE replaces both rule templates and logical operators with fully differentiable, attention-driven conjunction and disjunction operators that approximate logical min-max semantics, enabling accurate, stable, and interpretable reasoning over probabilistic data. By softly selecting, negating, or excluding predicates within each rule, ANDRE supports flexible rule induction while preserving symbolic structure. Extensive experiments on classical ILP benchmarks, large-scale knowledge bases, and synthetic datasets with probabilistic predicates and noisy supervision demonstrate that ANDRE achieves competitive or superior predictive performance while reliably recovering correct symbolic rules under uncertainty. In particular, ANDRE remains robust to moderate label noise, substantially outperforming existing differentiable ILP methods in both rule extraction quality and stability.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于注意力的可微规则提取器ANDRE，通过注意力逻辑算子实现概率数据上的可解释一阶规则学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 归纳逻辑编程（ILP）旨在从数据中学习可解释的一阶规则，但现有符号和神经符号方法难以扩展到噪声和概率场景，经典ILP依赖离散组合搜索且对不确定性脆弱，可微ILP方法则受限于预定义规则模板或不精确的模糊算子，导致梯度消失或逻辑结构近似差。
analysis.problem: 如何在概率和噪声数据上高效、稳定地学习可解释的一阶逻辑规则，同时避免离散搜索和模板限制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有可微ILP方法使用预定义规则模板或模糊算子，在概率谓词估值推理时存在梯度消失或逻辑结构近似差的问题。
analysis.method: 提出ANDRE框架，使用基于注意力的可微合取和析取算子替代规则模板和逻辑算子，通过软选择、否定或排除谓词实现灵活规则归纳，同时保持符号结构。
contributions: 提出基于注意力的可微逻辑算子，精确近似逻辑min-max语义，支持概率数据上的稳定推理。
在经典ILP基准、大规模知识库和合成数据集上达到竞争或更优的预测性能，并在噪声下可靠恢复正确符号规则。
analysis.experiments: 在经典ILP基准、大规模知识库和含概率谓词与噪声监督的合成数据集上进行实验，结果显示ANDRE在规则提取质量和稳定性上显著优于现有可微ILP方法，且对中等标签噪声鲁棒。
limitations: 可能对高噪声或极端概率分布场景的鲁棒性有限。
注意力机制的计算开销可能影响大规模规则集的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于注意力的可微规则提取器ANDRE，通过注意力逻辑算子实现概率数据上的可解释一阶规则学习。

papers.title: Actionable Real-Time Modeling of Surgical Team Dynamics via Time-Expanded Interaction Graphs
papers.abstract: Surgical team performance arises from complex interactions between technical execution and non-technical skills, including communication and coordination dynamics. However, current surgical AI systems predominantly model visual workflow signals, lacking structured representations of intraoperative team interactions over time. We propose a real-time actionable approach for modeling surgical team dynamics using time-expanded interaction graphs, where team members are modeled as time-indexed nodes and communication exchanges define directed edges. This spatio-temporal expansion enables dynamic interaction modeling, while allowing efficient inference with a static graph neural network. The model predicts procedural efficiency as the deviation from the expected duration and supports real-time deployment. Beyond prediction, we perform a counterfactual analysis to identify minimal changes in communication structure and interpretable behavioral variables associated with improved predicted outcomes. Experiments on recorded surgical procedures show that structured modeling of team interactions improves early identification of prolonged interventions and provides coherent, actionable explanations. This work advances surgical AI toward real-time, team-aware, and actionable decision support in the operating room.

analysis.tldr: 用时序扩展交互图建模手术团队动态，实时预测效率偏差并提供可操作解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有手术AI主要建模视觉工作流信号，缺乏对术中团队交互的结构化表示，无法捕捉沟通与协调等非技术因素对手术表现的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何实时建模手术团队动态交互，预测手术效率偏差，并提供可操作的因果解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建时间扩展交互图，将团队成员建模为时间索引节点，通信交换定义为有向边；使用静态图神经网络进行高效推理，并执行反事实分析以识别最小通信结构变化。
contributions: 提出基于时间扩展交互图的实时手术团队动态建模方法。
实现手术效率偏差预测与可操作的反事实解释。
analysis.experiments: 在记录的手术流程上验证，结构化交互建模改善了延长干预的早期识别，并提供连贯可操作的解释。
limitations: 可能依赖特定手术类型的数据。
反事实分析的实际临床可行性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用时序扩展交互图建模手术团队动态，实时预测效率偏差并提供可操作解释。

papers.title: Regularized Centered Emphatic Temporal Difference Learning
papers.abstract: Off-policy temporal-difference (TD) learning with function approximation faces a structural tradeoff among stability, projection geometry, and variance control. Emphatic TD (ETD) improves the off-policy projection geometry through follow-on emphasis, but the follow-on trace can have high variance. We revisit this tradeoff through Bellman-error centering. Although centering naturally removes a common drift term from TD errors, we show that a naive centered emphatic extension introduces an auxiliary coupling that can destroy the positive-definiteness of the ETD key matrix. We propose \emph{Regularized Emphatic Temporal-Difference Learning} (RETD), which preserves the follow-on trace and regularizes only the auxiliary centering recursion, corresponding to lifting the lower-right block of the coupled key matrix from \(1\) to \(1+c\). We derive the RETD core matrix, prove convergence under a conservative sufficient regularization condition, and evaluate the method on diagnostic linear off-policy prediction tasks. The experiments show that RETD avoids the instability of naive centered emphatic learning, preserves favorable emphatic geometry, and exhibits a robust intermediate regime for the regularization parameter \(c\) across the diagnostics.

analysis.tldr: 提出正则化中心化强调时序差分学习（RETD），通过仅正则化辅助中心化递归来平衡离策略TD学习的稳定性、投影几何和方差控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 离策略时序差分学习在函数近似时面临稳定性、投影几何和方差控制之间的权衡，强调TD（ETD）通过后续强调改善了投影几何但引入了高方差，而中心化方法虽能去除漂移项但会破坏ETD关键矩阵的正定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏ETD关键矩阵正定性的前提下，利用Bellman误差中心化来改善离策略TD学习的稳定性和方差控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，朴素中心化强调扩展会引入辅助耦合，破坏ETD关键矩阵的正定性；而RETD通过仅正则化辅助中心化递归，将耦合关键矩阵的右下块从1提升到1+c，从而避免不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出正则化中心化强调时序差分学习（RETD），保留后续强调迹，仅对辅助中心化递归施加正则化（对应提升耦合关键矩阵的右下块），并推导了RETD核心矩阵及收敛条件。
contributions: 揭示了朴素中心化强调扩展会破坏ETD关键矩阵正定性的问题。
提出RETD算法，通过仅正则化辅助中心化递归来保持ETD的有利几何并避免不稳定。
证明了RETD在保守充分正则化条件下的收敛性，并在线性离策略预测任务上验证了其鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在诊断性线性离策略预测任务上评估，实验表明RETD避免了朴素中心化强调学习的不稳定性，保持了有利的强调几何，并在正则化参数c上表现出鲁棒的中等区间。
limitations: 摘要未提供非线性函数近似或更复杂环境的实验。
收敛性证明基于保守的充分正则化条件，实际中可能过于严格。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出正则化中心化强调时序差分学习（RETD），通过仅正则化辅助中心化递归来平衡离策略TD学习的稳定性、投影几何和方差控制。

papers.title: LCM: Lossless Context Management
papers.abstract: We introduce Lossless Context Management (LCM), a deterministic architecture for LLM memory that outperforms Claude Code on long-context tasks. When benchmarked using Opus 4.6, our LCM-augmented coding agent, Volt, achieves higher scores than Claude Code on the OOLONG long-context eval, including at every context length between 32K and 1M tokens. LCM may be considered both a vindication and extension of the recursive paradigm pioneered by Recursive Language Models (RLMs). Our results demonstrate that recursive context manipulation can outperform not just conventional LLMs, but frontier coding agents with native file-system access. LCM departs from RLM by decomposing symbolic recursion into two deterministic, engine-managed mechanisms: recursive context compression, in which a hierarchical summary DAG automatically compacts older messages while retaining lossless pointers to every original; and recursive task partitioning, in which engine-managed parallel primitives like LLM-Map replace model-written loops. This trade-off, analogous to the move from GOTO to structured control flow in program-ming language design, sacrifices maximal flexibility for termination guarantees, zero-cost continuity on short tasks, and lossless retrievability of all prior state.

analysis.tldr: 提出无损上下文管理（LCM）架构，通过确定性递归机制提升LLM长上下文任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在长上下文任务中性能受限，且递归语言模型（RLM）虽具潜力但缺乏确定性和可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种确定性的LLM记忆架构，以在长上下文任务中实现无损、高效且可扩展的上下文管理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LCM将符号递归分解为两个确定性机制：递归上下文压缩（构建层次摘要DAG，保留无损指针）和递归任务划分（引擎管理的并行原语如LLM-Map替代模型自写循环）。
contributions: 提出LCM架构，在长上下文评测中超越Claude Code。
将递归范式从RLM扩展为确定性、引擎管理的机制，提供终止保证和零成本连续性。
analysis.experiments: 在OOLONG长上下文评测中，LCM增强的编码代理Volt在32K到1M token的每个上下文长度上均取得比Claude Code更高的分数。
limitations: 可能牺牲了RLM的灵活性以换取确定性。
未讨论在非编码任务上的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无损上下文管理（LCM）架构，通过确定性递归机制提升LLM长上下文任务性能。

papers.title: Grokability in five inequalities
papers.abstract: In this note, we report five mathematical discoveries made in collaboration with Grok, all of which have been subsequently verified by the authors. These include an improved lower bound on the maximal Gaussian perimeter of convex sets in $\mathbb{R}^n$, sharper $L_2$-$L_1$ moment comparison inequalities on the Hamming cube $\{-1,1\}^n$, a strengthened autoconvolution inequality, improved asymptotic bounds on the size of the largest $g$-Sidon sets in $\{1,\dots,n\}$, and an optimal balanced Szarek's inequality.

analysis.tldr: Grok 辅助发现五个数学不等式改进，涵盖凸集高斯周长、Hamming 立方矩比较、自卷积、g-Sidon 集和 Szarek 不等式。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索大语言模型在数学发现中的辅助能力，验证 AI 合作能否产生可验证的数学新结果。
analysis.problem: 利用 Grok 模型辅助发现并证明五个经典数学不等式的新下界或改进形式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 与 Grok 模型交互式合作，提出猜想并验证，最终由作者完成严格证明。
contributions: 改进了凸集最大高斯周长的下界
得到了 Hamming 立方上更优的 L2-L1 矩比较不等式
加强了自卷积不等式
改进了最大 g-Sidon 集的渐近界
给出了最优平衡 Szarek 不等式
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 结果依赖于 Grok 模型，可重复性可能受限于模型版本
仅涉及数学不等式，应用范围有限
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Grok 辅助发现五个数学不等式改进，涵盖凸集高斯周长、Hamming 立方矩比较、自卷积、g-Sidon 集和 Szarek 不等式。

papers.title: Almost-Orthogonality in Lp Spaces: A Case Study with Grok
papers.abstract: Carbery proposed the following sharpened form of triangle inequality for many functions: for any $p\ge 2$ and any finite sequence $(f_j)_j\subset L^p$ we have \[ \Big\|\sum_j f_j\Big\|_p \ \le\ \left(\sup_{j} \sum_{k} \alpha_{jk}^{\,c}\right)^{1/p'} \Big(\sum_j \|f_j\|_p^p\Big)^{1/p}, \] where $c=2$, $1/p+1/p'=1$, and $\alpha_{jk}=\sqrt{\frac{\|f_{j}f_{k}\|_{p/2}}{\|f_{j}\|_{p}\|f_{k}\|_{p}}}$. In the first part of this paper we construct a counterexample showing that this inequality fails for every $p>2$. We then prove that if an estimate of the above form holds, the exponent must satisfy $c\le p'$. Finally, at the critical exponent $c=p'$, we establish the inequality for all integer values $p\ge 2$. In the second part of the paper we obtain a sharp three-function bound \[ \Big\|\sum_{j=1}^{3} f_j\Big\|_p \ \le\ \left(1+2\Gamma^{c(p)}\right)^{1/p'} \Big(\sum_{j=1}^{3} \|f_j\|_p^p\Big)^{1/p}, \] where $p \geq 3$, $c(p) = \frac{2\ln(2)}{(p-2)\ln(3)+2\ln(2)}$ and $\Gamma=\Gamma(f_1,f_2,f_3)\in[0,1]$ quantifies the degree of orthogonality among $f_1,f_2,f_3$. The exponent $c(p)$ is optimal, and improves upon the power $r(p) = \frac{6}{5p-4}$ obtained previously by Carlen, Frank, and Lieb. Some intermediate lemmas and inequalities appearing in this work were explored with the assistance of the large language model Grok.

analysis.tldr: 本文研究了Lp空间中几乎正交性的不等式，构造了Carbery不等式的反例并给出了最优指数。
analysis.research_motivation: Carbery提出的Lp空间三角不等式锐化形式在调和分析等领域有重要应用，但其正确性及最优指数尚未完全解决。
analysis.problem: 验证Carbery不等式是否对所有p≥2成立，并确定其最优指数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过构造反例证明Carbery不等式在p>2时失败，并利用对偶性和插值方法建立临界指数下的不等式；对于三函数情形，通过优化指数得到更紧的界。
contributions: 构造了反例表明Carbery不等式对任意p>2不成立。
证明了若不等式成立则指数c≤p'，并在c=p'时对所有整数p≥2建立不等式。
得到了三函数情形的sharp界，指数c(p)最优且改进了Carlen等人的结果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 结果仅限于Lp空间，未推广到其他函数空间。
三函数情形的界仅适用于p≥3。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文研究了Lp空间中几乎正交性的不等式，构造了Carbery不等式的反例并给出了最优指数。

papers.title: When Life Gives You BC, Make Q-functions: Extracting Q-values from Behavior Cloning for On-Robot Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Behavior Cloning (BC) has emerged as a highly effective paradigm for robot learning. However, BC lacks a self-guided mechanism for online improvement after demonstrations have been collected. Existing offline-to-online learning methods often cause policies to replace previously learned good actions due to a distribution mismatch between offline data and online learning. In this work, we propose Q2RL, Q-Estimation and Q-Gating from BC for Reinforcement Learning, an algorithm for efficient offline-to-online learning. Our method consists of two parts: (1) Q-Estimation extracts a Q-function from a BC policy using a few interaction steps with the environment, followed by online RL with (2) Q-Gating, which switches between BC and RL policy actions based on their respective Q-values to collect samples for RL policy training. Across manipulation tasks from D4RL and robomimic benchmarks, Q2RL outperforms SOTA offline-to-online learning baselines on success rate and time to convergence. Q2RL is efficient enough to be applied in an on-robot RL setting, learning robust policies for contact-rich and high precision manipulation tasks such as pipe assembly and kitting, in 1-2 hours of online interaction, achieving success rates of up to 100% and up to 3.75x improvement against the original BC policy. Code and video are available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 从行为克隆中提取Q函数，实现高效的离线到在线机器人强化学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 行为克隆（BC）在机器人学习中效果显著，但缺乏在线自我改进机制；现有离线到在线学习方法常因数据分布不匹配导致策略退化。
analysis.problem: 如何从BC策略中提取Q函数并设计门控机制，实现高效且稳定的离线到在线强化学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 离线数据与在线学习之间的分布不匹配会导致策略替换先前学到的良好动作。
analysis.method: 提出Q2RL算法，包含两部分：Q-Estimation通过少量环境交互从BC策略中提取Q函数；Q-Gating根据Q值在BC和RL策略动作之间切换，收集样本用于RL训练。
contributions: 提出Q2RL方法，从BC策略中提取Q函数并利用Q门控实现高效离线到在线学习。
在D4RL和robomimic基准测试中，Q2RL在成功率和收敛速度上超越现有方法。
在真实机器人上仅需1-2小时在线交互即可学习鲁棒策略，成功率高达100%，相比原始BC提升3.75倍。
analysis.experiments: 在D4RL和robomimic基准测试的操控任务上评估，并在真实机器人上进行管道组装和套件整理等接触丰富、高精度任务。
limitations: 可能依赖初始BC策略的质量。
Q函数提取需要少量环境交互，在极端样本效率场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从行为克隆中提取Q函数，实现高效的离线到在线机器人强化学习。

papers.title: Design Conductor 2.0: An agent builds a TurboQuant inference accelerator in 80 hours
papers.abstract: Driven by a rapid co-evolution of both harness and underlying models, LLM agents are improving at a dizzying pace. In our prior work (performed in Dec. 2025), we introduced "Design Conductor" (or just "Conductor"), a system capable of building a 5-stage Linux-capable RISC-V CPU in 12 hours. In this work, we introduce an updated multi-agent harness powered by frontier models released in April 2026, which is able to handle 80x larger tasks, at higher quality, fully autonomously. Following a brief introduction, we examine 4 designs that the system produced autonomously, including "VerTQ", an LLM inference accelerator which hard-wires support for TurboQuant in a 240-cycle pipeline, starting from the TurboQuant arXiv paper. VerTQ includes heavy compute processing, with 5129 FP16/32 units; the design was mapped to an FPGA at 125 MHz and consumes 5.7 mm^2 in TSMC 16FF (8 attention pipes). We review the key new characteristics that enabled these results. Finally, we analyze Design Conductor's token usage and other empirical characteristics, including its limitations.

analysis.tldr: LLM智能体系统Design Conductor 2.0在80小时内自主设计出TurboQuant推理加速器VerTQ。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体能力快速提升，但此前系统只能处理较小规模的设计任务，需要探索更大规模、更复杂的硬件设计自动化。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够自主完成大规模、高质量硬件设计（如LLM推理加速器）的LLM多智能体系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于2026年4月前沿模型的多智能体框架，能够处理80倍于先前工作的任务，完全自主生成设计。
contributions: 提出Design Conductor 2.0，一个能自主完成大规模硬件设计的LLM多智能体系统
展示了系统自主生成的4个设计，包括TurboQuant推理加速器VerTQ
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定前沿模型，泛化性未知
token消耗和实际部署成本可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM智能体系统Design Conductor 2.0在80小时内自主设计出TurboQuant推理加速器VerTQ。

papers.title: The First Token Knows: Single-Decode Confidence for Hallucination Detection
papers.abstract: Self-consistency detects hallucinations by generating multiple sampled answers to a question and measuring agreement, but this requires repeated decoding and can be sensitive to lexical variation. Semantic self-consistency improves this by clustering sampled answers by meaning using natural language inference, but it adds both sampling cost and external inference overhead. We show that first-token confidence, phi_first, computed from the normalized entropy of the top-K logits at the first content-bearing answer token of a single greedy decode, matches or modestly exceeds semantic self-consistency on closed-book short-answer factual question answering. Across three 7-8B instruction-tuned models and two benchmarks, phi_first achieves a mean AUROC of 0.820, compared with 0.793 for semantic agreement and 0.791 for standard surface-form self-consistency. A subsumption test shows that phi_first is moderately to strongly correlated with semantic agreement, and combining the two signals yields only a small AUROC improvement over phi_first alone. These results suggest that much of the uncertainty information captured by multi-sample agreement is already available in the model's initial token distribution. We argue that phi_first should be reported as a default low-cost baseline before invoking sampling-based uncertainty estimation.

analysis.tldr: 首个token的置信度即可媲美多采样语义一致性，用于幻觉检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法如自一致性需要多次解码且对词汇变化敏感，语义自一致性虽改进但增加了采样和外部推理开销，亟需低成本基线。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加解码开销的前提下，高效检测大模型在事实问答中的幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多采样一致性捕获的不确定性信息大部分已存在于模型首个token的分布中。
analysis.method: 提出phi_first，基于单次贪心解码首个内容token的top-K logits归一化熵计算置信度。
contributions: 提出单次解码的首token置信度phi_first，无需采样或外部模型。
在多个模型和基准上验证phi_first达到或超过语义自一致性，且与后者高度相关。
analysis.experiments: 在三个7-8B指令微调模型和两个基准上，phi_first平均AUROC为0.820，优于语义一致性0.793和表面形式自一致性0.791。
limitations: 仅适用于闭卷短答案事实问答，未验证长文本或开放域场景。
依赖首个token的logits，可能不适用于生成式任务中后续token的幻觉。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个token的置信度即可媲美多采样语义一致性，用于幻觉检测。

papers.title: PSK at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual Polarization Detection Using Ensemble Gemma Models with Synthetic Data Augmentation
papers.abstract: We present our system for SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual Polarization Detection, a binary classification task spanning 22 languages. Our approach fine-tunes separate Gemma~3 models (12B and 27B parameters) per language using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), augmented with synthetic data generated by a large language model (LLM). We employ three synthetic data strategies (direct generation, paraphrasing, and contrastive pair creation) using GPT-4o-mini, with a multi-stage quality filtering pipeline including embedding-based deduplication. We find that per-language threshold tuning on the development set yields 2 to 4\% F1 improvements without retraining. We also use weighted ensembles of 12B and 27B model predictions with per-language strategy selection. Our final system achieves a mean macro-F1 of 0.811 across all 22 languages, ranking 2nd overall of the participating teams, with 1st place finishes in 3 languages and top-3 in 8 languages. We also find that alternative architectures (XLM-RoBERTa, Qwen3) that showed strong development set performance suffered 30 to 50\% F1 drops on the test set, highlighting the importance of generalization.

analysis.tldr: 使用LoRA微调Gemma模型结合GPT-4o-mini合成数据增强，在多语言极化检测任务中取得第二名。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言极化检测是社交媒体分析的重要任务，但标注数据稀缺且跨语言泛化困难，现有方法在测试集上性能下降严重。
analysis.problem: 如何在22种语言上高效构建高泛化能力的二分类极化检测系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对每种语言单独微调Gemma 3 (12B/27B) 模型，使用LoRA；利用GPT-4o-mini生成三种合成数据（直接生成、改写、对比对），经多阶段质量过滤（含嵌入去重）；开发集上每语言阈值调优；加权集成12B和27B模型预测，并每语言选择最佳策略。
contributions: 提出结合LoRA微调与合成数据增强的多语言极化检测框架
设计三种合成数据策略及多阶段质量过滤流程
通过每语言阈值调优和模型集成实现跨语言性能提升
analysis.experiments: 在SemEval-2026 Task 9的22种语言上评估，最终系统平均macro-F1为0.811，排名第二，在3种语言上获得第一，8种语言进入前三。
limitations: 依赖GPT-4o-mini生成合成数据，可能引入领域偏差
每语言单独训练模型，扩展至更多语言时计算成本高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用LoRA微调Gemma模型结合GPT-4o-mini合成数据增强，在多语言极化检测任务中取得第二名。

papers.title: Superposition Is Not Necessary: A Mechanistic Interpretability Analysis of Transformer Representations for Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Transformer architectures have been widely adopted for time series forecasting, yet whether the representational mechanisms that make them powerful in NLP actually engage on time series data remains unexplored. The persistent competitiveness of simple linear models such as DLinear has fueled ongoing debate, but no mechanistic explanation for this phenomenon has been offered. We address this gap by applying sparse autoencoders (SAEs), a tool from mechanistic interpretability, to probe the internal representations of PatchTST. We first establish that a single-layer, narrow-dimensional transformer matches the forecasting performance of deeper configurations across commonly used benchmarks. We then train SAEs on the post-GELU intermediate FFN activations with dictionary sizes ranging from 0.5x to 4.0x the native dimensionality. Expanding the dictionary yields negligible downstream performance change (average 0.214%), with large portions of overcomplete dictionaries remaining inactive. Targeted causal interventions on dominant latent features produce minimal forecast perturbation. Across all evaluated settings, we observe no empirical evidence that the analyzed FFN representations rely on strong superposition. Instead, the representations remain sparse, stable under aggressive dictionary expansion, and largely insensitive to latent interventions. These results demonstrate that superposition is not necessary for competitive performance on standard forecasting benchmarks, suggesting they may not demand the rich compositional representations that drive transformer success in language modeling, and helping explain the persistent competitiveness of simple linear models

analysis.tldr: Transformer在时间序列预测中并不依赖叠加表示，其FFN表征稀疏且稳定，这解释了简单线性模型为何仍具竞争力。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer在时间序列预测中广泛应用，但简单线性模型（如DLinear）仍具竞争力，其背后的表示机制尚不明确，缺乏机理解释。
analysis.problem: 探究Transformer在时间序列预测中是否依赖叠加表示（superposition），以及其内部表征机制与NLP中的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但观察到：单层窄Transformer性能与深层相当；SAE字典扩展对性能影响极小（平均0.214%）；过完备字典大量特征未激活；对主导潜在特征进行因果干预几乎不影响预测。
analysis.method: 使用稀疏自编码器（SAE）对PatchTST的FFN中间激活进行机械可解释性分析，包括字典大小变化、特征激活统计和因果干预。
contributions: 首次从机械可解释性角度分析时间序列Transformer的表示机制，发现其不依赖叠加表示。
揭示了FFN表征稀疏、稳定且对干预不敏感，为简单线性模型的竞争力提供了机理解释。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅分析了PatchTST一种架构，可能不适用于其他时间序列Transformer变体。
实验限于标准基准，未涉及更复杂或高维时间序列任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Transformer在时间序列预测中并不依赖叠加表示，其FFN表征稀疏且稳定，这解释了简单线性模型为何仍具竞争力。

papers.title: Joint Treatment Effect Estimation from Incomplete Healthcare Data: Temporal Causal Normalizing Flows with LLM-driven Evolutionary MNAR Imputation
papers.abstract: Target trial emulation (TTE) enables causal questions to be studied with observational data when randomized controlled trials (RCTs) are infeasible. Yet treatment-effect methods often address causal estimation, missingness, and temporal structure separately, limiting their robustness in electronic health records (EHRs), where time-varying confounding and missing-not-at-random (MNAR) biomarkers can reach 50%--80%. We propose a two-stage pipeline for treatment effect estimation from incomplete longitudinal EHRs. First, CausalFlow-T, a directed acyclic graph (DAG)-constrained normalizing flow with long short-term memory (LSTM)-encoded patient history, performs exact invertible counterfactual inference, avoiding approximation errors from variational inference and separating confounding through explicit causal structure. Ablations on four synthetic and one semi-synthetic benchmark with known counterfactuals show that DAG constraints and exact inference address distinct failure modes: neither compensates for the other. Second, because CausalFlow-T requires completed inputs, we introduce an LLM-driven evolutionary imputer that proposes executable imputation operators rather than individual entries, and evaluate it with three large language model (LLM) backends, including two open-source models. Across 30%--80% MNAR missingness, this imputer achieves the best pooled rank over biomarker and causal metrics, leading in point-wise accuracy and temporal extrapolation while preserving average treatment effect (ATE) recovery as statistical baselines degrade. On Swiss primary-care EHRs from adults with type 2 diabetes initiating a GLP-1 receptor agonist or SGLT-2 inhibitor, the pipeline estimates a per-protocol weight-loss difference of -0.98 kg [95% CI -1.01, -0.96] favoring GLP-1 receptor agonists, consistent with randomized evidence and obtained from realistically incomplete real-world EHRs.

analysis.tldr: 提出CausalFlow-T与LLM驱动的进化插补器，从缺失率高达80%的EHR中估计因果治疗效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 随机对照试验不可行时，目标试验模拟利用观察数据研究因果问题，但现有方法分别处理因果估计、缺失和时序结构，在电子健康记录中面对时变混杂和MNAR缺失（可达50%-80%）时鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 从不完整纵向电子健康记录中准确估计因果治疗效果，同时处理MNAR缺失和时变混杂。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融实验表明DAG约束和精确推断分别解决不同的失败模式，两者不可互相替代；统计基线在MNAR缺失率增加时ATE恢复能力下降。
analysis.method: 两阶段流水线：第一阶段CausalFlow-T使用DAG约束的归一化流结合LSTM编码的患者历史进行精确可逆反事实推断；第二阶段LLM驱动的进化插补器生成可执行插补算子而非单个值，完成输入。
contributions: 提出CausalFlow-T，一种DAG约束的归一化流，实现精确可逆反事实推断，避免变分推断的近似误差。
引入LLM驱动的进化插补器，通过生成插补算子处理MNAR缺失，在30%-80%缺失率下优于统计基线。
在合成、半合成基准和真实瑞士初级保健EHR上验证，估计的体重减轻效果与随机证据一致。
analysis.experiments: 在四个合成和一个半合成基准（已知反事实）上进行消融实验，并在瑞士2型糖尿病成人EHR上评估，缺失率30%-80%，比较三种LLM后端。
limitations: 依赖LLM的插补质量，可能受LLM偏见影响。
DAG结构需预先指定，可能不适用于未知因果图。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CausalFlow-T与LLM驱动的进化插补器，从缺失率高达80%的EHR中估计因果治疗效果。

papers.title: Adaptive Policy Selection and Fine-Tuning under Interaction Budgets for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: In offline-to-online reinforcement learning (O2O-RL), policies are first safely trained offline using previously collected datasets and then further fine-tuned for tasks via limited online interactions. In a typical O2O-RL pipeline, candidate policies trained with offline RL are evaluated via either off-policy evaluation (OPE) or online evaluation (OE). The policy with the highest estimated value is then deployed and continually fine-tuned. However, this setup has two main issues. First, OPE can be unreliable, making it risky to deploy a policy based solely on those estimates, whereas OE may identify a viable policy with substantial online interaction, which could have been used for fine-tuning. Second--and more importantly--it is also often not possible to determine a priori whether a pretrained policy will improve with post-deployment fine-tuning, especially in non-stationary environments. As a result, procedures committing to a single deployed policy are impractical in many real-world settings. Moreover, a naive remedy that exhaustively fine-tunes all candidates would violate interaction budget constraints and is likewise infeasible. In this paper, we propose a novel adaptive approach for policy selection and fine-tuning under online interaction budgets in O2O-RL. Following the standard pipeline, we first train a set of candidate policies with different offline RL algorithms and hyperparameters; we then perform OPE to obtain initial performance estimates. We next adaptively select and fine-tune the policies based on their predicted performance via an upper-confidence-bound approach thereby making efficient use of online interactions. We demonstrate that our approach improves upon O2O-RL baselines with various benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应策略选择与微调方法，在有限在线交互预算下高效完成离线到在线强化学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线到在线强化学习（O2O-RL）中，传统方法依赖离线策略评估（OPE）或在线评估（OE）选择单一策略进行微调，但OPE不可靠，OE消耗大量交互预算，且无法预知策略微调后的提升效果，导致实际部署困难。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限在线交互预算下，从多个离线预训练策略中自适应地选择并微调策略，以最大化最终性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出OPE不可靠，基于单一策略的部署风险高；OE虽能识别可行策略但消耗交互预算；且无法先验判断策略微调后的提升，尤其在非平稳环境中。
analysis.method: 先使用不同离线RL算法和超参数训练候选策略集，通过OPE获得初始性能估计；然后基于上置信界（UCB）方法自适应地选择策略进行微调，高效利用在线交互预算。
contributions: 提出一种自适应策略选择与微调框架，解决O2O-RL中交互预算约束下的策略部署问题。
采用UCB方法平衡探索与利用，在多个基准上优于现有O2O-RL基线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖OPE初始估计的质量，若OPE偏差过大可能影响选择。
未讨论非平稳环境下的适应性细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应策略选择与微调方法，在有限在线交互预算下高效完成离线到在线强化学习。

papers.title: On the Wasserstein Gradient Flow Interpretation of Drifting Models
papers.abstract: Recently, Deng et al. (2026) proposed Generative Modeling via Drifting (GMD), a novel framework for generative tasks. This note presents an analysis of GMD through the lens of Wasserstein Gradient Flows (WGF), i.e., the path of steepest descent for a functional in the space of probability measures, equipped with the geometry of optimal transport. Unlike previous WGF-based contributions, GMD can be thought of as directly targeting a fixed point of a specific WGF flow. We demonstrate three main results: first, that one algorithm proposed by Deng et al. (2026) corresponds to finding the limiting point of a WGF on the KL divergence, with Parzen smoothing on the densities. Second, that the algorithm actually implemented by Deng et al. (2026) corresponds to a different procedure, which bears some resemblance to the fixed point of a WGF on the Sinkhorn divergence, but lacks certain desirable properties of the latter. Third, the same same idea can be extended to the limiting point of other WGFs, including the Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD), the sliced Wasserstein distance, and GAN critic functions.

analysis.tldr: 从Wasserstein梯度流视角重新解释漂移生成模型，揭示其与KL散度、Sinkhorn散度等WGF不动点的联系与差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成模型的理论基础对理解算法行为至关重要，Wasserstein梯度流为分析生成模型提供了几何视角，但现有工作对漂移模型（GMD）的WGF解释尚不充分。
analysis.problem: 阐明GMD算法与Wasserstein梯度流不动点之间的精确对应关系，并分析其理论性质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过WGF框架分析GMD：证明其一种算法对应KL散度WGF的极限点（带Parzen平滑），而实际实现算法对应Sinkhorn散度WGF的不动点但缺乏某些理想性质，并推广到MMD、切片Wasserstein距离和GAN判别器。
contributions: 揭示GMD的一种算法等价于KL散度WGF的极限点。
指出GMD实际算法与Sinkhorn散度WGF不动点的相似性与差异。
将GMD思想扩展到其他WGF（MMD、切片Wasserstein、GAN）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析未涉及实际生成质量或效率的实证验证。
对Sinkhorn散度WGF不动点缺失性质的讨论可能需进一步量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从Wasserstein梯度流视角重新解释漂移生成模型，揭示其与KL散度、Sinkhorn散度等WGF不动点的联系与差异。

papers.title: LineRides: Line-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Bicycle Robot Stunts
papers.abstract: Designing reward functions for agile robotic maneuvers in reinforcement learning remains difficult, and demonstration-based approaches often require reference motions that are unavailable for novel platforms or extreme stunts. We present LineRides, a line-guided learning framework that enables a custom bicycle robot to acquire diverse, commandable stunt behaviors from a user-provided spatial guideline and sparse key-orientations, without demonstrations or explicit timing. LineRides handles physically infeasible guidelines using a tracking margin that permits controlled deviation, resolves temporal ambiguity by measuring progress via traveled distance along the guideline, and disambiguates motion details through position- and sequence-based key-orientations. We evaluate LineRides on the Ultra Mobility Vehicle (UMV) and show that the policy trained with our methods supports seamless transitions between normal driving and stunt execution, enabling five distinct stunts on command: MiniHop, LargeHop, ThreePointTurn, Backflip, and DriftTurn.

analysis.tldr: LineRides 通过线引导强化学习，使自行车机器人无需演示即可学会多种特技动作。
analysis.research_motivation: 敏捷机器人特技的奖励函数设计困难，基于演示的方法需要参考运动，对于新型平台或极端特技不可用。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有演示和显式时序的情况下，让自行车机器人学会多样化的可命令特技行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 LineRides 框架，使用用户提供的空间引导线和稀疏关键朝向，通过跟踪裕度处理物理不可行引导线，利用沿引导线行进距离解决时间模糊性，并通过位置和序列关键朝向消除运动细节歧义。
contributions: 提出无需演示的线引导学习框架 LineRides，使自行车机器人能学习多种特技。
设计跟踪裕度、行进距离进度和关键朝向机制，解决物理不可行、时间模糊和运动歧义问题。
在 Ultra Mobility Vehicle 上验证，实现正常驾驶与五种特技的无缝切换。
analysis.experiments: 在 Ultra Mobility Vehicle (UMV) 上评估，策略支持正常驾驶与五种特技（MiniHop, LargeHop, ThreePointTurn, Backflip, DriftTurn）之间的无缝切换。
limitations: 可能依赖用户提供的引导线质量。
特技种类可能受限于引导线设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LineRides 通过线引导强化学习，使自行车机器人无需演示即可学会多种特技动作。

papers.title: Building informative materials datasets beyond targeted objectives
papers.abstract: Materials science data collection can be expensive, making the reuse and long-term utility of datasets critical important for future discovery campaigns. In practice, researchers prioritize a subset of properties due to research interests. However, ignoring a subset of outcomes in data collection campaigns potentially generate datasets poorly suited for future learning tasks. Here, we present a framework for dataset construction that maximizes informativeness for target properties of interest while preserving performance on untargeted ones. Our approach uses diversity-aware selection to ensure broad coverage of the materials space. In noisy experimental dataset construction, we find that without our diversity-aware framework, prediction performance on untargeted properties can degrade by up to 40% relative to random sampling, whereas applying our framework yields improvements of up to 10% . For targeted properties, performance can degrade with respect to random sampling by up to 12.5% without diversity, while our framework achieves gains of up to 25%. Incorporating diversity into dataset construction not only preserves informativeness for the targeted properties, but also improves materials coverage for potential future objectives. As a result, the constructed datasets remain broadly informative across considered and unconsidered outcomes, ensuring unbiased quality entries and mitigating cold-start limitations in subsequent modeling and discovery campaigns.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种多样性感知的数据集构建框架，在保证目标属性预测性能的同时，提升非目标属性的信息量。
analysis.research_motivation: 材料科学数据收集成本高昂，但现有数据集常因只关注部分属性而难以复用，限制了未来学习任务的效果。
analysis.problem: 如何构建数据集，使其对目标属性保持高信息量，同时不牺牲非目标属性的预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多样性感知的样本选择框架，通过最大化材料空间覆盖来构建数据集。
contributions: 提出一种兼顾目标与非目标属性的数据集构建框架。
实验证明该框架能显著提升非目标属性的预测性能（最高提升10%），同时改善目标属性性能（最高提升25%）。
analysis.experiments: 在噪声实验数据集上，对比随机采样，未使用多样性框架时非目标属性性能下降高达40%，使用后提升10%；目标属性性能下降12.5%，使用后提升25%。
limitations: 框架可能依赖特定多样性度量，泛化性需进一步验证。
实验仅在噪声实验数据集上进行，其他场景效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种多样性感知的数据集构建框架，在保证目标属性预测性能的同时，提升非目标属性的信息量。

papers.title: Text Corpora as Concept Fields: Black-Box Hallucination and Novelty Measurement
papers.abstract: We introduce the \textbf{Concept Field} of a text corpus: a local drift field with pointwise uncertainty, estimated in sentence-embedding space from the deltas between consecutive sentences. Given a candidate sentence transition, we score its agreement with the field by $\zeta$, the mean absolute z-distance between the observed delta and the field's local Gaussian estimate. The score is black-box (no model internals), corpus-attributable (every score traces to nearby corpus sentences), and admits a probabilistically motivated interpretation under a local Gaussian approximation. We support the computation with the introduction of a \textbf{Vector Sequence Database (VSDB)} that stores embeddings together with sequence-position and next-delta metadata. We evaluate this approach on two large-scale settings: hallucination-style groundedness detection over the U.S. Code of Federal Regulations, and novelty detection over Project Gutenberg. On controlled LLM-generated rewrites, Concept Fields achieve strong selective classification performance under a grounded / ungrounded / unsure triage policy. Unlike retrieval-centric baselines, the resulting coverage-risk behavior is similar across both domains, supporting a degree of cross-domain stability for the standardized deviation score. We also sketch how divergence and curl of the Concept Field, computed on dense clusters, surface qualitatively meaningful semantic patterns (logic sources, sinks, and implicit topics), which we offer as hypothesis-generating rather than as a quantitative result. Concept Fields provide a fast, lightweight, and interpretable signal for groundedness and novelty, complementary to LLM-as-judge and white-box detectors.

analysis.tldr: 提出文本语料的概念场（Concept Field）用于黑盒幻觉检测和新颖性评估，无需模型内部信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法多依赖模型内部信息或检索基线，缺乏轻量、可解释且跨领域稳定的黑盒方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不访问模型内部结构的情况下，利用文本语料本身检测生成内容的幻觉（groundedness）和新颖性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义文本语料的概念场：在句子嵌入空间中，基于连续句子间的delta估计局部漂移场，并引入向量序列数据库（VSDB）存储嵌入及序列位置信息；通过ζ分数（观测delta与局部高斯估计的绝对z距离）评估候选句子转换与场的一致性。
contributions: 提出概念场（Concept Field）用于黑盒幻觉和新颖性检测，具有可解释性和跨领域稳定性。
引入向量序列数据库（VSDB）支持高效计算。
在联邦法规和古腾堡项目上验证了方法的有效性，并展示了概念场的散度和旋度可揭示语义模式。
analysis.experiments: 在两个大规模场景上评估：美国联邦法规的幻觉式groundedness检测和古腾堡项目的新颖性检测。在受控LLM生成改写上，概念场在grounded/ungrounded/unsure三分类策略下实现了强选择性分类性能。与检索基线相比，覆盖-风险行为在领域间相似。
limitations: 散度和旋度的语义模式分析仅为假设生成性质，非定量结果。
方法依赖句子嵌入质量，可能受嵌入空间偏差影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出文本语料的概念场（Concept Field）用于黑盒幻觉检测和新颖性评估，无需模型内部信息。

papers.title: Continual Knowledge Updating in LLM Systems: Learning Through Multi-Timescale Memory Dynamics
papers.abstract: LLMs are trained once, then deployed into a world that never stops changing. External memory compensates for this, but most systems manage it explicitly rather than letting it adapt on its own. Biological memory works differently: coupled multi-timescale dynamics make new associations immediately usable, strengthen what repetition confirms, and let the rest fade. We argue that external memory should follow a similar principle. In Memini, this view takes the form of an associative memory that organizes knowledge as a directed graph. Each edge carries two coupled internal variables, one fast and one slow, following the Benna-Fusi model of synaptic consolidation. From this coupling, episodic sensitivity, gradual consolidation, and selective forgetting emerge as facets of a single mechanism, reframing external memory as a learning substrate that reorganizes through its own dynamics.

analysis.tldr: 受生物记忆多时间尺度动力学启发，提出Memini系统将外部记忆视为可自组织的学习基质，通过耦合快慢变量实现持续知识更新。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM部署后世界持续变化，但现有外部记忆系统依赖显式管理，缺乏自适应能力；生物记忆通过耦合多时间尺度动力学实现高效更新，启发我们设计类似机制。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM的外部记忆系统像生物记忆一样，通过自身动力学实现持续知识更新，包括即时关联、重复强化和选择性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Memini系统，采用有向图组织知识，每条边携带快慢两个耦合变量（基于Benna-Fusi突触巩固模型），通过快变量实现即时敏感性，慢变量实现渐进巩固，整体涌现出情景敏感、巩固和选择性遗忘。
contributions: 提出将外部记忆视为自组织学习基质的新视角，基于生物记忆的多时间尺度动力学。
设计Memini系统，通过耦合快慢变量实现持续知识更新，无需显式管理。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模实证验证。
图结构记忆的扩展性和效率可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受生物记忆多时间尺度动力学启发，提出Memini系统将外部记忆视为可自组织的学习基质，通过耦合快慢变量实现持续知识更新。

papers.title: Think-Aloud Reshapes Automated Cognitive Model Discovery Beyond Behavior
papers.abstract: Computational cognitive models discovered using large language models have so far relied solely on behavioral data. However, it is well-known that models produced from the behavioral trajectory alone are typically under-determined. In this work, we explore the use of Think Aloud traces as an additional form of data constraint during automated model discovery. When applied to the domain of risky decision-making, we find that the models discovered with think-aloud achieve significantly improved predictive performance on held-out data. Additionally, we find that the discovered models belong to different structural classes than those discovered from behavior alone for the majority of participants (69.4\%), specifically, it shifts from Explicit comparator towards Integrated utility. These results suggest that process-level language data not only improve model fit, but also systematically reshape the structure of the discovered cognitive models, enabling the identification of mechanisms that are not recoverable from behavior alone.

analysis.tldr: 利用出声思维数据重塑自动化认知模型发现，超越纯行为数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 纯行为数据发现的认知模型通常欠定，无法唯一确定潜在机制，需要额外约束。
analysis.problem: 如何利用出声思维（Think-Aloud）语言数据作为额外约束，改进自动化认知模型发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在风险决策领域，使用LLM结合行为数据和出声思维轨迹自动发现认知模型。
contributions: 首次将出声思维数据用于自动化认知模型发现，显著提升预测性能。
发现出声思维数据系统性地改变了模型结构类别，从显式比较器转向集成效用。
analysis.experiments: 在风险决策领域进行实验，使用出声思维数据发现模型，在留出数据上预测性能显著提升，且69.4%参与者的模型结构类别改变。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定领域（风险决策），泛化性未知。
依赖LLM的生成质量，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用出声思维数据重塑自动化认知模型发现，超越纯行为数据。

papers.title: Automatically Finding and Validating Unexpected Side-Effects of Interventions on Language Models
papers.abstract: We present an automated, contrastive evaluation pipeline for auditing the behavioral impact of interventions on large language models. Given a base model $M_1$ and an intervention model $M_2$, our method compares their free-form, multi-token generations across aligned prompt contexts and produces human-readable, statistically validated natural-language hypotheses describing how the models differ, along with recurring themes that summarize patterns across validated hypotheses. We evaluate the approach in synthetic setting by injecting known behavioral changes and showing that the pipeline reliably recovers them. We then apply it to three real-world interventions, reasoning distillation, knowledge editing and unlearning, demonstrating that the method surfaces both intended and unexpected behavioral shifts, distinguishes large from subtle interventions, and does not hallucinate differences when effects are absent or misaligned with the prompt bank. Overall, the pipeline provides a statistically grounded and interpretable tool for post-hoc auditing of intervention-induced changes in model behavior.

analysis.tldr: 提出自动化对比评估流水线，审计语言模型干预的意外副作用。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型干预（如知识编辑、去学习）可能引入意外行为变化，现有审计方法缺乏自动化、统计验证和可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何自动发现并统计验证干预前后模型行为的差异，生成可读的自然语言假设。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对比评估流水线：在对齐提示上下文中比较自由文本生成，通过统计检验生成自然语言假设，并总结重复主题。
contributions: 提出自动化、对比式审计流水线，可发现干预的预期和意外行为变化。
在合成和真实干预场景中验证方法有效性，能区分显著与细微差异，且不产生幻觉。
analysis.experiments: 在合成注入变化和三种真实干预（推理蒸馏、知识编辑、去学习）上评估，显示方法能可靠恢复已知变化并发现意外行为。
limitations: 依赖提示库的质量和覆盖范围。
可能无法捕捉所有类型的副作用。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自动化对比评估流水线，审计语言模型干预的意外副作用。

papers.title: The Impossibility Triangle of Long-Context Modeling
papers.abstract: We identify and prove a fundamental trade-off governing long-sequence models: no model can simultaneously achieve (i) per-step computation independent of sequence length (Efficiency), (ii) state size independent of sequence length (Compactness), and (iii) the ability to recall a number of historical facts proportional to sequence length (Recall). We formalize this trade-off within an Online Sequence Processor abstraction that unifies Transformers, state space models, linear recurrent networks, and their hybrids. Using the Data Processing Inequality and Fano's Inequality, we prove that any model satisfying Efficiency and Compactness can recall at most O(poly(d)/log V) key-value pairs from a sequence of arbitrary length, where d is the model dimension and V is the vocabulary size. We classify 52 architectures published before March 2026 into the triangle, showing that each achieves at most two of the three properties and that hybrid architectures trace continuous trajectories in the interior. Experiments on synthetic associative recall tasks with five representative architectures validate the theoretical bound: empirical recall capacity lies strictly below the information-theoretic limit, and no architecture escapes the triangle.

analysis.tldr: 长序列建模存在效率、紧凑性和召回能力三者不可兼得的理论三角。
analysis.research_motivation: 长序列模型在效率、状态紧凑性和历史召回能力之间面临根本性权衡，现有方法缺乏统一理论框架来理解这种权衡。
analysis.problem: 证明长序列模型中效率、紧凑性和召回能力三者无法同时满足，并量化其理论极限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出混合架构在三角内部连续轨迹。
analysis.method: 提出在线序列处理器抽象，利用数据处理不等式和Fano不等式推导信息论下界，并分类52种架构。
contributions: 证明长序列建模中效率、紧凑性和召回能力三者不可兼得的理论三角。
推导出满足效率和紧凑性的模型召回能力的信息论上界。
分类52种架构并验证理论边界。
analysis.experiments: 在合成关联召回任务上使用5种代表性架构验证理论界，实证召回容量严格低于信息论极限。
limitations: 理论分析基于特定抽象，可能不覆盖所有模型变体。
实验仅使用合成任务，未在真实长序列任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 长序列建模存在效率、紧凑性和召回能力三者不可兼得的理论三角。

papers.title: SoK: Robustness in Large Language Models against Jailbreak Attacks
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success but remain highly susceptible to jailbreak attacks, in which adversarial prompts coerce models into generating harmful, unethical, or policy-violating outputs. Such attacks pose real-world risks, eroding safety, trust, and regulatory compliance in high-stakes applications. Although a variety of attack and defense methods have been proposed, existing evaluation practices are inadequate, often relying on narrow metrics like attack success rate that fail to capture the multidimensional nature of LLM security. In this paper, we present a systematic taxonomy of jailbreak attacks and defenses and introduce Security Cube, a unified, multi-dimensional framework for comprehensive evaluation of these techniques. We provide detailed comparison tables of existing attacks and defenses, highlighting key insights and open challenges across the literature. Leveraging Security Cube, we conduct benchmark studies on 13 representative attacks and 5 defenses, establishing a clear view of the current landscape encompassing jailbreak attacks, defenses, automated judges, and LLM vulnerabilities. Based on these evaluations, we distill critical findings, identify unresolved problems, and outline promising research directions for enhancing LLM robustness against jailbreak attacks. Our analysis aims to pave the way towards more robust, interpretable, and trustworthy LLM systems. Our code is available at Code.

analysis.tldr: 系统综述LLM越狱攻击与防御，提出统一评估框架Security Cube。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM易受越狱攻击，现有评估方法单一，缺乏系统性比较，亟需统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何系统分类、评估并提升LLM对越狱攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有评估依赖攻击成功率等窄指标，无法全面反映安全维度。
analysis.method: 提出Security Cube多维评估框架，对13种攻击和5种防御进行基准测试。
contributions: 系统分类越狱攻击与防御方法
提出Security Cube统一评估框架
基准测试揭示当前攻防现状与开放挑战
analysis.experiments: 对13种攻击和5种防御进行基准测试，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实验覆盖的防御方法有限
框架可能未涵盖所有新兴攻击
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统综述LLM越狱攻击与防御，提出统一评估框架Security Cube。

papers.title: Adaptive Learning Strategies for AoA-Based Outdoor Localization: A Comprehensive Framework
papers.abstract: Localization in 5G and 6G networks is essential for important use cases such as intelligent transportation, smart factories, and smart cities. Although deep learning has enabled improving localization accuracy, depending on the deployment scenario and the effort required for dataset collection campaigns on a given infrastructure, the training process for localization models can vary significantly. Furthermore, with respect to feature selection, recent works have demonstrated the robustness of angle-of-arrival (AoA) based localization. In view of these two points, we propose an adaptive framework for AoA-based localization that consists of two alternative learning strategies, each suited either for large or small training datasets. The proposed framework is evaluated on a real, massive multiple input multiple output (mMIMO) orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) outdoor channel state information (CSI) dataset. First, we investigate offline learning when large training datasets are available; we propose a hierarchical framework that first distinguishes between line of sight (LoS) and non line of sight (NLoS) regions and then moves to more fine grained localization in the respective region. This approach provides high-performance localization through accumulated batch retraining and an integrated hyperparameter optimization mechanism. Second, when only a small training dataset is available, an online learning framework is proposed, using incremental tree-based and ensemble-based models for handling streaming data and continuously updating mode, as well as an online few-shot learning model for rapidly initializing new classes from a limited labeled support set. These results showcase that highly accurate robust localization can be achieved incrementally during network operation by exploiting online learning, alleviating the need for large dataset collection campaigns.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应AoA定位框架，根据数据集大小选择离线或在线学习策略，实现高精度鲁棒定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 5G/6G定位对智能交通、智慧工厂等应用至关重要，但深度学习定位模型训练依赖大量数据集，且不同部署场景下数据收集成本差异大；同时AoA特征已被证明鲁棒，但缺乏自适应学习策略。
analysis.problem: 如何根据训练数据集大小（大规模或小样本）自适应选择学习策略，实现高效、高精度的AoA室外定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出包含两种替代学习策略的自适应框架：1）离线学习：适用于大规模数据集，采用层次化框架先区分LoS/NLoS区域再细粒度定位，结合累积批量重训练和超参数优化；2）在线学习：适用于小数据集，使用增量树/集成模型处理流数据并持续更新，以及在线少样本学习模型快速初始化新类别。
contributions: 提出自适应AoA定位框架，根据数据集大小选择离线或在线学习策略。
离线层次化框架结合累积批量重训练和超参数优化，实现高精度定位。
在线学习框架利用增量模型和少样本学习，减少大规模数据收集需求。
analysis.experiments: 在真实mMIMO OFDM室外CSI数据集上评估，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对AoA特征，未考虑其他特征融合。
在线学习部分可能对动态环境适应性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应AoA定位框架，根据数据集大小选择离线或在线学习策略，实现高精度鲁棒定位。

papers.title: Piper: Efficient Large-Scale MoE Training via Resource Modeling and Pipelined Hybrid Parallelism
papers.abstract: Frontier models increasingly adopt Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures to achieve large-model performance at reduced cost. However, training MoE models on HPC platforms is hindered by large memory footprints, frequent large-scale communication across heterogeneous networks, and severe workload imbalance. To characterize these challenges, we develop a mathematical model that quantifies memory, compute, and communication requirements for MoE configurations under various parallelization schemes, verified through micro-benchmarking, code instrumentation, and hardware profiling. Our analysis identifies performance bottlenecks: all-to-all latency at scale from expert parallelism, insufficient compute-communication overlap, low GPU utilization from imbalanced skinny GEMMs, and the absence of platform-aware hybrid parallelization strategies. To address these, we introduce Piper, a framework that leverages resource modeling to identify efficient training strategies for MoE models on target HPC platforms, applying pipeline parallelism with optimized schedules. Piper achieves 2-3.5X higher MFU than state-of-the-art frameworks such as X-MoE, and a novel all-to-all algorithm delivers 1.2-9X bandwidth over vendor implementation.

analysis.tldr: Piper通过资源建模和流水线混合并行，实现MoE模型在HPC平台上的高效训练，MFU提升2-3.5倍。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE模型在HPC平台上训练面临内存占用大、异构网络通信频繁和负载不均等挑战，现有框架缺乏平台感知的混合并行策略，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何通过资源建模和流水线并行优化，解决MoE训练中的通信延迟、计算-通信重叠不足和GPU利用率低等问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过微基准测试和硬件分析，识别出四个性能瓶颈：专家并行的all-to-all延迟、计算-通信重叠不足、不平衡瘦GEMM导致的低GPU利用率、以及缺乏平台感知的混合并行策略。
analysis.method: 提出Piper框架，通过数学建模量化MoE配置的内存、计算和通信需求，并采用流水线并行与优化调度策略，同时设计新型all-to-all算法提升带宽。
contributions: 开发了量化MoE配置资源需求的数学模型，并通过微基准测试验证。
提出Piper框架，利用资源建模和流水线混合并行，实现2-3.5倍MFU提升。
设计新型all-to-all算法，带宽提升1.2-9倍。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到与X-MoE等框架对比，MFU提升2-3.5倍，all-to-all算法带宽提升1.2-9倍。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定HPC平台优化，泛化性未知。
未提及对模型精度的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Piper通过资源建模和流水线混合并行，实现MoE模型在HPC平台上的高效训练，MFU提升2-3.5倍。

papers.title: Preference-Based Self-Distillation: Beyond KL Matching via Reward Regularization
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation is an efficient alternative to reinforcement learning, offering dense token-level training signals. However, its reliance on a stronger external teacher has driven recent work on on-policy self-distillation, where the same model serves as both teacher and student under different prompt contexts. Yet, existing self-distillation methods largely reduce learning to KL matching toward the context-augmented teacher model. This approach often suffers from training instability and can degrade reasoning performance over time. Moreover, self-distillation from the same model with prompt augmentation lacks the exploratory diversity provided by a genuine external teacher. To address these limitations, we move beyond fixed-teacher KL matching and propose \textbf{P}reference-\textbf{B}ased \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{D}istillation (\textbf{PBSD}), which revisits on-policy self-distillation through a reward-regularized perspective. Instead of directly matching the teacher distribution, we derive a reward-regularized objective whose analytic optimum is a reward-reweighted teacher distribution, yielding a target policy provably superior to the original teacher under this objective. Practically, PBSD optimizes preference gaps between teacher and student samples while maintaining on-policy student sampling. We support this framework with a statistical analysis of the induced preference-learning problem, formally establishing when on policy self-distillation is preferable to learning from an external teacher in our setting. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and tool-use benchmarks across multiple model scales demonstrate that PBSD consistently achieves the strongest average performance among comparable baselines, showing improved training stability over prior self-distillation baselines while preserving token efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出偏好引导自蒸馏方法PBSD，通过奖励正则化超越传统KL匹配，提升训练稳定性与推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自蒸馏方法依赖KL匹配，存在训练不稳定和推理性能退化问题，且缺乏外部教师提供的探索多样性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种自蒸馏方法，避免KL匹配的缺陷，同时提升训练稳定性和模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有自蒸馏方法将学习简化为对上下文增强教师模型的KL匹配，导致训练不稳定和推理性能随时间退化。
analysis.method: 提出PBSD，从奖励正则化视角重新审视自蒸馏，推导出奖励重加权教师分布作为最优目标，并通过偏好学习优化教师与学生样本之间的差距，同时保持在线学生采样。
contributions: 提出奖励正则化自蒸馏框架PBSD，其解析最优解为奖励重加权教师分布，理论上优于原始教师。
通过统计偏好学习分析，正式建立了在线自蒸馏优于外部教师学习的条件。
在数学推理和工具使用基准上，PBSD在多个模型规模下取得最强平均性能，且训练稳定性优于先前自蒸馏基线。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理和工具使用基准上，跨多个模型规模进行实验，PBSD在平均性能上优于可比基线，并展示了更好的训练稳定性。
limitations: 可能依赖偏好数据的质量。
理论分析可能限于特定设置。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出偏好引导自蒸馏方法PBSD，通过奖励正则化超越传统KL匹配，提升训练稳定性与推理性能。

papers.title: Misaligned by Reward: Socially Undesirable Preferences in LLMs
papers.abstract: Reward models are a key component of large language model alignment, serving as proxies for human preferences during training. However, existing evaluations focus primarily on broad instruction-following benchmarks, providing limited insight into whether these models capture socially desirable preferences. As a result, important failures in social alignment can remain hidden. We extend reward-model benchmarking to four socially consequential domains: bias, safety, morality, and ethical reasoning. We introduce a framework that converts social evaluation datasets into pairwise preference data, leveraging gold labels where available and directional bias indicators otherwise. This enables us to test whether reward models prefer socially undesirable responses, and whether their preferences produce systematically biased distributions over selected outputs. Across five publicly available reward models and two instruction-tuned models used as reward proxies, we find substantial variation across domains, with no single model performing best overall. The models fall well short of strong social intelligence: they often prefer socially undesirable options, and their preferences produce systematically biased distributions. Moreover, stronger bias avoidance can reduce sensitivity to context, revealing a key alignment trade-off between avoiding biased outcomes and preserving contextual faithfulness. These findings show that standard reward benchmarks are insufficient for assessing social alignment and highlight the need for evaluations that directly measure the social preferences encoded in reward models.

analysis.tldr: 奖励模型在多个社会敏感领域偏好不良选项，标准基准不足以评估社会对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 奖励模型是LLM对齐的关键，但现有评估主要关注指令遵循，忽略了社会偏好，可能导致社会对齐失败。
analysis.problem: 评估奖励模型是否偏好社会不良响应，以及其偏好是否导致系统偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 奖励模型在社会领域偏好不良选项，且偏好分布存在系统偏差；更强的去偏可能降低上下文敏感性，揭示对齐权衡。
analysis.method: 将社会评估数据集转换为成对偏好数据，利用金标签或方向性偏差指标，测试奖励模型是否偏好社会不良响应。
contributions: 提出评估奖励模型社会偏好的框架，覆盖偏见、安全、道德和伦理推理四个领域。
发现现有奖励模型在社会智能方面不足，偏好存在系统偏差，并揭示去偏与上下文保真度之间的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在5个公开奖励模型和2个指令微调模型上评估，发现模型偏好存在领域差异，无单一模型全面最优。
limitations: 仅评估了有限数量的模型和领域。
未探讨如何改进奖励模型以缓解社会偏好问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 奖励模型在多个社会敏感领域偏好不良选项，标准基准不足以评估社会对齐。

papers.title: Federated Learning for Early Prediction of EV Charging Demand
papers.abstract: Accurate forecasting of electric vehicle (EV) charging demand is critical for grid stability, infrastructure planning, and real-time charging optimization. In this work, we study the problem of early prediction of charging demand, where the total energy of a session is estimated using only information available at plug-in time and during the first minutes of charging. This enables actionable decisions while the session is still in progress, which is of direct importance for EV network operators. We construct a session-level dataset from the Adaptive Charging Network (ACN), combining session metadata with early-window charging measurements, and derive tabular features capturing user intent, temporal patterns, and initial charging behavior. We focus on a single operational depot, Caltech, and model intra-depot heterogeneity through station-level client partitions while evaluating multiple model families in a federated learning (FL) setting. Our results show that federated models can approach centralized predictive performance while keeping data in-depot, enabling privacy-enhanced training across distributed charging infrastructures. Overall, we demonstrate that reliable demand estimates can be obtained early in the session with minimal data, and that FL provides a practical pathway toward scalable and privacy-aware analytics for EV charging networks. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 联邦学习可在保护隐私的前提下，利用充电初期数据实现电动汽车充电需求的早期预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 电动汽车充电需求的准确预测对电网稳定和基础设施规划至关重要，但现有方法通常需要完整会话数据，且集中式训练面临隐私和可扩展性挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何利用充电初期（插电时刻及前几分钟）的有限数据，在联邦学习框架下实现准确的充电需求早期预测，同时保护数据隐私。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从ACN数据集构建会话级数据集，提取用户意图、时间模式和初始充电行为等表格特征；在单个运营站点（Caltech）内，按充电站划分客户端，评估多种模型在联邦学习设置下的预测性能。
contributions: 构建了基于ACN数据集的会话级充电需求早期预测数据集，并提取了有效的表格特征。
证明了联邦学习模型在保持数据本地化的同时，能够接近集中式模型的预测性能，为隐私增强的分布式充电基础设施分析提供了可行路径。
analysis.experiments: 在Caltech站点的ACN数据集上进行了实验，比较了联邦学习与集中式模型的预测性能，结果显示联邦模型可接近集中式性能。
limitations: 仅针对单个运营站点（Caltech）进行实验，未验证跨站点的泛化能力。
摘要未提供具体实验结果数值，如预测误差或与基线方法的详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 联邦学习可在保护隐私的前提下，利用充电初期数据实现电动汽车充电需求的早期预测。

papers.title: Architectural Constraints Alignment in AI-assisted, Platform-based Service Development
papers.abstract: AI-assisted development tools enable rapid prototyping of services but often lack awareness of architectural constraints, infrastructure dependencies, and organizational standards required in production environments. Consequently, generated artifacts may exhibit brittle behavior and limited deployability. We propose a retrieval-augmented scaffolding approach that combines platform-based code generation with agentic clarification loops to expose and resolve architectural constraint ambiguities. By combining template retrieval with structured interaction, the method embeds production-relevant considerations during service scaffolding. Evaluation indicates improved architectural consistency and deployability compared to general-purpose AI code generation workflows, suggesting that constraint-aware retrieval is essential for aligning AI-assisted service development with production software engineering practices.

analysis.tldr: 提出检索增强的脚手架方法，通过模板检索与智能体澄清循环对齐架构约束，提升AI辅助服务开发的部署一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: AI辅助开发工具快速原型化服务，但缺乏对架构约束、基础设施依赖和组织标准的感知，导致生成制品脆弱且部署性差。
analysis.problem: 如何使AI辅助服务开发感知并遵循生产环境中的架构约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用AI代码生成工作流生成的制品存在架构不一致和部署性差的问题。
analysis.method: 检索增强的脚手架方法，结合平台代码生成与智能体澄清循环，通过模板检索和结构化交互暴露并解决架构约束歧义。
contributions: 提出约束感知的检索增强脚手架方法，提升架构一致性和可部署性
引入智能体澄清循环以解决架构约束歧义

limitations: 可能依赖平台模板的质量和覆盖范围

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出检索增强的脚手架方法，通过模板检索与智能体澄清循环对齐架构约束，提升AI辅助服务开发的部署一致性。

papers.title: Why Geometric Continuity Emerges in Deep Neural Networks: Residual Connections and Rotational Symmetry Breaking
papers.abstract: Weight matrices in deep networks exhibit geometric continuity -- principal singular vectors of adjacent layers point in similar directions. While this property has been widely observed, its origin remains unexplained. Through experiments on toy MLPs and small transformers, we identify two mechanisms: residual connections create cross-layer gradient coherence that aligns weight updates across layers, and symmetry-breaking nonlinearities constrain all layers to a shared coordinate frame, preventing the rotation drift that would otherwise destabilize weight structure. Crucially, a nonlinear but rotation-preserving activation fails to retain continuity, isolating symmetry breaking -- not nonlinearity itself -- as the active ingredient. Activation and normalization play distinct roles: activation concentrates continuity in the leading singular direction, while normalization distributes it across multiple directions. In transformers, continuity is projection-specific: Q, K, Gate, and Up (which read from the residual stream) develop input-space ($\mathbf{v}_1$) continuity; O and Down (which write to it) develop output-space ($\mathbf{u}_1$) continuity; V alone, lacking an adjacent nonlinearity, develops only low continuity.

analysis.tldr: 残差连接和旋转对称性破缺共同解释了深度神经网络中权重矩阵几何连续性的涌现机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度网络权重矩阵的几何连续性（相邻层主奇异向量方向一致）被广泛观察到，但其起源尚不明确，理解这一机制有助于揭示深度学习成功的内在原理。
analysis.problem: 解释深度神经网络中权重矩阵几何连续性的根本原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过实验发现，残差连接产生跨层梯度一致性，使权重更新对齐；对称性破缺非线性将各层约束到共享坐标系，防止旋转漂移。旋转保持的非线性无法保持连续性，表明对称性破缺是关键。激活和归一化作用不同：激活将连续性集中到主奇异方向，归一化则分散到多个方向。在Transformer中，连续性具有投影特异性。
analysis.method: 在玩具MLP和小型Transformer上进行实验，通过控制变量（残差连接、非线性类型、激活/归一化）分析几何连续性的来源。
contributions: 识别出残差连接和旋转对称性破缺是几何连续性的两个核心机制
区分了激活和归一化在连续性中的不同作用
揭示了Transformer中连续性具有投影特异性的模式
analysis.experiments: 在玩具MLP和小型Transformer上进行实验，观察不同设置下权重矩阵奇异向量的对齐程度。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 实验仅在小型模型上进行，可能无法完全推广到大规模深度网络
未提供定量指标或与现有理论的对比
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 残差连接和旋转对称性破缺共同解释了深度神经网络中权重矩阵几何连续性的涌现机制。

papers.title: Skill Neologisms: Towards Skill-based Continual Learning
papers.abstract: Modern LLMs show mastery over an ever-growing range of skills, as well as the ability to compose them flexibly. However, extending model capabilities to new skills in a scalable manner is an open-problem: fine-tuning and parameter-efficient variants risk catastrophic forgetting, while context-based approaches have limited expressiveness and are constrained by the model's effective context. We explore skill neologisms--i.e., soft tokens integrated in the model's vocabulary and optimized to improve capabilities over a specific skill--as a way to selectively extend model capabilities to new skills without weight updates. We first observe that off-the-shelf pre-trained LLMs already demonstrate tokens associated with procedural knowledge. We then show that skill neologisms can be learned to improve model capabilities on specific skills while being composable with out-of-distribution skills, and that independently trained skill neologisms can be composed zero-shot. These results suggest that skill neologisms may provide a scalable path towards skill-based continual learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出技能新词（skill neologisms）作为无需权重更新的持续学习方法，通过可组合的软令牌扩展LLM技能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM虽具备多种技能组合能力，但扩展新技能时面临灾难性遗忘（微调）或表达受限（上下文方法）的瓶颈，亟需可扩展的持续学习方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不更新模型权重的前提下，高效且可组合地扩展LLM的新技能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练LLM中已存在与程序性知识相关的令牌，且技能新词可独立训练后零样本组合。
analysis.method: 在模型词汇表中集成软令牌（skill neologisms），通过优化提升特定技能能力，无需权重更新，支持跨技能组合。
contributions: 提出技能新词概念，作为持续学习的新范式
实验证明技能新词可学习、可组合，且独立训练的令牌能零样本组合
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 软令牌的表示能力可能受限于模型词汇表大小
未讨论技能新词在复杂多技能场景下的扩展性
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出技能新词（skill neologisms）作为无需权重更新的持续学习方法，通过可组合的软令牌扩展LLM技能。

papers.title: Reliable Modeling of Distribution Shifts via Displacement-Reshaped Optimal Transport
papers.abstract: Optimal transport (OT) is a central framework for modeling distribution shifts. Because OT compares distributions directly in input space, a well-designed ground metric between observations is essential to ensure that the optimizer does not violate the true geometry of change. We propose Displacement-Reshaped Optimal Transport (ReshapeOT), a method that reshapes the ground metric by integrating observed sample displacements as an additional source of knowledge. Technically, ReshapeOT replaces the Euclidean metric with a Mahalanobis distance estimated from displacement second moments. This effectively carves expressways through the input space, inviting transport solutions that better align with observed displacements. Our method is computationally lightweight, integrates seamlessly into any OT solver that operates on a cost matrix, and can be kernelized for further flexibility. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data show that ReshapeOT achieves substantial gains in transport reliability. We further demonstrate our method's usefulness in two practical use cases.

analysis.tldr: 通过位移信息重塑最优传输中的地面度量，提升分布偏移建模的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 最优传输（OT）是建模分布偏移的核心框架，但传统方法依赖输入空间中的地面度量，若度量设计不当，优化结果可能违背真实的几何变化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计地面度量，使其更好地反映观测到的样本位移，从而提高OT在分布偏移建模中的可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出位移重塑最优传输（ReshapeOT），通过位移二阶矩估计马氏距离来重塑地面度量，在输入空间中开辟“高速公路”，使传输方案更符合观测位移。
contributions: 提出ReshapeOT方法，通过整合样本位移信息重塑地面度量，提升OT的可靠性。
方法计算轻量，可无缝集成到任何基于成本矩阵的OT求解器，并支持核化扩展。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据上实验，显示ReshapeOT在传输可靠性上取得显著提升，并在两个实际用例中验证了实用性。
limitations: 可能依赖位移数据的质量，若位移估计不准确则效果受限。
仅考虑了位移二阶矩，高阶信息可能被忽略。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过位移信息重塑最优传输中的地面度量，提升分布偏移建模的可靠性。

papers.title: EP-GRPO: Entropy-Progress Aligned Group Relative Policy Optimization with Implicit Process Guidance
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), particularly Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has advanced LLM reasoning. However, GRPO suffers from three credit assignment failures: uniform token-level granularity that ignores heterogeneous informational value, uniform polarity that penalizes correct steps and rewards incorrect ones, and zero-variance collapse that erases outcome-driven gradients. We systematically quantify these failures, revealing highly non-uniform token informativeness, widespread step-level polarity misalignment, and substantial training waste. To address these limitations, we propose Entropy-Progress Aligned GRPO (EP-GRPO), a framework that mines the model's intrinsic information flow for dense, self-supervised guidance. EP-GRPO integrates entropy-gated modulation to prioritize high entropy decision pivots, implicit process signals from policy divergence anchored to outcome advantages for directional token-level feedback without external reward models, and cumulative entropy mapping that enables progress-aligned advantage normalization, naturally maintaining gradient flow under zero reward variance. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that EP-GRPO achieves superior accuracy and efficiency compared to GRPO and its variants. The code will be available.

analysis.tldr: EP-GRPO通过熵-进度对齐和隐式过程引导，解决了GRPO在LLM推理中的信用分配失败问题。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO在LLM推理中面临信用分配失败，包括均匀token粒度忽略信息价值差异、均匀极性惩罚正确步骤奖励错误步骤、以及零方差崩溃消除梯度，导致训练效率低下。
analysis.problem: 解决GRPO中三种信用分配失败：均匀token粒度、均匀极性、零方差崩溃。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要量化了GRPO的失败模式：token信息量高度不均匀、步骤级极性广泛错位、大量训练浪费。
analysis.method: 提出EP-GRPO框架，包含熵门控调制（优先高熵决策点）、隐式过程信号（基于策略分歧与结果优势对齐的token级反馈）、累积熵映射（实现进度对齐的优势归一化）。
contributions: 系统量化了GRPO的三种信用分配失败及其影响。
提出EP-GRPO，利用模型内在信息流进行密集自监督引导。
在数学推理基准上验证了EP-GRPO相比GRPO及其变体的准确率和效率提升。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理基准上进行实验，显示EP-GRPO相比GRPO及其变体具有更优的准确率和效率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务（数学推理）的验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
隐式过程信号的有效性可能受模型初始策略影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EP-GRPO通过熵-进度对齐和隐式过程引导，解决了GRPO在LLM推理中的信用分配失败问题。

papers.title: Modular Reinforcement Learning For Cooperative Swarms
papers.abstract: A cooperative robot swarm is a collective of computationally-limited robots that share a common goal. Each robot can only interact with a small subset of its peers, without knowing how this affects the collective utility. Recent advances in distributed multi-agent reinforcement learning have demonstrated that it is possible for robots to learn how to interact effectively with others, in a manner that is aligned with the common goal, despite each robot learning independently of others. However, this requires each robot to represent a potentially combinatorial number of interaction states, challenging the memory capabilities of the robots. This paper proposes an alternative approach for representing spatial interaction states for multi-robot reinforcement learning in swarms. A modular (decomposed) representation is used, where each feature of the state is handled by a separate learning procedure, and the results aggregated. We demonstrate the efficacy of the approach in numerous experiments with simulated robot swarms carrying out foraging.

analysis.tldr: 提出模块化强化学习表示方法，解决机器人集群中状态空间组合爆炸问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人集群中每个机器人只能与少量同伴交互，但独立学习时需表示组合爆炸的交互状态，超出有限内存能力。
analysis.problem: 如何高效表示多机器人强化学习中的空间交互状态，避免组合爆炸。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用模块化（分解）表示，每个状态特征由独立学习过程处理，结果聚合。
contributions: 提出模块化状态表示方法用于集群多机器人强化学习
在模拟觅食任务中验证了方法的有效性
analysis.experiments: 在模拟机器人集群觅食任务中进行了实验，摘要未提供具体实验结果。

未讨论模块化表示的理论收敛性
