Finally, we conduct a user study to qualitatively assess the generated strategies, and Pen-Strategist demonstrates superior performance compared to the Claude-4.6-Sonnet.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Pen-Strategist 框架，通过领域特定推理模型和分类器提升渗透测试策略生成与步骤预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 网络安全威胁日益严重，但熟练的网络安全专业人员严重短缺，现有基于LLM的自动化渗透测试框架在策略制定、领域推理和动作选择方面表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何提升LLM在渗透测试中的策略推理能力和步骤预测准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有框架在策略制定、领域特定推理和准确动作/工具选择方面能力有限，导致性能较差。
analysis.method: 构建包含策略推导和步骤选择逻辑解释的推理数据集，使用强化学习微调Qwen-3-14B模型生成策略，并训练基于语义的CNN分类器进行步骤预测。
contributions: 提出Pen-Strategist框架，包含领域特定推理模型和分类器，用于渗透测试策略生成和步骤预测。
构建了包含逻辑解释的推理数据集，并通过强化学习微调模型，在策略推导上提升87%。
集成到现有框架后，在子任务完成率上提升47.5%，在CTFKnow基准上提升18%，步骤预测分类器优于商业LLM 28%。
analysis.experiments: 在测试集上策略推导性能提升87%；集成到PentestGPT后在脆弱机器上子任务完成率提升47.5%，超越GPT-5；在CTFKnow基准上提升18%；步骤预测分类器优于商业LLM 28%；用户研究显示优于Claude-4.6-Sonnet。
limitations: 依赖特定领域数据集，可能泛化到其他网络安全任务有限。
框架复杂度较高，需要微调和分类器训练。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Pen-Strategist 框架，通过领域特定推理模型和分类器提升渗透测试策略生成与步骤预测性能。

papers.title: CAR: Query-Guided Confidence-Aware Reranking for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) depends on document ranking to provide useful evidence for generation, but conventional reranking methods mainly optimize query-document relevance rather than generation usefulness. A relevant document may still introduce noise, while a lower-ranked document may better reduce the generator's uncertainty. We propose CAR (Confidence-Aware Reranking), a query-guided, training-free, and plug-and-play reranking framework that uses generator confidence change as a document usefulness signal. CAR estimates confidence through the semantic consistency of multiple sampled answers under query-only and query-document conditions. Documents that significantly increase confidence are promoted, those that decrease confidence are demoted, and uncertain cases preserve the baseline order, while a query-level gate avoids unnecessary intervention on already confident queries. Experiments on four BEIR datasets show that CAR consistently improves NDCG@5 across sparse and dense retrievers, LLM-based and supervised rerankers, and four LLM backbones. Notably, CAR improves the YesNo reranker by 25.4 percent on average under Contriever retrieval, and its ranking gains strongly correlate with downstream generation F1 improvements, achieving Spearman rho = 0.964.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的重排序框架CAR，通过生成器置信度变化衡量文档对生成的有用性，显著提升RAG检索质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统重排序方法主要优化查询-文档相关性，但相关文档可能引入噪声，而低排名文档可能更有利于生成，因此需要一种以生成有用性为导向的重排序方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种重排序方法，使其能够根据文档对生成器不确定性的降低程度来重新排序，从而提升RAG的生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相关文档不一定对生成有用，甚至可能引入噪声；而低排名文档可能更有效地降低生成器的不确定性。
analysis.method: CAR框架通过比较仅查询和查询-文档条件下多个采样答案的语义一致性来估计生成器置信度变化，据此提升或降低文档排名，并对已置信查询跳过干预。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的重排序框架CAR，利用生成器置信度变化作为文档有用性信号。
在多个BEIR数据集上验证了CAR对稀疏和稠密检索器、LLM和监督重排序器的一致改进，且排名提升与下游生成F1强相关。
analysis.experiments: 在四个BEIR数据集上，使用多种检索器（稀疏、稠密）、重排序器（LLM、监督）和四个LLM骨干进行实验，CAR一致提升NDCG@5，其中在Contriever检索下将YesNo重排序器平均提升25.4%，且排名增益与生成F1的Spearman相关系数达0.964。
limitations: 依赖生成器置信度估计的准确性，可能受采样策略影响。
仅适用于可采样多次答案的生成器，对单次生成模型需适配。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的重排序框架CAR，通过生成器置信度变化衡量文档对生成的有用性，显著提升RAG检索质量。

papers.title: A Hybrid Method for Low-Resource Named Entity Recognition
papers.abstract: Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a critical component of Natural Language Processing with diverse applications in information extraction and conversational AI. However, NER in specific domains for low-resource languages faces challenges such as limited annotated data and heterogeneous label sets. This study addresses these issues by proposing a hybrid neurosymbolic framework that integrates rule-based processing with deep learning models for Vietnamese NER. The core idea involves a two-stage pipeline: first, a rule-based component reduces label complexity by grouping relational and special categories; second, pre-trained language models are fine-tuned for high-precision extraction. A post-processing module is then utilized to restore fine-grained labels, preserving expressiveness for application-level usability. To mitigate data scarcity, a scalable data augmentation strategy leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) is introduced to expand the label set without full re-annotation, which is a significant novelty of this work. The effectiveness of this method was evaluated across five specific-domain datasets, including logistics, wildlife, and healthcare. Experimental results demonstrate substantial improvements over strong RoBERTa-based baselines. Specifically, the proposed system achieved F1 scores of 90 percent in Customer Service, up from 83 percent; 84 percent in GAM, up from 73 percent; 83 percent in AI Fluent, up from 80 percent; 94 percent in PhoNER_Covid19, up from 91 percent; and 60 percent in Rare Wildlife, up from 36 percent. These findings confirm that the hybrid approach effectively captures the linguistic complexity of Vietnamese and contextual nuances in specialized domains, offering a robust contribution to low-resource NER research.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合神经符号框架，结合规则与深度学习，并利用LLM数据增强，在越南语低资源NER上显著提升F1。
analysis.research_motivation: 低资源语言特定领域的NER面临标注数据稀缺和标签集异构的挑战，现有方法难以兼顾精度与细粒度表达。
analysis.problem: 解决低资源语言（越南语）特定领域NER中标注数据不足和标签集复杂的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段流水线：规则组件先粗分标签，预训练语言模型微调提取，后处理恢复细粒度标签；并利用LLM进行可扩展数据增强。
contributions: 提出混合神经符号框架，结合规则与深度学习处理低资源NER。
引入基于LLM的数据增强策略，无需完全重新标注即可扩展标签集。
analysis.experiments: 在5个特定领域数据集（客服、GAM、AI Fluent、PhoNER_Covid19、稀有野生动物）上评估，F1分别提升7、11、3、3、24个百分点。
limitations: 方法依赖规则设计，可能难以迁移到其他语言或领域。
LLM数据增强可能引入噪声，需进一步验证质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合神经符号框架，结合规则与深度学习，并利用LLM数据增强，在越南语低资源NER上显著提升F1。

papers.title: CCL-D: A High-Precision Diagnostic System for Slow and Hang Anomalies in Large-Scale Model Training
papers.abstract: As training scales grow, collective communication libraries (CCL) increasingly face anomalies arising from complex interactions among hardware, software, and environmental factors. These anomalies typically manifest as slow/hang communication, the most frequent and time-consuming category to diagnose. However, traditional diagnostic methods remain inaccurate and inefficient, frequently requiring hours or even days for root cause analysis. To address this, we propose CCL-D, a high-precision diagnostic system designed to detect and locate slow/hang anomalies in large-scale distributed training. CCL-D integrates a rank-level real-time probe with an intelligent decision analyzer. The probe measures cross-layer anomaly metrics using a lightweight distributed tracing framework to monitor communication traffic. The analyzer performs automated anomaly detection and root-cause location, precisely identifying the faulty GPU rank. Deployed on a 4,000-GPU cluster over one year, CCL-D achieved near-complete coverage of known slow/hang anomalies and pinpointed affected ranks within 6 minutes-substantially outperforming existing solutions.

analysis.tldr: CCL-D 是一个用于大规模模型训练中慢/挂起通信异常的高精度诊断系统，可在 6 分钟内定位故障 GPU 节点。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模训练中集体通信库（CCL）的慢/挂起异常频发且诊断耗时，传统方法不准确且效率低，需要数小时甚至数天才能定位根因。
analysis.problem: 如何快速、准确地检测和定位大规模分布式训练中的慢/挂起通信异常。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CCL-D 集成 rank 级实时探针和智能决策分析器：探针通过轻量级分布式追踪框架测量跨层异常指标以监控通信流量；分析器执行自动异常检测和根因定位，精确识别故障 GPU rank。
contributions: 提出 CCL-D 系统，实现高精度慢/挂起异常检测与定位。
在 4000 GPU 集群上部署一年，覆盖已知异常并在 6 分钟内定位故障 rank，显著优于现有方案。
analysis.experiments: 在 4000 GPU 集群上部署一年，CCL-D 实现了对已知慢/挂起异常的近乎完全覆盖，并在 6 分钟内定位受影响 rank。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件或软件环境，泛化性未充分讨论。
仅针对慢/挂起异常，未涵盖其他类型通信异常。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CCL-D 是一个用于大规模模型训练中慢/挂起通信异常的高精度诊断系统，可在 6 分钟内定位故障 GPU 节点。

papers.title: Stabilizing LLM Supervised Fine-Tuning via Explicit Distributional Control
papers.abstract: Post-training large language models (LLMs) often suffers from catastrophic forgetting, where improvements on a target objective degrade previously acquired capabilities. Recent evidence suggests that this phenomenon is primarily driven by excessive distributional drift during optimization. Motivated by this perspective, we propose Anchored Learning, a simple framework that explicitly controls distributional updates during offline fine-tuning via a dynamically evolving moving anchor. Instead of matching a fixed reference distribution, the anchor interpolates between the current model and a frozen reference to construct an intermediate target that the model distills toward, transforming global fine-tuning into a sequence of local trust-region updates in distribution space. Theoretically, we prove this anchor-based update admits a linear KL-divergence upper bound per iteration, ensuring a stable transition between model distributions. Extensive experiments on iGSM, MedCalc, and IFEval show that Anchored Learning consistently lies on the Pareto frontier of gain-stability trade-offs, achieving near-optimal performance improvements while substantially reducing degradation compared to strong baselines. For example, while standard SFT suffers from over 53% performance degradation on iGSM and MedCalc, Anchored Learning slashes this drop to under 5% while maintaining near-optimal gains (e.g., 75.2% on iGSM).

analysis.tldr: 提出 Anchored Learning 框架，通过动态移动锚点控制分布更新，缓解 LLM 微调中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 后训练常因灾难性遗忘导致能力退化，现有方法难以平衡目标提升与已有能力保持。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲已有能力的前提下，稳定地微调 LLM 以提升目标性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 灾难性遗忘主要由优化过程中的过度分布漂移引起。
analysis.method: Anchored Learning：在离线微调中，通过动态插值当前模型与冻结参考模型构建中间目标，将全局微调转化为分布空间中的局部信任域更新序列。
contributions: 提出 Anchored Learning 框架，显式控制分布更新以稳定微调。
理论证明锚点更新每步具有线性 KL 散度上界，确保分布过渡稳定。
实验表明该方法在增益-稳定性帕累托前沿上取得近最优性能，显著降低遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 在 iGSM、MedCalc 和 IFEval 上评估，Anchored Learning 始终处于增益-稳定性帕累托前沿，相比标准 SFT 将性能退化从 53% 以上降至 5% 以下，同时保持近最优增益（如 iGSM 上 75.2%）。
limitations: 可能依赖参考模型质量，弱参考模型下效果未知。
动态锚点插值策略的额外计算开销未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Anchored Learning 框架，通过动态移动锚点控制分布更新，缓解 LLM 微调中的灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: GEM: Graph-Enhanced Mixture-of-Experts with ReAct Agents for Dialogue State Tracking
papers.abstract: Dialogue State Tracking (DST) requires precise extraction of structured information from multi-domain conversations, a task where Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle despite their impressive general capabilities. We present GEM (Graph-Enhanced Mixture-of-Experts), a novel framework that combines language models and graph-structured dialogue understanding with ReAct agent-based reasoning for superior DST performance. Our approach dynamically routes between specialized experts: a Graph Neural Network that captures dialogue structure and turn-level dependencies, and a finetuned T5-Small encoder-decoder for sequence modeling, coordinated by an intelligent router. For complex value generation tasks, we integrate ReAct agents that perform structured reasoning over dialogue context. On MultiWOZ 2.2, GEM achieves 65.19% Joint Goal Accuracy, substantially outperforming end-to-end LLM approaches (best: 38.43%) and surpassing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods including TOATOD (63.79%), D3ST (58.70%), and Diable (56.48%). Our graph-enhanced mixture-of-experts architecture with ReAct integration demonstrates that combining structured dialogue representation with dynamic expert routing and agent-based reasoning provides a powerful paradigm for dialogue state tracking, achieving superior accuracy while maintaining computational efficiency through selective expert activation.

analysis.tldr: 提出图增强混合专家与ReAct智能体框架，在对话状态跟踪任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 对话状态跟踪需要从多领域对话中提取结构化信息，现有大语言模型虽能力强但在此任务上表现不佳，亟需更有效的结构化建模方法。
analysis.problem: 如何结合图结构对话理解和智能体推理来提升对话状态跟踪的准确性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GEM框架，包含图神经网络捕捉对话结构、微调T5-Small进行序列建模，并由智能路由器动态选择专家；对于复杂值生成，集成ReAct智能体进行结构化推理。
contributions: 提出图增强混合专家架构，结合图神经网络和序列模型进行动态路由。
集成ReAct智能体进行复杂值生成推理，提升对话状态跟踪准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在MultiWOZ 2.2上，GEM达到65.19%联合目标准确率，优于端到端LLM方法（最佳38.43%）和现有SOTA方法（TOATOD 63.79%、D3ST 58.70%、Diable 56.48%）。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集（MultiWOZ 2.2），泛化性需进一步验证。
图神经网络和智能体路由可能增加系统复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图增强混合专家与ReAct智能体框架，在对话状态跟踪任务上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Dissociating spatial frequency reliance from adversarial robustness advantages in neurally guided deep convolutional neural networks
papers.abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) have rivaled humans on many visual tasks, yet they remain vulnerable to near-imperceptible perturbations generated by adversarial attacks. Recent work shows that aligning DCNN representations with human visual cortex activity improves adversarial robustness, but the mechanisms driving this advantage are unclear. One hypothesis suggests that neural alignment confers robustness by biasing models away from brittle high-frequency details and towards the low spatial frequencies (LSF). However, recent work shows that human object recognition critically depends on a narrow, mid-frequency "human channel". Interestingly, this band was partially preserved in prior LSF-focused studies. Here, we investigate whether a spectral bias towards the LSF or the human channel is the primary driver of the adversarial robustness observed in neurally aligned DCNNs. We first show that DCNNs aligned to higher-order regions of the human ventral visual stream systematically increase reliance on both LSF and the human channel. However, directly steering DCNNs towards these bands revealed a clear dissociation. Biasing models towards the human channel, either alone or together with LSF, does not improve robustness and even impairs it. LSF bias produced some robustness gains, but such improvements are modest despite inducing much larger shifts in spatial-frequency reliance than neurally aligned models. Spatial-frequency-biased models overall show little, if any, increase in similarity to human neural representational geometry. Together, our results suggest that altered spatial-frequency reliance is likely an emergent property of learning more human-like representations rather than the primary mechanism by which neural alignment confers adversarial robustness, and motivate the need for future research examining representational properties beyond spatial-frequency profiles.

analysis.tldr: 神经对齐提升DCNN对抗鲁棒性的机制并非源于对低频或人眼频段的依赖，而是更类人表征的副产品。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度卷积网络在视觉任务上表现优异，但对对抗攻击脆弱；神经对齐可提升鲁棒性，但其机制不明，需厘清空间频率偏好的作用。
analysis.problem: 探究神经对齐DCNN中对抗鲁棒性的提升是否主要源于对低频空间频率或人眼中频通道的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 神经对齐模型同时增加对低频和人眼频段的依赖；但直接偏置模型至人眼频段不提升鲁棒性甚至损害，低频偏置仅带来适度增益；空间频率偏置模型与人类神经表征相似度低。
analysis.method: 通过分析神经对齐DCNN的空间频率依赖，并直接操纵模型偏置至低频或人眼频段，对比鲁棒性变化。
contributions: 发现神经对齐DCNN的对抗鲁棒性并非由空间频率偏置直接驱动，而是类人表征学习的副产品。
揭示人眼频段偏置不能提升鲁棒性，低频偏置效果有限，为未来研究指明方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于特定DCNN架构和数据集，结论泛化性需验证。
未探索其他表征属性对鲁棒性的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 神经对齐提升DCNN对抗鲁棒性的机制并非源于对低频或人眼频段的依赖，而是更类人表征的副产品。

papers.title: Joint Optimization of Trajectory Control, Resource Allocation, and Task Offloading for Multi-UAV-Assisted IoV
papers.abstract: This paper investigates a multi-Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) joint base station-assisted Internet of Vehicles (IoV) task offloading system in dense urban environments. To minimize system delay and energy consumption under strict coupling constraints, the complex non-convex optimization problem is decoupled into a hierarchical execution framework. First, a sequential distributed optimization algorithm based on Second-Order Cone Programming (SOCP) is proposed to optimize the 3D flight trajectory of each UAV, ensuring adaptive network coverage. Second, a novel hybrid resource scheduling paradigm synergizing Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) and Large Language Models (LLMs) is developed. Within this framework, the DRL agent dictates the initial resource allocation, while the LLM acts as a semantic macro-scheduler to rectify long-tail allocation imbalances for failed and surplus tasks. Crucially, a reward decoupling mechanism is introduced to isolate DRL training from external LLM interventions, thereby ensuring policy convergence. Finally, the task offloading ratios are precisely determined via Linear Programming (LP) within an alternating optimization loop. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms traditional multi-agent reinforcement learning baselines in terms of task success rate and system efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出多无人机辅助车联网中轨迹、资源与任务卸载的联合优化方法，结合SOCP、DRL与LLM实现低延迟低能耗。
analysis.research_motivation: 密集城市环境中多无人机辅助车联网任务卸载面临复杂耦合约束，传统方法难以同时优化轨迹控制、资源分配和任务卸载以最小化系统延迟和能耗。
analysis.problem: 解决多无人机辅助车联网系统中轨迹控制、资源分配和任务卸载的联合优化问题，以最小化系统延迟和能耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将非凸优化问题解耦为层次化执行框架：首先用基于SOCP的序列分布式优化算法优化3D飞行轨迹；然后提出混合资源调度范式，DRL决定初始资源分配，LLM作为语义宏调度器纠正长尾分配不平衡，并引入奖励解耦机制确保策略收敛；最后通过线性规划在交替优化循环中确定任务卸载比例。
contributions: 提出基于SOCP的序列分布式优化算法优化多无人机3D轨迹。
提出DRL与LLM混合资源调度范式，并引入奖励解耦机制。
通过交替优化实现轨迹、资源和卸载的联合优化。
analysis.experiments: 仿真结果表明，所提方法在任务成功率和系统效率上显著优于传统多智能体强化学习基线。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理延迟和计算成本。
未在真实硬件或大规模场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多无人机辅助车联网中轨迹、资源与任务卸载的联合优化方法，结合SOCP、DRL与LLM实现低延迟低能耗。

papers.title: Towards Robust LLM Post-Training: Automatic Failure Management for Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) has become a core paradigm for post-training large language models, yet its training process remains highly fragile. Existing efforts mainly improve reliability at the system level or address specific issues in individual subproblems by modifying RFT algorithms. Despite their effectiveness, they largely overlook the problem of failure management at the training-process level. When training goes wrong, practitioners still rely heavily on expert-driven manual inspection and correction, and automatic failure management for RFT remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we take a first step toward systematic failure management for reinforcement fine-tuning. To understand the empirical structure of RFT failures, we first construct RFT-FaultBench, the first benchmark for fine-grained failures in reinforcement fine-tuning, covering 5 fault families, 16 fault types, 779 training runs, 22,549 train-step records, and 1,457,288 trajectory-level records. Based on this benchmark, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study showing that RFT failures are both observable from training dynamics and distinguishable through their empirical fault fingerprints. Building on these findings, we propose RFT-FM, an automatic failure management framework for reinforcement fine-tuning that unifies anomaly detection, failure diagnosis, and auto remediation in a closed loop. Experimental results show that RFT-FaultBench is neither trivial nor saturated: it exhibits clear anomaly structure while still posing substantial challenges, especially under subtle fault settings. Moreover, RFT-FM shows strong capability in detecting, diagnosing, and mitigating RFT failures.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个强化微调故障基准RFT-FaultBench和自动故障管理框架RFT-FM，实现异常检测、诊断与自动修复的闭环。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化微调（RFT）是LLM后训练的核心范式，但训练过程高度脆弱，现有工作主要关注系统级可靠性或修改算法解决特定子问题，忽视了训练过程级的故障管理，导致实践中仍依赖专家手动检查与修正。
analysis.problem: 如何实现强化微调训练过程中故障的自动检测、诊断与修复，减少人工干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过构建RFT-FaultBench基准进行实证研究，发现RFT故障可从训练动态中观察，并通过经验故障指纹区分。
analysis.method: 提出RFT-FM框架，统一异常检测、故障诊断和自动修复形成闭环。
contributions: 构建了首个强化微调细粒度故障基准RFT-FaultBench，涵盖5个故障族、16种故障类型、779次训练运行等大规模数据。
提出RFT-FM自动故障管理框架，实现异常检测、诊断与修复的闭环。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明RFT-FaultBench具有清晰的异常结构但仍具挑战性，RFT-FM在检测、诊断和缓解RFT故障方面表现强劲。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有实际故障类型。
自动修复策略可能在某些复杂场景下效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个强化微调故障基准RFT-FaultBench和自动故障管理框架RFT-FM，实现异常检测、诊断与自动修复的闭环。

papers.title: FLUID: Continuous-Time Hyperconnected Sparse Transformer for Sink-Free Learning
papers.abstract: Continuous-time (CT) Transformers improve irregular and long-range modeling over CT-RNNs by exploiting inputs or outputs embeddings with continuous dynamics. However, the core scaled-dot-product-attention (SDPA) mechanism remains inherently discrete. We propose FLUID (Flexible Unified Information Dynamics), a CT Transformer that incorporates continuous dynamics directly into the attention computation by replacing it with Liquid Attention Network (LAN). LAN reinterprets attention logits as continuous dynamical system and reformulates them as the solution to a linear ODE modulated by input-dependent nonlinear recurrent gates. Theoretically, we establish stability guarantees for LAN dynamics and show that it serves as an interpolating middle ground between SDPA and CT-RNNs, recovering each as special case under well-defined parameterization of its gating functions. LAN also introduces an explicit attention-sink gate to eliminate disproportionate attention mass on uninformative nodes. FLUID replaces standard residual connections with input-dependent Liquid Hyper-Connections to adaptively regulate interlayer information flow. Empirically, we evaluate FLUID on a broad set of learning tasks, including (i) irregular time-series, (ii) long-range modeling, (iii) lane-keeping control of autonomous vehicles, and (iv) learning physical dynamics under a scarce data regime. Across all the tasks, FLUID consistently matches or outperforms CT baselines, achieving improvements of up to 47% in certain scenarios and enhancing generalization under distributional shifts. Additionally, FLUID demonstrates superior noise robustness and a self-correcting inductive bias in autonomous vehicle control. We also provide a detailed analysis of key hyperparameters to guide tuning and show that FLUID occupies an intermediate position among competing approaches in terms of runtime and memory efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续时间注意力机制LAN，替代标准SDPA，实现无注意力汇聚的连续时间Transformer。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续时间Transformer虽改进了不规则序列建模，但其核心注意力机制仍是离散的，限制了动态建模能力。
analysis.problem: 如何将连续时间动力学直接融入注意力计算，消除离散注意力带来的信息汇聚问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准SDPA在连续时间框架下存在离散-连续不匹配，且易产生注意力汇聚（attention sink）现象。
analysis.method: 提出Liquid Attention Network (LAN)，将注意力logits视为线性ODE的解，并引入输入依赖的非线性循环门控；同时用Liquid Hyper-Connections替代残差连接。
contributions: 提出LAN，将连续动力学融入注意力计算，理论上可恢复SDPA和CT-RNN为特例
引入注意力汇聚门（attention-sink gate）消除无信息节点的过度注意力
在多个任务上实现最高47%的性能提升，并展示噪声鲁棒性和自校正归纳偏置
analysis.experiments: 在四个任务上评估：不规则时间序列、长程建模、自动驾驶车道保持、稀缺数据下的物理动力学学习，FLUID一致匹配或超越基线，部分场景提升达47%。
limitations: 可能增加计算复杂度，摘要未提供详细效率对比
注意力汇聚门的设计可能依赖特定任务，泛化性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续时间注意力机制LAN，替代标准SDPA，实现无注意力汇聚的连续时间Transformer。

papers.title: Demystifying Manifold Constraints in LLM Pre-training
papers.abstract: The empirical success of large language model (LLM) pre-training relies heavily on heuristic stabilization techniques, such as explicit normalization layers and weight decay. While recent constrained optimization approaches that explicitly restrict weights may improve numerical stability and performance, the mechanism and motivation for adding constraints still remain elusive. This paper systematically demystifies the role of explicit manifold constraints in LLM pre-training. By introducing the Msign-Aligned Constrained Riemannian Optimizer (MACRO)-a provably convergent, single-loop optimization framework-our study disentangles weight regularization heuristics from interacting mechanisms like RMS normalization and decoupled weight decay. Theoretical analyses and comprehensive empirical evaluations reveal that manifold constraints independently bound forward activation scales and enforce stable rotational equilibrium, thereby subsuming the roles of these heuristic mechanisms. Evaluations on large-scale LLM architectures demonstrate that MACRO achieves highly competitive performance while rigorously preserving the theoretical guarantees of exact Riemannian optimization.

analysis.tldr: 揭示流形约束在LLM预训练中替代归一化和权重衰减的机制，并提出MACRO优化器。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM预训练依赖启发式稳定技术（如归一化层和权重衰减），但其机制不明确，且缺乏理论保证。
analysis.problem: 解释显式流形约束在LLM预训练中的作用，并设计一个理论保证的优化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 流形约束独立地约束前向激活尺度并强制稳定的旋转平衡，从而替代了RMS归一化和解耦权重衰减的作用。
analysis.method: 提出Msign-Aligned Constrained Riemannian Optimizer (MACRO)，一个单循环、可证明收敛的优化框架，通过显式流形约束替代启发式正则化。
contributions: 系统揭示了流形约束在LLM预训练中替代归一化和权重衰减的机制。
提出MACRO优化器，兼具理论收敛保证和大规模LLM上的竞争性能。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模LLM架构上评估，MACRO达到高度竞争性能，同时保持精确黎曼优化的理论保证。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的流形约束。
大规模训练中的计算开销未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示流形约束在LLM预训练中替代归一化和权重衰减的机制，并提出MACRO优化器。

papers.title: Critical Windows of Complexity Control: When Transformers Decide to Reason or Memorize
papers.abstract: Recent work has shown that Transformers' compositional generalization is governed by \emph{complexity control}, initialization scale and weight decay, which steers training toward low-complexity reasoning solutions rather than high-complexity memorization. Existing analyses, however, treat complexity control as a single static hyperparameter choice, leaving open \emph{when} during training this control is actually decisive. We show that the memorization-versus-reasoning fate of a Transformer is determined within a sharp, identifiable window of training. On a controlled compositional task we find that (i)~weight decay applied for a single 25\%-of-training window matches full-training weight decay in out-of-distribution (OOD) accuracy ($0.93$ vs $0.91$); (ii)~holding total regularization budget constant, placing it in the middle of training yields $5{-}9\times$ higher OOD accuracy than placing it early; (iii)~the boundary of the critical window is remarkably sharp, window onset shifted by as little as $100$ optimization steps causes mean OOD to jump from chance ($0.15$) to reasoning-regime ($0.61$); (iv)~the window's position depends systematically on initialization scale, but the basin of attraction for reasoning solutions \emph{shrinks} at small initialization, contradicting the prevailing recommendation that smaller initialization is uniformly better. We further show that the critical-window phenomenon is task-specific: it does not appear on grokking with modular arithmetic, where properly tuned constant weight decay matches scheduled weight decay.

analysis.tldr: Transformer 的推理与记忆行为由训练中一个尖锐的关键窗口决定，窗口内施加权重衰减对泛化至关重要。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究将复杂度控制视为静态超参数，忽略了训练过程中何时施加控制最为关键，理解这一时间窗口有助于更高效地训练泛化模型。
analysis.problem: 确定 Transformer 在训练过程中决定其走向推理还是记忆的关键时间窗口，并分析其特性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在组合任务上，权重衰减仅在训练中期的一个尖锐窗口内有效，窗口偏移少量步数即可导致 OOD 准确率从随机水平跃升至推理水平；窗口位置依赖于初始化尺度，且小初始化下推理解的吸引域反而缩小，与常见建议相悖；该现象在模算术任务上不出现。
analysis.method: 通过控制权重衰减的施加时间窗口，在组合任务上进行实验，分析不同窗口位置、长度和初始化尺度对 OOD 准确率的影响。
contributions: 发现 Transformer 的推理与记忆命运由训练中一个尖锐的关键窗口决定，窗口内施加权重衰减即可达到全训练衰减的效果。
揭示了关键窗口的位置依赖于初始化尺度，且小初始化下推理解的吸引域缩小，挑战了“小初始化更好”的普遍观点。
证明关键窗口现象具有任务特异性，在模算术任务上不出现。
analysis.experiments: 在受控的组合任务和模算术任务上进行实验，报告了 OOD 准确率等指标，并进行了窗口位置、长度和初始化尺度的系统分析。
limitations: 实验仅限于合成任务，真实场景下的适用性未知。
未提供理论解释为何窗口如此尖锐。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Transformer 的推理与记忆行为由训练中一个尖锐的关键窗口决定，窗口内施加权重衰减对泛化至关重要。

papers.title: Experiment-as-Code Labs: A Declarative Stack for AI-Driven Scientific Discovery
papers.abstract: To unleash the full potential of AI for Science, we must untether the agents from a purely digital environment. The agent's ability to control and explore in real-world labs is essential because the physical lab remains foundational to scientific discovery. While some tasks can be performed on a computer (e.g., data analysis, running simulated experiments), Eureka moments could occur at any time while operating lab instruments (e.g., when a scientist notices unexpected clues, intuition may prompt a real-time course change). Although autonomous labs are on the rise, which expose programmable APIs to control scientific instruments via software, bridging the gap between increasingly powerful AI agents and automated lab equipment requires innovation that draws insights from computer systems. We propose a new paradigm called ``Experiment-as-Code (EaC) Labs,'' where a core concept is to encode experiments as declarative configurations that can be compiled down to device-level APIs. AI agents come up with hypotheses and experiments, written as an ensemble of declarative configurations. The systems layer performs program analysis, safety checks, resource assignment, and job orchestration. Finally, programmatic experimentation occurs via actuating the device APIs. This is a general stack that is science-, lab-, and instrument-independent, representing a novel synthesis across the physical, systems, and intelligence layers to unleash the next breakthrough in AI for Science.

analysis.tldr: 提出Experiment-as-Code (EaC) Labs范式，将实验编码为声明式配置，通过系统层编译执行，实现AI驱动的自动化科学发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI for Science多局限于数字环境，但物理实验室仍是科学发现的基础，AI agent需要具备在真实实验室中控制和探索的能力。当前自主实验室虽提供可编程API，但AI agent与自动化设备之间仍存在鸿沟，需要从计算机系统角度创新。
analysis.problem: 如何桥接AI agent与自动化实验设备，使AI能自主设计、执行和调整物理实验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Experiment-as-Code (EaC) Labs范式，核心是将实验编码为声明式配置，通过系统层进行程序分析、安全检查、资源分配和作业编排，最终编译为设备级API执行。该框架独立于科学领域、实验室和仪器。
contributions: 提出Experiment-as-Code (EaC) Labs新范式，将实验编码为声明式配置，实现AI驱动的自动化科学发现。
设计跨物理层、系统层和智能层的通用堆栈，支持安全检查和作业编排，可适用于不同科学领域和实验室。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 摘要未提及实际部署或实验验证，可能面临物理设备兼容性和系统可靠性挑战。
声明式配置的抽象程度可能限制对复杂实验细节的表达。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Experiment-as-Code (EaC) Labs范式，将实验编码为声明式配置，通过系统层编译执行，实现AI驱动的自动化科学发现。

papers.title: Worst-Case Discovery and Runtime Protection for RL-Based Network Controllers
papers.abstract: RL-based controllers achieve strong average-case performance in networking tasks such as congestion control and adaptive bitrate streaming. Yet their performance can degrade severely under network conditions where strong performance is still achievable. Identifying such conditions and quantifying the resulting performance gap is intractable by enumeration, while the sequential and closed-loop nature of RL controllers makes formal verification methods impractical. We present ReGuard, a framework that discovers worst-case scenarios for a given RL controller and protects it against them at inference time without retraining. Discovery is formulated as a bilevel regret-maximization problem, which yields a certified lower bound on the worst-case performance gap. The discovered trajectories are then analyzed as counterfactuals and compiled into lightweight logic rules that intervene only when a risky state is detected, leaving the controller's behavior unchanged otherwise. We evaluate ReGuard across three RL-based network controllers: Pensieve, Sage, and Park. ReGuard discovers scenarios in which the controller's performance is 43$-$64% worse than what is achievable. ReGuard not only discovers gaps 57% to 6$\times$ larger than those found by the strongest baselines but also shrinks them by 79$-$85% via lightweight rule-based protection while preserving nominal performance. ReGuard's protection extends beyond the scenarios it discovers, improving performance across a wider range of network conditions.

analysis.tldr: ReGuard框架通过双层遗憾最大化发现RL网络控制器的最坏情况，并用轻量规则在推理时保护控制器，显著缩小性能差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于RL的网络控制器在平均性能上表现良好，但在某些网络条件下性能严重下降，而枚举所有可能情况不可行，形式化验证方法因RL的序列性和闭环性而不实用。
analysis.problem: 如何自动发现RL网络控制器的最坏情况场景，并在不重新训练的情况下在推理时保护控制器免受这些场景的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RL控制器在特定网络条件下性能可下降43-64%，且这些条件难以通过枚举或形式化方法识别。
analysis.method: 将最坏情况发现建模为双层遗憾最大化问题，得到性能差距的认证下界；将发现的轨迹作为反事实分析，编译成轻量逻辑规则，仅在检测到风险状态时干预。
contributions: 提出ReGuard框架，能够发现RL网络控制器的最坏情况场景并给出认证的性能差距下界。
通过轻量规则保护，在不影响正常性能的前提下将性能差距缩小79-85%，且保护泛化到未发现的场景。
analysis.experiments: 在三个RL网络控制器（Pensieve、Sage、Park）上评估，ReGuard发现的性能差距比最强基线大57%到6倍，并通过规则保护缩小79-85%。
limitations: 方法依赖于对控制器行为的反事实分析，可能不适用于所有类型的RL控制器。
规则保护可能无法覆盖所有极端情况，且规则生成过程可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReGuard框架通过双层遗憾最大化发现RL网络控制器的最坏情况，并用轻量规则在推理时保护控制器，显著缩小性能差距。

papers.title: Extending Differential Temporal Difference Methods for Episodic Problems
papers.abstract: Differential temporal difference (TD) methods are value-based reinforcement learning algorithms that have been proposed for infinite-horizon problems. They rely on reward centering, where each reward is centered by the average reward. This keeps the return bounded and removes a value function's state-independent offset. However, reward centering can alter the optimal policy in episodic problems, limiting its applicability. Motivated by recent works that emphasize the role of normalization in streaming deep reinforcement learning, we study reward centering in episodic problems and propose a generalization of differential TD. We prove that this generalization maintains the ordering of policies in the presence of termination, and thus extends differential TD to episodic problems. We show equivalence with a form of linear TD, thereby inheriting theoretical guarantees that have been shown for those algorithms. We then extend several streaming reinforcement learning algorithms to their differential counterparts. Across a range of base algorithms and environments, we empirically validate that reward centering can improve sample efficiency in episodic problems.

analysis.tldr: 将差分时序差分方法推广到回合制问题，证明其保持策略排序并提升样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 差分TD方法在无限时域问题中有效，但奖励中心化会改变回合制问题的最优策略，限制了其应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将差分TD方法扩展到回合制问题，同时保持策略排序并提升样本效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 奖励中心化在回合制问题中会改变最优策略，导致差分TD方法不适用。
analysis.method: 提出差分TD的推广形式，证明其保持策略排序，并与线性TD等价，从而继承理论保证。
contributions: 提出差分TD方法在回合制问题中的推广，并证明其保持策略排序。
证明该推广与线性TD等价，继承理论保证，并扩展多种流式强化学习算法。
analysis.experiments: 在多种基础算法和环境中，实验验证奖励中心化能提升回合制问题的样本效率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的回合制问题。
理论分析可能依赖于线性函数近似。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将差分时序差分方法推广到回合制问题，证明其保持策略排序并提升样本效率。

papers.title: Mitigating Label Shift in Tabular In-Context Learning via Test-Time Posterior Adjustment
papers.abstract: TabPFN has recently gained attention as a foundation model for tabular datasets, achieving strong performance by leveraging in-context learning on synthetic data. However, we find that TabPFN is vulnerable to label shift, often overfitting to the majority class in the training dataset. To address this limitation, we propose DistPFN, the first test-time posterior adjustment method designed for tabular foundation models. DistPFN rescales predicted class probabilities by downweighting the influence of the training prior (i.e., the class distribution of the context) and emphasizing the contribution of the model's predicted posterior, without architectural modification or additional training. We further introduce DistPFN-T, which incorporates temperature scaling to adaptively control the adjustment strength based on the discrepancy between prior and posterior. We evaluate our methods on over 250 OpenML datasets, demonstrating substantial improvements for various TabPFN-based models in classification tasks under label shift, while maintaining strong performance in standard settings without label shift. Code is available at this repository: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出DistPFN，通过测试时后验调整缓解表格上下文学习中的标签偏移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: TabPFN作为表格数据的基础模型，在上下文学习中易受标签偏移影响，过度拟合训练数据中的多数类，限制了其在真实场景中的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 解决TabPFN在标签偏移下分类性能下降的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TabPFN在标签偏移场景下会过度依赖训练先验（上下文类别分布），导致对多数类过拟合。
analysis.method: DistPFN通过重新缩放预测概率，降低训练先验的影响并强调模型预测后验的贡献，无需修改架构或额外训练；DistPFN-T引入温度缩放，根据先验与后验差异自适应调整强度。
contributions: 首次提出针对表格基础模型的测试时后验调整方法DistPFN，缓解标签偏移。
引入DistPFN-T，通过温度缩放自适应控制调整强度。
在250多个OpenML数据集上验证了方法在标签偏移下的显著改进，且标准设置下性能保持。
analysis.experiments: 在超过250个OpenML数据集上评估，展示了TabPFN系列模型在分类任务中标签偏移下的性能提升，标准设置下性能未下降。
limitations: 方法依赖模型预测的后验质量，若后验不准确可能影响效果。
温度缩放参数需要验证集或启发式选择，可能增加调参成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DistPFN，通过测试时后验调整缓解表格上下文学习中的标签偏移问题。

papers.title: Coral: Cost-Efficient Multi-LLM Serving over Heterogeneous Cloud GPUs
papers.abstract: The usage of large language models (LLMs) has grown increasingly fragmented, with no single model dominating. Meanwhile, cloud providers offer a wide range of mid-tier and older-generation GPUs that enjoy better availability and deliver comparable performance per dollar to top-tier hardware. To efficiently harness these heterogeneous resources for serving multiple LLMs concurrently, we introduce Coral, an adaptive heterogeneity-aware multi-LLM serving system. The key idea behind Coral is to jointly optimize resource allocation and the serving strategy of each model replica across all models. To keep pace with shifting throughput demand and resource availability, Coral applies a lossless two-stage decomposition that preserves joint optimality while cutting online solve time from hours to tens of seconds. Our evaluation across 6 models and 20 GPU configurations shows that Coral reduces serving cost by up to 2.79$\times$ over the best baseline, and delivers up to 2.39$\times$ higher goodput under scarce resource availability.

analysis.tldr: Coral 是一个面向异构云 GPU 的、自适应感知异构性的多 LLM 服务系统，通过联合优化资源分配和服务策略，显著降低服务成本并提高有效吞吐。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 使用日益碎片化，没有单一模型占主导；云提供商提供多种中端和旧代 GPU，这些 GPU 可用性更好且性价比与高端硬件相当，但现有系统未能高效利用这些异构资源来同时服务多个 LLM。
analysis.problem: 如何在异构云 GPU 上高效地同时服务多个 LLM，以最小化成本并最大化有效吞吐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Coral 提出一种自适应感知异构性的多 LLM 服务系统，核心是联合优化所有模型的资源分配和每个模型副本的服务策略；采用无损两阶段分解，在保持联合最优性的同时将在线求解时间从数小时缩短到数十秒。
contributions: 提出 Coral，一个面向异构云 GPU 的、自适应感知异构性的多 LLM 服务系统。
设计无损两阶段分解方法，实现联合优化资源分配和服务策略，显著降低在线求解时间。
在 6 个模型和 20 种 GPU 配置上的实验表明，Coral 相比最佳基线降低服务成本达 2.79 倍，在资源稀缺时有效吞吐提升达 2.39 倍。
analysis.experiments: 在 6 个模型和 20 种 GPU 配置上进行评估，Coral 相比最佳基线降低服务成本达 2.79 倍，在资源稀缺时有效吞吐提升达 2.39 倍。
limitations: 可能未考虑 GPU 间通信开销对联合优化的影响。
两阶段分解方法可能对某些极端动态场景适应性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Coral 是一个面向异构云 GPU 的、自适应感知异构性的多 LLM 服务系统，通过联合优化资源分配和服务策略，显著降低服务成本并提高有效吞吐。

papers.title: Efficiently Aligning Language Models with Online Natural Language Feedback
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has been used to elicit impressive performance from language models in many domains. But, broadly beneficial deployments of AI may require us to train models with strong capabilities in "fuzzy", hard-to-supervise domains. In this paper, we develop methods to align language models in fuzzy domains where human experts are still able to provide high-quality supervision signal, but only for a small number of model outputs, using online natural language feedback. Specifically, we train models by iteratively optimizing against proxy reward signals, stopping at the point of over-optimization, collecting fresh expert supervision, and updating the proxy reward. We construct proxy reward models from language models using in-context learning (ICL) and fine-tuning. We test our methods by eliciting creative writing and alignment research capabilities in Qwen3-8B and Haiku 4.5 respectively. For Qwen3-8B, ICL methods recover up to 35% of performance with 50x fewer expert samples, while fine-tuning methods recover 80% with up to 20x fewer samples and 100% with 3x fewer samples. For Haiku 4.5, ICL methods recover up to 35% of performance with 30x fewer samples, and fine-tuning methods recover 100% with 10x fewer samples. Our results suggest that online natural language feedback can substantially improve the data efficiency of expert supervision.

analysis.tldr: 提出在线自然语言反馈方法，通过迭代优化代理奖励模型，在模糊领域以更少专家样本高效对齐语言模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习在模糊、难以监督的领域（如创意写作）中难以应用，因为专家监督成本高且难以规模化。
analysis.problem: 如何在模糊领域中使用少量专家在线自然语言反馈，高效地对齐语言模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 迭代优化代理奖励信号，在过优化点停止并收集新专家反馈更新代理奖励；代理奖励模型通过上下文学习或微调从语言模型构建。
contributions: 提出一种利用在线自然语言反馈对齐语言模型的迭代框架，显著降低专家监督成本。
在创意写作和对齐研究两个模糊领域验证了方法，展示了高达20-50倍的数据效率提升。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-8B（创意写作）和Haiku 4.5（对齐研究）上测试，上下文学习方法用50倍/30倍更少样本恢复35%性能，微调方法用20倍/10倍更少样本恢复80-100%性能。
limitations: 方法依赖专家在线反馈，可能仍需要一定量的专家参与。
代理奖励模型的过优化点检测可能不鲁棒，需要进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在线自然语言反馈方法，通过迭代优化代理奖励模型，在模糊领域以更少专家样本高效对齐语言模型。

papers.title: Budgeted LoRA: Distillation as Structured Compute Allocation for Efficient Inference
papers.abstract: We study distillation for large language models under explicit compute constraints, with the goal of producing student models that are not only cheaper to train, but structurally efficient at inference time. While prior approaches to parameter-efficient distillation, such as LoRA, reduce adaptation cost, they leave the dense backbone unchanged and therefore fail to deliver meaningful inference savings. We propose Budgeted LoRA, a distillation framework that treats model compression as a structured compute allocation problem. Instead of using a fixed student architecture, we introduce a global compute budget that sets the final target fraction of dense computation retained. Under this constraint, the model redistributes capacity across dense and low-rank pathways via (i) module-level dense retention coefficients, (ii) adaptive low-rank allocation, and (iii) post-training compression that selectively removes, approximates, or preserves dense components. This formulation yields a family of students controlled by a single budget dial. Empirically, Budgeted LoRA matches standard LoRA perplexity at a moderate budget with a 1.74x compressed-module speedup; at an aggressive budget it achieves a 4.05x speedup with moderate perplexity degradation, and it preserves higher accuracy on function-style in-context learning probes. These results suggest that, under compute-constrained distillation, retaining behavior is less about matching perplexity or removing more parameters than it is about controlling how dense computation is transferred to low-rank pathways.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Budgeted LoRA，将模型压缩视为结构化计算分配问题，通过预算控制稠密与低秩路径的容量分配，实现推理加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数高效蒸馏方法（如LoRA）虽降低微调成本，但未改变稠密骨干网络，无法带来推理效率提升。
analysis.problem: 如何在显式计算约束下，通过蒸馏得到结构上推理高效的学生模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在计算受限蒸馏中，保留行为的关键不在于匹配困惑度或移除更多参数，而在于控制稠密计算向低秩路径的转移。
analysis.method: 提出 Budgeted LoRA 框架，引入全局计算预算，通过模块级稠密保留系数、自适应低秩分配和训练后压缩，在稠密与低秩路径间重新分配容量。
contributions: 提出将模型压缩视为结构化计算分配问题的蒸馏框架 Budgeted LoRA。
通过单一预算旋钮控制学生模型族，实现可调节的推理加速与性能权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在语言模型上评估，中等预算下匹配标准LoRA困惑度并获得1.74倍压缩模块加速；激进预算下获得4.05倍加速，困惑度适度下降，并在函数式上下文学习探针上保持更高准确率。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨任务或跨模型规模的泛化性。
可能仅适用于特定架构（如Transformer）。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Budgeted LoRA，将模型压缩视为结构化计算分配问题，通过预算控制稠密与低秩路径的容量分配，实现推理加速。

papers.title: Resilient AI Supercomputer Networking using MRC and SRv6
papers.abstract: Tail latency dominates the performance of synchronous pretraining jobs when running at very large scales. We describe a three-pronged approach: (1) a new RDMA-based transport protocol, MRC, sprays across many paths and actively load-balances between them, eliminating the issue of flow collisions (2) the use of multi-plane Clos topologies to get the benefits of high switch radix and redundancy, allowing training clusters well over 100K GPUs to be built as two-tier topologies while increasing physical redundancy, and (3) the use of static source-routing using SRv6 to allow MRC the freedom to bypass failures by itself. We describe our experiences running MRC and static SRv6 routing in production in OpenAI and Microsoft's largest training clusters, where it has been used to train the latest frontier models. We demonstrate how MRC allows AI training jobs to ride out many network failures that previously would have interrupted training.

analysis.tldr: 提出MRC协议与SRv6静态路由结合，解决大规模AI训练集群的网络尾延迟和故障容错问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模同步预训练任务中，尾延迟主导性能，传统网络方案在超100K GPU集群中面临流碰撞和故障中断问题。
analysis.problem: 如何消除大规模AI训练网络中的流碰撞和尾延迟，并实现故障自愈以维持训练连续性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三管齐下：1) 基于RDMA的MRC传输协议，多路径喷洒并主动负载均衡；2) 多平面Clos拓扑，利用高交换基数与冗余构建两层级集群；3) SRv6静态源路由，使MRC自主绕过故障。
contributions: 提出MRC协议，通过多路径喷洒和主动负载均衡消除流碰撞，降低尾延迟。
结合多平面Clos拓扑和SRv6静态路由，实现大规模集群的故障自愈，减少训练中断。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenAI和Microsoft的最大训练集群中生产部署，用于训练前沿模型，证明MRC能容忍多次网络故障。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件（RDMA）和网络拓扑（Clos），通用性受限。
静态SRv6路由在动态故障场景下可能需额外配置开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MRC协议与SRv6静态路由结合，解决大规模AI训练集群的网络尾延迟和故障容错问题。

papers.title: NoisyCausal: A Benchmark for Evaluating Causal Reasoning Under Structured Noise
papers.abstract: Causal reasoning in natural language requires identifying relevant variables, understanding their interactions, and reasoning about effects and interventions, often under noisy or ambiguous conditions. While large language models (LLMs) exhibit strong general reasoning abilities, they struggle to disentangle correlation from causation, particularly when observations are partially incorrect or irrelevant information is present. In this work, we introduce NoisyCausal, a new benchmark designed to evaluate causal reasoning under structured noise. Each instance is generated from a ground-truth causal graph and contextualized with a natural language scenario by injecting controllable forms of noise, such as irrelevant distractors, value perturbations, confounding, and partial observability. Moreover, we propose a modular reasoning framework that combines LLMs with explicit causal structure to address these challenges. Our method prompts the LLM to extract variables, construct a causal graph from context, and then reformulates the reasoning task as a structured prompt grounded in this graph. Rather than relying on statistical patterns alone, the LLM is guided by symbolic structure, enabling more interpretable and robust inference. Experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms standard prompting and reasoning baselines on NoisyCausal. Furthermore, it generalizes well to external benchmarks such as Cladder without task-specific tuning. Our findings highlight the importance of combining causal abstractions with language-driven reasoning to achieve faithful and robust causal understanding in LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出NoisyCausal基准和模块化因果推理框架，提升LLM在结构化噪声下的因果推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在自然语言因果推理中易混淆相关性与因果性，尤其在观测部分错误或存在无关信息时表现不佳，现有基准缺乏对结构化噪声的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估和提升LLM在结构化噪声（如无关干扰、值扰动、混杂、部分可观测性）下的因果推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在标准因果推理任务中表现尚可，但面对结构化噪声时容易失败，依赖统计模式而非因果结构。
analysis.method: 提出NoisyCausal基准（基于因果图生成含可控噪声的自然语言场景）和模块化推理框架（LLM提取变量、构建因果图，再基于图结构进行推理）。
contributions: 构建了NoisyCausal基准，系统评估LLM在结构化噪声下的因果推理。
提出模块化因果推理框架，结合LLM与显式因果结构，提升鲁棒性和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在NoisyCausal上显著优于标准提示和推理基线，并在Cladder等外部基准上泛化良好。
limitations: 框架依赖LLM提取变量和构建因果图的准确性。
噪声类型可能未覆盖所有真实场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NoisyCausal基准和模块化因果推理框架，提升LLM在结构化噪声下的因果推理能力。

papers.title: Memory as a Markov Matrix: Sample Efficient Knowledge Expansion via Token-to-Dictionary Mapping
papers.abstract: Continual incorporation of new knowledge is essential for the long-term evolution of large language models (LLMs). Existing approaches typically rely on parameter-update algorithms to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, yet they suffer from fundamental limitations: 1) forgetting is unavoidable as the amount of newly injected knowledge grows; and 2) model updates are often irreversible. As modern LLMs become increasingly expressive, it is natural to question whether large-scale weight updates are necessary for acquiring a small amount of new knowledge. In this work, we propose a principled framework that models autoregressive language generation as a Markov process over tokens, where model memory is represented by a Markov transition matrix. Under this formulation, incorporating new knowledge/tokens corresponds to extending the state space, and preserving existing transitions guarantees retention of previously learned knowledge. We then prove a sample complexity bound for incorporating new tokens via a token-to-dictionary mapping strategy. In particular, for learning the transition behavior of each new token, the required number of samples scales linearly with the number of existing tokens it is mapped to. To realize this mapping, we propose an embedding-tuning algorithm that requires minimal parameter updates and induces zero forgetting. Experimental results further demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and validate our theoretical findings.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM记忆建模为马尔可夫转移矩阵，通过token到字典映射实现零遗忘的知识扩展。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM持续学习方法依赖参数更新，存在遗忘不可避免和更新不可逆的固有限制，而现代LLM表达能力强，质疑大规模权重更新对于少量新知识的必要性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不遗忘已有知识的前提下，高效地将新知识/新token融入LLM。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将自回归语言生成建模为token上的马尔可夫过程，记忆由马尔可夫转移矩阵表示；新知识扩展对应状态空间扩展，通过token到字典映射策略实现，并设计嵌入微调算法实现零遗忘。
contributions: 提出将LLM记忆建模为马尔可夫转移矩阵的框架，将知识扩展转化为状态空间扩展。
证明token到字典映射策略的样本复杂度界限，所需样本数与映射到的已有token数线性相关。
提出嵌入微调算法，仅需最小参数更新且实现零遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 实验验证了方法的有效性和理论发现。
limitations: 可能仅适用于新token与已有token有明确映射关系的场景。
样本复杂度界限可能在实际大规模词汇表中仍较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将LLM记忆建模为马尔可夫转移矩阵，通过token到字典映射实现零遗忘的知识扩展。

papers.title: SWAN: Semantic Watermarking with Abstract Meaning Representation
papers.abstract: We introduce SWAN (Semantic Watermarking with Abstract Meaning Representation), a novel framework that embeds watermark signatures into the semantic structure of a sentence using Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR). In contrast to existing watermarking methods, which typically encode signatures by adjusting token selection preferences during text generation, SWAN embeds the signature directly in the sentence's semantic representation. As the signature is encoded at the semantic structure level, any paraphrase that preserves meaning automatically preserves the signature. SWAN is training-free: watermark injection is achieved by prompting an LLM to generate sentences guided by a selected AMR template while maintaining contextual coherence, and detection uses an off-the-shelf AMR parser followed by a simple one-proportion z-test. Empirical evaluation on the RealNews benchmark shows SWAN matches state-of-the-art detection performance on unaltered watermarked text, while significantly improving robustness against paraphrasing, increasing detection AUC by up to 13.9 percentage points compared to prior methods. These results demonstrate that SWAN's approach of anchoring watermarks in AMR semantic structures provides a simple, effective, and prompt-based method for robust text provenance verification under paraphrasing, opening new avenues for semantic-level watermarking research.

analysis.tldr: SWAN 利用抽象语义表示在句子语义结构中嵌入水印，显著提升对释义攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本水印方法通常通过调整 token 选择偏好来编码签名，但这类方法在文本被释义后容易失效，缺乏对语义层面篡改的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种文本水印方法，使其在保留语义的前提下对释义攻击具有强鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SWAN 框架：使用抽象语义表示（AMR）将水印签名嵌入句子的语义结构中；水印注入通过提示 LLM 生成符合选定 AMR 模板的句子实现，检测则使用现成的 AMR 解析器结合单比例 z 检验。
contributions: 提出基于 AMR 语义结构的水印嵌入方法，无需训练，仅需提示 LLM。
在 RealNews 基准上，SWAN 在未修改文本上达到 SOTA 检测性能，并在释义攻击下 AUC 提升高达 13.9 个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在 RealNews 基准上评估，SWAN 在未修改文本上检测性能与 SOTA 相当，在释义攻击下 AUC 提升高达 13.9 个百分点。
limitations: 依赖 AMR 解析器的准确性，可能影响检测性能。
仅针对英文文本，对其他语言的适用性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SWAN 利用抽象语义表示在句子语义结构中嵌入水印，显著提升对释义攻击的鲁棒性。

papers.title: LLMs Uncertainty Quantification via Adaptive Conformal Semantic Entropy
papers.abstract: LLMs' overconfidence, particularly when hallucinating, poses a significant challenge for the deployment of the models in safety-critical settings and makes a reliable estimation of uncertainty necessary. Existing approaches for uncertainty quantification typically prioritize lexical or probabilistic measures; however, these techniques often ignore the semantic variance of different responses with similar meaning. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Conformal Semantic Entropy (ACSE), a method for estimating prompt-level uncertainty by adaptively measuring semantic dispersion in LLMs outputs. Our uncertainty scoring function is based on clustering semantic entropy of multiple diverse responses to the same prompt. The function adaptively adjusts the uncertainty score based on semantic features of each cluster. To ensure statistical reliability of our score, we use conformal calibration to apply a decision rule to accept/abstain the prompts, providing a finite-sample, distribution-free guarantee such that the error rate among the accepted responses remains bounded by a user-specified tolerance. Our extensive experimental evaluations using different LLMs and datasets, demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art uncertainty quantification baselines using discriminative performance, conformal guarantees, and probabilistic calibration indicators. As a highlight, for TriviaQA dataset, AUROC of our approach is 0.88 compared to 0.65 produced by the token entropy approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应共形语义熵（ACSE）方法，通过聚类语义熵和共形校准实现LLM不确定性量化，在TriviaQA上AUROC达0.88。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在安全关键场景中常过度自信（如幻觉），现有不确定性量化方法多基于词法或概率度量，忽略了语义相似但表达不同的响应间的语义方差。
analysis.problem: 如何可靠地估计LLM在提示级别的不确定性，并保证统计可靠性（如有限样本、分布自由的误差控制）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自适应共形语义熵（ACSE），先对同一提示的多个响应进行语义聚类，基于每个聚类的语义特征自适应调整不确定性分数，再通过共形校准得到接受/弃权的决策规则，保证接受响应的错误率在用户指定容忍度内。
contributions: 提出ACSE方法，利用语义聚类和自适应调整实现提示级不确定性量化。
引入共形校准提供有限样本、分布自由的统计保证。
实验表明ACSE在判别性能、共形保证和概率校准上优于现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM和数据集上评估，与SOTA基线比较，使用判别性能、共形保证和概率校准指标。TriviaQA上AUROC为0.88，而token熵方法为0.65。
limitations: 可能依赖语义聚类的质量，对聚类算法敏感。
共形校准需要校准集，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应共形语义熵（ACSE）方法，通过聚类语义熵和共形校准实现LLM不确定性量化，在TriviaQA上AUROC达0.88。

papers.title: A Mean Curvature Approach to Boundary Detection: Geometric Insights for Unsupervised Learning
papers.abstract: Accurate boundary detection in high-dimensional data remains a central challenge in unsupervised learning, particularly in the presence of non-linear structures and heterogeneous densities. In this work, we introduce Mean Curvature Boundary Points (MCBP), a novel geometric framework grounded in Geometric Machine Learning that departs from traditional density-based approaches by explicitly modeling the intrinsic curvature of the data manifold. The method relies on a discrete approximation of the shape operator, estimated from local k-nearest neighbor patches, to compute pointwise mean curvature without requiring explicit manifold parametrization. The key insight of MCBP is to use mean curvature as a principled descriptor of boundary structure: high-curvature regions naturally correspond to transitions between clusters, geometric irregularities, and low-density interfaces. This yields a unified geometric interpretation of boundary, outlier, and transition points. We further introduce an adaptive percentile-based thresholding scheme that enables multiscale boundary extraction without relying on ad hoc density parameters. Beyond detection, we propose a curvature-driven data decomposition that separates samples into smooth (low-curvature) and boundary (high-curvature) subsets, effectively acting as a non-linear geometric filtering mechanism. This representation enhances cluster separability and improves the robustness of downstream unsupervised algorithms. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that MCBP consistently improves clustering performance, particularly in complex and high-dimensional scenarios. These results position MCBP as a concrete contribution to Geometric Machine Learning, highlighting the potential of curvature-aware analysis as a unifying paradigm bridging differential geometry and data-driven modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于平均曲率的无监督边界检测方法，利用流形曲率统一识别聚类边界、异常点和过渡区域。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维数据中边界检测在无监督学习中面临非线性结构和异质密度的挑战，传统密度方法难以处理复杂几何结构。
analysis.problem: 如何利用数据流形的内在曲率进行无监督边界检测，而不依赖显式流形参数化或密度假设。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高曲率区域自然对应聚类间过渡、几何不规则和低密度界面，曲率可作为边界、异常点和过渡点的统一几何描述符。
analysis.method: 基于局部k近邻块离散近似形状算子，计算逐点平均曲率；采用自适应百分位阈值实现多尺度边界提取；提出曲率驱动数据分解，将样本分为平滑和边界子集。
contributions: 提出MCBP框架，将平均曲率作为边界结构的原理性描述符，统一解释边界、异常和过渡点。
引入自适应百分位阈值方案，无需人工密度参数即可实现多尺度边界提取。
提出曲率驱动数据分解，增强聚类可分离性并提升下游无监督算法的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上进行了广泛实验，表明MCBP在复杂和高维场景下持续提升聚类性能。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖k近邻图，对邻域大小敏感。
高维数据中曲率估计可能受噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于平均曲率的无监督边界检测方法，利用流形曲率统一识别聚类边界、异常点和过渡区域。

papers.title: Layerwise LQR for Geometry-Aware Optimization of Deep Networks
papers.abstract: Geometry-aware optimizers such as Newton and natural gradient can improve conditioning in deep learning, but scalable variants such as K-FAC, Shampoo, and related preconditioners usually impose structural approximations early, often discarding cross-layer interactions induced by the network computation. We introduce Layerwise LQR (LLQR), a framework for learning structured inverse preconditioners under a global layerwise optimal-control objective. The starting point is an exact equivalence: the steepest-descent step under a broad class of divergence-induced quadratic models--including Newton, Gauss-Newton, Fisher/natural-gradient, and intermediate-layer metrics--can be written as a finite-horizon Linear Quadratic Regulator (LQR) problem. This formulation serves as a reference that exposes the layerwise dynamics and cost matrices encoding the original dense geometry. We then derive a scalable relaxation that learns diagonal, (E-)Kronecker-factored, or other structured inverse preconditioners by minimizing the LQR objective and reusing them across iterations. The resulting optimizer wraps standard methods while retaining a principled connection to second-order geometry, without forming or inverting the global curvature matrix. Experiments on ResNets and Transformers show that LLQR improves optimization dynamics and often translates these gains into improved final test performance, while adding only modest wall-clock overhead. It establishes LLQR as a practical framework for geometry-aware second-order methods and a reference for evaluating scalable approximations.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Layerwise LQR 框架，将二阶优化方法等价为有限时域 LQR 问题，并学习结构化逆预条件子以提升深度网络优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 几何感知优化器（如牛顿法、自然梯度）可改善深度网络的条件数，但可扩展变体（如 K-FAC、Shampoo）通常过早施加结构近似，丢弃了网络计算中的跨层交互，导致性能损失。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持全局几何信息的同时，设计可扩展的结构化逆预条件子，以提升深度网络优化效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将广泛类别的散度诱导二次模型（包括牛顿、高斯-牛顿、Fisher/自然梯度等）的梯度下降步长等价为有限时域线性二次型调节器（LQR）问题，然后通过最小化 LQR 目标学习对角、Kronecker 因子化等结构化逆预条件子，并在迭代中复用。
contributions: 建立了二阶优化方法与有限时域 LQR 问题之间的精确等价关系，揭示了层间动态和代价矩阵。
提出可扩展的 LLQR 框架，学习结构化逆预条件子，保留与二阶几何的原理性连接，无需形成或求逆全局曲率矩阵。
analysis.experiments: 在 ResNet 和 Transformer 上的实验表明，LLQR 改善了优化动态，并常转化为更好的最终测试性能，同时仅增加适度的墙钟开销。
limitations: 可能对非常深的网络或极端大规模场景仍需进一步验证可扩展性。
结构化近似可能仍会丢失部分跨层交互信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Layerwise LQR 框架，将二阶优化方法等价为有限时域 LQR 问题，并学习结构化逆预条件子以提升深度网络优化。

papers.title: ARMATA: Auto-Regressive Multi-Agent Task Assignment
papers.abstract: Coordinating multi-agent systems over spatially distributed areas requires solving a complex hierarchical problem: first distributing areas among agents (allocation) and subsequently determining the optimal visitation order (routing). Existing methods typically decouple these stages ignoring inter-stage dependencies or rely on decentralized heuristics that lack global context. In this work, we propose a centralized, fully end-to-end auto-regressive framework that jointly generates allocation decisions and routing sequences. The core contribution of our approach is a multi-stage decoding mechanism that unifies high-level allocation and low-level routing in a single autoregressive pass while maintaining a centralized global state. This enables the model to implicitly balance workload distribution with routing efficiency, avoiding local optima common in decentralized methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms diverse baselines, achieving up to a 20\% improvement in solution quality over industrial solvers such as Google OR-Tools, IBM CPLEX, and LKH-3, while reducing computation time from hours to seconds.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端自回归框架ARMATA，统一解决多智能体任务分配与路径规划问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统在空间分布区域协调时，需要先分配区域再规划路径，现有方法要么解耦两阶段忽略依赖，要么依赖缺乏全局信息的分散式启发式方法，导致次优解。
analysis.problem: 如何联合优化多智能体的区域分配与访问顺序，避免解耦带来的次优性并保持全局协调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出集中式端到端自回归框架ARMATA，采用多阶段解码机制，在单次自回归过程中统一生成高层分配决策和低层路径序列，同时维护集中式全局状态。
contributions: 首次提出端到端自回归框架联合解决多智能体任务分配与路径规划。
多阶段解码机制统一高层分配与低层路由，隐式平衡负载与效率。
analysis.experiments: 在多种基准上显著优于Google OR-Tools、IBM CPLEX、LKH-3等工业求解器，解质量提升最高20%，计算时间从小时级降至秒级。
limitations: 可能对大规模智能体或动态环境扩展性有限。
依赖集中式全局状态，通信开销可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出端到端自回归框架ARMATA，统一解决多智能体任务分配与路径规划问题。

papers.title: Self-Prompting Small Language Models for Privacy-Sensitive Clinical Information Extraction
papers.abstract: Clinical named entity recognition from dental progress notes is challenging because documentation is highly unstructured, domain-specific, and often privacy-sensitive. We developed a locally deployable framework that enables small language models to self-generate, verify, refine, and evaluate entity-specific prompts for extracting multiple clinical entities from dental notes. Using 1,200 annotated notes, we evaluated candidate open-weight models with multi-prompt ensemble inference and further adapted selected models using QLoRA-based supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization. Model performance varied substantially, highlighting the need for task-specific evaluation rather than reliance on generic benchmarks. Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct achieved the strongest baseline performance. After DPO, Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct achieved micro/macro F1 scores of 0.864/0.837 and 0.806/0.797, respectively. These findings suggest that automated prompt optimization combined with lightweight preference-based post-training can support scalable clinical information extraction using locally deployed small language models.

analysis.tldr: 提出自提示框架，让小语言模型通过自生成、验证、优化提示，结合QLoRA微调和DPO，在隐私敏感的牙科临床信息抽取中取得高F1分数。
analysis.research_motivation: 牙科临床记录高度非结构化、领域特定且隐私敏感，现有方法依赖通用基准或大模型，难以在本地部署且性能不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何利用本地可部署的小语言模型，从隐私敏感的牙科进展笔记中准确抽取多种临床实体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同模型性能差异显著，表明需要任务特定评估而非依赖通用基准。
analysis.method: 自提示框架：小语言模型自生成、验证、优化实体特定提示，结合多提示集成推理，并使用QLoRA监督微调和直接偏好优化进行后训练。
contributions: 提出一种自提示框架，使小语言模型能自动优化提示用于临床信息抽取。
在牙科进展笔记数据集上验证了多提示集成和偏好优化的有效性，Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct达到0.864/0.837的微/宏F1。
analysis.experiments: 使用1200条标注的牙科进展笔记，评估多个开源模型，并采用QLoRA SFT和DPO后训练。
limitations: 仅针对牙科领域，泛化性未验证。
依赖人工标注数据，扩展成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自提示框架，让小语言模型通过自生成、验证、优化提示，结合QLoRA微调和DPO，在隐私敏感的牙科临床信息抽取中取得高F1分数。

papers.title: Predict-then-Diffuse: Adaptive Response Length for Compute-Budgeted Inference in Diffusion LLMs
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based Large Language Models (D-LLMs) represent a promising frontier in generative AI, offering fully parallel token generation that can lead to significant throughput advantages and superior GPU utilization over traditional autoregressive paradigm. However, this parallelism is constrained by the requirement of a fixed-size response length prior to generation. This architectural limitation imposes a severe trade-off: oversized response length results in computational waste on semantically meaningless padding tokens, while undersized response length cause output truncation requiring costly re-computations that introduce unpredictable latency spikes. To tackle this issue, we propose Predict-then-Diffuse, a simple and model-agnostic framework, that enables compute-budgeted inference per input query by first estimating the response length and then using it to run inference with D-LLM. At its core lies a Adaptive Response Length Predictor (AdaRLP) auxiliary predictor that predicts the optimal response length given an input query. As a measure against under-predicting the response length and re-running inference with a higher response length, we introduce a data-driven safety mechanism, which trades a negligible padding overhead. As a whole, our framework limits the significant waste of computation on padding tokens and preserves output quality. Experimental validation on multiple datasets demonstrate that Predict-then-Diffuse significantly reduces computational costs (FLOP) compared to the default D-LLM inference mechanism and baselines based on heuristics, while being robust to skewed data distributions.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Predict-then-Diffuse 框架，通过预测响应长度实现扩散 LLM 的计算预算推理，减少填充令牌浪费。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散 LLM 需要固定响应长度，导致计算浪费或输出截断，现有方法无法自适应调整长度。
analysis.problem: 扩散 LLM 推理中固定响应长度带来的计算效率与输出质量权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Predict-then-Diffuse 框架，包含自适应响应长度预测器 (AdaRLP) 和数据驱动的安全机制。
contributions: 提出模型无关的框架，通过预测响应长度实现计算预算推理。
引入数据驱动的安全机制，防止欠预测导致的重计算。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上验证，显著降低 FLOP 计算成本，且对偏斜数据分布鲁棒。
limitations: 预测器可能引入额外开销。
安全机制仍可能引入少量填充开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Predict-then-Diffuse 框架，通过预测响应长度实现扩散 LLM 的计算预算推理，减少填充令牌浪费。

papers.title: Undetectable Backdoors in Model Parameters: Hiding Sparse Secrets in High Dimensions
papers.abstract: We present Sparse Backdoor, a supply-chain attack that plants a \emph{provably undetectable} backdoor in pre-trained image classifiers, including convolutional networks and Vision Transformers. The attack injects a structured sparse perturbation along a randomly chosen direction into a small subset of columns at each fully connected layer, propagating a trigger signal to an adversary-chosen target class, and masks the perturbation with an independent isotropic Gaussian dither. The dither serves a single technical purpose: it induces a clean reference distribution anchored at the pre-trained weights, against which undetectability can be formalized. Under a mild margin condition on the pre-trained classifier, we show that the dithered reference is functionally equivalent to the original classifier. We prove that distinguishing the backdoor-injected model from this reference is at least as hard as Sparse PCA detection, which is computationally infeasible under standard hardness assumptions. The guarantee holds against any probabilistic polynomial-time distinguisher with white-box access to the parameters.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在预训练图像分类器参数中植入计算不可区分后门的攻击方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有后门攻击通常可被检测，缺乏理论上的不可检测性保证，供应链安全面临威胁。
analysis.problem: 如何在模型参数中植入后门，使得任何概率多项式时间区分器都无法将其与干净参考分布区分开。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在预训练分类器的全连接层中沿随机方向注入结构化稀疏扰动，并用独立各向同性高斯抖动掩盖，使抖动后的参考分布与原始分类器功能等价，且区分后门模型与参考分布至少与稀疏PCA检测一样困难。
contributions: 提出一种可证明不可检测的后门攻击方法，基于稀疏PCA的困难性假设。
证明了抖动参考分布与原始分类器功能等价，并给出了理论保证。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 攻击仅针对全连接层，可能不适用于其他层类型。
依赖预训练分类器的边际条件，可能限制适用范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在预训练图像分类器参数中植入计算不可区分后门的攻击方法。

papers.title: Deep Wave Network for Modeling Multi-Scale Physical Dynamics
papers.abstract: Performance of deep learning models is strongly governed by architectural capacity, with width and depth as primary controls. However, in physical-science applications, models are often compared at a single fixed size or by separating accuracy and computational cost, which can be misleading since architectures exhibit different accuracy-cost scaling as width and depth vary. This issue is particularly relevant for U-Net-type encoder-decoder models, widely used for multi-scale gas, fluid, and plasma dynamics due to their ability to represent features across spatial scales. A U-Net constructs a multi-resolution representation via an encoder that progressively reduces spatial resolution, followed by a decoder that restores it for prediction. Skip connections link corresponding encoder and decoder features, preserving fine-scale information and improving optimization. In practice, U-Net width is routinely tuned, while depth is typically kept fixed (a set number of down/up-sampling stages with few convolutions per stage), limiting systematic exploration of depth for improving the accuracy-cost trade-off. We address this limitation by increasing effective depth through stacking multiple encoder-decoder "waves" in series, with skip connections both within and across waves to enable progressive cross-scale refinement. We call this architecture a Deep Wave Network (DW-Net). Training data, optimization, and schedules are kept identical across models. Instead of evaluating single configurations, we train multiple width variants of each architecture and compare accuracy vs. GPU time Pareto fronts. Across several 2D and 3D flow benchmarks, DW-Net models consistently improve the Pareto frontier over single-wave U-Nets, achieving higher accuracy at matched cost or similar accuracy at reduced cost, and reaching low-error regimes with up to 3x less training time under identical training settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出Deep Wave Network (DW-Net)，通过堆叠多个编码器-解码器波并引入跨波跳跃连接，在物理动力学建模中实现更优的精度-计算成本帕累托前沿。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理科学应用中，深度学习模型常以固定大小或分离精度与计算成本进行比较，这具有误导性，因为不同架构在宽度和深度变化时表现出不同的精度-成本缩放关系。U-Net虽广泛用于多尺度物理动力学，但其深度通常固定，限制了精度-成本权衡的系统探索。
analysis.problem: 现有U-Net模型在物理动力学建模中，深度固定导致无法有效探索精度-计算成本的最佳权衡，需要一种能系统增加有效深度并改善缩放特性的架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Deep Wave Network (DW-Net)，通过串联堆叠多个编码器-解码器“波”，并在波内和波间引入跳跃连接，实现渐进式跨尺度细化，从而增加有效深度。
contributions: 提出DW-Net架构，通过堆叠多个编码器-解码器波并引入跨波跳跃连接，有效增加深度并改善多尺度物理动力学建模。
在多个2D和3D流动基准上，DW-Net在精度-计算成本帕累托前沿上一致优于单波U-Net，在相同成本下达到更高精度或相同精度下减少训练时间（最多3倍）。
analysis.experiments: 在多个2D和3D流动基准上，训练多个宽度变体，比较精度与GPU时间的帕累托前沿。DW-Net模型一致改善帕累托前沿，在相同成本下达到更高精度，或在相同精度下减少训练时间，在低误差区域训练时间最多减少3倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有多尺度特征的物理动力学问题，通用性有待验证。
堆叠多个波可能增加模型复杂度和训练难度，需要更多调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Deep Wave Network (DW-Net)，通过堆叠多个编码器-解码器波并引入跨波跳跃连接，在物理动力学建模中实现更优的精度-计算成本帕累托前沿。

papers.title: MedFabric and EtHER: A Data-Centric Framework for Word-Level Fabrication Generation and Detection in Medical LLMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models exhibit strong reasoning and semantic understanding capabilities but often hallucinate in domains that require expert knowledge, among which fabrications, the generation of factually incorrect yet fluent statements, pose the greatest risk in medical contexts. Existing medical hallucination datasets inadequately capture fabrication phenomena due to limited fabrication coverage, stylistic disparities between human and LLM-authored texts, and distributional drift during hallucinated sample synthesis. To address this, we propose a data-centric pipeline to generate realistic and word-level fabrications that preserve syntactic and stylistic fidelity while introducing subtle factual deviations, resulting in MedFabric. Building upon this dataset, we introduce ETHER, a modular word-level fabrication detector integrating Text2Table Decomposition, Word Masking and Filling and Hybrid Sentence Pair Evaluation to enhance factual alignment. Empirical results demonstrate that MedFabric outperforms state-of-the-art detectors by over 15% on word-level fabrication benchmarks while maintaining consistent performance across structural similarities, offering a comprehensive framework for reliable and domain-specific factuality detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出数据驱动的医学LLM幻觉检测框架，通过合成高保真词级虚构数据并设计模块化检测器，在词级虚构基准上超越SOTA超15%。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学领域LLM的虚构（fabrication）现象风险极高，但现有医疗幻觉数据集因虚构覆盖有限、文本风格差异和分布漂移等问题，无法有效捕捉真实虚构。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高保真、词级、保持句法和风格一致性的医学虚构数据，并设计能精确检测词级虚构的检测器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 数据驱动流水线：1) 生成MedFabric数据集，通过保持句法和风格一致性引入细微事实偏差；2) 构建ETHER检测器，包含Text2Table分解、词掩码填充和混合句对评估三个模块。
contributions: 提出MedFabric数据集，用于生成高保真词级医学虚构。
提出ETHER检测器，在词级虚构基准上超越SOTA超15%。
analysis.experiments: 在词级虚构基准上，MedFabric+ETHER相比SOTA检测器提升超15%，且在结构相似性上保持一致性。
limitations: 可能仅针对医学领域，泛化性未验证。
依赖合成数据，真实场景虚构分布可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出数据驱动的医学LLM幻觉检测框架，通过合成高保真词级虚构数据并设计模块化检测器，在词级虚构基准上超越SOTA超15%。

papers.title: Frontier Lag: A Bibliometric Audit of Capability Misrepresentation in Academic AI Evaluation
papers.abstract: Readers of applied-domain LLM capability evaluations want to know what AI systems can currently do. That literature answers a related, but consequentially different, question: what older, cheaper, less-elicited models could do months or years earlier (a 2026 paper evaluating GPT-4o-mini zero-shot, say, against a frontier of reasoning-capable, tool-using systems like GPT-5.5 Pro and Claude Opus 4.7), often reported with sparse configuration details and abstracted upward into claims about "AI" that propagate through citations, media, and policy. We measure the 'publication elicitation gap' (the gap between these answers) in a pre-registered audit of 112,303 LLM-keyword-matched candidate records (2022-01 to 2026-04; 18,574 admissible, 4,766 full-paper texts retrievable), comparing tested models to the contemporaneous frontier on the Epoch AI Capabilities Index (ECI), reproduced under Arena Elo and Artificial Analysis. The median paper evaluates a model +10.85 ECI (~1.4x the distance between Claude Sonnet 3.7 and Claude Opus 4.5) behind the contemporaneous frontier at evaluation time (H1); an exploratory rational-lag baseline (H8) decomposes this into ~25% peer-review latency, ~75% excess lag. The gap is widening at +5.53 ECI/year (H2; 95% CI [+5.03, +5.83]). Meanwhile, only 3.2% of abstracts (21.2% of full-texts) disclose reasoning-mode status on reasoning-capable models (H4) and 52.5% (95% CI [48.2, 56.9]) state conclusions at the level of "AI" rather than the evaluated model(s), rising at OR = 1.23/year. Proposed remedies include API-access subsidies and editorial enforcement of reporting frameworks mandating configuration-surface disclosure (model snapshot, reasoning mode/effort, tool access, scaffolding, prompting, etc.); VERSIO-AI is a 13-item checklist (Core 3 desk-reject) extending existing frameworks at the elicitation surface, with per-DOI analysis at this http URL .

analysis.tldr: 学术AI评估中测试模型远落后于前沿，且结论常被抽象为“AI”能力，导致能力误报。
analysis.research_motivation: 应用领域的LLM能力评估旨在回答“AI系统当前能做什么”，但实际文献评估的是过时、廉价、未充分调用的模型，导致结论与真实前沿能力存在系统性偏差，影响政策、媒体和引用传播。
analysis.problem: 量化并解释学术AI评估中测试模型与同时期前沿模型之间的能力差距（publication elicitation gap），并评估结论抽象化程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过审计112,303篇论文发现：中位论文评估的模型落后前沿10.85 ECI（约1.4倍Claude Sonnet 3.7到Claude Opus 4.5的距离），且差距以每年5.53 ECI扩大；仅3.2%摘要披露推理模式状态，52.5%结论抽象为“AI”而非具体模型。
analysis.method: 预注册审计：从112,303篇LLM关键词匹配候选记录中筛选出18,574篇可接受、4,766篇可获取全文，比较测试模型与Epoch AI能力指数（ECI）上的同时期前沿，并辅以Arena Elo和Artificial Analysis复现；提出VERSIO-AI检查清单（13项，核心3项为desk-reject）以规范配置表面披露。
contributions: 首次大规模量化学术LLM评估中的“发表诱发差距”，发现中位论文落后前沿10.85 ECI且差距逐年扩大。
揭示结论抽象化问题：52.5%摘要将结果归因于“AI”而非具体模型，且比例逐年上升。
提出VERSIO-AI检查清单，要求披露模型快照、推理模式/努力、工具访问、脚手架、提示等配置信息。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了审计流程：112,303篇候选记录，18,574篇可接受，4,766篇可获取全文，使用ECI、Arena Elo和Artificial Analysis作为前沿指标。
limitations: 审计仅覆盖2022-01至2026-04的论文，可能不反映更早或更晚的趋势。
ECI等前沿指标本身可能存在偏差或更新延迟。
VERSIO-AI清单的有效性需进一步实证验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 学术AI评估中测试模型远落后于前沿，且结论常被抽象为“AI”能力，导致能力误报。

papers.title: A Dialogue-Based Framework for Correcting Multimodal Errors in AI-Assisted STEM Education
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are democratizing access to personalized tutoring; however, their effectiveness is hindered by challenges in processing multimodal content, which limits AI's potential to provide equitable, high-quality STEM support. This study evaluates LLM performance on multimodal physics problems, identifies specific failure modes through an empirical error taxonomy, and tests practical interventions designed to overcome multimodal processing limitations. We assessed three publicly available LLMs (Claude, Gemini, and ChatGPT) on multimodal physics problems from the OpenStax database and compared the results with text-only performance. An empirically derived error taxonomy was developed through pilot testing, followed by evaluation of a structured multimodal dialogue intervention. All three models achieved near-ceiling accuracy (96%) on text-only physics problems. Performance declined substantially on multimodal problems, consistent with what we term the Multimodal Interference Effect. Error analysis identified four failure modes: visual processing errors, context misinterpretation, mathematical computational errors, and hybrid errors, with visual processing errors being the most prevalent. The structured dialogue intervention corrected 82% of errors overall; visual processing errors were corrected at 100% across all models. Educators and students can implement these interventions immediately, requiring no model retraining, to improve AI tutoring reliability on image-rich STEM content, advancing equitable access to high-quality learning support.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化对话框架纠正AI辅助STEM教育中的多模态错误，无需重训模型即可提升可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在个性化辅导中处理多模态内容存在困难，限制了AI提供公平、高质量STEM支持的潜力。
analysis.problem: LLM在多模态物理问题中性能下降，存在特定失败模式，需要有效干预来纠正错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在纯文本问题上接近天花板（96%），但在多模态问题上性能显著下降，称为多模态干扰效应。错误分析识别出四种失败模式：视觉处理错误、上下文误解、数学计算错误和混合错误，其中视觉处理错误最常见。
analysis.method: 基于经验错误分类法，设计结构化多模态对话干预框架，通过对话引导模型逐步处理图像和文本信息。
contributions: 实证评估了三个公开LLM在多模态物理问题上的性能，并识别了具体失败模式。
提出了结构化对话干预框架，无需模型重训即可纠正82%的错误，其中视觉处理错误纠正率达100%。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenStax数据库的多模态物理问题上评估了Claude、Gemini和ChatGPT，并与纯文本性能对比。摘要未提供具体实验细节如数据集大小、统计显著性等。
limitations: 仅评估了三个模型，可能不适用于其他LLM。
干预框架在更复杂或开放域多模态问题上的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化对话框架纠正AI辅助STEM教育中的多模态错误，无需重训模型即可提升可靠性。

papers.title: ProtDBench: A Unified Benchmark of Protein Binder Design and Evaluation
