papers.abstract: Recent advances in de novo protein binder design have enabled increasing experimental validation, yet reported in silico metrics remain difficult to interpret or compare across studies due to non-standardized evaluation protocols. We introduce ProtDBench, a standardized and throughput-aware evaluation framework for protein binder design. ProtDBench defines unified benchmark tasks, evaluation protocols, and success criteria, enabling systematic analysis of how evaluation design influences observed performance. Using a large wet-lab annotated dataset, we analyze commonly used structure prediction models as evaluation verifiers, revealing substantial verifier-dependent bias and limited agreement under identical filtering protocols. We then benchmark representative open-source generative binder design methods across ten diverse protein targets under a fixed evaluation protocol. Beyond per-sequence success rates, ProtDBench incorporates throughput-aware metrics based on a fixed 24-hour budget, as well as cluster-level success criteria to account for structural diversity. Together, these results expose systematic differences induced by filtering rules, success definitions, and throughput-aware evaluation between computational efficiency, success rate, and structural diversity. Overall, ProtDBench provides a fair and reproducible evaluation pipeline that supports systematic and controlled comparison of protein binder design methods under realistic evaluation settings.

analysis.tldr: ProtDBench 为蛋白质结合剂设计提供了标准化、吞吐量感知的统一评测框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 蛋白质结合剂设计领域缺乏标准化评测协议，导致不同研究的 in silico 指标难以比较和解释。
analysis.problem: 现有评测协议不统一，评估设计（如过滤规则、成功率定义）对观测性能的影响未被系统分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出常用的结构预测模型作为评估验证器时存在显著的验证器依赖偏差，且在相同过滤协议下一致性有限。
analysis.method: 提出 ProtDBench，包含统一基准任务、评测协议和成功标准，并引入吞吐量感知指标（基于固定24小时预算）和聚类级成功标准。
contributions: 构建了标准化、吞吐量感知的蛋白质结合剂设计评测框架。
系统分析了评估设计（过滤规则、成功率定义、吞吐量）对性能比较的影响，揭示了计算效率、成功率和结构多样性之间的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 使用大规模湿实验标注数据集，分析结构预测模型作为验证器的偏差；在十个不同蛋白质靶标上评测代表性开源生成式结合剂设计方法。
limitations: 仅关注开源方法，未涵盖商业或闭源方法。
吞吐量预算固定为24小时，可能不适用于不同计算资源场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProtDBench 为蛋白质结合剂设计提供了标准化、吞吐量感知的统一评测框架。

papers.title: Learning reveals invisible structure in low-rank RNNs
papers.abstract: Learning in neural systems arises from synaptic changes that reshape the representations underlying behavior. While low-rank recurrent neural networks (RNNs) have emerged as a powerful framework for linking connectivity to function, a theoretical understanding of their learning process remains elusive. Here, we extend the low-rank framework from activity to learning by deriving gradient-descent dynamics directly in a reduced overlap space. We formulate a closed-form, low-dimensional system of ODEs that governs learning in this space, exact for linear RNNs and asymptotically exact for nonlinear RNNs in the large-$N$ Gaussian limit. Central to our analysis is a distinction between two classes of overlaps: loss-visible overlaps, which fully determine network activity, output, and loss, and loss-invisible overlaps, which do not affect function but are required to describe learning. We illustrate the consequences of this decomposition through two phenomena. First, we show that learning can serve as a perturbation that exposes differences in connectivity between functionally equivalent networks. Second, we show that loss-invisible overlaps can act as memory variables that encode training history, and characterize the conditions under which this occurs. Finally, we present several testable predictions for biological learning experiments derived from our theory.

analysis.tldr: 将低秩RNN的学习动力学简化为低维ODE，揭示损失不可见重叠在训练中的记忆作用。
analysis.research_motivation: 低秩RNN是连接神经连接性与功能的强大框架，但其学习过程的理论理解仍然缺乏，现有方法难以解析学习中的隐藏结构。
analysis.problem: 如何从理论上解析低秩RNN的学习动力学，特别是区分损失可见与不可见的连接重叠及其作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要区分了两类重叠：损失可见重叠完全决定网络活动、输出和损失；损失不可见重叠不影响功能但描述学习过程，可编码训练历史。
analysis.method: 从活动空间扩展到学习空间，在约化重叠空间中推导梯度下降动力学，得到封闭的低维ODE系统，对线性RNN精确，对非线性RNN在大N高斯极限下渐近精确。
contributions: 建立了低秩RNN学习动力学的封闭低维ODE理论，精确或渐近精确描述学习过程。
揭示了损失不可见重叠作为记忆变量编码训练历史的现象，并给出其发生条件。
提出学习可作为扰动暴露功能等价网络间连接差异的机制。
从理论推导出可检验的生物学学习实验预测。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论主要针对线性RNN和渐近极限，非线性有限网络下的适用性需进一步验证。
生物学预测的可检验性依赖于实验设计，可能受限于实际神经数据的可观测性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将低秩RNN的学习动力学简化为低维ODE，揭示损失不可见重叠在训练中的记忆作用。

papers.title: Resource Utilization of Differentiable Logic Gate Networks Deployed on FPGAs
papers.abstract: On-edge machine learning (ML) often strives to maximize the intelligence of small models while miniaturizing the circuit size and power needed to perform inference. Meeting these needs, differentiable Logic Gate Networks (LGN) have demonstrated nanosecond-scale prediction speeds while reducing the required resources as compares to traditional binary neural networks. Despite these benefits, the trade-offs between LGN parameters and resulting hardware synthesis characteristics are not well characterized. This paper therefore studies the tradeoffs between power, resource utilization, inference speed, and model accuracy when varying the depth and width of LGNs synthesized for Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGA). Results reveal that the final layer of an LGN is critical to minimize timing and resource usage (i.e. 28\% decrease), as this layer dictates the logic size of summing operations. Subject to timing and routing constraints, deeper and wider LGNs can be synthesized for FPGA when the final layer is narrow. Further tradeoffs are presented to help ML engineers select baseline LGN architectures for FPGAs with a set number of Look Up Tables (LUT).

analysis.tldr: 研究可微分逻辑门网络在FPGA上部署时资源利用与精度的权衡，发现最终层宽度是关键瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 边缘机器学习追求小模型高智能，同时最小化推理电路尺寸和功耗。可微分逻辑门网络（LGN）相比传统二值神经网络在资源消耗和速度上有优势，但其参数与硬件综合特性之间的权衡尚未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 系统研究LGN的深度和宽度变化对FPGA上功耗、资源利用率、推理速度和模型精度之间的权衡关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最终层是LGN时序和资源使用的关键，因为该层决定了求和操作的逻辑大小；在满足时序和布线约束下，当最终层较窄时，更深更宽的LGN可以成功综合到FPGA上。
analysis.method: 通过改变LGN的深度和宽度，在FPGA上综合并测量功耗、资源利用率、推理速度和精度，分析最终层宽度的影响。
contributions: 揭示了LGN最终层对FPGA资源利用和时序的关键影响，窄最终层可减少28%资源。
提供了LGN架构选择指南，帮助ML工程师根据FPGA的LUT数量选择基线LGN架构。
analysis.experiments: 在FPGA上对不同深度和宽度的LGN进行综合，测量功耗、资源利用率、推理速度和精度，并给出量化结果（如28%资源减少）。
limitations: 仅针对FPGA平台，结论可能不适用于ASIC或其他硬件。
未涉及不同数据集或任务对权衡的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究可微分逻辑门网络在FPGA上部署时资源利用与精度的权衡，发现最终层宽度是关键瓶颈。

papers.title: TSCG: Deterministic Tool-Schema Compilation for Agentic LLM Deployments
papers.abstract: Production agent frameworks (OpenAI Function Calling, Anthropic Tool Use, MCP) transmit tool schemas as JSON, a format designed for machine parsing, not for interpretation by language models. For small models (4B-14B), this protocol mismatch accounts for the majority of tool-use failure at production catalog sizes. We present TSCG, a deterministic tool-schema compiler that resolves this mismatch at the API boundary, converting JSON schemas into token-efficient structured text without model access, fine-tuning, or runtime search. TSCG combines eight composable operators with a formal compression bound (>=51% on well-formed schemas). On TSCG-Agentic-Bench (about 19,000 calls, 12 models, 5 scenarios), TSCG restores Phi-4 14B from 0% to 84.4% accuracy at 20 tools (90.3% at 50 tools) and achieves 108-181% accuracy-retained ratio across three models on BFCL. Format-versus-compression decomposition (R^2=0.88 -> 0.03) establishes representation change as the dominant mechanism. Per-operator isolation across three frontier models reveals three distinct operator-response profiles: operator-hungry (Opus 4.7), operator-sensitive (GPT-5.2), and operator-robust (Sonnet 4), providing per-model deployment guidance. Scaling experiments show accuracy advantages persisting on heavy production MCP schemas (+5.0 pp at about 10,500 input tokens) despite saturation on light synthetic catalogs, with 52-57% token savings throughout. The synthetic benchmark generalizes to real MCP schemas within 0.1 accuracy points. TSCG ships as a 1,200-line zero-dependency TypeScript package.

analysis.tldr: TSCG 通过确定性工具模式编译，将 JSON 模式转换为 token 高效的结构化文本，显著提升小模型在工具调用中的准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代理框架将工具模式作为 JSON 传输，但 JSON 是为机器解析而非语言模型理解设计的，导致小模型（4B-14B）在生产规模下工具调用失败的主要原因是协议不匹配。
analysis.problem: 解决 JSON 模式与语言模型解释之间的协议不匹配问题，提升小模型在工具调用中的准确性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过格式与压缩分解（R²从0.88降至0.03）表明表示变化是主导机制；不同模型对操作符有不同响应模式（operator-hungry、operator-sensitive、operator-robust）。
analysis.method: TSCG 是一个确定性工具模式编译器，在 API 边界处将 JSON 模式转换为 token 高效的结构化文本，无需模型访问、微调或运行时搜索，结合八个可组合操作符和形式化压缩界限（≥51%）。
contributions: 提出 TSCG，一种确定性工具模式编译器，解决 JSON 与语言模型之间的协议不匹配问题。
在 TSCG-Agentic-Bench 上，Phi-4 14B 在20个工具时准确率从0%提升至84.4%，在50个工具时达90.3%。
通过格式与压缩分解揭示表示变化是主要机制，并识别三种模型操作符响应模式。
analysis.experiments: 在 TSCG-Agentic-Bench（约19,000次调用，12个模型，5个场景）和 BFCL 上评估，显示准确率显著提升和 token 节省（52-57%），合成基准泛化到真实 MCP 模式（精度差0.1）。
limitations: 主要针对小模型（4B-14B），大模型效果可能不同。
需要预定义操作符组合，可能不适用于所有工具模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TSCG 通过确定性工具模式编译，将 JSON 模式转换为 token 高效的结构化文本，显著提升小模型在工具调用中的准确率。

papers.title: Meta-LegNet: A Transferable and Interpretable Framework for Surface Adsorption Prediction via Self-Defined Adsorption-Environment Learning
papers.abstract: A central challenge in computational catalysis is the identification of low-energy and chemically plausible adsorption configurations, as these directly affect adsorption energies, reaction pathways, and catalytic performance. Existing approaches generally rely on enumerating candidate adsorption sites followed by iterative refinement through density functional theory calculations or machine-learning-based relaxations. However, such workflows remain computationally expensive and are difficult to scale to complex surfaces or multi-adsorbate systems. Here, we introduce Meta-LegNet, a graph learning framework that combines SE(3)-equivariant atom-level message passing with voxel-based multiscale aggregation and cross-domain meta-learning to learn transferable representations of local adsorption environments across diverse catalyst--adsorbate systems. Rather than following a conventional regression-only paradigm, Meta-LegNet encodes local chemical environments using invariant radial features and equivariant directional information, and further incorporates broader structural context through coordinate-frame voxel pooling, assignment-based upsampling, and gated feature fusion. The resulting local-global decomposition produces atom-resolved attribution maps, which are processed to identify adsorption-relevant local environments in an interpretable manner. Based on the learned representations, we further construct an adsorption-environment database and develop a template-matching strategy to propose likely adsorption sites on previously unexplored surfaces without exhaustive site enumeration. Overall, our results suggest that learning transferable adsorption environments provides an accurate, interpretable, and practical route for accelerating catalyst screening.

analysis.tldr: 提出Meta-LegNet框架，通过自定义吸附环境学习实现可迁移、可解释的表面吸附预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算催化中识别低能吸附构型对吸附能、反应路径和催化性能至关重要，但现有枚举候选位点加DFT或ML弛豫的方法计算昂贵且难以扩展到复杂表面或多吸附物系统。
analysis.problem: 解决现有吸附预测方法计算成本高、可扩展性差且缺乏可解释性的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合SE(3)-等变原子级消息传递、体素多尺度聚合和跨领域元学习的图学习框架，通过不变径向特征和等变方向信息编码局部化学环境，利用坐标帧体素池化、分配上采样和门控特征融合整合全局结构上下文，生成原子级归因图以可解释方式识别吸附相关局部环境，并构建吸附环境数据库和模板匹配策略。
contributions: 提出Meta-LegNet框架，实现可迁移的吸附环境学习。
开发可解释的吸附位点识别方法，无需穷举枚举。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量训练数据。
跨领域泛化能力需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Meta-LegNet框架，通过自定义吸附环境学习实现可迁移、可解释的表面吸附预测。

papers.title: CTM-AI: A Blueprint for General AI Inspired by a Model of Consciousness
papers.abstract: Despite remarkable advances, today's AI systems remain narrow in scope, falling short of the flexible, adaptive, and multisensory intelligence that characterizes human capabilities. This gap has fueled longstanding debates about whether AI might one day achieve human-like generality or even consciousness, and whether theories of consciousness can inspire new architectures for AI. This paper presents an early blueprint for implementing a general AI system, CTM-AI, combining the Conscious Turing Machine (CTM), a formal machine model of consciousness, with today's foundation models. CTM-AI contains an enormous number of powerful processors ranging from specialized experts (e.g., vision-language models and APIs) to unspecialized general-purpose learners poised to develop their own expertise. Crucially, for whatever problem must be dealt with, information from many processors is selected, integrated, and exchanged appropriately to solve the task. CTM-AI achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on MUStARD (72.28) and UR-FUNNY (72.13), outperforming multimodal and multi-agent frameworks. On tool-using and agentic tasks, CTM-AI achieves 10+ points of improvement on StableToolBench and WebArena-Lite. Overall, CTM-AI offers a principled, testable blueprint for general AI inspired by a model of consciousness.

analysis.tldr: 受意识模型启发的通用AI蓝图CTM-AI，结合意识图灵机与基础模型，在多项任务上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI系统范围狭窄，缺乏人类灵活、自适应和多感官智能，意识理论能否启发新架构是长期争论点。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个通用AI系统，使其具备灵活、自适应和多感官智能，并超越现有窄AI的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CTM-AI架构，结合意识图灵机（CTM）与基础模型，包含大量专用专家（如视觉-语言模型、API）和通用学习器，通过选择、整合和交换多处理器信息来解决问题。
contributions: 提出CTM-AI，一个受意识模型启发的通用AI蓝图。
在MUStARD、UR-FUNNY、StableToolBench和WebArena-Lite上取得SOTA或显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在MUStARD（72.28）、UR-FUNNY（72.13）上超越多模态和多智能体框架；在StableToolBench和WebArena-Lite上提升10+点。
limitations: 蓝图实现细节可能不完整。
通用性尚未在更广泛任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受意识模型启发的通用AI蓝图CTM-AI，结合意识图灵机与基础模型，在多项任务上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Evaluating Patient Safety Risks in Generative AI: Development and Validation of a FMECA Framework for Generated Clinical Content
papers.abstract: Objectives: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for clinical text summarization, yet structured methods to assess associated patient safety risks remain limited. Failure Mode, Effects, and Criticality Analysis (FMECA) provides a proactive framework for systematic risk identification but has not been adapted to LLM-generated clinical content. This study aimed to develop and validate a novel FMECA framework for the prospective assessment of patient safety risks in LLM-generated clinical summaries. Materials and Methods: An interdisciplinary expert panel (n = 8) developed a taxonomy of failure modes through literature review and brainstorming. Standard FMECA dimensions (occurrence, severity, detectability) were adapted into 5-point ordinal scales. The framework was applied to 36 discharge summaries from four patients, generated by an open LLM (GPT-OSS 120B) using real-world clinical data from the Geneva University Hospitals. Reviewers independently annotated the summaries across two rounds. Inter-rater reliability was assessed at failure mode, severity and detectability score levels. Usability and content validity were evaluated using an adapted System Usability Scale and structured feedback. Results: The final framework comprised 14 failure modes organized into categories. Inter-rater agreement improved between rounds, reaching moderate-to-substantial agreement for failure mode identification and good agreement for severity and detectability scoring. Usability was rated as good (mean SUS: 79.2/100), with high evaluator confidence. Discussion and Conclusion: This study presents the first FMECA-based framework for systematic patient safety risk assessment of LLM-generated clinical summaries. The framework provides a structured and reproducible method for identifying clinically relevant risks caused by these summaries.

analysis.tldr: 提出并验证了首个基于FMECA的框架，用于系统评估LLM生成临床摘要的患者安全风险。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM越来越多用于临床文本摘要，但缺乏结构化方法来评估相关的患者安全风险；现有FMECA方法未被应用于LLM生成内容。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地识别和评估LLM生成临床摘要中的患者安全风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发了一个包含14种失效模式的FMECA框架，由跨学科专家小组通过文献综述和头脑风暴构建，并应用于4名患者的36份出院摘要，由评审者独立标注两轮。
contributions: 首次将FMECA框架应用于LLM生成临床内容的风险评估。
验证了框架的可靠性（评分者间一致性中等至显著）和可用性（SUS评分79.2/100）。
analysis.experiments: 在36份由GPT-OSS 120B生成的出院摘要上进行了两轮标注，评估了评分者间信度和可用性。
limitations: 样本量较小（4名患者，36份摘要），可能限制泛化性。
仅使用单一开源LLM，未涵盖其他模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出并验证了首个基于FMECA的框架，用于系统评估LLM生成临床摘要的患者安全风险。

papers.title: FASQ: Flexible Accelerated Subspace Quantization for Calibration-Free LLM Compression
papers.abstract: Compressing large language models (LLMs) for deployment on commodity GPUs remains challenging: conventional scalar quantization is limited to fixed bit-widths (e.g., 8/4/3-bit), offers only a few discrete compression points, and typically requires calibration data. We present FASQ (Flexible Accelerated Subspace Quantization), a calibration-free framework that applies product quantization to LLM weight matrices. By tuning two parameters, sub-vector size and codebook cardinality, FASQ exposes a continuous design space spanning 27-49% of the original FP16 model size, filling compression gaps that fixed-bit schemes cannot reach. On Meta-Llama-3-8B, FASQ surpasses 4-bit GPTQ and AWQ in accuracy (67.1-67.7 avg.) at 37-42% model size, with consistent results on Qwen3-8B and Qwen3.5-9B-Base. To make product quantization practical at inference time, we design custom CUDA kernels: a LUT-free direct-compute GEMV for decode and an output-stationary double-buffered LUT GEMM for prefill, both with split-K parallelism. On an RTX~3090, FASQ achieves 45.2 tok/s decode at effective 4-bit (2.56x memory reduction) and 51.8 tok/s at effective 3-bit (2.80x), both surpassing FP16 tensor-core performance (43.9 tok/s) and delivering 1.6 to 1.8x the throughput of AWQ, 2.5 to 2.5x of GPTQ, and 4.3 to 5x of RTN. FASQ is the only compressed method that accelerates decode beyond FP16, offering calibration-free compression, continuous size-quality trade-offs, and real-time inference on a single consumer GPU.

analysis.tldr: FASQ 通过无校准的子空间量化实现 LLM 连续压缩，在 3-4 比特有效位宽下超越 GPTQ/AWQ 精度并加速推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有标量量化仅支持固定比特宽度（如 8/4/3 比特），压缩点离散且通常需要校准数据，限制了 LLM 在消费级 GPU 上的灵活部署。
analysis.problem: 如何实现无需校准数据、支持连续压缩率且推理加速的 LLM 权重量化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 FASQ 框架，对 LLM 权重矩阵应用乘积量化，通过调节子向量大小和码本基数两个参数实现连续压缩空间（27-49% 原始大小）；设计自定义 CUDA 核：无查找表的直接计算 GEMV 用于解码阶段，输出驻留双缓冲查找表 GEMM 用于预填充阶段，均采用 split-K 并行。
contributions: 提出无校准数据的子空间量化框架 FASQ，实现连续压缩率调节。
设计专用 CUDA 核，使乘积量化在推理时达到超越 FP16 张量核心的解码速度。
analysis.experiments: 在 Meta-Llama-3-8B 上，FASQ 在 37-42% 模型大小时精度（67.1-67.7 avg.）超过 4 比特 GPTQ 和 AWQ；在 Qwen3-8B 和 Qwen3.5-9B-Base 上结果一致。RTX 3090 上，有效 4 比特解码 45.2 tok/s（2.56x 内存缩减），有效 3 比特 51.8 tok/s（2.80x），均超过 FP16 张量核心（43.9 tok/s），吞吐量为 AWQ 的 1.6-1.8x、GPTQ 的 2.5x、RTN 的 4.3-5x。
limitations: 可能仅针对权重矩阵，未考虑激活量化。
自定义 CUDA 核的通用性可能受限于特定 GPU 架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FASQ 通过无校准的子空间量化实现 LLM 连续压缩，在 3-4 比特有效位宽下超越 GPTQ/AWQ 精度并加速推理。

papers.title: AsymmetryZero: A Framework for Operationalizing Human Expert Preferences as Semantic Evals
papers.abstract: Much of the focus in RL today is on evaluation design: building meaningful evals that serve simultaneously as benchmarks and as well-defined reward signals for post-training. Yet, many real-world tasks are governed by subjective, procedural, and domain-specific requirements that are difficult to encode as exact-match targets or open-ended preference judgments frequently used in RL pipelines today. In this work, we present AsymmetryZero, a framework for operationalizing human expert preferences as semantic evals. AsymmetryZero represents each task as a stable evaluation contract that makes grading criteria explicit: what is being graded, how each criterion is judged, and how criterion-level decisions are aggregated into a task outcome. The same contract can be executed using Inspect for model-only evaluations, as well as the Harbor Framework for agentic evaluations, enabling comparable scores and shared audit artifacts across both settings. We argue that the central challenge in post-training today is the faithful encoding of expert requirements into the evaluation itself. To that end, we present a study using Harbor that holds task contracts fixed and compares a five-model frontier jury against a five-model compact jury across four frontier-class solvers (Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, Grok-4.20, Gemini-3.1-Pro). We find that criterion-level frontier-vs-compact agreement ranges from $75.9\%$ to $89.6\%$ (strict common-subset agreement: $77.8\%$ to $92.1\%$), while compact juries exhibit substantially higher internal dissent (3--2 split rate $28.7\%$--$32.4\%$) than frontier juries ($6.1\%$--$11.5\%$). Verifier traces further show that compact juries reduce per-criterion judging cost to roughly $4.2\%$--$5.6\%$ of frontier and latency to roughly $21.7\%$--$27.1\%$, even as aggregated task-level outcomes often remain comparatively stable.

analysis.tldr: 提出AsymmetryZero框架，将人类专家偏好操作化为语义评估，通过评估合约实现可复现的模型评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前RL评估依赖精确匹配或开放偏好判断，难以编码主观、程序化、领域特定的任务需求，亟需一种能忠实编码专家要求的评估框架。
analysis.problem: 如何将人类专家偏好系统性地转化为可执行的语义评估，并保证评估的稳定性、可比性和可审计性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 紧凑型陪审团（compact jury）内部异议率（28.7%-32.4%）远高于前沿模型陪审团（6.1%-11.5%），但任务级结果相对稳定；紧凑型陪审团成本降至前沿的4.2%-5.6%，延迟降至21.7%-27.1%。
analysis.method: AsymmetryZero框架：将每个任务表示为稳定评估合约，明确评分标准、判断方式和聚合规则；合约可在Inspect（纯模型评估）和Harbor（智能体评估）中执行，支持跨设置可比分数和共享审计痕迹。
contributions: 提出AsymmetryZero框架，将人类专家偏好操作化为语义评估合约，实现评估的显式化、可复现和可审计。
通过实验比较前沿模型陪审团与紧凑型陪审团，揭示紧凑型陪审团在成本、延迟和内部一致性上的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 使用Harbor框架，固定任务合约，比较五模型前沿陪审团（Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, Grok-4.20, Gemini-3.1-Pro）与五模型紧凑陪审团在四个前沿求解器上的表现，报告了标准级一致率、内部异议率及成本延迟指标。
limitations: 实验仅涉及五个模型和四个求解器，泛化性有待验证。
紧凑型陪审团的高内部异议率可能影响评估可靠性，需进一步研究聚合策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AsymmetryZero框架，将人类专家偏好操作化为语义评估，通过评估合约实现可复现的模型评估。

papers.title: Time series causal discovery with variable lags
papers.abstract: Causal Bayesian Networks (CBNs) are a powerful tool for reasoning under uncertainty about complex real-world problems. Such problems evolve over time, responding to external shocks as they occur. To support decision-making, CBNs require a cause-and-effect map of the variables under consideration, known as the network's structure. Learning the graphical structure of a causal model from data remains challenging; learning it from time-series data is even harder because dependencies may arise at different time lags. Existing time-series causal discovery methods often assume a fixed lag window and do not explicitly optimise edge-specific lags. We propose a Tabu-based structure learning algorithm that searches for a time-ordered directed structure (i.e., where every edge respects time) while allowing edge-specific lags up to a specified maximum lag. The approach uses a decomposable BIC-based score with node-specific effective sample sizes and an explicit lag-length penalty encouraging parsimonious delay assignments while preserving efficient local score updates. We provide theoretical guarantees of validity and local optimality, and we also describe a parallel implementation for improved scalability. In simulations, the method recovered graph structure competitively and estimated lags accurately when true adjacencies were recovered. On a real-world UK COVID-19 policy dataset, the learnt structure was dominated by short delays while retaining a substantial minority of longer-lag dependencies, consistent with delayed behavioural and epidemiological effects.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于Tabu搜索的时间序列因果发现算法，允许变量间存在不同时滞，并在模拟和真实数据上验证了有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 时间序列因果发现中，变量间的依赖关系可能发生在不同时间滞后，现有方法通常假设固定滞后窗口，无法优化边特定的滞后，限制了建模精度。
analysis.problem: 如何从时间序列数据中学习因果图结构，同时允许每条边具有不同的时间滞后，并实现高效的结构搜索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Tabu搜索的结构学习算法，搜索时间有序的有向图，允许边特定滞后（不超过最大滞后），使用可分解的BIC分数（含节点有效样本量和滞后长度惩罚），并支持并行实现。
contributions: 提出一种允许边特定滞后的时间序列因果发现算法，并给出理论有效性和局部最优性保证。
设计了可分解的BIC分数和滞后惩罚项，支持高效局部更新和并行计算。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟数据上，方法在恢复图结构方面具有竞争力，并在正确恢复邻接关系时准确估计滞后；在真实UK COVID-19政策数据集上，学习到的结构以短滞后为主，同时保留相当比例的长滞后依赖。
limitations: 可能依赖最大滞后参数的设定，对超参数敏感。
并行实现的具体加速效果未在摘要中量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于Tabu搜索的时间序列因果发现算法，允许变量间存在不同时滞，并在模拟和真实数据上验证了有效性。

papers.title: Efficient Handwriting-Based Alzheimer,s Disease Diagnosis Using a Low-Rank Mixture of Experts Deep Learning Framework
papers.abstract: Early and reliable detection of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is crucial for timely clinical intervention and improved patient management. It also supports the evaluation of emerging therapeutic strategies. In this paper, we propose a Low-Rank Mixture of Experts (LoRA-MoE) deep learning framework for Alzheimer's disease diagnosis based on handwriting analysis. Handwriting signals provide a non-invasive and scalable digital biomarker that captures subtle cognitive-motor impairments associated with early AD progression. The proposed architecture allows multiple experts to specialize in different handwriting patterns while sharing a common base network. This design enables efficient learning of general representations while reducing interference between experts. Each expert is equipped with lightweight low-rank adapters. This mechanism significantly reduces the number of trainable parameters compared with standard Mixture of Experts (MoE) models and improves training stability. The proposed framework is evaluated on the Diagnosis AlzheimeR WIth haNdwriting (DARWIN) dataset. Extensive experiments are conducted, including ablation studies on key architectural parameters such as hidden dimension size, number of experts, and LoRA rank. The method is compared with multilayer perceptron (MLP) and conventional MoE architectures. In addition, stacking ensemble strategies (StackMean and StackMax) are investigated to improve robustness and predictive performance. Experimental results show that the LoRA-MoE framework achieves powerful diagnostic performance while activating significantly fewer parameters during inference. These results highlight the potential of the proposed approach as an accurate and computationally efficient solution for handwriting-based Alzheimer's disease screening and digital health applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出LoRA-MoE框架，通过低秩专家混合高效利用手写信号诊断阿尔茨海默病。
analysis.research_motivation: 阿尔茨海默病早期可靠诊断对临床干预和患者管理至关重要，手写信号作为非侵入性数字生物标志物可捕捉早期认知-运动障碍，但现有深度学习模型在参数效率和专家间干扰方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个参数高效、训练稳定且能利用手写信号进行阿尔茨海默病诊断的深度学习框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出低秩混合专家（LoRA-MoE）框架，多个专家共享基础网络并配备低秩适配器，减少可训练参数并提高训练稳定性。
contributions: 提出LoRA-MoE框架用于手写信号阿尔茨海默病诊断，实现参数高效和训练稳定。
在DARWIN数据集上通过消融实验和与MLP、传统MoE对比，验证了诊断性能和推理时激活参数少的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在DARWIN数据集上进行实验，包括隐藏维度、专家数量、LoRA秩的消融研究，以及与MLP和传统MoE的对比，并探索了StackMean和StackMax集成策略。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上评估，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论低秩适配器对专家多样性的潜在限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LoRA-MoE框架，通过低秩专家混合高效利用手写信号诊断阿尔茨海默病。

papers.title: Validity-Calibrated Reasoning Distillation
papers.abstract: Reasoning distillation aims to transfer multi-step reasoning capabilities from large language models to smaller, more efficient ones. While recent methods have shown promising gains, they typically rely on static teacher-student hierarchies and frame distillation as trajectory imitation. This is misaligned with the structure of reasoning, where intermediate steps are often locally under-specified: global correctness constrains the final answer, but does not uniquely determine each intermediate move. We propose validity-calibrated reasoning distillation, a framework that treats reasoning distillation as a problem of local learning-signal allocation rather than path alignment. Instead of enforcing token-level imitation, we compare the student's and teacher's proposed next-step actions under the same prefix and use their relative local validity to modulate the strength of the distillation update. This yields a dynamic, context-dependent supervision mechanism that preserves the teacher's structural guidance while adapting update strength to local reasoning quality. Across mathematical reasoning, code generation, and instruction-following benchmarks, our method consistently outperforms strong distillation baselines. These results indicate that effective LLM reasoning distillation is governed not by rigid trajectory imitation, but by principled, locally calibrated allocation of learning signal.

analysis.tldr: 提出有效性校准推理蒸馏，通过局部学习信号分配替代轨迹模仿，提升小模型推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理蒸馏方法依赖静态师生层次和轨迹模仿，但推理中间步骤局部欠指定，全局正确性不唯一确定中间步骤，导致蒸馏信号不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何为推理蒸馏设计更合理的局部学习信号分配机制，而非简单的路径对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推理过程中中间步骤局部欠指定，全局正确性不唯一确定中间步骤，导致轨迹模仿与推理结构不匹配。
analysis.method: 提出有效性校准推理蒸馏，比较学生和教师在相同前缀下的下一步动作，利用相对局部有效性调节蒸馏更新强度，实现动态上下文相关的监督。
contributions: 提出有效性校准推理蒸馏框架，将推理蒸馏视为局部学习信号分配问题而非路径对齐。
在数学推理、代码生成和指令跟随基准上持续优于强蒸馏基线。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理、代码生成和指令跟随基准上评估，方法持续优于强蒸馏基线。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型质量，局部有效性估计的准确性有待验证。
未讨论在更复杂推理任务上的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出有效性校准推理蒸馏，通过局部学习信号分配替代轨迹模仿，提升小模型推理能力。

papers.title: Balanced Aggregation: Understanding and Fixing Aggregation Bias in GRPO
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a central paradigm for improving reasoning and code generation in large language models, and GRPO-style training is widely adopted for its simplicity and effectiveness. However, an important design choice remains underexplored: how token-level policy gradient terms are aggregated within each sampled group. Standard GRPO uses sequence aggregation, while recent work has advocated token aggregation as a better alternative. We show that these two rules induce different optimization biases: token aggregation introduces sign-length coupling, while sequence aggregation implicitly downweights longer responses through sequence-level equal weighting. To address this tension, we propose \textbf{Balanced Aggregation (BA)}, a simple drop-in replacement that computes token-level means separately within the positive and negative subsets and then combines them with sequence-count-based weights. Experiments with Qwen2.5-Math-7B and Qwen3-1.7B on DAPO-17k and Polaris, evaluated on six reasoning and coding benchmarks, show that BA consistently improves training stability and final performance over standard token and sequence aggregation. Our analysis further shows that the relative effectiveness of token and sequence aggregation is largely governed by response-length variation and the positive-negative length gap, highlighting aggregation as a critical design dimension in GRPO-style RLVR.

analysis.tldr: 提出平衡聚合方法，解决GRPO中token聚合与序列聚合的偏差问题，提升训练稳定性与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO风格的强化学习在LLM推理和代码生成中广泛应用，但token级策略梯度在组内的聚合方式（序列聚合与token聚合）存在未充分探索的设计选择，且两种方式引入不同的优化偏差，影响训练效果。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种聚合规则，既能避免token聚合的符号-长度耦合偏差，又能克服序列聚合对长响应的隐式降权，从而提升GRPO训练的稳定性和最终性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: token聚合引入符号-长度耦合，序列聚合通过序列级等权隐式降权长响应；两种聚合规则的相对有效性主要由响应长度变异和正负长度差距决定。
analysis.method: 提出平衡聚合（BA），在正负子集内分别计算token级均值，然后基于序列计数权重组合。
contributions: 揭示了GRPO中token聚合与序列聚合的优化偏差机制。
提出平衡聚合方法，作为简单即插即用的替代方案，在多个基准上提升训练稳定性和性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-Math-7B和Qwen3-1.7B上使用DAPO-17k和Polaris数据集，在六个推理和编码基准上评估，BA一致优于标准token和序列聚合。
limitations: 方法在正负样本不平衡极端情况下可能仍需调参。
未在更大规模模型或更多任务上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出平衡聚合方法，解决GRPO中token聚合与序列聚合的偏差问题，提升训练稳定性与性能。

papers.title: A Regulatory Governance Framework for AI-Driven Financial Fraud Detection in U.S. Banking: Integrating OCC, SR 11-7, CFPB, and FinCEN Compliance Requirements for Model Development, Validation, and Monitoring Lifecycles
papers.abstract: U.S. financial institutions deploying AI-based fraud detection face a fragmented compliance landscape spanning four regulatory frameworks -- OCC Bulletin 2011-12, SR 11-7, the CFPB AI circular, and FinCEN BSA/SAR requirements -- with no integrated governance life cycle connecting these requirements to model development, validation, and monitoring practice. This paper presents the Regulatory Governance Framework for AI-Driven Financial Fraud Detection (RGF-AFFD), a three-tier governance architecture empirically anchored in a multi-study empirical program. Using the IEEE-CIS dataset (590,540 transactions) and ULB benchmark (284,807 transactions), we benchmark six architectures including an LSTM+XGBoost ensemble, and conduct ablation, temporal drift, SHAP interpretability, and BISG fairness analyses. The LSTM+XGBoost ensemble achieves ROC-AUC of 0.9289 (F1: 0.6360) with a benefit-cost ratio of 6:1. XGBoost demonstrates the strongest temporal stability (delta-AUC = -0.0017 versus -0.0626 for LSTM). The RDT-FG Regulatory Digital Twin meta-model translates metrics into four regulator-specific health scores and a composite Regulatory Fitness Index for continuous compliance monitoring. The RGF-AFFD is the first integrated deployment blueprint to simultaneously satisfy OCC, SR 11-7, CFPB, and FinCEN requirements, supported by a community bank implementation vignette and four evidence-based policy recommendations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个整合美国四大监管框架的AI金融欺诈检测治理框架，并通过实证验证其有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 美国金融机构在部署基于AI的欺诈检测时面临碎片化的合规环境，缺乏统一的治理生命周期来连接监管要求与模型开发、验证和监控实践。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个集成OCC、SR 11-7、CFPB和FinCEN合规要求的治理框架，以指导AI欺诈检测模型的开发、验证和监控全生命周期。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三层次治理架构RGF-AFFD，包括基准测试六种架构（如LSTM+XGBoost集成）、消融、时间漂移、SHAP可解释性和BISG公平性分析，并引入RDT-FG监管数字孪生元模型将指标转化为四个监管机构特定的健康评分和综合监管适应性指数。
contributions: 首次提出同时满足OCC、SR 11-7、CFPB和FinCEN要求的集成部署蓝图。
通过两个数据集和多种分析（包括时间漂移、可解释性、公平性）实证验证了框架的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 使用IEEE-CIS数据集（590,540笔交易）和ULB基准（284,807笔交易），对六种架构进行基准测试，包括LSTM+XGBoost集成，并进行了消融、时间漂移、SHAP可解释性和BISG公平性分析。LSTM+XGBoost集成达到ROC-AUC 0.9289（F1: 0.6360），收益成本比6:1。XGBoost表现出最强的时间稳定性（delta-AUC = -0.0017，而LSTM为-0.0626）。
limitations: 框架可能主要针对美国监管环境，其他国家的适用性需进一步验证。
社区银行实施案例可能无法完全代表大型金融机构的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个整合美国四大监管框架的AI金融欺诈检测治理框架，并通过实证验证其有效性。

papers.title: RetentiveKV: State-Space Memory for Uncertainty-Aware Multimodal KV Cache Eviction
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models face severe challenges in computational efficiency and memory consumption due to the substantial expansion of the visual KV cache when processing long visual contexts. Existing KV cache compression methods typically rely on the "persistence of importance" hypothesis to prune tokens. However, this approach proves fragile in multimodal settings due to two key issues: 1) Visual tokens display "deferred importance," initially exhibiting low salience but becoming pivotal during later decoding, which can lead to premature eviction. 2) Discrete pruning disrupts the inherent spatial continuity of visual cues. To address these challenges, we propose RetentiveKV, an entropy-driven KV cache optimization method that reformulates KV eviction from "discrete context truncation" to "continuous memory evolution" based on State Space Models. Our method leverages information entropy to quantify the information potential of low-attention tokens and integrates tokens scheduled for eviction into a continuous state space through entropy-guided state transitions, enabling their dynamic reactivation when semantic relevance arises during subsequent decoding. Extensive experiments on multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that RetentiveKV achieves 5.0 times KV cache compression and 1.5 times decoding acceleration.

analysis.tldr: 提出RetentiveKV，用状态空间模型将KV缓存驱逐从离散截断变为连续记忆演化，实现5倍压缩和1.5倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型处理长视觉上下文时，视觉KV缓存急剧膨胀导致计算和内存瓶颈；现有压缩方法依赖“重要性持久性”假设，在多模态场景下因视觉token的“延迟重要性”和离散剪枝破坏空间连续性而失效。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型中视觉KV缓存的高效压缩问题，需解决视觉token延迟重要性和空间连续性破坏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个关键现象：1) 视觉token具有“延迟重要性”，初始时显著性低但后续解码中变得关键，导致过早驱逐；2) 离散剪枝破坏视觉线索固有的空间连续性。
analysis.method: 提出RetentiveKV，一种基于信息熵的KV缓存优化方法，利用状态空间模型将KV驱逐从“离散上下文截断”重构为“连续记忆演化”，通过熵引导的状态转移将待驱逐token整合到连续状态空间中，使其在后续解码中能动态重新激活。
contributions: 揭示了多模态KV缓存压缩中视觉token的延迟重要性和空间连续性破坏问题
提出RetentiveKV，基于状态空间模型和熵引导的连续记忆演化方法
在多个多模态基准上实现5倍KV缓存压缩和1.5倍解码加速
analysis.experiments: 在多模态基准上进行实验，实现了5倍KV缓存压缩和1.5倍解码加速。
limitations: 可能对长上下文场景的泛化性需进一步验证
状态空间模型的计算开销可能影响实际部署效率
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RetentiveKV，用状态空间模型将KV缓存驱逐从离散截断变为连续记忆演化，实现5倍压缩和1.5倍加速。

papers.title: A Physics-Aware Framework for Short-Term GPU Power Forecasting of AI Data Centers
papers.abstract: AI data centers experience rapid fluctuations in power demand due to the heterogeneity of computational tasks that they have to support. For example, the power profile of inference and training of large language models (LLMs) is quite distinct and big divergences can result in the instability of the underlying electricity grid. In this paper we propose, to the best of our knowledge, the first physics-informed DLinear time-series model that can accurately forecast power utilization of an AI data center 5-80 minutes (short-term forecasting) into the future. The physics, based on a multi-node lumped thermal resistance-capacitance (RC) network consistent with Newton's law of cooling, is captured using newly derived time-dependent ordinary differential equations (ODE) that separately models and interlinks power consumption with the GPU compute and memory utilization and temperature. The resulting model, that we refer to as PI-DLinear, trained and evaluated on a real AI data center dataset and is not only more accurate than the state-of-the-art (SOTA) models tested, but the forecast profile respects the underlying physics under power throttling and load transient events. Relative to the SOTA transformer-based and non-transformer-based models, improvements in forecasting accuracy (averaged across all look-back and prediction windows) range from 0.782%-39.08% for MSE, 0.993%-51.82% for MAE, and 0.370%-22.28% for RMSE.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个物理信息DLinear时间序列模型PI-DLinear，用于AI数据中心GPU功耗的短期预测，在真实数据集上优于SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: AI数据中心因计算任务异构性导致功耗快速波动，影响电网稳定性，现有模型缺乏物理约束，预测精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何准确预测AI数据中心未来5-80分钟的GPU功耗，并确保预测符合物理规律。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于多节点集总热阻-电容网络和牛顿冷却定律，推导时变常微分方程，将功耗与GPU计算、内存利用率和温度关联，并嵌入DLinear模型。
contributions: 首个物理信息DLinear时间序列模型用于AI数据中心GPU功耗短期预测
提出基于RC网络的时变ODE物理约束，提升预测准确性和物理一致性
analysis.experiments: 在真实AI数据中心数据集上评估，与SOTA模型相比，MSE提升0.782%-39.08%，MAE提升0.993%-51.82%，RMSE提升0.370%-22.28%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据中心架构，泛化性需验证
物理模型简化可能忽略其他影响因素
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个物理信息DLinear时间序列模型PI-DLinear，用于AI数据中心GPU功耗的短期预测，在真实数据集上优于SOTA。

papers.title: Confronting Label Indeterminacy in Automated Bail Decisions
papers.abstract: Bail decisions present a fundamental challenge for data-driven decision support systems. When bail is denied, the counterfactual outcome of whether the defendant would have appeared in court remains unobserved. As a result, historical bail data embed structural label indeterminacy: future decisions are influenced by past decisions whose outcomes are only partially knowable. Building automated systems on such data risks introducing bias and reinforcing feedback loops. This raises a core question for machine-learning systems intended to assist judicial actors: how should cases in which bail was denied be treated during model development? In a case study of bail decisions from the Unified Judicial System of Pennsylvania, we evaluate five contemporary approaches to handling label indeterminacy across three machine learning models, including a novel label imputation method motivated by the dynamics of bail decisions. Each method relies on unverifiable assumptions, yet all influence the models' predictive behaviour, sometimes even more so than the choice of model itself. Explainable AI analysis further reveals that these effects extend to the models' internal decision-making processes as well. Finally, we consider the notion of label indeterminacy from a legal perspective and assess the legitimacy of these approaches in the context of bail decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 保释决策中的标签不确定性问题导致数据驱动系统存在偏差和反馈循环，不同处理方法对模型行为影响显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 保释决策中，拒绝保释的被告的后续出庭情况无法观测，导致历史数据存在结构性标签不确定性，基于此类数据构建的自动化系统可能引入偏差并强化反馈循环，亟需研究如何处理这些不确定标签。
analysis.problem: 如何应对保释决策数据中因拒绝保释而导致的标签不确定性问题，并评估不同处理方法对机器学习模型预测行为的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在宾夕法尼亚州统一司法系统的保释决策案例研究中，评估了五种处理标签不确定性的方法（包括一种基于保释决策动态的新颖标签插补方法），并应用于三种机器学习模型。
contributions: 系统评估了五种处理标签不确定性的方法对保释决策模型的影响，发现方法选择有时比模型选择影响更大。
通过可解释AI分析揭示了不同方法对模型内部决策过程的影响。
从法律视角审视了这些方法在保释决策中的合法性。
analysis.experiments: 在宾夕法尼亚州统一司法系统的保释决策数据上进行了案例研究，评估了五种方法在三种机器学习模型上的表现。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 每种方法都依赖于不可验证的假设。
研究仅基于单一司法系统的数据，可能缺乏泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 保释决策中的标签不确定性问题导致数据驱动系统存在偏差和反馈循环，不同处理方法对模型行为影响显著。

papers.title: Sparse Autoencoder Decomposition of Clinical Sequence Model Representations: Feature Complexity, Task Specialisation, and Mortality Prediction
papers.abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have been applied to large language models and protein language models, but not systematically to electronic health record (EHR) foundation models. We train TopK SAEs on FlatASCEND, a 14.5-million-parameter autoregressive clinical sequence model, at all 10 residual stream extraction points on INSPECT (outpatient) and MIMIC-IV (ICU). SAE decomposition reveals progressive abstraction across transformer depth: layer-0 features are near-perfect token detectors (45.7% singleton), while layer-6 features span approximately 30 token types across multiple clinical categories (0.5% singleton). Under full-sequence simple linear probes, SAE features outperform dense representations for discrete event prediction (mortality) while dense representations outperform for continuous magnitude prediction (length of stay) - a probe-level representational phenomenon that does not extend to clinically relevant leakage-safe windows, where dense representations match or exceed SAE features across all tested settings (eICU-CRD 48-hour AUC: SAE 0.871 versus dense 0.880; base model zero-shot, SAE dictionaries trained on eICU activations; MIMIC-IV: 0.836 versus 0.914; INSPECT 1-year/3-year: 0.697 versus 0.800). A delta-mode intervention method reduces SAE perturbation noise by 86x, enabling cleaner feature-level experiments, though the resulting perturbation effects are larger than random controls in 3 of 4 conditions but not formally significant. Feature reproducibility across random seeds is 21%, and individual features should be interpreted as illustrative rather than stable.

analysis.tldr: 首次将稀疏自编码器应用于临床序列模型，揭示特征层级抽象与任务特异化，但SAE在泄漏安全窗口下未优于密集表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏自编码器已成功应用于大语言模型和蛋白质语言模型，但尚未系统探索其在电子健康记录基础模型中的可解释性潜力，临床序列模型的特征分解有助于理解模型内部表示。
analysis.problem: 系统评估稀疏自编码器在临床序列模型上的分解效果，分析特征复杂度、任务特异化及预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SAE分解显示特征随Transformer深度逐渐抽象：浅层特征近乎完美检测单个token（45.7%单例），深层特征跨多个临床类别覆盖约30种token类型（0.5%单例）；全序列线性探针下SAE特征在离散事件预测（死亡率）上优于密集表示，但在连续量预测（住院时长）上密集表示更优；泄漏安全窗口下密集表示在所有设置中匹配或超过SAE特征。
analysis.method: 在FlatASCEND模型（1450万参数）的10个残差流提取点训练TopK稀疏自编码器，使用INSPECT（门诊）和MIMIC-IV（ICU）数据，并引入delta模式干预方法减少扰动噪声。
contributions: 首次将SAE系统应用于临床序列模型，揭示特征层级抽象与任务特异化现象
发现全序列线性探针下SAE特征与密集表示在不同预测任务上的性能差异，但泄漏安全窗口下密集表示更优
提出delta模式干预方法将SAE扰动噪声降低86倍，但特征可重复性仅21%
analysis.experiments: 在eICU-CRD、MIMIC-IV、INSPECT三个数据集上评估死亡率预测（AUC），泄漏安全窗口下密集表示优于SAE（eICU-CRD: 0.880 vs 0.871；MIMIC-IV: 0.914 vs 0.836；INSPECT 1年: 0.800 vs 0.697）。
limitations: SAE特征可重复性低（21%），单个特征仅具说明性而非稳定性
delta模式干预的扰动效应在4个条件中3个大于随机对照但未达统计显著
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次将稀疏自编码器应用于临床序列模型，揭示特征层级抽象与任务特异化，但SAE在泄漏安全窗口下未优于密集表示。

papers.title: FlatASCEND: Autoregressive Clinical Sequence Generation with Continuous Time Prediction and Association-Based Pharmacological Testing
papers.abstract: Autoregressive models can predict clinical events, but generating patient-conditioned multi-step trajectories that respond to intervention tokens and testing whether those responses preserve known pharmacological associations has received limited attention. We present FlatASCEND, a 14.5M-parameter autoregressive clinical sequence model using flat composite tokens and a zero-inflated log-normal time head. Standard distributional metrics (Jaccard 0.889-0.954) do not distinguish FlatASCEND from trivial baselines; the model's value lies in conditional generation from patient-specific prefixes. A prompt-shuffle ablation shows patient-specific conditioning amplifies mechanistic pharmacological effects (2.0-2.2x for steroid to glucose, diuretic to potassium) while leaving confounding-driven associations unchanged (0.9x for insulin to glucose). An incident-user framework assesses directional consistency against prior pharmacological knowledge on MIMIC-IV (N=500 per comparison): 4/10 recover correct mechanistic directions, 2 reproduce treatment-context associations, 4 are incorrect (9/10 significant, Wilcoxon p<0.05). This pattern - partial recovery under residual confounding - is consistent with learned observational associations without causal distinction. Direct preference optimisation with surrogate reward destroys all correct associations (3/3 to 0/3), illustrating reward exploitation when reward and evaluation share an outcome domain. Generative evidence is strongest for short-horizon ICU data; outpatient temporal fidelity is weaker (median 10 vs 154 days on INSPECT), and zero-shot cross-site transfer degrades without adaptation.

analysis.tldr: FlatASCEND 是一个14.5M参数的自回归临床序列生成模型，通过扁平复合令牌和零膨胀对数正态时间头实现条件生成，并评估药理关联保持能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自回归模型能预测临床事件，但生成患者条件化的多步轨迹并响应干预令牌，以及测试这些响应是否保持已知药理关联的研究有限。
analysis.problem: 生成患者条件化的临床序列，并评估生成序列中药理关联的保持情况。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准分布指标（Jaccard 0.889-0.954）无法区分模型与平凡基线；患者条件化放大机制性药理效应（2.0-2.2倍），但混淆驱动的关联不变（0.9倍）；直接偏好优化破坏所有正确关联；生成证据在短期ICU数据中最强，门诊时间保真度较弱，零样本跨站点迁移退化。
analysis.method: 使用扁平复合令牌和零膨胀对数正态时间头的14.5M参数自回归临床序列模型，通过提示洗牌消融和事件用户框架评估药理关联。
contributions: 提出FlatASCEND模型，实现患者条件化的多步临床序列生成。
通过提示洗牌消融和事件用户框架系统评估生成序列中的药理关联保持。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-IV和INSPECT数据集上评估，使用Jaccard指标、提示洗牌消融、事件用户框架和直接偏好优化，每比较N=500。
limitations: 模型在门诊数据的时间保真度较弱。
零样本跨站点迁移性能下降。
直接偏好优化导致药理关联破坏。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlatASCEND 是一个14.5M参数的自回归临床序列生成模型，通过扁平复合令牌和零膨胀对数正态时间头实现条件生成，并评估药理关联保持能力。

papers.title: Toward Human-AI Complementarity Across Diverse Tasks
papers.abstract: Human-AI complementarity, the idea that combining human and AI judgments can outperform either alone, offers a promising pathway toward robust oversight of advanced AI systems. However, whether human-AI complementarity can be achieved on realistic tasks remains an open question. We investigate this through two approaches: hybridization and two AI assistance methods (top-2 assistance and subtask delegation), evaluated on a multi-domain dataset of 1,886 samples spanning knowledge, factuality, long-context reasoning, and deception detection. We find only modest complementarity gains. Baseline hybridization yields just +0.4 percentage points (pp) over AI alone (69.3\% vs 68.9\%), limited both by a small complementarity region (only 8.9\% of items where AI errs but humans do not) and the inability of confidence-based routing to identify it, since the model's confidence is similarly distributed across correct and incorrect predictions. Applied when AI has low confidence, top-2 assistance increases human accuracy from 28.4\% to 38.3\%, surpassing AI alone (37.7\%) -- but primarily because humans adopt correct AI suggestions, not because they successfully override AI errors. These findings suggest that the primary bottleneck is not human task accuracy per se, but the ability to route decisions to humans when it matters and to design assistance methods that enable humans to catch AI mistakes. Our quantitative and qualitative analyses pinpoint where and why each method succeeds or fails, offering concrete targets for future work. We will release our dataset and code upon request to support progress toward more effective human-AI collaboration for AI oversight.

analysis.tldr: 人类-AI互补性在多样化任务中增益有限，主要瓶颈在于决策路由和辅助方法设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类-AI互补性有望提升AI系统的鲁棒性，但能否在现实任务中实现尚不明确，现有研究缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估人类-AI互补性在多样化任务中的实际效果，并分析其瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 互补区域小（仅8.9%的AI错误项人类正确），且基于置信度的路由无法有效识别该区域；top-2辅助提升人类准确率主要源于采纳正确建议，而非纠正AI错误。
analysis.method: 采用混合化（hybridization）和两种AI辅助方法（top-2辅助和子任务委派），在多领域数据集上评估。
contributions: 系统评估了人类-AI互补性在多样化任务中的表现，发现增益有限。
识别出主要瓶颈是决策路由和辅助方法设计，而非人类任务准确率本身。
提供定量和定性分析，指出各方法成功与失败的具体原因。
analysis.experiments: 在包含1886个样本的多领域数据集上评估，覆盖知识、事实性、长上下文推理和欺骗检测。
limitations: 互补区域小，可能限制方法的通用性。
置信度路由效果不佳，需要更精细的识别机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人类-AI互补性在多样化任务中增益有限，主要瓶颈在于决策路由和辅助方法设计。

papers.title: LAWS: Learning from Actual Workloads Symbolically -- A Self-Certifying Parametrized Cache Architecture for Neural Inference, Robotics, and Edge Deployment
papers.abstract: We introduce LAWS (Learning from Actual Workloads Symbolically), a self-certifying inference caching architecture that builds a growing library of certified expert functions from deployment observations. Each expert covers a region of input space defined by a node in the Probabilistic Language Trie (PLT) of the base model and carries a formal error bound holding uniformly over all inputs. The central result is a self-certification theorem: for any input x, the LAWS approximation error is bounded by epsilon_fit + 2*Lambda(W)*C_E, where Lambda(W) is the model Lipschitz constant, C_E is the maximum embedding diameter, and epsilon_fit is the expert training error -- all checkable at deployment time without ground truth. We prove that LAWS generalizes both Mixture-of-Experts and KV prefix caching as special cases and is strictly more expressive than any fixed-K MoE or finite cache. Further results include a monotone hit rate theorem (any-match routing ensures coverage only increases), an expert library growth rate of O(2^H log N) where H is workload entropy, a fleet learning convergence theorem with Omega(K) speedup for K-unit fleets, and an over-the-air update bandwidth bound. We conjecture that LAWS is acquisition-optimal among stationary online caching algorithms and that the effective Lipschitz constant on the training distribution grows polynomially rather than exponentially in depth. Applications are developed for LLM inference, robotic control, and multi-agent edge deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自认证推理缓存架构LAWS，通过符号化学习部署工作负载，为LLM推理、机器人控制和边缘部署提供可证明的误差界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理缓存和专家混合方法缺乏形式化的误差保证，且无法自适应地覆盖输入空间，导致在安全关键应用（如机器人控制）中部署受限。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个自认证的推理缓存架构，使得近似误差在部署时无需真实标签即可被形式化界定，同时保证缓存增长可控和跨设备协同学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于概率语言Trie（PLT）构建专家库，每个专家覆盖输入空间的一个区域并携带形式化误差界；通过自认证定理给出误差上界，并证明其泛化MoE和KV缓存。
contributions: 提出LAWS架构，实现自认证推理缓存，具有形式化误差界。
证明LAWS泛化MoE和KV前缀缓存，且严格更具表达力。
给出单调命中率定理、专家库增长率、集群学习收敛定理和空中更新带宽界。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖模型Lipschitz常数的可计算性，实际中难以精确获取。
专家库增长率为O(2^H log N)，在高熵工作负载下可能仍较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自认证推理缓存架构LAWS，通过符号化学习部署工作负载，为LLM推理、机器人控制和边缘部署提供可证明的误差界。

papers.title: Designing a double deep reinforcement learning selection tool for resilient demand prediction
papers.abstract: The use of artificial intelligence in supply chain forecasting has attracted many scientific studies for several decades. However, the process of selecting an appropriate forecasting solution becomes a daunting task. This complexity arises due to the distinct features inherent to each dataset. Research to tackle this issue has been performed since the eighties but recent development of demand forecasting has opened new perspectives. This research aims to enhance automatic forecasting model selection by proposing a novel architecture that acts as a double deep reinforcement learning agent, selecting automatically a forecasting model from the forecasting committee at the time of prediction. Moreover, a novel early-stopping approach based on average reward convergence has been introduced to expedite training time. To evaluate the model's performance, an empirical study was conducted utilizing grocery sales datasets and snack demands datasets. The experimental results demonstrate the robustness of the proposed approach when compared to state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出双深度强化学习代理自动选择预测模型，用于韧性需求预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 供应链预测中，由于数据集特征各异，选择合适的预测模型非常困难，现有方法难以自动适应不同数据。
analysis.problem: 如何自动从预测委员会中选择最优预测模型，并加速训练过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计双深度强化学习代理，在预测时自动选择模型；引入基于平均奖励收敛的早停策略加速训练。
contributions: 提出双深度强化学习架构用于自动模型选择
引入基于平均奖励收敛的早停方法
analysis.experiments: 使用杂货销售数据集和零食需求数据集进行实证研究，与最先进方法比较显示鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的时间序列数据
早停策略的收敛阈值需要手动调整
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双深度强化学习代理自动选择预测模型，用于韧性需求预测。

papers.title: Investigating Trustworthiness of Nonparametric Deep Survival Models for Alzheimer's Disease Progression Analysis
papers.abstract: Alzheimer's Dementia (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disease marked by irreversible decline, making reliable modeling of its progression essential for effective patient care. Progression-aware methods such as survival analysis are therefore crucial tools for the early detection and monitoring of AD. Recent advancements in deep learning have demonstrated remarkable performance in survival tasks, but alarmingly fewer studies have been conducted in the domain of AD. Further, the studies that do exist do not consider learned bias within the model itself, which could result in unfair and unreliable predictions toward certain marginalized groups. As such, we conduct a rigorous study of fairness in AD progression analysis along with a thorough feature importance study to determine the characteristics which are most important for reliable AD predictions. Furthermore, we propose two novel fairness metrics, called Time-Dependent Concordance Impurity and Kaplan-Meier Fairness, to quantify bias with respect to sensitive attributes such as sex, race, and education in nonparametric survival models. Our study demonstrates that while deep learning powered survival models are robust tools which can aid clinicians in AD care decisions, they often exhibit considerable bias, representing important avenues for future research.

analysis.tldr: 研究阿尔茨海默病非参数深度生存模型的公平性，发现模型存在显著偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 阿尔茨海默病进展建模对患者护理至关重要，但现有深度学习生存模型在AD领域缺乏公平性研究，可能对边缘群体产生不公平预测。
analysis.problem: 评估非参数深度生存模型在AD进展分析中的可信度，特别是公平性和特征重要性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 深度学习生存模型在AD预测中表现鲁棒，但常表现出显著偏见，需进一步研究。
analysis.method: 提出两个新公平性指标：时间依赖一致性杂质和Kaplan-Meier公平性，用于量化对性别、种族、教育等敏感属性的偏见，并进行特征重要性研究。
contributions: 首次对AD进展分析中的深度生存模型进行严格的公平性研究。
提出两个新的公平性指标用于非参数生存模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对非参数生存模型，可能不适用于参数模型。
公平性指标可能依赖特定数据集。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究阿尔茨海默病非参数深度生存模型的公平性，发现模型存在显著偏见。

papers.title: EdgeRazor: A Lightweight Framework for Large Language Models via Mixed-Precision Quantization-Aware Distillation
papers.abstract: Recent years have witnessed an increasing interest in deploying LLMs on resource-constrained devices, among which quantization has emerged as a promising lightweight technique that converts full-precision model weights and activations into lower-bit formats. Existing weight quantization approaches can be roughly divided into three categories: Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) that calibrates quantized parameters on a small dataset without retraining but suffers from severe performance degradation below 4-bit, Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) that searches low-bit parameters using surrogate gradients but demands substantial computational resources, and Quantization-Aware Distillation that integrates QAT with knowledge transfer from a full-precision teacher but manually selects features to distill and relies heavily on teacher-specific data. In this paper, we propose EdgeRazor, a lightweight framework for LLMs with mixed-precision and extremely low-bit weight quantization. The EdgeRazor framework contains three modules: Mixed-Precision Quantization-Aware Distillation for the fine-grained control of precision, Adaptive Feature Distillation that derives an $n$-bit student from its 16-bit teacher, and Entropy-Aware KL Divergence on both human-annotated and distilled datasets, whose forward-reverse balance is determined solely by the teacher's output distribution. Empirical investigations of EdgeRazor are conducted on base, instruction-tuned, and multimodal LLMs. Notably, EdgeRazor with 1.88-bit surpasses all contenders with the 3-bit precision, especially outperforms the leading 2-bit PTQ methods by 11.3 points, within a 4-10$\times$ lower training budget than the leading QAT approach. EdgeRazor delivers higher compression ratios at all bit width; the 1.58-bit Qwen3-0.6B reduces storage from 1.41 GB to 0.28 GB while accelerating decoding by 15.1$\times$ relative to the 16-bit baseline.

analysis.tldr: EdgeRazor 通过混合精度量化感知蒸馏，在极低比特下显著提升 LLM 压缩效果，1.88-bit 超越 3-bit 方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 在资源受限设备上部署 LLM 时，量化是关键技术，但现有方法在低于 4-bit 时性能严重下降，或需要大量计算资源，或依赖教师数据。
analysis.problem: 如何实现 LLM 的极低比特（<4-bit）混合精度量化，同时保持高性能并降低训练成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 EdgeRazor 框架，包含混合精度量化感知蒸馏、自适应特征蒸馏和熵感知 KL 散度，其中前向-反向平衡仅由教师输出分布决定。
contributions: 提出 EdgeRazor 轻量级框架，实现 LLM 的混合精度和极低比特量化。
引入自适应特征蒸馏和熵感知 KL 散度，无需手动选择特征或依赖教师特定数据。
在基础、指令微调和多模态 LLM 上验证，1.88-bit 超越 3-bit 方法，训练预算比领先 QAT 低 4-10 倍。
analysis.experiments: 在基础、指令微调和多模态 LLM 上进行实验，1.88-bit 超越所有 3-bit 竞争者，优于 2-bit PTQ 方法 11.3 个点，1.58-bit Qwen3-0.6B 存储从 1.41 GB 降至 0.28 GB，解码加速 15.1 倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的 LLM。
极低比特下的泛化能力可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EdgeRazor 通过混合精度量化感知蒸馏，在极低比特下显著提升 LLM 压缩效果，1.88-bit 超越 3-bit 方法。

papers.title: MP-ISMoE: Mixed-Precision Interactive Side Mixture-of-Experts for Efficient Transfer Learning
papers.abstract: Parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) has emerged as a pivotal paradigm for adapting pre-trained foundation models to downstream tasks, significantly reducing trainable parameters yet suffering from substantial memory overhead caused by gradient backpropagation during fine-tuning. While memory-efficient transfer learning (METL) circumvents this challenge by bypassing backbone gradient computation via lightweight small side networks, its stringent memory constraint severely limits learning capacity of side networks, thereby significantly compromising performance. To address these limitations, we propose a novel Mixed-Precision Interactive Side Mixture-of-Experts framework (MP-ISMoE). Specifically, we first propose a Gaussian Noise Perturbed Iterative Quantization (GNP-IQ) scheme to quantize weights into lower-bits while effectively decreasing quantization errors. By leveraging memory conserved from GNP-IQ, we subsequently employ Interactive Side Mixture-of-Experts (ISMoE) to scaling up side networks without sacrificing overall memory efficiency. Different from conventional mixture-of-experts, ISMoE learns to select optimal experts by interacting with salient features from frozen backbones, thus suppressing knowledge forgetting and boosting performance. Extensive experiments across diverse vision-language and language-only tasks demonstrate that MP-ISMoE remarkably promotes accuracy compared to state-of-the-art METL approaches, while maintaining comparable parameter and memory efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合精度交互式侧边混合专家框架，在保持内存高效的同时提升迁移学习性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 参数高效迁移学习虽减少可训练参数，但反向传播导致内存开销大；内存高效迁移学习通过侧边网络避免骨干梯度计算，但内存限制严重制约侧边网络容量，导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在严格内存约束下扩展侧边网络容量，同时保持内存效率和性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MP-ISMoE框架，包含高斯噪声扰动迭代量化（GNP-IQ）将权重量化为低位并减少量化误差，以及交互式侧边混合专家（ISMoE）通过冻结骨干的显著特征选择最优专家，抑制知识遗忘。
contributions: 提出GNP-IQ方案，实现低位量化并降低量化误差，节省内存。
提出ISMoE，利用冻结骨干的显著特征交互选择专家，扩展侧边网络容量而不增加内存。
analysis.experiments: 在多种视觉-语言和纯语言任务上，MP-ISMoE相比最先进的内存高效迁移学习方法显著提升准确率，同时保持可比的参数和内存效率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定骨干网络结构。
量化方案可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合精度交互式侧边混合专家框架，在保持内存高效的同时提升迁移学习性能。

papers.title: Structured Progressive Knowledge Activation for LLM-Driven Neural Architecture Search
papers.abstract: This paper focuses on a key challenge in Neural Architecture Search (NAS): integrating established architectural knowledge while exploring new designs under expensive evaluations. Large language models (LLMs) are a promising assistant for NAS because they can translate rich architectural and coding priors into executable code edits. However, in practice, seemingly local revisions often propagate into non-local behavioral and performance shifts because a single edit can inadvertently couple multiple interacting functional factors, a phenomenon we refer to as functional entanglement. To make LLM knowledge usable under such entanglement, we propose Structured Progressive Knowledge Activation (SPARK), which activates relevant priors by explicitly selecting the functional factor to modify and conditioning the edit on that factor. This factor-conditioned editing reduces entangled side effects and yields more targeted, reliable architecture modifications. On CLRS-DFS, SPARK achieves a 28.1x sample-efficient architecture evolution speedup and yields a 22.9 percent relative improvement in OOD accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化渐进知识激活（SPARK）方法，通过因子条件编辑解决LLM驱动神经架构搜索中的功能纠缠问题，显著提升样本效率和OOD准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经架构搜索（NAS）面临整合已有架构知识与探索新设计之间的挑战，且评估成本高昂。LLM虽能利用丰富的架构和编码先验，但局部编辑常导致非局部行为变化（功能纠缠），限制了知识有效利用。
analysis.problem: LLM驱动的NAS中，局部编辑因功能纠缠导致不可预测的性能偏移，需要一种方法使LLM知识在纠缠条件下仍能可靠地修改架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到功能纠缠现象：看似局部的编辑会因耦合多个交互功能因子而传播为非局部行为与性能变化。
analysis.method: 提出SPARK，通过显式选择要修改的功能因子并基于该因子条件化编辑，实现因子条件编辑，减少纠缠副作用，产生更精准可靠的架构修改。
contributions: 识别并形式化LLM驱动NAS中的功能纠缠问题
提出SPARK方法，通过因子条件编辑激活相关先验知识，实现高效架构演化
analysis.experiments: 在CLRS-DFS基准上，SPARK实现28.1倍样本效率的架构演化加速，并提升22.9%的OOD准确率。
limitations: 方法可能依赖功能因子的正确识别与选择
实验仅在单一基准上验证，泛化性需进一步评估
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化渐进知识激活（SPARK）方法，通过因子条件编辑解决LLM驱动神经架构搜索中的功能纠缠问题，显著提升样本效率和OOD准确率。

papers.title: Transformation Categorization Based on Group Decomposition Theory Using Parameter Division
papers.abstract: Representation learning seeks meaningful sensory representations without supervision and can model aspects of human development. Although many neural networks empirically learn useful features, a principled account of what makes a representation "good" remains elusive. We study unsupervised categorization of transformations between pairs of inputs under algebraic constraints. Classical disentanglement favors mutually independent factors and fails when factors are coupled. Our prior Galois-theoretic approach decomposes a group via normal subgroups by learning a product of two transformations with one factor constrained to a normal subgroup, covering both commutative and non-commutative cases. That method, however, relied on auxiliary assumptions (e.g., motion and isometry restrictions) not required by decomposition theory, and ablations did not separate theory-based from auxiliary effects. We propose parameter division for a single transformation: we split its parameter into components, impose homomorphism constraints mapping the full transformation to one component, and identify the normal subgroup as the set of transformations when that component is fixed to the identity. This formulation drops the previous auxiliary assumptions and applies more broadly. We evaluate on image pairs involving rotation, translation, and scale; ablations show that group-decomposition constraints drive appropriate categorization.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于参数划分的群分解理论，无需辅助假设即可对变换进行无监督分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 无监督表征学习缺乏对“好”表征的原则性解释，现有解耦方法在因子耦合时失效，且基于Galois理论的方法依赖辅助假设。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖辅助假设的情况下，对成对输入之间的变换进行无监督分类，并识别出变换群中的正规子群。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将单个变换的参数划分为多个分量，施加同态约束将完整变换映射到其中一个分量，并将正规子群定义为该分量固定为单位元时的变换集合。
contributions: 提出参数划分方法，消除了先前Galois方法所需的辅助假设（如运动和等距限制）。
在旋转、平移和缩放图像对上验证了群分解约束能够驱动正确的变换分类。
analysis.experiments: 在包含旋转、平移和缩放的图像对上进行评估，消融实验表明群分解约束驱动了适当的分类。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有群结构的变换。
未在更复杂或高维数据上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于参数划分的群分解理论，无需辅助假设即可对变换进行无监督分类。

papers.title: The Reasoning Trap: An Information-Theoretic Bound on Closed-System Multi-Step LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: When copies of the same language model are prompted to debate, they produce diverse phrasings of one perspective rather than diverse perspectives. Multi-agent debate (MAD), and more broadly closed-system reasoning where agents iteratively transform each other's outputs, tends to preserve answer accuracy while degrading the reasoning behind those answers. We name the multi-agent case the Debate Trap and the broader phenomenon the Reasoning Trap, offering a programmatic theory of evidence-grounded reasoning this http URL framework has three parts: (i) SFS (Supported Faithfulness Score), a claim-level metric verifying decomposed atomic claims against provided evidence (decomposer-invariant rankings: Spearman rho=1.0); (ii) EGSR (Evidence-Grounded Socratic Reasoning), replacing adversarial argumentation with evidence-grounded inquiry; (iii) Theorem 1 (DPI Bound): under standard MAD, the chain E -> O^0 -> O^1 -> ... is Markov, and the Data Processing Inequality implies E[I(E;O^{t+1})] <= E[I(E;O^t)]. Three companion results -- open-system recovery (Theorem 2), EGSR accumulation (Lemma 2), and vote-aggregation floor (Proposition 1) -- partition multi-step LLM reasoning by its information-theoretic relationship to E. Across 16 conditions on SciFact (300 claims) and FEVER (1,000 claims), DebateCV (C13) preserves 88% of baseline accuracy while SFS drops 43%; majority-vote MAD (C15) reduces SFS to 1.7% of baseline (p < 10^{-6}, d = -0.96); EGSR recovers 98%. An R6 cohort study (Korean n=10x30 FEVER; English n=3x200 SciFact) finds inter-rater Fleiss kappa <= +0.018 with 0.8-1.4 Likert intra-rater shifts across language and domain -- the human agreement that faithfulness metrics have been calibrated against is not itself stable. We offer one falsifiable conjecture: any closed-system reasoning protocol preserving Theorem 1's Markov structure is, in expectation, subject to the same DPI bound.

analysis.tldr: 多步LLM推理存在信息论下界，封闭系统会损害推理忠实度，而开放系统可恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体辩论等封闭系统推理中，模型输出趋于同质化，导致推理质量下降，但缺乏理论解释。
analysis.problem: 量化并解释封闭系统多步LLM推理中推理忠实度退化的现象，并提出改进方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 封闭系统推理（如多智能体辩论）中，模型输出多样性不足，推理忠实度（SFS）显著下降，而准确率保持较高；人类标注者自身对忠实度的判断也不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出SFS指标、EGSR推理框架，并基于数据加工不等式证明封闭系统推理的信息论下界（DPI Bound）。
contributions: 提出SFS（Supported Faithfulness Score）指标，用于评估推理忠实度，并证明其分解器不变性。
提出EGSR（Evidence-Grounded Socratic Reasoning）框架，用证据引导的询问替代对抗性辩论。
证明封闭系统推理的DPI Bound，并给出开放系统恢复、EGSR累积等理论结果。
analysis.experiments: 在SciFact（300 claims）和FEVER（1000 claims）上进行了16种条件实验，包括DebateCV、多数投票MAD和EGSR；人类评估涉及韩语和英语的R6队列研究。
limitations: 理论结果基于马尔可夫假设，可能不适用于所有推理协议。
SFS指标依赖分解器，实际应用中可能受分解质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多步LLM推理存在信息论下界，封闭系统会损害推理忠实度，而开放系统可恢复。

papers.title: Modeling Subjective Urban Perception with Human Gaze
papers.abstract: Urban perception describes how people subjectively evaluate urban environments, shaping how cities are experienced and understood. Existing computational approaches primarily model urban perception directly from street view images, but largely ignore the human perceptual process through which such judgments are formed. In this paper, we introduce Place Pulse-Gaze, an urban perception dataset that augments street view images with synchronized eye-tracking recordings and individual perception labels. Based on this dataset, we propose a Gaze-Guided Urban Perception Framework to study how gaze behavior contributes to the modeling of subjective urban perception. The framework systematically investigates three complementary settings: gaze-only modeling, gaze fusion with explicit semantic scene representations, and gaze fusion with implicit richer visual representations. Experiments show that gaze alone already carries useful predictive signals for subjective urban perception, and that integrating gaze with scene representations further improves prediction under both semantic and richer visual representations. Overall, our findings highlight the importance of incorporating human perceptual processes into urban scene understanding and open a direction for gaze-guided multimodal urban computing.

analysis.tldr: 引入眼动追踪数据构建城市感知数据集，提出注视引导框架提升主观城市感知建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有城市感知建模方法直接使用街景图像，忽略了人类通过注视形成主观判断的感知过程，缺乏对感知机制的建模。
analysis.problem: 如何利用人类注视行为数据来改进主观城市感知的预测模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出注视引导的城市感知框架，包含三种设置：仅注视建模、注视与显式语义场景表示融合、注视与隐式丰富视觉表示融合。
contributions: 构建了Place Pulse-Gaze数据集，包含街景图像、同步眼动追踪记录和个体感知标签。
提出Gaze-Guided Urban Perception Framework，系统研究注视行为对主观城市感知建模的贡献。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明仅注视即可携带有效预测信号，融合注视与场景表示能进一步提升预测性能。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，泛化性需验证。
框架依赖眼动追踪设备，实际应用成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 引入眼动追踪数据构建城市感知数据集，提出注视引导框架提升主观城市感知建模。

papers.title: Interpreting Manifolds and Graph Neural Embeddings from Internet of Things Traffic Flows
papers.abstract: The rapid expansion of Internet of Things (IoT) ecosystems has led to increasingly complex and heterogeneous network topologies. Traditional network monitoring and visualization tools rely on aggregated metrics or static representations, which fail to capture the evolving relationships and structural dependencies between devices. Although Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) offer a powerful way to learn from relational data, their internal representations often remain opaque and difficult to interpret for security-critical operations. Consequently, this work introduces an interpretable pipeline that generates directly visualizable low-dimensional representations by mapping high-dimensional embeddings onto a latent manifold. This projection enables the interpretable monitoring and interoperability of evolving network states, while integrated feature attribution techniques decode the specific characteristics shaping the manifold structure. The framework achieves a classification F1-score of 0.830 for intrusion detection while also highlighting phenomena such as concept drift. Ultimately, the presented approach bridges the gap between high-dimensional GNN embeddings and human-understandable network behavior, offering new insights for network administrators and security analysts.

analysis.tldr: 提出可解释管道，将GNN嵌入映射到低维流形，实现IoT流量可视化和入侵检测。
analysis.research_motivation: IoT网络拓扑复杂异构，传统监控工具依赖聚合指标或静态表示，无法捕捉设备间演化关系和结构依赖；GNN内部表示不透明，难以用于安全关键操作。
analysis.problem: 如何将高维GNN嵌入转化为可解释、可可视化的低维表示，以支持IoT网络监控和入侵检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建可解释管道，将高维GNN嵌入映射到潜在流形，生成可直接可视化的低维表示，并集成特征归因技术解码塑造流形结构的特定特征。
contributions: 提出将GNN嵌入映射到可解释低维流形的管道，实现网络状态的可视化监控。
集成特征归因技术，解码流形结构的关键特征，提升可解释性。
在入侵检测任务上达到0.830的F1分数，并揭示概念漂移现象。
analysis.experiments: 在入侵检测任务上评估，F1分数为0.830。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的IoT网络拓扑。
未提及在更大规模或更复杂网络上的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可解释管道，将GNN嵌入映射到低维流形，实现IoT流量可视化和入侵检测。

papers.title: Learning Reconstructive Embeddings in Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces via the Representer Theorem
papers.abstract: Motivated by the growing interest in representation learning approaches that uncover the latent structure of high-dimensional data, this work proposes new algorithms for reconstruction-based manifold learning within Reproducing-Kernel Hilbert Spaces (RKHS). Each observation is first reconstructed as a linear combination of the other samples in the RKHS, by optimizing a vector form of the Representer Theorem for their autorepresentation property. A separable operator-valued kernel extends the formulation to vector-valued data while retaining the simplicity of a single scalar similarity function. A subsequent kernel-alignment task projects the data into a lower-dimensional latent space whose Gram matrix aims to match the high-dimensional reconstruction kernel, thus transferring the auto-reconstruction geometry of the RKHS to the embedding. Therefore, the proposed algorithms represent an extended approach to the autorepresentation property, exhibited by many natural data, by using and adapting well-known results of Kernel Learning Theory. Numerical experiments on both simulated (concentric circles and swiss-roll) and real (cancer molecular activity and IoT network intrusions) datasets provide empirical evidence of the practical effectiveness of the proposed approach.

analysis.tldr: 利用再生核希尔伯特空间中的表示定理，提出基于重构的流形学习算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维数据中潜在结构的无监督学习需求日益增长，现有方法在捕捉非线性几何结构方面存在局限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用RKHS中的表示定理设计基于重构的流形学习算法，以有效提取高维数据的低维嵌入。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在RKHS中通过优化表示定理的向量形式获得样本的自表示重构系数，然后通过核对齐任务将高维重构核的几何结构转移到低维潜在空间。
contributions: 提出基于RKHS表示定理的重构流形学习算法。
引入可分离算子值核以处理向量值数据。
通过核对齐实现低维嵌入，保留高维重构几何。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟数据集（同心圆、瑞士卷）和真实数据集（癌症分子活性、物联网网络入侵）上进行了数值实验，验证了方法的有效性。
limitations: 可能对核函数选择敏感。
大规模数据上的计算效率未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用再生核希尔伯特空间中的表示定理，提出基于重构的流形学习算法。

papers.title: A large language model-type architecture for high-dimensional molecular potential energy surfaces
papers.abstract: Computing high-dimensional potential energy surfaces for molecular systems and materials is considered to be a great challenge in computational chemistry with potential impact in a range of areas including the fundamental prediction of reaction rates. In this paper, we design and discuss an algorithm that has similarities to large language models in generative AI and natural language processing. Specifically, we represent a molecular system as a graph which contains a set of nodes, edges, faces, etc. Interactions between these sets, which represent molecular subsystems in our case, are used to construct the potential energy surface for a reasonably sized chemical system with 51 nuclear dimensions. For this purpose, a family of neural networks that pertain to the graph-theoretically obtained subsystems get the job done for this 51 nuclear dimensional system. We then ask if this same family of lower-dimensional graph-based neural networks can be transformed to provide accurate predictions for a 186-dimensional potential energy surface. We find that our algorithm does provide accurate results for this larger-dimensional problem with sub-kcal/mol accuracy for the higher-dimensional potential energy surface problem. Indeed, as a result of these developments, here we produce the first efforts towards a full-dimensional potential energy surface for the protonated 21-water cluster (186 nuclear dimensions) at CCSD level accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 借鉴大语言模型架构，用图神经网络构建高维分子势能面，实现186维体系亚kcal/mol精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维分子势能面计算是计算化学的重大挑战，对反应速率预测等有重要影响，但传统方法难以处理高维系统。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地构建高维分子系统的势能面。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将分子系统表示为包含节点、边、面等的图，利用图论分解为子系统，对每个子系统训练神经网络，组合构建势能面。
contributions: 提出一种类似大语言模型的图神经网络架构用于高维分子势能面构建。
首次实现质子化21水团簇（186核维度）在CCSD级别精度的全维势能面。
analysis.experiments: 在51维和186维分子系统上验证，186维体系达到亚kcal/mol精度。
limitations: 方法可能依赖于分子系统的图表示质量。
扩展到更大体系时计算成本可能增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 借鉴大语言模型架构，用图神经网络构建高维分子势能面，实现186维体系亚kcal/mol精度。

papers.title: Analogy between Boltzmann machines and Feynman path integrals
papers.abstract: We provide a detailed exposition of the connections between Boltzmann machines commonly utilized in machine learning problems and the ideas already well known in quantum statistical mechanics through Feynman's description of the same. We find that this equivalence allows the interpretation that the hidden layers in Boltzmann machines and other neural network formalisms are in fact discrete versions of path elements that are present within the Feynman path-integral formalism. Since Feynman paths are the natural and elegant depiction of interference phenomena germane to quantum mechanics, it appears that in machine learning, the goal is to find an appropriate combination of ``paths'', along with accumulated path-weights, through a network that cumulatively capture the correct $x \rightarrow y$ map for a given mathematical problem. As a direct consequence of this analysis, we are able to provide general quantum circuit models that are applicable to both Boltzmann machines and to Feynman path integral descriptions. Connections are also made to inverse quantum scattering problems which allow a robust way to define ``interpretable'' hidden layers.

analysis.tldr: 揭示玻尔兹曼机与费曼路径积分之间的深层数学等价性，并据此提出通用量子电路模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索机器学习中玻尔兹曼机与量子统计力学中费曼路径积分之间的内在联系，为理解神经网络隐藏层提供新的物理视角，并推动量子计算与机器学习的交叉。
analysis.problem: 如何建立玻尔兹曼机与费曼路径积分之间的形式化等价关系，并利用这种等价性设计量子电路模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式。
analysis.method: 通过数学推导建立玻尔兹曼机隐藏层与费曼路径积分中路径元素的离散对应，并基于此构造通用量子电路模型，同时联系逆量子散射问题以定义可解释的隐藏层。
contributions: 揭示了玻尔兹曼机与费曼路径积分之间的等价性，将隐藏层解释为离散的路径元素。
提出了适用于玻尔兹曼机和费曼路径积分描述的通用量子电路模型。
建立了与逆量子散射问题的联系，为定义可解释隐藏层提供了新途径。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论推导为主，缺乏实验验证。
量子电路模型的实际实现可能面临硬件限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示玻尔兹曼机与费曼路径积分之间的深层数学等价性，并据此提出通用量子电路模型。
